entries.name: Hail of Hammers
entries.description_text: Reduces the cast time of Crush by -25 % .

entries.name: Efficient Killer
entries.description_text: Reduces the Energy cost of your spells and abilities by -10 % .

entries.name: Brutal Swing
entries.description_text: Your next attack causes you to swing violently at an enemy and up to 2 nearby enemies, dealing 120 % Weapon Damage plus 10 .

entries.name: Battering Ram
entries.description_text: Increases your Armor penetration by 10 % while wielding a two-handed mace or axe.

entries.name: Brutal Spirit
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of your Spirit spells by 25 % .

entries.name: Reckful
entries.description_text: Your Smash now has a 30 % chance to not trigger a cooldown.

entries.name: Steel Fury
entries.description_text: Dealing damage with Storm of Steel increases the damage of its subsequent strikes by 4 % , stacking 10 times. In addition, the duration of Storm of Steel is increased by 2.5 sec.

entries.name: Ancestral Trauma
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Ancestral Strike and Crush now scales with your Strength.

entries.name: Crush
entries.description_text: Crush enemies in a frontal cone, dealing 250 % Weapon Damage plus 30 , knocking them down briefly and stunning them for 3 seconds.

entries.name: Symbol of the Warspear
entries.description_text: You are marked by the Warspear symbol, granting 10 % increased attack power to party and raid members. Does not stack with similar effects. In addition, reduces the cooldown of Spears by -2 sec.

entries.name: Whirling Assault
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Whirling Advance by 300 % on enemies above 80% health.

entries.name: Steelslinger
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Barbaric Whirl by -2 sec and increases its damage dealt by 100 % on enemies below 35% health.

entries.name: Storm of Steel
entries.description_text: Begin striking your target every 1 sec for 80 % Weapon Damage for 3 seconds.

entries.name: Rancor
entries.description_text: Your Brutal Swing now triggers an additional auto attack on the primary target.

entries.name: Reckless Movements
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Ancestral Strike and Barbaric Whirl by 20 % .

entries.name: Overkill
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of Decapitate and Headhunter's Spear by 30 % against targets below 20% health.

entries.name: Spiked Weapons
entries.description_text: Increases the critical damage of Crush , Brutal Swing , and Decapitate by 20 % .

entries.name: Mounting Fury
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Born in Blood by 2 sec.

entries.name: Horde Breaker
entries.description_text: Your Crush is now guaranteed to critically strike enemies affected by Headbutt and it now applies Wounded to enemies for 10 seconds. Wounded (Proc) Increases Physical Damage taken by 4 % for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Utter Devastation
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Maximum Carnage by 1 sec and it now grants Utter Devastation for 6 seconds. Utter Devastation Instantly removes all movement impairing effects, increases your movement speed by 25 % , and makes you immune to slows. Can be consumed by Decapitate or Crush to guarantee them to critically strike.

entries.name: Sustaining Swings
entries.description_text: Melee attacks now have an 8 % chance to heal you for 10 % of the damage dealt and cause your next Ancestral Strike to deal 50 % increased damage.

entries.name: Pure Power
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Smash by 15 % and your expertise by 5 .

entries.name: Beheader
entries.description_text: Scoring a kill blow with Decapitate now refunds 100% of your maximum Energy.

entries.name: Bloody Fighter
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of Brutal Swing and Smash by 5 % .

entries.name: Anger Issues
entries.description_text: Scoring a critical strike against an enemy now reduces the cooldown of Carnage by -4 sec.

entries.name: Headlopper
entries.description_text: Your critical strikes with Decapitate now cause the enemy to bleed, dealing an additional 30% of the damage dealt over 5 seconds.

entries.name: Incredibly Strong
entries.description_text: Removes the minimum range from Maiming Spear , but reduces its maximum range by -5 yds.

entries.name: Excessive Power
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive Increases your maximum Energy by 100 % .

entries.name: Decapitate
entries.description_text: Attempt to decapitate an injured enemy, dealing 165 % Weapon Damage plus 15 , and converting each extra point of Energy to deal additional damage (up to a maximum cost of 100 Energy). Only usable on enemies below 35% health.

entries.name: Maximum Carnage
entries.description_text: Casting Unbridled Rage now causes you to begin swinging your weapon around you dealing 47 + 25% AP Physical damage to up to 5 nearby enemies over 5 seconds.

entries.name: Thirst for Battle
entries.description_text: Your Smash now regenerate 25 % of your maximum Energy.

entries.name: Killing Spree
entries.description_text: Charge at an enemy, dealing 25 + 30% AP Physical damage. Can only be used within 6 seconds of scoring a killing blow or applying Born in Blood .

entries.name: Giant Tosser
entries.description_text: Your Headhunter's Spear now generates 50 % additional Energy when you strike an enemy that is at least 20 yds away.

entries.name: Savage
entries.description_text: Unbridled Rage now also increases your critical damage by 10 % .

entries.name: Power Swings
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Crush by -5 sec.

entries.name: Crusher
entries.description_text: Melee auto attacks now have a 10 % chance to reset the cooldown of Crush .

entries.name: Ogre's Strength
entries.description_text: Level 40 Passive Increases your attack power by 30 % of your Strength.

entries.name: Relentless
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Critical strikes with Ancestral Strike and Brutal Swing now refund 10 Energy.

entries.name: Body Builder
entries.description_text: Level 50 Passive You now gain 1 Strength for every 3 Agility and your size is increased by 5 % .

entries.name: Savage
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Born in Blood now also increases your damage dealt by 5 % and its duration is increased by 3 sec.

entries.name: Spite
entries.description_text: Quickly unleash 3 Berserker Throws at your target and then fling yourself back a great distance, dealing 125 % Ranged Weapon Damage, scaling with modifiers to Berserker Axe .

entries.name: Brutal Form
entries.description_text: Increases the tick rate of Born in Blood by -25 % , allows its healing to scale with your Agility, and it can now critically heal you.

entries.name: Axe Twirling
entries.description_text: Display mastery over throwing weapons for 10 seconds, causing Throw Weapon , Gutspiller , and Berserker Axe to strike 2 additional nearby enemies.

entries.name: Power Tosser
entries.description_text: Level 50 Passive Damage dealt by Throw Weapon now scales with your Agility.

entries.name: Spear Thrower
entries.description_text: Level 30 Passive Casting Throw Weapon now has a 30 % chance to reset the cooldown of your Spears .

entries.name: Berserker Axe
entries.description_text: Requires Enraged 3 Charges, 8 sec recharge Hurl two axes at an enemy, each dealing 16 + 40% ranged AP Physical damage and reducing enemy armor by 80 for 8 seconds.

entries.name: Legacy of the Amani
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by your Spears now has a 25 % chance to cause you to quickly throw an additional spear that strikes for 40 % of the damage dealt.

entries.name: Berserker
entries.description_text: While enraged, your ranged critical strikes now grant you Berserker . Once applied it cannot be applied again. Berserker Your ranged abilities have a 20 % chance to unleash Berserker Throw , dealing 75 % Ranged Weapon Damage. Lasts 15 seconds. While active, every offensive ranged ability used increases its chance to trigger by 2 % .

entries.name: Raging Spirit
entries.description_text: Casting Unbridled Rage now grants you 30 Energy and it now also removes the Energy cost of your Spirit spells while active.

entries.name: Vengeance For Zul'jin
entries.description_text: Casting Berserker Rush now grants you Born in Blood . Born in Blood Battle fuels your vitality, restoring 18 health and 12 Energy over 3 seconds.

entries.name: Barbed Spear
entries.description_text: Throw a heavy spear with precision at an enemy, dealing 160 % Ranged Weapon Damage plus 37 , and reducing their healing received by -30 % for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Payback
entries.description_text: Increases the damage dealt by your Guts Spilled by 75 % .

entries.name: Headhunting
entries.description_text: Reduces the cast time of Throw Weapon by -20 % and removes your spell pushback suffered from taking damage.

entries.name: Manhunter
entries.description_text: Increases critical strike chance of all party and raid members by 3 % . Does not stack with similar effects. In addition, increases your damage dealt by 10 % against Humanoids.

entries.name: Skullseeker
entries.description_text: Increases your critical strike chance against enemies above 80% health by 25 % .

entries.name: Gutspiller
entries.description_text: Launch a heavy axe at an enemy, causing them to bleed for 96 damage over 12 seconds. Every 6 sec the target has their Guts Spilled , causing them to bleed out for an additional 71 + 40% ranged AP damage.

entries.name: Guts Splatter
entries.description_text: Your Gutspiller now allows your abilities to ignore 10 % of the enemy's Armor.

entries.name: Time To Kill!
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Axe Twirling by -15 sec.

entries.name: No Survivors
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Axe Twirling , Maiming Spear , and Barbed Spear by 5 sec.

entries.name: Furious Berserker
entries.description_text: Critical strikes with Barbed Spear now grants Born in Blood . Born in Blood Battle fuels your vitality, restoring 18 health and 12 Energy over 3 seconds.

entries.name: Bloody Fighter
entries.description_text: Level 40 Passive Born in Blood now stacks 1 additional time.

entries.name: Strong Arm
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Spears by 15 % and your hit chance by 3 % .

entries.name: Vital Spirit
entries.description_text: Increases the range of your Spirit spells by 10 yds.

entries.name: Berserker Rush
entries.description_text: Charge an enemy dealing 31 + 35% ranged AP Physical damage and rooting them for 2 seconds, then leap backwards.

entries.name: Headhunter
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive Reduces the Energy cost of Throw Weapon , Maiming Spear , and Whirling Advance by -15 .

entries.name: Puncture Wounds
entries.description_text: Critical strikes with Spears now causes enemies to bleed for 633 + 16.5% ranged AP over 6 seconds.

entries.name: Hunting for Sport
entries.description_text: While Unbridled Rage is active, your attacks now ignore 20 % of the target's Armor.

entries.name: You Want Axe?
entries.description_text: While enraged, casting Spears now refreshes 3 charges of Berserker Axe and your next 3 casts cost -50 % less Energy. Lasts 12 seconds.

entries.name: Spear Shards
entries.description_text: Whenever you shatter your Impaling Spear , affected enemies bleed for 100% of the damage dealt over 3 seconds.

entries.name: Gurubashi Technique
entries.description_text: Casting Throw Weapon now has a 25 % chance to transform your next cast of it within 8 seconds into Rapid Throw . Rapid Throw Throw your ranged weapon 3 times in quick succession, each dealing 50 % Ranged Weapon Damage plus 25 Physical damage. Grants Born in Blood . Scales with damage modifiers to Throw Weapon .

entries.name: Gruesome
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Throw Weapon , Gutspiller , and Guts Spilled by 10 % .

entries.name: Sen'jin's Guidance
entries.description_text: Transforms your Throw Weapon into Javelin Toss and increases the critical strike chance of Javelin Toss by 5 % . Javelin Toss Take aim and hurl a javelin at an enemy dealing 160 % Ranged Weapon Damage plus 241 . Scales with damage modifiers to Throw Weapon and Spears . Usable while moving.

entries.name: Entrails
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by bleed effects now increases your Agility by 1 % for 8 seconds, stacking 10 times.

entries.name: Frothing Savage
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of Spears and Berserker Axe by 8 % against bleeding targets.

entries.name: Deep Fury
entries.description_text: Direct Physical damage dealt now reduces the cooldown of Unbridled Rage by -1 sec.

entries.name: To The Bone
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of Guts Spilled by 10 % and it now applies Break to the target and critically striking with it will apply an additional stack. Break Break an enemy's defenses, reducing their armor by -4 % for 20 seconds, stacking 5 times.

entries.name: Impaling Spear
entries.description_text: Hurl a spear in a 30 yd frontal line, dealing 131 % Ranged Weapon Damage plus 23 , dealing less damage with each enemy struck. At the spear's impact location the spear shatters, dealing 277 + 15% ranged AP Physical damage to nearby enemies.

entries.name: Fill Level
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive Grants you Fill Level and the ability to manipulate a Tankard . Fill Level You have a magical Tankard that fills up over time, granting you 1 stack of Fill Level every 2 sec. Some of your other abilities empty your Tankard to trigger with a reduced cooldown.

entries.name: Frost Giant's Fury
entries.description_text: Casting Breath of the North now grants you 10 % melee attack speed, plus an additional 20 % when using a two-handed weapon, for 8 seconds.

entries.name: Fury of the North
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of the enrage effect from your Ramhorn Rage by 6 sec and causes it to increase your movement speed by 40 % for its duration.

entries.name: Clanlord's Totem
entries.description_text: Drop the Clanlord's Totem at the target location where it will remain for 15 seconds. The totem emanates an aura for 15 seconds, causing allied players within 100 yds to deal 35% AP additional damage as Frost damage when they deal direct damage and gain 50 % increased honor. Applies Exhaustion , preventing you from benefiting from similar effects for 1 minute.

entries.name: Frozen Tankard
entries.description_text: Throw one of your extra tankards at an enemy, dealing 107 Frost damage and stunning them for 4 seconds. Stunned enemies are considered Frozen .

entries.name: Breaking Morale
entries.description_text: Reduces the Energy cost of Break by -15 .

entries.name: Tavern Brawl!
entries.description_text: Enrage all nearby allies, increasing their haste by 30 % for 20 seconds. After being affected by this spell, allies cannot benefit from similar effects for 5 minutes.

entries.name: Keg Smash
entries.description_text: Smash an enemy for 21 + 15% AP Physical damage, plus an additional 17 + 25% AP Frost damage to up to 5 nearby enemies.

entries.name: Frozen Blades
entries.description_text: Critical strikes now grant party and raid members 5 % critical strike chance for 8 seconds. Does not stack with similar effects.

entries.name: To The Bone
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Breath of the North now reduces enemies' resistances by 75 and increases their Magic damage taken by -2 % for 8 seconds.

entries.name: Ancestral Wisdom
entries.description_text: Increases chance to hit with all spells and attacks by 1 % for you and party and raid members. Does not stack with similar effects.

entries.name: Thane's Grip
entries.description_text: Allows you to wield a Two-Handed Axe, Mace, or Sword in each hand, but reduces your Physical Damage dealt by -8 % .

entries.name: Crystal Enhancements
entries.description_text: You now emanate an aura around you, increasing the Armor of party and raid members by 390 . Does not stack with similar effects.

entries.name: Rally Behind Me!
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Warband by 3 sec. In addition, your first use of Warband will incur no cooldown. Can only occur once every 1.5 min.

entries.name: Ale of The God-King
entries.description_text: Empower your Honored Ancestor 's melee attacks to deal additional Frost damage scaling with your attack power. Lasts for 20 seconds. This ability consumes Fill Level stacks and triggers a reduced cooldown based on stacks consumed.

entries.name: Blind Stupor
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Keg Smash now reduces enemies' casting speed by -30 % for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Uniting Voice
entries.description_text: Casting Ancestral Roar now increases haste of party and raid members by 5 % for 20 seconds. Does not stack with similar effects. Critical strikes extend the duration of the buff by 1 sec.

entries.name: Frostbite
entries.description_text: Breath of The North now causes the target to bleed for an additional 30% of its damage over 6 seconds as Frost damage.

entries.name: Trip to the Alehouse
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Keg Smash by 10 % and its range by 3 yds.

entries.name: Drinking Frenzy
entries.description_text: Your melee attacks now have a 15 % chance to grant a stack of Fill Level . In addition, your chance to hit is increased by 5 % .

entries.name: Ancestor's Fury
entries.description_text: Unbridled Rage now also increases your Frost damage by 10 % .

entries.name: Icebound Ancestry
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of Breath of the North by 10 % . In addition, your attacks now ignore Armor against Frozen targets.

entries.name: The Finest Ale
entries.description_text: Your Ale of The God-King no longer empties your Tankard .

entries.name: Hodir's Revenge
entries.description_text: Enemies damaged by your Frozen Tankard now take 50 % increased damage from you for 6 seconds.

entries.name: Liquid Courage
entries.description_text: Each Fill Level stack now reduces your damage taken by -2 % .

entries.name: Drunken Frenzy
entries.description_text: Unbridled Rage now increases your Honored Ancestor 's Physical damage by 15 % for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Breath of The North
entries.description_text: Unleashes a frost breath, dealing 31 + 20% AP Frost damage to enemies in a 12 yd cone and slowing them by -30 % for 5 seconds. Can only be used after emptying your Tankard .

entries.name: Rage of the North
entries.description_text: Increases the amount of attacks that can trigger your Ale of The God-King by 10 .

entries.name: Ancestral Spirit
entries.description_text: Reduces the Energy cost of your Spirit spells and increases the duration of your Shouts by -50 % .

entries.name: The Spins
entries.description_text: Casting Keg Smash now causes your Honored Ancestor to perform an Ancestral Whirl attack upon nearby enemies.

entries.name: Might of Utgarde
entries.description_text: Attacks from your Ancestral Combat now heal your Honored Ancestor for 5 % maximum health and cause it to perform an Ancestral Whirl attack.

entries.name: War Cry
entries.description_text: Unleash a blood curdling war cry, increasing melee and ranged attack speed by 20 % , and attack power by 150 of allies within 25 yds for 20 seconds. Allies cannot benefit from this spell again for 5 minutes.

entries.name: Ancestral Combat
entries.description_text: Empower yourself, granting your Physical damage dealt a 25 % chance to trigger an additional main hand attack as Frost damage on your target and grant a stack of Fill Level . Lasts until triggered 20 times.

entries.name: Improved Ancestral Combat
entries.description_text: Reduces the Energy cost of your Ancestral Combat by -10 and allows it to trigger 3 additional times.

entries.name: Ice Cold Bubbles
entries.description_text: Each Fill Level stack now also increases Frost damage dealt by 2 % .

entries.name: Unified Rage
entries.description_text: Your Unbridled Rage now increases your chance to trigger Ancestral Combat by 25 % .

entries.name: Cold Brew
entries.description_text: Critical strikes with Frost damage now generate a stack of Fill Level . Can only occur once per sec.

entries.name: Cheers!
entries.description_text: Designate an ally as your drinking partner for 30 minutes, reducing all damage they take by -5 % , and causing 10 % of all damage they take to be redirected to you. You can only have 1 ally designated at a time.

entries.name: Splash Zone
entries.description_text: Share a drink from your Tankard with all party and raid members, granting 95 increased attack or spell power for 15 seconds. Does not stack with similar effects.

entries.name: Ancestor's Call
entries.description_text: Teaches you Ancestor's Call . Ancestor's Call (Troll) Call an Honored Ancestor to aid you in battle until dismissed that scales with your Agility and attack power. Whenever you use Barbaric Whirl or Whirling Advance , your Honored Ancestor mimics it.

entries.name: Thane's Guard
entries.description_text: Gain the Shield proficiency and while wearing a shield you gain 40 % increased attack speed and 100 % increased Armor contribution from your shield.

entries.name: Ancestral Fury
entries.description_text: Emanate a powerful aura, granting 10 % increased melee and ranged haste to party and raid members within 100 yds. Does not stack with similar effects.

entries.name: Jawbreaker
entries.description_text: Attempt to break an enemy's jaw, interrupting them and preventing any spell from that school from being cast for 4 seconds.

entries.name: Headhunter's Spear
entries.description_text: Hurl a light spear at an enemy dealing 140 % Ranged Weapon Damage plus 21 and restores 30 % of your maximum Energy.

entries.name: First Blood
entries.description_text: Increases all damage dealt to enemies above 80% health by 20 % .

entries.name: Face Smasher
entries.description_text: Your ability critical strikes now reduce the cooldown of your Battle Vigor and Thick Skull by -1 sec.

entries.name: Bellowing Voice
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of your Shouts by 20 % .

entries.name: Savage Strength
entries.description_text: Increases your Agility by 5 % .

entries.name: Athleticism
entries.description_text: Increases your Energy regeneration by 25 % .

entries.name: Unrelenting
entries.description_text: Increases your Physical damage dealt and taken by 5 % .

entries.name: Iron Gut
entries.description_text: Reduces the duration of poison effects on you by -40 % .

entries.name: Dauntless
entries.description_text: Dealing damage with Whirling Advance now dispels 1 movement slowing effect from you and refunds 2 Energy.

entries.name: Rapid Recovery
entries.description_text: Your Onslaught 's effect now occurs -50 % faster.

entries.name: Blood and Glory
entries.description_text: While at or below 35% maximum health, you now gain 20 % increased healing received and take -10 % reduced damage.

entries.name: Ogre's Endurance
entries.description_text: Increases your healing received by 10 % .

entries.name: Ancestral Roar
entries.description_text: Requires Enraged Roar with ancestral fervor, healing you for 100 + 50% AP .

entries.name: Hodir's Wrath
entries.description_text: Erupt with the power of Hodir, dealing 1361 + 120% AP Frost damage to nearby enemies and restoring 100 % of your maximum Energy.

entries.name: Forward Advance
entries.description_text: Increases the range of your Whirling Advance by 3 yds.

entries.name: Defiance
entries.description_text: Attempt to defy death, reducing all damage taken by 30% to 80% based on your current missing health for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Maiming Spear
entries.description_text: Throw your ranged weapon at your enemy's legs, dealing 100 % Ranged Weapon Damage plus 2 and slowing their movement speed by -50 % for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Unstoppable Rage
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Unbridled Rage by 2 sec.

entries.name: Thick Skull
entries.description_text: Your thick skull makes you immune to all stun effects for 10 seconds and while active taking direct damage grants you Born in Blood . Usable while stunned. Born in Blood Battle fuels your vitality, restoring 18 health and 12 Energy over 3 seconds.

entries.name: Bloodbound
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of your Warband by -30 sec and Ancestral Roar by -5 sec.

entries.name: Born Killer
entries.description_text: Killing an enemy that yields experience or honor now grants you 5 % increased armor penetration and movement speed for 5 seconds, stacking 20 times.

entries.name: Drunken Brawler
entries.description_text: Taking direct damage now increases your chance to dodge by 1 % for 3 seconds, stacking 10 times.

entries.name: War Tales
entries.description_text: Increases your chance to resist fear and horrify effects by 25 % .

entries.name: Strength of Goria
entries.description_text: Casting Unbridled Rage now grants you Born in Blood . Born in Blood Battle fuels your vitality, restoring 18 health and 12 Energy over 3 seconds.

entries.name: Savagery
entries.description_text: While below 35% health, your auto attacks, Ancestral Strike , and Throw Weapon now grant Born in Blood . Can only occur once every 2 sec. Born in Blood Battle fuels your vitality, restoring 18 health and 12 Energy over 3 seconds.

entries.name: Knockout Artist
entries.description_text: Successfully interrupting a target with Jawbreaker now increases your haste by 30 % for 4 seconds and refunds half its Energy cost.

entries.name: Outrage
entries.description_text: Requires Enraged Increases your haste and critical strike chance by 20 % , but increases your damage taken by 30 % for 10 seconds. Physical critical strikes extend this effect by 1 sec.

entries.name: Warband
entries.description_text: Bring all nearby allies into the warband for 12 seconds, granting them Born in Blood , repeating every 3 sec. Born in Blood Battle fuels your vitality, restoring 18 health and 12 Energy over 3 seconds.

entries.name: Powerful Grip
entries.description_text: Reduces the duration of disarm effects by -30 % .

entries.name: Skull Smash
entries.description_text: Pick up a rock and hurl it at an enemy's skull, disorienting them for 40 seconds ( 8 sec vs players). Damage taken will end this effect.

entries.name: Rage Whirling
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of Whirling Advance by 50 % .

entries.name: Plugging the Hole
entries.description_text: Your Skull Smash now removes all bleed effects on the enemy.

entries.name: One With The Ancestors
entries.description_text: Increases your critical strike chance by 2 % .

entries.name: Battle Rhythm
entries.description_text: Critical strikes with abilities now generate 5 Energy.

entries.name: Savage Cadence
entries.description_text: Direct critical strikes now extend the duration of your Unbridled Rage by 0.5 sec. This effect can occur only once per sec. Killing blows extend the duration of your Unbridled Rage by 0.5 sec.

entries.name: Bloodthirsty
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of your Outrage by 100 % .

entries.name: Frozen Warlord
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Hodir's Wrath now freezes enemies in place for 0 seconds.

entries.name: Mak'Gora
entries.description_text: Critical strikes on enemies above 80% or below 20% health now challenges them to a Mak'Gora . Only 1 enemy can be challenged at a time. Mak'gora ( 20% ) Challenge an enemy to a duel to the death for 10 seconds, reducing their healing received by -20 % and absorbing the next 1244 + 100% AP healing done to them.

entries.name: Smasher
entries.description_text: Removes the Energy cost from Skull Smash .

entries.name: Bloody Onslaught
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Onslaught by 6 sec.

entries.name: Juju Spirits
entries.description_text: Level 40 Passive Increases your spell critical damage by 100 % and increases the critical strike chance of Bad Juju by 5 % for each active Spirit on you.

entries.name: Malignant Jinx
entries.description_text: Curse an enemy for 8 seconds, causing their next spell cast to silence them for 5 sec. Can only have 1 Jinx active on a target at a time.

entries.name: Voice of Bwonsamdi
entries.description_text: Let the spirit of Bwonsamdi possess you for 15 seconds. Dealing periodic damage unleashes a trapped voodoo spirit at enemies, exploding for 162 + 25% shadow SP Shadow damage.

entries.name: Shadow Puppets
entries.description_text: Summon a Shadow Puppet that collects a Spirit and rushes towards your target, dealing 25 + 22% shadow SP Shadow damage, repeating every 1 sec for 3 seconds.

entries.name: Zalazane's Malice
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Hex of Malice by 15 % and the duration of Jinxes by 2 sec.

entries.name: It's Da Voodoo
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Shadowflare by 0 % .

entries.name: Overflowing Juju
entries.description_text: Increases the spell power scaling of Malefic Wrath , Shadowflare , and Bad Juju by 20 % .

entries.name: Stranglethorn Style
entries.description_text: Increases your critical strike chance by 4 % and reduces threat generated by your Voodoo spells by -20 % .

entries.name: Loa Spirits
entries.description_text: Damage dealt and healing done now has a 8 % chance to collect a Spirit . In addition, each active Spirit now increases your Spirit by 2 % . Spirit Regenerates 7 health and mana, repeating every 4 sec for 12 seconds, stacking 5 times.

entries.name: De Other Side
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Shadow Puppets now increases your damage and critical strike chance by 1 % for 20 seconds, stacking up to 10 times. Additional procs do not refresh the duration.

entries.name: Hexplosion
entries.description_text: Your offensive critical strikes now increase your haste by 20 % for 6 seconds.

entries.name: Growing Malice
entries.description_text: Each tick of Hex of Malice increases the damage of the next tick on the enemy by 3 % , stacking 10 times.

entries.name: War Golem
entries.description_text: Summon a War Golem for 10 seconds, absorbing damage dealt to you based on your Intellect, and redirecting harmful spells cast on nearby allies to itself.

entries.name: Voodoo Strings
entries.description_text: When Bad Juju is used on enemies affected by Puppeteer's Threads , it strikes an additional time every 1 sec for 30% of the damage dealt over 3 seconds as Nature damage.

entries.name: Puppeteer's Grasp
entries.description_text: Transform into a malignant spirit for 30 seconds, allowing you to cast Malefic Wrath and Bad Juju while moving, and periodically granting you a Spirit every 2 sec. Spirit Regenerates 7 health and mana, repeating every 4 sec for 12 seconds, stacking 5 times.

entries.name: Bad Juju
entries.description_text: Hurl a bolt of dark magic at an enemy, dealing 203 + 87.65% SP + 100% Spirit Shadow damage, scaling with your Spirit. If the target is affected by Hex of Malice it also reduces the target's healing received by -20 % for 8 seconds.

entries.name: Malicious Golems
entries.description_text: Summoning your War Golem now increases your spell haste by 30 % for 20 seconds. In addition, periodic damage dealt by Hex of Malice and damage dealt by Shadow Puppets will reduce the cooldown of War Golem by -0.5 sec.

entries.name: Prolonged Malice
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of your Hex of Malice by 6 sec and the range of your offensive Voodoo spells by 6 yds.

entries.name: Staff of the Coven
entries.description_text: Increases your Spirit by 8 % and your hit chance by 2 % .

entries.name: Malignant
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Bad Juju and Hexfire now spreads Hex of Malice to up to 1 nearby enemy.

entries.name: Beware Da Voodoo
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Mimic Ward and Spirits by 4 sec.

entries.name: Hollow Spirit
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Shadowflare and Hexfire now increases the chance enemies are critically struck by 3 % for 12 seconds.

entries.name: Jin'do's Wrath
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance and critical damage of Hexfire by 25 % .

entries.name: Voodoo Unleashed
entries.description_text: Your Mimic Wards now also cast Bad Juju and casting Bad Juju now reduces the cooldown of Shadow Puppets by -3 sec.

entries.name: The Price of Power
entries.description_text: Voice of Bwonsamdi now increases your Spirit by 100 % .

entries.name: Dark Magic
entries.description_text: Reduces the cast time of Malefic Wrath and Bad Juju by -0.3 sec.

entries.name: Voodoo Mind
entries.description_text: Shadow Puppets now ticks -10 % faster and lasts 10 % longer for each Spirit active on you.

entries.name: Ritual Hexing
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Bad Juju , Malefic Wrath and Hexfire by 10 % against enemies affected by Hex of Malice .

entries.name: Puppeteer's Threads
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive Damaging abilities now leave behind Puppeteer's Threads on enemies for 10 seconds. Puppeteer’s Threads (Debuff) Damage taken from the Witch Doctor stores 10% of its value. When the effect ends the damage stored is dealt instantly.

entries.name: Overflowing Juju
entries.description_text: Level 30 Passive Damage dealt by your Shadow Puppets and Puppeteer's Threads now has a 15 % chance to reset the cooldown of Bad Juju and cause your next cast to incur an -8 sec reduced cooldown.

entries.name: Voodoo Power
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Increases your spell damage by 50 % of your Spirit and your spell hit rating by 5 % of your Spirit.

entries.name: Dark Loa's Blessing
entries.description_text: Increases the all damage dealt by party and raid members by 3 % . Does not stack with similar effects. In addition, your Shadow Puppets now deals damage -20 % faster.

entries.name: Voodoo Spirits
entries.description_text: Hexfire now snaps your Puppeteer's Threads on your target, unleashing its damage on them instantly and collecting one Spirit . Spirit Regenerates 7 health and mana, repeating every 4 sec for 12 seconds, stacking 5 times.

entries.name: Dark Effigy
entries.description_text: Your Bad Juju and Hexfire now strike 2 additional nearby enemies. Shadowflare now deals 50 % increased damage to enemies affected by Puppeteer's Threads . Puppeteer’s Threads (Debuff) Damage taken from the Witch Doctor stores 10% of its value. When the effect ends the damage stored is dealt instantly.

entries.name: Hexfire
entries.description_text: Blast an enemy with hexfire, dealing cond(gt(SPFI, SPN), 60+0+SPFI*0.55, 60+0+SPN*0.55+SPI*0.5) Fire damage, scaling with your Spirit.

entries.name: Splash Potion
entries.description_text: Fill a splash potion from your Cauldron , and toss it at a location, healing up to 8 allies for 54 + 22.45% healing + 8% Spirit . Potion effects from Ingredients used this way have reduced effectiveness.

entries.name: Plentiful Potions
entries.description_text: Reduces the cost of your Loa's Brew and Hexbreak by -10 % .

entries.name: Spice: Earthroot
entries.description_text: Infuse your Cauldron with Spice: Earthbloom . Increases effectiveness of all Cauldron effects and Ingredients by 30 % .

entries.name: Potent Mixes
entries.description_text: Increases your healing done by 4 % and reduces the threat generated by your spells by -15 % .

entries.name: Rage Brew
entries.description_text: Throw your Rage Brew at an ally, regenerating 50 % of their maximum Rage, Energy, and Focus. Increases their attack power and ranged attack power by 15 % for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Mojo: Jungle Thistle
entries.description_text: Your Potion Toss and Splash Potion cooldown is reset, and the next use within 5 seconds now applies Jungle Thistle to affected allies. Instantly swaps your Ingredients to Jungle Shrooms and Bloodthistle .

entries.name: Spirit Out Of The Bottle
entries.description_text: Casting Spirit in a Bottle now grants Spirit . Spirit Regenerates 7 health and mana, repeating every 4 sec for 12 seconds, stacking 5 times. @ifknown:500950:In addition, channeling Mojo Beam causes Spirit in a Bottle to affect 3 additional allies near the primary target.:ifknown@

entries.name: Sen'jin's Presence
entries.description_text: Casting Potion Toss and Spirit in a Bottle now reduce the cast time of your next 2 Loa's Brews by -20 % for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Mojo: Fish Bones
entries.description_text: Your Potion Toss and Splash Potion cooldown is reset, and the next use within 5 seconds now applies Fish Bones to affected allies. Instantly swaps your Ingredients to Fish Oil and Frog Bones .

entries.name: Mojo: Frog Shrooms
entries.description_text: Your Potion Toss and Splash Potion cooldown is reset, and the next use within 5 seconds now applies Frog Shrooms to affected allies. Instantly swaps your Ingredients to Jungle Shrooms and Frog Bones .

entries.name: Jungle Booms
entries.description_text: Jungle Shrooms when used with Potion Toss and Splash Potion now ticks -0.5 sec faster.

entries.name: Ingredient: Bloodthistle
entries.description_text: Brew Bloodthistle into your Cauldron . Cauldron : Allies within 40 yds receive 8 % increased healing. Potion : Causes target ally to leech 5 % of all damage they deal for 15 seconds. Can only occur once every 0.5 sec.

entries.name: Splash On 'Em
entries.description_text: Effective healing done by Loa's Brew and Mojo Beam reduce the cooldown of Potion Toss and Splash Potion by -1 sec.

entries.name: Disciple of Sseratus
entries.description_text: Increases the bonus healing scaling of Loa's Brew and Spirit in a Bottle by 15 % .

entries.name: Master of Concoctions
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Ingredients by 20 % and causes allies affected by Jungle Shrooms to heal for 5 % of the damage they deal with their next 3 offensive abilities or spells for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Unstable Concoction
entries.description_text: Potion Toss now applies Unstable Concoction to the target for 20 seconds. Using Loa's Brew or Spirit in a Bottle on the target will trigger an explosion of mojo around the target, healing nearby allies within 20 yds for 177 + 40% healing .

entries.name: Fresh Ingredients
entries.description_text: Increases the healing of your Jungle Shrooms from your Cauldron by 15 % .

entries.name: Loa's Blessing
entries.description_text: Level 30 Passive Healing done by Loa's Brew now applies a random empowerment to the target ally.

entries.name: Mojo Wave
entries.description_text: Level 40 Passive Healing with Mojo Beam now heals up to 3 of the lowest health nearby allies within 20 yds for 75 % of the healing done.

entries.name: Presence of the Loa
entries.description_text: Increases your critical strike chance by 4 % .

entries.name: Cauldron Brewer
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive You may now prepare Ingredients into a Cauldron , crafting a brew. Nearby allies are buffed based on the active brew. Only 1 of each Ingredient can be active at a time.

entries.name: Spice: Peacebloom
entries.description_text: Infuse your Cauldron with Spice: Peacebloom . Reduces the duration of roots, stuns, and snares against allies within 40 yds by -25 % .

entries.name: Potion Boss
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of Potion Toss and your tossed Ingredients by 20 % .

entries.name: Base: Beast Blood
entries.description_text: Infuse your Cauldron with Beast Blood for 10 seconds, causing 15% of the direct Physical damage taken by allies within 40 yds to instead be dealt over time. Only 1 Base can be active at a time.

entries.name: Touch of the Spirits
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Spirit In a Bottle causes the enemies to take 3 % more damage and deal -3 % less damage for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Spirit Healer
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Increases healing power by 25 % of Spirit and increases spell critical strike chance by 10 % of Spirit.

entries.name: Ingredient: Jungle Shrooms
entries.description_text: Brew Jungle Shrooms into your Cauldron . Cauldron : Heal up to 8 allies within 30 yds for 34 + 15% healing every 8 sec. Potion Toss : Heal the target ally for -3.75 to -2.75 every 3 sec for 18 seconds.

entries.name: Potion Toss
entries.description_text: Fill a potion from your Cauldron , and toss it at a friendly target, healing them for 108 + 40% healing + 10% Spirit . The effect of Potion Toss will change based on your active Ingredients .

entries.name: It's Da Mojo
entries.description_text: Level 50 Passive Allows your Mojo Beam to critically heal.

entries.name: Mojo Beam
entries.description_text: Bring mojo to an ally, healing for 174 + 18.5% SP every 1 sec for 4 seconds. While channeling, you can instantly cast Potion Toss , Splash Potion and Spirit in a Bottle at a 20 % increased cost.

entries.name: Mojo Addiction
entries.description_text: Increases your maximum mana by 5 % .

entries.name: Brewmaster
entries.description_text: Reduces the cast time of Loa's Brew by 0.25 sec.

entries.name: Doctor of the Jungle
entries.description_text: Jungle Shrooms used from your Cauldron now ticks -3 sec faster.

entries.name: Master Mixologist
entries.description_text: For 10 seconds, the effectiveness of all Cauldron effects and Ingredients is increased by 100 % and you can cast Spirit in a Bottle while moving.

entries.name: Ingredient: Frog Bones
entries.description_text: Brew Frog Bones into your Cauldron . Cauldron : Grants allies within 40 yds -3 % reduced damage taken. Potion : Grants target ally an absorption shield, absorbing 50 + 35% Spirit damage, scaling with Spirit.

entries.name: Arcane Brew
entries.description_text: Throw your Arcane Brew at an ally, increasing their spell power and Spirit by 30 for 10 seconds. Spell power scales with caster level.

entries.name: Base: Crystal Water
entries.description_text: Infuse your Cauldron with Crystal Water for 10 seconds, causing allies within 40 yds to be shielded for 20% of their healing taken for 5 seconds. Only 1 Base can be active at a time.

entries.name: Voodoo Cauldron
entries.description_text: Place down a Voodoo Cauldron for 15 seconds, increasing allies' healing received by 20 % while near the cauldron. Allies within 15 yds are healed for 300 + 60% healing every 1.5 sec for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Jungle Secrets
entries.description_text: When you heal with Loa's Brew your Effigies will now heal an additional ally within 20 yds for 35 % of the healing done, prioritizing allies with low health.

entries.name: Call of Sseratus
entries.description_text: Summon 4 Serpent Wards near you for 15 seconds. Scales with modifiers to Serpent Ward .

entries.name: Soul Feeder
entries.description_text: Increases the damage dealt by Malefic Arrow by 5 % for each active Spirit on you.

entries.name: Strength of Da Loa
entries.description_text: Increases the attack power of party and raid members by 5 % . Does not stack with similar effects. In addition, health and mana restoration provided by your Spirits now occurs -50 % more often.

entries.name: Dambala's Lethality
entries.description_text: After using Spirit Eclipse , the damage of your next Shadowflare within 15 seconds is increased by 50 % .

entries.name: Spirit Shock
entries.description_text: Shock an enemy's spirit, silencing them for 4 seconds and interrupting non-player spellcasting for 4 seconds.

entries.name: Berserking
entries.description_text: Periodic damage dealt now has a 25 % chance to increase the haste of your Serpent Wards by 3 % for 15 seconds, stacking up to 3 times.

entries.name: Serpent's Guile
entries.description_text: Your Malefic Arrow now deals an additional 15 % of its damage dealt every 1 sec for 4 seconds as Nature damage.

entries.name: Improved Malefic Arrow
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Malefic Arrow by -2 sec.

entries.name: Shadowhunter
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive Allows you to auto shoot with a ranged weapon. In addition, reduces the mana cost of all spells and abilities by -25 % .

entries.name: Hex of Death
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Malefic Arrow now reduces the targets healing received by -20 % for 10 seconds, stacking 2 times.

entries.name: Mojo High
entries.description_text: Your Mimic Ward now summons 1 additional Mimic Ward and its duration is increased by 3 sec.

entries.name: Shadow Enchantments
entries.description_text: Increases the duration and effectiveness of your Jinxes by 25 % .

entries.name: Serpent Handler
entries.description_text: Increases the cooldown of Call of Sseratus by 5 sec, but increases the amount of Serpent Wards summoned by it by 2 .

entries.name: Vol'jin's Blessing
entries.description_text: While Shadow Avatar is active, the cooldown of Spirit Glaive is now reduced by 20 % every 1 sec.

entries.name: Residual Energy
entries.description_text: At the end of Shadow Avatar 's duration you become a Lesser Shadow Avatar . Lesser Shadow Avatar Increases magic damage dealt by 10 % and reduces the cooldown of Spirit Glaive by 20 % every 1 sec. Lasts for 8 seconds.

entries.name: Spiritual Devotee
entries.description_text: Collecting a Spirit now instantly restores 3 % of your maximum mana.

entries.name: Dark Loa's Incantation
entries.description_text: Dealing damage with Shadowflare now applies Hex of Malice if it strikes at least 3 enemies. Hex of Malice Curse an enemy, dealing 5 + 8% shadow SP + 10% ranged AP Shadow damage and an additional 96 Shadow damage over 24 seconds.

entries.name: Village Wisdom
entries.description_text: Increases your hit chance by 5 % and the damage of Reclamation by 15 % .

entries.name: A Price To Pay
entries.description_text: Casting Spirit Eclipse with 5 Spirits now resets the cooldown of Spirit Glaive and causes your next cast within 8 seconds to be guaranteed to critically strike. Spirit Glaives used in this way will reduce the cooldown of Shadowstalker by -15 sec.

entries.name: The True Spirit
entries.description_text: Summoning a Serpent Ward or Spirit now increases the damage of your next Spirit Glaive or Spirit Eclipse by 6 % for 10 seconds, stacking 5 times.

entries.name: Voodoo Fire
entries.description_text: Your Serpent Ward's attacks now have a 20 % chance to shoot Voodoo Fire , dealing cond(gt(SPFI, SPN), 73*1+ranged AP*0.03+SPFI*0.12, 73*1+ranged AP*0.03+SPN*0.12) Fire damage to up to 3 nearby enemies.

entries.name: Darkspear Traditionalist
entries.description_text: Emanate a powerful aura, granting 10 % increased melee and ranged haste to party and raid members. Does not stack with similar effects. Periodic damage dealt by Hex of Malice now has a 20 % chance to collect a Spirit . Spirit Regenerates 7 health and mana, repeating every 4 sec for 12 seconds, stacking 5 times.

entries.name: Spirit Eclipse
entries.description_text: Unleash your Spirits on an enemy, dealing 8 + 7% ranged AP + 12% shadow SP Shadow damage every 0 sec for each active Spirit . Each Spirit explodes on impact, dealing 71 + 6% shadow SP + 3.5% ranged AP Shadow damage to other nearby enemies within 5 yds of the target.

entries.name: Shadowstalker
entries.description_text: Disappear into darkness, entering an improved stealth mode, clearing all harmful effects, and increasing movement speed by 50 % for 20 seconds.

entries.name: Sen'jin's Apprentice
entries.description_text: Level 40 Passive Increases your ranged attack power by 100 % of your Intellect and your ranged attack power and spell power by 25 % of your Agility.

entries.name: Reclamation
entries.description_text: Shoot a quick voodoo arrow at an enemy dealing 100 % Ranged Weapon Damage plus 15 as Nature damage and collecting a Spirit . Spirit Regenerates 7 health and mana, repeating every 4 sec for 12 seconds, stacking 5 times. Usable while moving.

entries.name: Loa Spirits
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive For each active Spirit on you, you have an 5 % chance for your Reclamation to cast an additional time.

entries.name: Eye of Kimbul
entries.description_text: Critical strikes now apply Eye of Kimbul to enemies for 15 seconds. Eye of Kimbul Increases damage dealt and critical strike chance against this target by 1 % , stacking 5 times. While affected, enemies cannot stealth or turn invisible.

entries.name: Spirit Striker
entries.description_text: Increases the proc chance of Voodoo Fire by 10 % .

entries.name: Viper Ward
entries.description_text: Transforms Call of Sseratus into Viper Ward . Viper Ward Summons a powerful and fast-attacking Viper Ward at target location for 20 seconds. Viper Wards have a 50 % chance to unleash a Hexfire Blast , dealing 216 + 15% ranged AP Fire damage to an enemy. Chance increased based on your ranged critical strike rating.

entries.name: Godslayer
entries.description_text: Your Spirit Glaive now deals an additional 54 + 19% shadow SP + 14% ranged AP Shadow damage to up to 5 nearby enemies at the end of its duration.

entries.name: Voodoo Hunger
entries.description_text: While Shadowstalker or Mirage is active, every 1 sec you now gain a stack of Voodoo Hunger . Voodoo Hunger Increases the damage of your next Malefic Arrow by 10 % , stacking 10 times. Lasts 8 seconds.

entries.name: Fool's Play
entries.description_text: Target an enemy and summon a copy of them for 20 seconds that attacks them and replicates their spells back on them.

entries.name: Malefic Arrow
entries.description_text: Transforms your Malefic Wrath into Malefic Arrow . Malefic Arrow Launch a voodoo arrow at an enemy, dealing 85 % Ranged Weapon Damage plus 25 + 20% ranged AP + 25% nature SP as Nature damage, healing you equal to 40 % of the damage dealt.

entries.name: Hexfire Mass
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Hex of Malice now has a 30 % chance to summon a Serpent Ward on top of your enemy for 10 seconds to aid you in combat. Can only occur once every 3 sec.

entries.name: Spirit Hunting
entries.description_text: Each active Spirit gives you a 15% chance when you cast Malefic Arrow to generate an additional Spirit . Spirit Regenerates 7 health and mana, repeating every 4 sec for 12 seconds, stacking 5 times.

entries.name: Bwonsamdi's Edge
entries.description_text: Your Spirit Eclipse now deals 40 % increased damage when it explodes on impact.

entries.name: Spirit Glaive
entries.description_text: Toss spectral glaives that strikes enemies it passes through, dealing 66 + 50% ranged AP + 50% shadow SP Shadow damage, and reducing their Shadow Resistance by 61 for 5 seconds. Usable while moving.

entries.name: Frenzied Spirits
entries.description_text: Consumes your Spirits to increase your ranged critical strike rating by 10 , critical damage by 5 % , and causing you to heal for 2 % of all damage dealt for each Spirit consumed. In addition, you gain 1 Spirit every 1 sec while active. Lasts for 3 sec per Spirit consumed.

entries.name: Loa's Strength
entries.description_text: Increases your Agility and your Nature and Shadow damage dealt by 3 % .

entries.name: Bwonsamdi's Gift
entries.description_text: While Mimic Ward is active, you now gain 15 % increased ranged haste and your Reclamation transforms into Spirit Volley . Each Spirit now increases the damage of Spirit Volley by 3 % . In addition, direct ranged abilty damage dealt now reduces the cooldown of Mimic Ward by -0.5 sec.

entries.name: Blessing of Hir'eek
entries.description_text: Your Hexbreak now removes an additional curse effect.

entries.name: Potent Mixes
entries.description_text: Increases your healing done by 4 % and reduces the threat generated by your spells by -15 % .

entries.name: Krag'wa's Blessing
entries.description_text: Your Amphibimorph is now instant cast.

entries.name: Jinx of Decay
entries.description_text: Your Lethargy Jinx now also reduces the target's periodic healing received by -30 % .

entries.name: Mimic Ward
entries.description_text: Summon a mimic ward for 12 seconds. For the duration when you cast Malefic Wrath and Loa's Brew the ward will also cast it on your target.

entries.name: Slither
entries.description_text: Transform into a serpent, removing all movement impairing effects and increasing movement speed by 80 % for 5 seconds. You cannot attack or cast spells, but chance to be hit by ranged attacks and spells is reduced by -100 % for the duration.

entries.name: Cleansing Idol
entries.description_text: Drop a Cleansing Idol near you for 1 minute. Allies within 30 yds have 1 poison and disease effect removed from them every 3 sec.

entries.name: Sen'jin's Wisdom
entries.description_text: Doubles the duration of Mirage .

entries.name: Blatant Curse
entries.description_text: Reduces the mana cost of your Jinxes by -25 % .

entries.name: Spirit Walker
entries.description_text: Increases the duration and effectiveness of Vol'jin's Vigil and Swift Idol by 10 % .

entries.name: Touch of Mueh'zala
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Stasis Ward 's stun effect by 1 sec.

entries.name: Alchemical Enhancement
entries.description_text: Increases your haste by 5 % .

entries.name: Veil of Darkness
entries.description_text: Envelop a target in a shadowy voodoo veil, increasing the damage you deal to them by 15 % for 15 seconds. If you are within 40 yds of the target you deal 195 + 10% shadow SP + 4.5% AP Shadow damage to them every 2 second.

entries.name: Death Draught
entries.description_text: Drink a potent voodoo draught that slows your body to a deathlike stillness for up to 5 minutes, causing you to feign death which may trick enemies into ignoring you.

entries.name: Latent Curse
entries.description_text: When your Shrinking Jinx is dispelled it now applies Misery to the dispeller. Misery Silences the target for 5 seconds and deals 9 + 60% shadow SP Shadow Damage every 1 sec for the duration.

entries.name: Healing Ward
entries.description_text: Drop a Healing Ward near you for 1 minute, healing 8 nearby allies within 30 yds for 48 + 20% SP + 12% ranged AP + 10% Spirit every 3 sec.

entries.name: Mirage
entries.description_text: Become invisible for 20 seconds, gaining 5 Spirits , leaving a copy of yourself behind, and reducing threat each second. Direct damage or healing done will end this effect. While invisible, you can only see other invisible targets and those who can see invisible.

entries.name: Will of the Serpent
entries.description_text: Your Lethargy Jinx now increases your critical strike chance against the target by 10 % .

entries.name: Devotion to Bwonsamdi
entries.description_text: Your direct damage now heals you for 10 % of the damage done.

entries.name: Loa Empowerment
entries.description_text: Reduces the cost of your Wujus by -50 % and increases the effectiveness of Power Wuju by 20 % .

entries.name: Hastened
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of all Wards , Idols , and Effigies by -25 % .

entries.name: Chosen One
entries.description_text: Your Mimic Ward will now summon 1 additional ward.

entries.name: Amphibimorph
entries.description_text: Transform enemies at target location into a frog, making them unable to attack or cast spells, and slowing their movement speed by -25 % for 40 seconds ( 8 sec vs players). While transformed into a frog the enemy is considered a Beast. Damage caused may interrupt the effect.

entries.name: Vol'jin's Vigil
entries.description_text: Embrace the way of Vol'jin, reducing your damage taken by -25 % and healing you for 2 % of your maximum health every 1 sec for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Mojo Madness
entries.description_text: Damage and healing done now have a 5 % chance to reduce the cost of your next spell or ability by -100 % for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Wizened
entries.description_text: Increases your maximum mana by 5 % and reduces the mana cost of spells and abilities by -3 % .

entries.name: Dark Mojo
entries.description_text: Increases your chance to resist magic and curse effects by 20 % .

entries.name: For Da Loa!
entries.description_text: Transforms Allcure Elixir into Mass Allcure Elixir . Mass Allcure Elixir Removes all poison, disease and curse effects from party and raid members within 30 yds, and grants immunity to such effects for 3 seconds.

entries.name: One Armed Waltz
entries.description_text: Big Bad Voodoo now only reduces damage dealt by 25 % and reduces damage taken by an additional -5 % .

entries.name: Swift Idol
entries.description_text: Drop a Swift Idol near you for 10 seconds. Allies within 30 yds gain 25 % increased movement speed and their chance to resist movement impairing effects is increased by 25 % .

entries.name: Loa Communion
entries.description_text: Increases the damage dealt by Veil of Darkness by 100 % .

entries.name: Spiritual Traditions
entries.description_text: Allows 40 % of your mana regeneration to continue while casting and reduces your spell pushback suffered from damaging attacks by 70 % .

entries.name: Cursed Effigy
entries.description_text: Drop a Cursed Effigy near you for 15 seconds. Enemies within 15 yds are unable to critically strike.

entries.name: Spirit Warden
entries.description_text: Summoning an Idol now increases your Spirit by 10 % for 1 minute.

entries.name: Juju Injection
entries.description_text: Increases your Agility and Intellect by 5 % .

entries.name: Seeker
entries.description_text: Reduces the mana cost of your Wards , Idols , and Effigies by -20 % .

entries.name: Sen'jin's Swiftness
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Mirage by -60 sec.

entries.name: Gonk's Blessing
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Amphibimorph by -60 sec, but increases its cast time by 0.5 sec.

entries.name: Burning Commander
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive Allows you to wield a Two-Handed Axe, Mace, or Sword in each hand and grants you additional Armor and magic resistance based on your dodge rating.

entries.name: Outland Slaver
entries.description_text: Reduces the cost of your Felrend and Fel Fireball by -3 and increases their damage dealt by 15 % .

entries.name: Nether Strength
entries.description_text: Casting Felfury spenders now reduces the cooldown of Burning Hatred , Hateforged Barrier , and Demonic Will by -1 sec.

entries.name: Vengeance Is Mine
entries.description_text: Dodging or parrying an attack now gives you a 10 % chance to make your next 10 instances of damage with Twin Slice deal 30 % increased damage and generate 1 Felfury .

entries.name: Expose
entries.description_text: Direct Fire and Shadow spell damage dealt now applies Expose to enemies. Expose (Proc) Damage taken from the Felsworn increased by 10 % and the critical strike chance of all allies against this target is increased by 3 % for 8 seconds.

entries.name: Nether Disciple
entries.description_text: Increases your dodge and parry chance by 3 % .

entries.name: Doomscarring
entries.description_text: Your melee critical strikes now deal an additional 1 + 30% AP Physical damage and scars enemies for 12 seconds, increasing your allies' attack power against them by 45 + 15% Agility .

entries.name: Straight to the Nether
entries.description_text: While Inner Demon is active, Carve and Sargeron Smite now leeches 20 % of the damage dealt from the initial strike as Shadowflame Damage.

entries.name: Hulking Demon
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Increases your attack power by 30 % of your Stamina and your hit rating by 6 % of your Agility.

entries.name: Felblade
entries.description_text: Level 40 Passive Damage dealt by Fel Fireball , Sargeron Smite , and Twin Slice now additionally scales with your Agility.

entries.name: Hellfire Carver
entries.description_text: Level 30 Passive Casting Carve now makes your next Fel Fireball instant cast and causes it to strike 1 additional enemy near the primary target based on how long you channeled, up to a maximum of 10 enemies, dealing less damage with each target struck.

entries.name: Fel Torpedo
entries.description_text: Transforms your Chaos Rush into Fel Torpedo . Fel Torpedo Generates 1 Felfury Torpedo forward in the direction you're running and deal 195 + 35% AP Shadowflame Damage to enemies in your path. Generates a large amount of threat. Scales with modifiers to Chaos Rush

entries.name: Demon Hide
entries.description_text: While Inner Demon is active, your Armor contribution from cloth and leather items is increased by 120 % .

entries.name: Illidan's Favor
entries.description_text: Removes the Energy cost of your Felbane and Manaburn and your Manaburn now strikes 4 additional enemies near the primary target.

entries.name: Fel Daze
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of Fel Fireball by 10 % and it's damage dealt now reduces the enemy's chance to hit by -3 % for 6 seconds.

entries.name: Annihilan Rituals
entries.description_text: Fully channeling Carve now refunds 1 Felfury .

entries.name: Abyssal Conditioning
entries.description_text: Casting Felfury spenders now increases your Energy regeneration by 5 % for 10 seconds, stacking up to 4 times.

entries.name: Demonic Blood
entries.description_text: Generating Felfury now extends the duration of Inner Demon by 0.5 sec.

entries.name: Fel Monstrosity
entries.description_text: Level 50 Passive Increases your Stamina by 25 % and size by 10 % .

entries.name: Vengeance
entries.description_text: Your Twin Slice and Felrend now have a 60 % chance to generate 1 additional Felfury .

entries.name: Taskmaster's Army
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Infernal Whipcrack by -30 sec and it now affects all allies and its radius is increased by 15 yds.

entries.name: Felrend
entries.description_text: Generates 1 Felfury Erupt in a whirlwind of felfury, striking all enemies within 6 yds with both weapons, dealing Weapon Damage plus 5 .

entries.name: Mannoroth's Rage
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Burning Hatred by -60 sec and removes its Energy cost.

entries.name: Tyrannical Resolve
entries.description_text: Taunt nearby enemies for 4 seconds and ignore -50 % of all damage taken for 30 seconds, up to 100% of your maximum health. When this ends, you unleash a Felfire Blast that leeches health from nearby enemies based on how many times you took damage with the effect active.

entries.name: Demonic Will
entries.description_text: Generates 1 Felfury Strengthen your will, reducing Physical damage taken by -30 % for 10 seconds. While active, direct damaging abilities heal you for 3 % of your maximum health. Can only occur once every 0.5 sec.

entries.name: Felspill
entries.description_text: Generating Felfury now leeches 10% AP health from 3 nearby enemies within 6 yds, scaling with your attack power.

entries.name: Tyrant's Gaze
entries.description_text: Set your fiery gaze upon an enemy and all enemies nearby, intimidating them and causing them to combust, dealing 220 + 35% AP Shadowflame Damage to them. Damaging an enemy in this way heals you for 146 + 50% AP and generates 1 Felfury . Only usable on enemies below 35% health.

entries.name: Burning Hatred
entries.description_text: Enrages you, instantly generating 6 Felfury and causing your melee damage to leech health to you equal to 50 % of the damage dealt as Chaos damage for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Eye of the Tyrant
entries.description_text: Grant 10 % increased melee and ranged haste to party and raid members within 100 yds. Does not stack with similar effects. In addition, your attack power is increased by 5 % .

entries.name: Dark Lord
entries.description_text: While above 75% health, your damage taken is reduced by -5 % and damage dealt is increased by 5 % .

entries.name: Illidari Training
entries.description_text: Dodging an attack now generates 3 Energy.

entries.name: Battle Finesse
entries.description_text: While channeling Carve , your chance to dodge is now increased by 1 % based on how long you channel, up to a maximum of 10% .

entries.name: Quick Carving
entries.description_text: Carve now channels 1 sec faster.

entries.name: Demonic Fortitude
entries.description_text: While Demonic Will or Hateforged Barrier are active, all damage taken or avoided now has a 20 % chance to generate 1 Felfury .

entries.name: Bulwark of Azzinoth
entries.description_text: Inner Demon now also reduces your damage taken by -10 % .

entries.name: Infernal Constitution
entries.description_text: Increases your maximum health by 10 % and increases your off-hand weapon damage by 30 % .

entries.name: Carve
entries.description_text: Consumes 2 Felfury Charge up a powerful attack over 2.5 seconds. Upon ending the channel, slash in front of you, dealing increased Weapon Damage with both weapons based on how long you channel, dealing less damage with each target struck. Inner Demon : Reduces affected enemies melee and ranged haste by -20 % for 8 seconds.

entries.name: Unholy Endurance
entries.description_text: Increases the damage and threat generated from Carve by 15 % .

entries.name: Pure Hatred
entries.description_text: Your Hateforged Barrier now also scales with your dodge rating.

entries.name: Infernal Whipcrack
entries.description_text: Enrage up to 8 allies within 20 yds, reducing their damage taken by -15 % and increasing their haste by 10 % for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Burning Legionnaire
entries.description_text: Reduces the Energy cost of Twin Slice and Sunder by -10 .

entries.name: Grommash's Folly
entries.description_text: While Inner Demon is active, your melee haste is now increased by 15 % and you now heal equal to 50 % of all damage dealt by critical strikes with auto attacks. In addition, critical strikes with Carve deal 5 % increased damage, increasing up to 60% with each strike based on how long you channel.

entries.name: Betrayer
entries.description_text: Dodging attacks causes 40 % off-hand Weapon Damage to attackers and enrages your party and raid members within 20 yds, increasing their critical strike chance by 2 % for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Twin Fury
entries.description_text: Critically striking with Twin Slice or Annihilan Strike now generates an additional 1 Felfury .

entries.name: Fel Blades
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Azzinoth's Assault now reduces the enemy's armor by -4 % for 10 seconds, stacking 5 times.

entries.name: Azzinoth's Assault
entries.description_text: Consumes 2 Felfury Strike an enemy for Weapon Damage plus 15 + 10% AP with both weapons, additionally scaling with your attack power.

entries.name: Fury Unleashed
entries.description_text: Spin your glaives for 5 seconds, increasing movement speed by 30 % and dealing 200 % Weapon Damage every 1 sec with both weapons to all nearby enemies. You are immune to movement impairing and loss of control effects.

entries.name: Demonic Machinations
entries.description_text: Critical strikes with Sargeron Smite now cause the target to bleed for an additional 50% of the damage dealt over 5 seconds.

entries.name: Reachwalker
entries.description_text: Casting Chaos Rush now reduces the cooldown of Felhoof Charge by -2 sec.

entries.name: Glaiving
entries.description_text: Increases the damage dealt and reduces the Energy cost of Fury Unleashed by 50 % .

entries.name: Burning Rage
entries.description_text: Increases the damage and reduces the cost of Sunder and Immolation Aura by 20 % .

entries.name: Whirling Vengeance
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Fury Unleashed by -60 sec. When Fury Unleashed ends, you strike all nearby enemies for 757 + 56.14% AP Shadowflame Damage and increase their damage taken from Sunder by 100 % for 15 seconds.

entries.name: You Cheat, Gul'dan!
entries.description_text: Increases your critical damage by 50 % against enemies above 75% health.

entries.name: Fury of the Illidari
entries.description_text: 2 Charges, 1.5 min recharge Move quickly from enemy to enemy, attacking them every 1 sec with both weapons until 6 assaults are made, generating 1 Felfury with each strike. While active you are immune to crowd control effects. Can hit the same target multiple times. Cannot hit invisible or stealthed targets.

entries.name: Legionfall
entries.description_text: Melee ability damage now has a 15 % chance to reset the cooldown of Annihilan Strike .

entries.name: Chaos Soldier
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of Azzinoth's Assault and Sargeron Smite by 5 % .

entries.name: Azzinoth's Rage
entries.description_text: Increases your Armor penetration by 10 % and your expertise by 4 .

entries.name: Pit Lord's Rage
entries.description_text: Casting Chaos Rush now increases your Physical damage by 15 % for 10 seconds. Casting Felhoof Charge increases your critical strike chance by 6 % for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Scars of the Past
entries.description_text: Reduces the Energy cost of Chaos Rush by -5 and casting Chaos Rush now heals you for 81 + 20% Stamina + 33% AP .

entries.name: Fel Instincts
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Azzinoth's Assault by 10 % and causes it to increase your melee haste by 20 % for 5 seconds.

entries.name: Spite
entries.description_text: Increases your Agility by 8 % and dodge chance by 3 % .

entries.name: Scars of Suffering
entries.description_text: Casting Azzinoth's Assault now scars the enemy, increasing your allies' attack power against them by 15% Agility for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Felguard
entries.description_text: Emanate a powerful aura, granting 10 % increased melee and ranged haste to party and raid members within 100 yds. Does not stack with similar effects. In addition, while Inner Demon is active, you now heal for 15 % of all melee damage dealt.

entries.name: Oblivion
entries.description_text: Critically striking now increases your damage dealt by 1 % for 4 seconds, stacking 10 times.

entries.name: A Thousand Cuts
entries.description_text: Azzinoth's Assault now has a 30 % chance to hit an additional time with your main-hand Weapon.

entries.name: Azzinoth's Battery
entries.description_text: Your Azzinoth's Assault now has a 30 % chance to not consume Felfury .

entries.name: Slice & Dice
entries.description_text: Increases your off-hand weapon damage by 25 % and reduces the Energy cost of Twin Slice by -5 .

entries.name: Fel Haze
entries.description_text: While active, Blood of Mannoroth now also causes you to ignore all enemy Armor.

entries.name: Perpetual Fury
entries.description_text: Dealing damage with Dancing Blades reduces the cooldown of Fury Unleashed by -1 sec.

entries.name: Immolation Aura
entries.description_text: Wreathe yourself in fire for up to 1 minute, dealing 23 + 30% fire SP + 23% AP Fire Damage to nearby enemies every 3 sec.

entries.name: Dancing Blades
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive Critical strikes with melee abilities now trigger Dancing Blades , dealing off-hand Weapon Damage to up to 5 nearby enemies.

entries.name: Reckless Assault
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Azzinoth's Assault , Annihilan Strike , and Twin Slice by 15 % against slowed enemies.

entries.name: Annihilan Strike
entries.description_text: Generates 2 Felfury Unleash a devastating attack, dealing 145 % Weapon Damage to your target with both weapons. This ability is guaranteed to critically strike against enemies above 75% health.

entries.name: Felhoof Charge
entries.description_text: Generates 1 Felfury Charge an enemy, dealing 60 + 28.5% AP Physical damage.

entries.name: Blighted Strikes
entries.description_text: While Inner Demon is active your melee attacks reduce the target's healing received by -20 % for 8 seconds, stacking 2 times.

entries.name: Pit Lord's Strength
entries.description_text: Your Annihilation now affects 1 additional attack.

entries.name: Consumed By Fel
entries.description_text: Increases the tick rate of Immolation Aura by -25 % .

entries.name: True Self
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Your Inner Demon now grants 10 % increased dodge chance and critical damage dealt while active.

entries.name: Chaotic
entries.description_text: Level 40 Passive While Inner Demon is active, direct melee ability critical strikes now refund 3 Energy.

entries.name: Felcaked Blades
entries.description_text: Level 50 Passive Twin Slice and Sargeron Smite now additionally scale with your Agility.

entries.name: Unbound
entries.description_text: Level 30 Passive Increases your dodge by 15 % of your Agility and your hit rating by 6 % of your Agility.

entries.name: Nether Champion
entries.description_text: Triggering Dancing Blades now increases the damage of next Sargeron Smite by 8 % for 20 seconds, stacking 5 times.

entries.name: Oppressive Ruin
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Ruin now absorbs the next 99 healing on the target based on rank, up to 226 at rank 7 , for 8 sec.

entries.name: Sargeras Embrace
entries.description_text: Channel a beam of fel magic upon an enemy, slowing your target's movement speed by -60 % for 5.5 seconds and dealing cond(gt(SPFI, SPS), 695+0+SPFI*0.85, 695+0+SPS*0.85) Shadowflame Damage at the end of the duration. For the duration, you may instant cast Fel Fireball and Ruin while channeling and they refund their cost.

entries.name: Herald of the Legion
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Bane of Chaos now radiates fel energy around the enemy, dealing 50 % of the damage dealt to up to 8 nearby enemies.

entries.name: Hidden Power
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Increases your spell damage by 15 % of your Intellect and Spirit. In addition, Inner Demon now increases your spell damage and critical strike chance by an additional 20 % of your Spirit.

entries.name: Doomsayer
entries.description_text: Critical strikes with Sargeron Smite now refund 1 Felfury . In addition, Sargeron Smite now deals 25 % increased damage to enemies above 75% of their maximum health.

entries.name: Sculptor of Doom
entries.description_text: Landing 3 direct critical strikes now grants Sculptor of Doom . Sculptor of Doom Your next Ruin within 8 seconds is instant cast.

entries.name: Unphased
entries.description_text: Level 40 Passive Increases your spell penetration by 20 , scaling with your level. In addition, reduces spell pushback suffered from damaging attacks by 50 % while Inner Demon is active.

entries.name: Cursed Flames
entries.description_text: Critically striking with Fel Fireball now increases the critical strike chance of your next Fel Fireball within 10 seconds by 20 % .

entries.name: Fury of Archimonde
entries.description_text: After generating 10 Felfury , your next Sargeron Smite within 15 seconds gains 50 % increased critical strike chance and damage.

entries.name: Felforged
entries.description_text: Periodic damage dealt now has a 15 % chance to grant you Felforged for 8 seconds. Felforged (Proc) Your next 3 Fel Fireballs have -30 % reduced casting speed for 8 seconds.

entries.name: Felbreak
entries.description_text: Interrupt a spell from being cast, preventing the target from casting spells of that school for 3 seconds and draining mana from the target based on your Spirit. Usable while moving.

entries.name: Fel Infusion
entries.description_text: Increases critical strike chance of all party and raid members within 100 by 3 % . Does not stack with similar effects. In addition, increases your critical strike chance by 3 % .

entries.name: Nether Spirit
entries.description_text: Increases your spell critical strike chance by 20 % of your Spirit.

entries.name: Archimonde's Wrath
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of your Felfury spenders by 1 % for every 10 points of Energy you have at the time of casting.

entries.name: Dark Magician
entries.description_text: While Inner Demon is active, casting Ruin , Sunder , or Felwrath now refunds 20 Energy.

entries.name: Infernal Doom
entries.description_text: Ruin now has a -25 % chance not to consume Felfury .

entries.name: Chaotic Intuition
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Felstrikes now extends the duration of Cripple on the target by 1 sec and grants you 1 % increased spell critical damage for 6 seconds, stacking 10 times.

entries.name: Shadow Magi
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Annihilation by -15 sec and Sunder by -4 sec.

entries.name: Bane of Chaos
entries.description_text: Generates 1 Felfury Unleash fel magic on an enemy, dealing 114 Chaos damage over 18 seconds. Inner Demon : The enemy takes an additional 13 + 100% SP Chaos Damage every 6 sec. Can only have 1 Bane active on a target at a time.

entries.name: Illidari Magi
entries.description_text: Your periodic damage now has a 20 % chance to generate 1 Felfury .

entries.name: Withering
entries.description_text: Your Fel Fireballs used with Felforged active now deal 30 % increased damage.

entries.name: Curse of Argus
entries.description_text: Each time Bane of Chaos deals damage its damage is increased on the target by 1 % for 6 seconds, stacking 20 times.

entries.name: Ruin
entries.description_text: Consumes 2 Felfury Bring doom upon an enemy, dealing cond(gt(SPFI, SPS), 116+0+SPFI*1, 116+0+SPS*1.32) Shadowflame Damage to an enemy, piercing all absorption effects. Inner Demon : Deals an additional 30% of the damage dealt over 3 seconds.

entries.name: Felfire Adept
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of Sargeron Smite by 10 % .

entries.name: Infernal
entries.description_text: Drop an infernal from the sky with grotesque magic, dealing 12 + 55% fire SP Fire damage to enemies in the radius, horrifying them for 4 seconds, and spawning an Infernal to fight by your side for 15 seconds. Inner Demon : Lasts 1 additional sec.

entries.name: Wrath of Sargeras
entries.description_text: Increases your Magic damage dealt by 3 % and your spell hit chance by 2 % .

entries.name: Black Magic
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of your Bane of Chaos and Ruin by 10 % .

entries.name: Fel Apprentice
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive While Inner Demon is active, your Fel Fireball will now unleash a Felstrike on your target. Felstrike Burn an enemy for 54 + 30% SP Shadowflame Damage over 6 seconds, stacking 3 times.

entries.name: Man'ari Teachings
entries.description_text: Level 50 Passive Increases your critical damage dealt by 100 % .

entries.name: Fel Cannon
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of Fel Fireball and Ruin by 15 % on enemies above 75% health.

entries.name: Fel Flamecasting
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Sargeron Smite now spreads your Cripple to 2 nearby enemies.

entries.name: Felshock
entries.description_text: Direct critical strikes with Felfury spenders now extend the duration of Inner Demon by 1 sec and cause enemies struck to have a 3 % increased chance to be hit by spells for 12 seconds.

entries.name: Illidari Smiter
entries.description_text: Critical strikes with Fel Fireball now generate 1 Felfury .

entries.name: The True Blessing
entries.description_text: Casting Annihilation now grants you Sculptor of Doom . Sculptor of Doom Your next Ruin within 8 seconds is instant cast.

entries.name: Infernal Ruin
entries.description_text: Every 3rd Ruin or Felwrath now spawns an Infernal to fight by your side for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Felwrath
entries.description_text: Consumes 2 Felfury Blast an enemy and all enemies near them with fel magic, dealing 69 + 40% SP Shadowflame Damage. Inner Demon : Striking at least 5 enemies with this spell causes it to deal an additional 108 + 10% SP Shadowflame Damage over 6 seconds, stacking 3 times.

entries.name: Gul'dan's Prodigy
entries.description_text: Reduces Energy cost and cast time of Fel Fireball by -15 % .

entries.name: Infernal Summoner
