entries.description_text: Direct damage dealt now has a 5 % chance to reset the cooldown of Infernal .

entries.name: Felguard
entries.description_text: Your Chaos Rush now reduces all damage taken by -3 % for 5 seconds, stacking 2 times.

entries.name: Dark Teachings
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of your Intuitions by 20 % .

entries.name: Whispers of the Pit
entries.description_text: Unleash fel energy upon enemies at target location, fearing them and slowing their movement speed by -80 % for 8 seconds. Damage caused may interrupt the effect.

entries.name: Fel Communion
entries.description_text: Increases your maximum Energy by 30 .

entries.name: Chaotic
entries.description_text: Dealing damage now has an 8 % chance to increase your damage by 3 % for 8 seconds, stacking 3 times.

entries.name: Warlock Training
entries.description_text: Cripple now causes the enemy target to be unable to critically strike for 4 seconds.

entries.name: Cruelty
entries.description_text: Increases your critical strike chance by 2 % and an additional 3 % against Demons.

entries.name: Infernal Armor
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of your Hateforged Barrier by -10 sec.

entries.name: Reckoning
entries.description_text: For 10 seconds, your Fel Fireball is free of cost, instant cast, and strikes up to 4 targets. For the duration, your falling speed is slowed and damage dealt by your Fel Fireball increases your damage dealt by 4 % for 15 seconds, stacking 4 times.

entries.name: Mark of Chaos
entries.description_text: Using Chaos Rush increases the next instance of direct spell or ability damage within 5 seconds by 25 % .

entries.name: Manaburn
entries.description_text: Burn an enemy's mana equal to 200% of your Stamina. Deals damage equal to the mana drained.

entries.name: Legion March
entries.description_text: Increases the range of Chaos Rush by 3 yds.

entries.name: Doomstride
entries.description_text: Using Chaos Rush twice in a row now refreshes a charge of Chaos Rush .

entries.name: Illidari Barrier
entries.description_text: Casting Hateforged Barrier now also creates a damage absorption shield on all nearby allies within 15 yds, absorbing 328 + 100% Stamina + 20% SP + 8% AP damage for 5 seconds.

entries.name: Felstrider
entries.description_text: Your Chaos Rush now increases your Energy regeneration by 10 % for 5 seconds, stacking 2 times.

entries.name: Suffering
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Skull of Gul'dan by 5 sec.

entries.name: Cunning
entries.description_text: Reduces the duration of movement impairing effects on you by -20 % .

entries.name: Gul'dan's Gift
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of your Skull of Gul'dan by 50 % , but its cooldown is increased by 30 sec.

entries.name: Felgorged
entries.description_text: Reduces the Energy cost of Cripple and Consume Magic by -10 .

entries.name: Embracing Evil
entries.description_text: Increases the duration and reduces the Energy cost of Banes by 20 % .

entries.name: Armaments of the Legion
entries.description_text: Reduces your chance to be hit by spells by -2 % and increases the absorption value of Hateforge Barrier by 10 % .

entries.name: Elemental Bane
entries.description_text: Increases your critical damage by 10 % and additionally increases your critical strike chance by 15 % while fighting Elementals.

entries.name: Annihilation
entries.description_text: Gorge on fel energy, guaranteeing your next direct instance of damage to critically strike, but causing it to consume 5% of your maximum health. Lasts for 5 attacks or 12 seconds.

entries.name: Felbane
entries.description_text: Curse an enemy, causing the next spell they cast within 4 seconds to be reflected onto them.

entries.name: Magic Fiend
entries.description_text: Increases the amount of beneficial magic effects stolen by your Consume Magic by 1 .

entries.name: Hateforged Barrier
entries.description_text: Manifest a barrier of pure hatred, absorbing 177 + 200% Stamina damage, scaling with your Stamina, for 30 seconds. While the barrier holds, you regenerate 2 % of your maximum health every 2 sec.

entries.name: Skull of Gul'dan
entries.description_text: Consume the essence of the skull of Gul'dan, increasing your maximum health and Energy by 25 % for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Pact Hunter
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of your Pacts by 50 % .

entries.name: Anti-Magic
entries.description_text: When Hateforged Barrier is removed from you, you now reduce -10 % of all Magic damage taken for 8 seconds. In addition, Hateforged Barrier now heals for an additional 2 % of your maximum health each tick.

entries.name: Demonic Evasion
entries.description_text: Increases your chance to dodge by 5 % .

entries.name: Warden's End
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Mana Burn and Illidan's Guile by -20 % .

entries.name: Felwracked
entries.description_text: Every 3rd Twin Slice or Fel Fireball within 15 seconds now generates 1 additional Felfury .

entries.name: Demonborn
entries.description_text: Increases your Energy regeneration by 15 % .

entries.name: Focused Hatred
entries.description_text: Direct magical critical strikes now generate 5 Energy.

entries.name: Felheart
entries.description_text: Each Felfury active now increases your haste by 1 % .

entries.name: Demonic Embrace
entries.description_text: Casting Inner Demon with at least 6 Felfury now restores 50 Energy.

entries.name: Illidan's Guile
entries.description_text: Gorge on fel energy, becoming immune to all physical attacks and spells for 8 seconds, but during that time you cannot attack, move or cast spells. At the end of the duration, your next Chaos Rush within 5 seconds now dashes an additional 20 yds.

entries.name: Heavy Crossbows
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Darkslayer by 50 % , but increases its cast time by 0.5 sec. Your Heartseeking Bolt and Darkslayer now have a 25 % chance to strike an additional time.

entries.name: Witchbane
entries.description_text: Unleash a series of devastating shots dealing 60 + 45% ranged AP Physical damage over 3 seconds.

entries.name: Crossbow Frenzy
entries.description_text: While Twilight Frenzy is active, your movement speed is now increased by 40 % .

entries.name: Crossbow Expert
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Shadowblast by 10 % and Witchbane by 5 % .

entries.name: My Trusty Arbalest
entries.description_text: Reduces the Rage cost of Witchbane and Shadowblast by -10 % and increases your chance to hit by 2 % .

entries.name: Witching Bolt
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of Damnation against Undead and Demons by 25 % .

entries.name: Relentless
entries.description_text: Allows Witchbane to hit an additional nearby enemy.

entries.name: Slayer
entries.description_text: Increases critical strike chance of all party and raid members by 3 % . Does not stack with similar effects. In addition, increases your critical strike chance by 3 % .

entries.name: Silver Bolts
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Heartseeking Bolt and Damnation is increased by 15 % , doubled against Undead or Demons or enemies affected by Shadow Trap .

entries.name: Dead and Gone
entries.description_text: Your Bolt and Dash now affects an additional use of a Heartseeking Bolt . Your Pavise now lasts 2 additional sec and has a -30 sec reduced cooldown.

entries.name: Everything You Have
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Twilight Frenzy by 5 sec, and gives damage dealt by it a 15 % chance to strike again.

entries.name: Bringing the Law
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of Shadowblast by 10 % .

entries.name: Slinging Bolts
entries.description_text: Level 40 Passive Direct ranged damage dealt now has an 8 % chance to grant you Slinging Bolts . Slinging Bolts (Proc) Your next Damnation is usable regardless of the target's current health. Lasts 20 seconds. Can only occur once every 5 sec.

entries.name: Tormenting the Tormented
entries.description_text: Level 50 Passive Your Tormentor can now critically strike.

entries.name: Mechanized Crossbows
entries.description_text: Increases your ranged attack power by 10 % and the range of your ranged abilities by 5 yds.

entries.name: Rapid Reload
entries.description_text: Increases your ranged haste by 8 % .

entries.name: Boltslinger
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive You may now cast Darkslayer while moving. Ranged attacks and abilities now have a 25 % chance to shoot an additional shot, dealing 20% ranged AP Physical damage and generating 5 Rage.

entries.name: Bounty Hunter
entries.description_text: Casting Darkslayer or Witchbane now applies a stack of Bounty Hunter to you for 8 seconds, which can be consumed by casting Heartseeking Bolt to deal an additional 305 + 45% SP + 30% ranged AP Physical damage, stacking 2 times.

entries.name: Contract Killing
entries.description_text: Increases damage dealt against enemies above 75% health and below 35% health by 15 % .

entries.name: Tormentor
entries.description_text: Fire a deadly bolt dealing cond(gt(SPS, SPH), 5+0+SPS*0.175, 5+0+SPH*0.175) Twilight Damage plus 63 + 87.5% ranged AP over 14 seconds.

entries.name: Strafing Shot
entries.description_text: Critical strikes with ranged abilities now spread Tormentor to a nearby enemy.

entries.name: Escape Artist
entries.description_text: Your Daring Escape now resets the cooldown of Vault and generates 10 Rage.

entries.name: Twilight Frenzy
entries.description_text: Spin around, unable to stop moving for 5 seconds, firing shots at nearby enemies for 50 % Ranged Weapon Damage plus cond(gt(SPS, SPH), 15+31+SPS*0.2+ranged AP*0.1, 15+31+SPH*0.2+ranged AP*0.1) as Twilight Damage. Can dodge and parry while active.

entries.name: Resourceful Pursuit
entries.description_text: Reduces the Rage cost of Tormentor and Damnation by -20 % .

entries.name: Pavise Crossbowman
entries.description_text: Teaches you how to use Shields and teaches you Pavise . Pavise Slam your shield into the ground, forming a pavise for 10 sec. While you remain near it, hostile spells targeting you are deflected.

entries.name: Arbalist
entries.description_text: Level 30 Passive Increases your attack power by 100 % of your Intellect.

entries.name: Daring Escape
entries.description_text: Jump backwards, causing all ranged attacks to miss you for 2 seconds.

entries.name: Arbalest Mastery
entries.description_text: Each subsequent shot of a Witchbane cast deals 15 % more damage, up to a maximum of 150 % .

entries.name: Bolt and Dash
entries.description_text: Your next Heartseeking Bolt within 10 seconds deals 25 % more damage and incurs no cooldown. When this buff is consumed you gain 50 % increased movement speed for 3 seconds.

entries.name: One Shot
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of Heartseeking Bolt by 20 % .

entries.name: Bane of Witches
entries.description_text: Casting Heartseeking Bolt now increases your Physical damage dealt by 10 % for 8 seconds.

entries.name: Heartless
entries.description_text: Increases your Physical ranged critical damage by 15 % .

entries.name: Enchanted Bolts
entries.description_text: Increases your Magic damage dealt by 5 % and your Armor penetration by 10 % .

entries.name: Neverending Pursuit
entries.description_text: Critically striking with Damnation now refunds 40 Rage.

entries.name: Heartseeking Bolt
entries.description_text: Charge up a powerful bolt that deals 200 % Ranged Weapon Damage plus 40 + 50% ranged AP + 30% shadow SP to an enemy and reduces their healing received by -30 % for 10 seconds. Generates Rage based on the damage dealt.

entries.name: Rapid
entries.description_text: Your Witchbane now deals its full damage over -1 second shorter period.

entries.name: Kingdom Hearts
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Your Heartseeking Bolt is now guaranteed to critically strike on enemies below 20% health and it now restores 10 % of your maximum mana.

entries.name: Damnation
entries.description_text: Deplete your rage to shoot a powerful bolt dealing 130 % Weapon Damage plus 6 Twilight Damage and converting each point of Rage into additional damage. Only usable on enemies below 35% health.

entries.name: Evasive
entries.description_text: Twilight Frenzy now grants you -20 % reduced damage taken while active.

entries.name: Expert Shot
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Shadowblast by 10 % and your hit chance by 2 % .

entries.name: Lethal Pursuit
entries.description_text: Shadow Rage now also grants your Shadow Hounds 10 % increased haste and it now stacks 3 additional times.

entries.name: Sharpshooter
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Casting Shadowblast now regenerates 5 % of your maximum mana.

entries.name: Dark Mind
entries.description_text: Level 30 Passive Increases your critical strike rating by 25 % of your Intellect.

entries.name: Houndmaster's Call
entries.description_text: Command your Shadow Hounds to leap upon an enemy target, dealing two strikes for 1164 + 30% ranged AP Shadow damage.

entries.name: Unleash the Hounds
entries.description_text: Summon 1 Lesser Shadow Hound to aid you in combat for 20 seconds.

entries.name: Repulse
entries.description_text: Emit a burst of shadow from your musket that strikes enemies in front of you, dealing 57 Shadow damage and knocking all affected targets back.

entries.name: Defender of Darkshire
entries.description_text: Critical strikes with ranged auto attacks now increase the melee haste of your Shadow Hounds by 10 % for 5 seconds.

entries.name: Darkflock
entries.description_text: Channel for 8 seconds, commanding a flock of crows to deal 50 + 15% ranged AP + 85% SP Shadow damage to enemies in a wide cone every 2 sec. Can channel while moving.

entries.name: Trapper
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of your Trap spells by -25 % .

entries.name: Low Dawn
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Sixfold Shot by 25 % and causes it to channel 0.5 sec quicker.

entries.name: Rearmament
entries.description_text: Arm yourself against evil, resetting the cooldown of all Traps and Decimate .

entries.name: Feast of Talons
entries.description_text: Striking at least 5 enemies with Darkflock now causes you to unleash a flock of crows around each enemy struck, dealing 762 + 78.75% SP + 45% ranged AP Twilight Damage over 9 seconds.

entries.name: Anguish
entries.description_text: Your Shadow damage dealt now has a 5 % chance to reduce the channel time of your next Darkflock within 15 seconds by -50 % .

entries.name: Houndmaster
entries.description_text: Using Houndmaster's Call summons 1 Lesser Shadow Hound for 15 seconds that leaps at the target and deals 217 Shadow damage.

entries.name: Pure Agony
entries.description_text: Increases the critical damage of Quickdraw by 50 % .

entries.name: Reload
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Quickdraw by -4 sec.

entries.name: Expulsion of Evil
entries.description_text: Direct ranged attacks and abilities now have a 5 % chance to reset the cooldown of Houndmaster's Call .

entries.name: Loksey's Journal
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Shadow Rage by 20% of your ranged attack power.

entries.name: Deal With The Devil
entries.description_text: Your and your Shadow Hounds critical damage dealt with Shadow damage is increased by 50 % , but the cost of your spells and abilities is increased by 25 % .

entries.name: Decimate
entries.description_text: Empowers your Shadow Hounds for 20 seconds, granting them 30 % increased damage and haste and allowing them to ignore Armor.

entries.name: Quickdraw
entries.description_text: Unleash a quick shot, dealing 175 % Ranged Weapon Damage plus 16 + 20% ranged AP Physical damage and generates Rage. Only usable after critically striking with an ability.

entries.name: Scent of Magic
entries.description_text: Critical strikes now apply Scent of Magic for 15 seconds, causing your Shadow Hound's next Shadow Leap to incur a -10 sec reduced cooldown.

entries.name: Kennel Master
entries.description_text: Casting Unleash The Hounds now has a 25 % chance to summon an additional Lesser Shadow Hound for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Rampaging Hounds
entries.description_text: Your Shadow Hounds melee attacks now cleave 1 additional nearby enemy.

entries.name: Hail of Gunfire
entries.description_text: Increases your ranged haste by 10 % .

entries.name: Darkhunter
entries.description_text: Your Quickdraw now additionally causes your next Darkslayer within 15 seconds to be instant cast.

entries.name: Veiled in Darkness
entries.description_text: A veil of dark magic encircles you at all times, granting 5 % increased Attack Power to party and raid members within 100 yds. Does not stack with similar effects.

entries.name: Coordinated Killing
entries.description_text: Casting Unleash the Hounds now casts Shadow Rage on you for 10 seconds. Shadow Rage Ranged auto attacks deal an additional 50 Shadow Damage.

entries.name: Silver Bullets
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Darkslayer by 10 % , increased by an additional 10 % against Undead.

entries.name: Dark Ranger
entries.description_text: Increases the Shadow damage dealt by your Shadow Hounds by 5 % .

entries.name: Daredevil
entries.description_text: Level 40 Passive When you take damage that would reduce your health to 35% or less, you summon 3 lesser Shadow Hounds and reset the cooldown of Vault . Can only occur once every 2 min.

entries.name: Darkrider
entries.description_text: Reduces the Rage cost of Shadowblast , Vault , and Unleash the Hounds by -10 .

entries.name: Shadow Rage
entries.description_text: Casting Shadowblast now grants Shadow Rage to your Shadow Hound . Shadow Rage Auto attacks have a 50 % chance to deal an additional 57*1+AP*0.07t Shadow Damage. Lasts 15 seconds.

entries.name: Bringer of Darkness
entries.description_text: Your Repulse now resets the cooldown of Vault and makes your next Vault within 6 seconds free of cost.

entries.name: Houndfeeder
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of you and your Shadow Hound by 4 % .

entries.name: Houndmaster
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive Your ranged auto attacks now generate Rage. In addition, teaches you Houndmaster's Whistle . Houndmaster's Whistle Summons a permanent Shadowhound companion to aid you in combat. Your Shadowhound receives 25 % of healing done to you.

entries.name: Flames of Sin
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive Using Dawn Blade now grants you Flames of Sin for 3 sec, causing your auto attacks to deal an additional 30 % of the damage dealt as Fire damage. Granting yourself Flames of Sin in this way while it's already active will increase the current duration by 3 sec.

entries.name: Refined Combatant
entries.description_text: Increases your expertise by 10 .

entries.name: Torchlight
entries.description_text: Throw a torch at an enemy, dealing 166 + 30% AP + 45% fire SP Fire damage, and causing up to 5 of the next attacks you make against them to grant you Flames of Sin and increasing the duration by 2 sec.

entries.name: Burned Alive
entries.description_text: Increases your critical strike chance by 25 % on enemies below 20% health.

entries.name: Hatred & Vitriol
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Stake now ignores enemy armor and its critical strikes refund half of its cost.

entries.name: Duskwood Renegade
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Burrow Bolt by -5 sec.

entries.name: Dusk Blade
entries.description_text: Strike an enemy with both weapons, dealing Weapon Damage plus 10 + 15% shadow SP Shadow damage, piercing resistances. Heals for 25 % of damage dealt.

entries.name: Holy Frenzy
entries.description_text: Increases your melee haste by 15 % .

entries.name: Pyro Tonic
entries.description_text: Drink a fiery tonic, increasing your Fire damage dealt by 20 % and your critical damage by 10 % for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Flames of the Sinned
entries.description_text: Your Smite Evil now has a 25 % chance to strike again. While you have Flames of Sin active, the chance to trigger this effect is increased by 10 % .

entries.name: Torch the Wicked!
entries.description_text: Dealing damage with Flames of Sin now grants 2 % attack speed, stacking up to 12 times for 6 seconds. Application of this effect does not refresh the duration. Additionally, Pyro Tonic now also resets the cooldown of Torchlight .

entries.name: Malice
entries.description_text: Level 30 Passive Increases your Fire spell damage by 50 % of your Agility and your attack power by 100 % of your Intellect.

entries.name: Evil Doers, Beware!
entries.description_text: Level 50 Passive Stake is now guaranteed to critically strike enemies above 75% health.

entries.name: Heartstopper
entries.description_text: Level 40 Passive Casting Purifier's Edge or Fiery Judgement now has a 30 % chance to allow the use of Stake within 8 seconds regardless of the target's health percentage.

entries.name: Monster Hunting
entries.description_text: Increases melee and ranged haste of party and raid members within 100 yds by 10 % . Does not stack with similar effects. In addition, increases your damage dealt against Undead and Demons by 10 % .

entries.name: The Hunt Continues
entries.description_text: Hunt now generates an additional 15 Rage and the mana cost is reduced by -15 % .

entries.name: Cinder and Ashes
entries.description_text: Increases the spell power scaling of Purifier's Edge and Fiery Judgement by 25 % .

entries.name: Hunt
entries.description_text: 2 Charges, 25 sec recharge Charge an enemy, slowing their movement speed by -70 % for 2 seconds and generating 20 Rage.

entries.name: Sinner
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Torchlight by 100 % .

entries.name: Interrogator
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Damage dealt by Dawn Blade now deals an additional 100% of the damage dealt over 10 seconds as Fire damage.

entries.name: Protector of Darkshire
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Dawn Blade and Dusk Blade by 15 % .

entries.name: Scarlet Inquisitor
entries.description_text: Reduces the mana cost of your Traps and Brands by -50 % .

entries.name: Cycle of Despair
entries.description_text: Increases the amount of stacks of Dawn and Dusk by 10 . In addition, reaching 20 stacks with both buffs will consume them to grant you 20 % increased damage, melee haste, movement speed, and critical strike chance for 6 seconds.

entries.name: Purity & Wickedness
entries.description_text: Main-hand auto attacks now apply a stack of Purity to the target, increasing the Fire and Holy damage you deal to them by 2 % per stack, stacking 6 times. Off-hand auto attacks now apply a stack of Wickedness to the target, increasing the Shadow and Physical damage you deal to them by 2 % per stack, stacking 6 times. Torchlight can now consume these stacks to deal 1028 + 25% holy SP + 45% AP Holyflame or Shadowstrike damage to the target.

entries.name: Lightbringer
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Dusk Blade now has a 15 % chance to reduce the mana cost of your next Purifier's Edge by -100 % . This effect has a 25% chance to not be consumed by Purifier's Edge .

entries.name: Stake
entries.description_text: Drive your concealed stake into the chest of an injured enemy, dealing 197 + 67.5% AP Physical damage. Grants Flames of Sin and increases the duration by 3 sec. Only usable on enemies at or below 35% health.

entries.name: Evil Never Sleeps
entries.description_text: Hunt now slows movement speed by an additional 2 sec.

entries.name: Dawn
entries.description_text: Dealing Fire damage now increases the damage dealt by Torchlight and Dusk Blade by 2 % for 5 seconds, stacking 10 times.

entries.name: Searing Hilt
entries.description_text: Purifier's Edge now grants you Searing Hilt for 10 seconds. Searing Hilt Increases your melee attack speed by 10 % for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Flourish
entries.description_text: Perform an advanced flourish, dealing 207 + 100% AP Fire damage to nearby enemies, repeating every 4 sec, and causing your Flames of Sin to cleave up to 3 additional enemies for 20 seconds. Grants you Flames of Sin and increases the duration by 10 sec.

entries.name: Sin Eater
entries.description_text: Increases the amount of next attacks that grant Flames of Sin through Torchlight by 5 .

entries.name: Dusk
entries.description_text: Dealing Physical damage now increases the damage dealt by Stake and Dawn Blade by 2 % for 5 seconds, stacking 10 times.

entries.name: Brushin' Off The Dusk
entries.description_text: Your off-hand auto attacks now have a 10 % chance to strike 2 additional times.

entries.name: Fiery Judgement
entries.description_text: Judge an enemy, dealing 361 + 40% AP + 100% fire SP Fire damage to them and nearby enemies. Grants Flames of Sin or increases the duration by 3 sec.

entries.name: Purifier's Edge
entries.description_text: Strike an enemy with searing blades, dealing Weapon Damage plus 20 with both weapons as Fire damage. Grants Flames of Sin or increases the duration by 3 sec.

entries.name: Darkslayer's Lantern
entries.description_text: Empower a lantern with your Flames of Sin and let it shine, dealing 291 + 15% AP Fire damage and stunning all enemies within 5 yds for 5 seconds.

entries.name: Brooding Hatred
entries.description_text: Increases your off-hand Weapon Damage by 20 % and increases your chance to hit by 3 % .

entries.name: Flexible Fighter
entries.description_text: Increases your Agility by 6 % .

entries.name: Smite Evil
entries.description_text: Strike an enemy with your blade, dealing Weapon Damage plus 25 as Holy damage to them and 5 nearby enemies.

entries.name: Sermon of Flame
entries.description_text: Increases your Fire damage dealt by 5 % .

entries.name: Vampire Hunter
entries.description_text: When an enemy applies a curse to you, your Magic damage taken is reduced by -10 % for 8 seconds. The damage reduction is increased by 5% and duration is increased by 2 seconds for every curse active.

entries.name: Smoke Grenade
entries.description_text: Throw down a smoke grenade, enemies are unable to target into or out of the Smoke for 8 seconds. Any damage caused will remove the effect. All allies in the Smoke area gain 40 % increased movement speed and all enemies have their movement speed slowed by -60 % .

entries.name: Slayer's Mark
entries.description_text: Mark an enemy, increasing the attack power of all attackers against that target by 150 and your critical strike chance against them by 3 % , increasing by 3 % every 1 sec for 8 seconds. For the duration, the enemy is unable to stealth.

entries.name: Shadow Trap
entries.description_text: Place a dark trap on the ground lasting 30 seconds that will curse the first enemy to approach it and up to 5 enemies within 3 yds, stunning them for 4 seconds and dealing 461 + 136% AP Shadow damage over 8 seconds.

entries.name: Trap Card
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of your Traps by 50 % .

entries.name: Vampiric Tonic
entries.description_text: Drink a vampiric tonic, allowing Physical damage dealt to heal you equal to 20 % of the damage dealt for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Night Stalker
entries.description_text: Increases your critical strike chance by 3 % .

entries.name: Dark Intuition
entries.description_text: Whenever you parry or dodge an attack, your attack speed is increased by 5 % , and your parry chance by 2 % for 15 seconds, stacking 2 times.

entries.name: Alchemical Research
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of your Tonics by 25 % .

entries.name: Slayer of Darkness
entries.description_text: Increases damage dealt by 5 % when fighting Demons or Undead. Additionally, direct damage dealt with spells or abilities now has a 10 % chance to deal 151 Holy damage.

entries.name: Regenerative Elixirs
entries.description_text: Drinking Tonics now also restores 30 Rage.

entries.name: Alertness
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Witching Shroud by -10 sec when you are struck by a Shadow or Arcane critical strike.

entries.name: Follow The Edict
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of your Edicts by 20 % .

entries.name: Trickster
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Smoke Grenade by -30 sec and increases its duration by 1 sec.

entries.name: Brand of the Unworthy
entries.description_text: Expose an enemy's darkest faults, disorienting them for 40 seconds ( 8 sec vs players). Damage caused will end this effect. Only usable on Humanoids, Demons, and Undead.

entries.name: Night Walker
entries.description_text: Increases the base range of Vault by 3 yds.

entries.name: Purified Bola
entries.description_text: Your Bola Throw now has 2 charges, deals additional damage, and lasts 2 additional sec, but now costs 10 Rage instead of mana. Purified Bola Throw 2 Charges, 15 sec recharge Throw a bola at an enemy, dealing 348 + 40% AP Holy damage and slowing movement speed by -60 % for 8 seconds.

entries.name: Vengeful Intent
entries.description_text: Whenever you take direct damage you have a 10 % chance to strike back for 75 % Weapon Damage.

entries.name: Renegade
entries.description_text: You now drop caltrops below you each time you use Vault that last 6 seconds.

entries.name: Witching Shroud
entries.description_text: Enter a powerful stealth mode for 3 seconds, granting immunity to all harmful magic effects. Only usable for 10 seconds after being hit by a magical critical strike. Usable while stunned or feared.

entries.name: Tonic Supply
entries.description_text: Using a Tonic now reduces the cooldown of all other Tonics by -10 sec.

entries.name: Inquisitor's Trap
entries.description_text: Place a cruel trap on the ground lasting 1 minute that will curse the first enemy to approach it silencing them and all enemies in a 5 yd radius for 6 seconds.

entries.name: Witchblood Tonic
entries.description_text: Drink a shadowy tonic, removing all curse effects from you and reducing all Magic damage taken by -40 % for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Combat Training
entries.description_text: Increases your Physical damage dealt and parry chance by 3 % .

entries.name: Vishas' Memoir
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of your Brand spells by -25 % .

entries.name: Brimming Hatred
entries.description_text: Your critical strikes now generate 10 Rage. Can only occur every 3 sec.

entries.name: Death Trap
entries.description_text: Place a death trap on the ground lasting 1 minute that will curse the first enemy to approach it, marking them for death, causing them to take 3100 + 100% AP Shadow damage after 1 minute.

entries.name: Burrow Bolt
entries.description_text: Shoot a bolt with a rope attached to it at an enemy dealing 6 + 25% AP Physical damage and pulling them to you.

entries.name: Dark Souls
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Tonics by 5 sec.

entries.name: Vault
entries.description_text: Dash in the direction you are moving. Distance scales with movement speed. Not usable while rooted.

entries.name: Strategist
entries.description_text: Your Vault now regenerates 5 % maximum mana.

entries.name: Evil Never Sleeps
entries.description_text: In the night time, your Agility is increased by 4 % . In the day time, your haste is increased by 3 % .

entries.name: Plagueland Survivalist
entries.description_text: Reduces the duration of disease effects on you by -30 % .

entries.name: Just A Sip
entries.description_text: Drinking Tonics now also restores 5 % of your maximum health and mana.

entries.name: Resilient to Darkness
entries.description_text: Direct Magic damage taken now heals you and restores mana to you equal to 3% of the damage done.

entries.name: Three Sevens
entries.description_text: Increases the duration that Traps last on the ground by 7 sec, reduces the cooldown of Burrow Bolt by -7 sec, and reduces the cost of Dawn Blade by -7 .

entries.name: Dawn Knight
entries.description_text: Level 50 Passive Avoiding damage or dealing damage with auto attacks now has a 40 % chance to grant you Dawn Knight . Dawn Knight Your next Dawn Blade within 15 seconds is free of cost and deals 25 % increased damage.

entries.name: Wicked Intent
entries.description_text: Casting Desecrate now has a 15 % chance to reset the cooldown of Noctis Blade .

entries.name: Dark Barrier
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Stoicism by 5 sec.

entries.name: Grasp of the Undying
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive Auto attacks while wielding a two-handed weapon now have a 25 % chance to unleash Grasp of the Undying , leeching 20 + 15% SP + 10% AP health from the target.

entries.name: Noctis Blade
entries.description_text: Strike an enemy, dealing 100 % Weapon Damage plus 26 , scaling with your parry rating, and healing you for 150 % of the damage dealt.

entries.name: Dark Riposte
entries.description_text: Parrying enemy attacks now restores 5 % of your missing health and Rage.

entries.name: Shadow Brand
entries.description_text: Direct ability damage now applies Shadow Brand to enemies. Shadow Brand Marks the target for 12 seconds, dealing 36 High Threat Shadow Damage over 12 seconds.

entries.name: March of the Black King
entries.description_text: Expel darkness from within you, dealing 55 Shadow damage to nearby enemies over 10 seconds. Generates 5 Rage every 2 sec.

entries.name: Witchblight
entries.description_text: Explode with dark energy, dealing 51 + 50% shadow SP + 20% AP Shadow damage to up to to 10 enemies within 8 yds and healing you for 20 % of your maximum health. Each target struck is guaranteed to miss their next instance of damage within 6 seconds.

entries.name: Guard Strike
entries.description_text: Bash an enemy with your weapon's hilt, interrupting them and preventing any spell from that school of magic from being cast for 3 seconds.

entries.name: Shadowy Tendrils
entries.description_text: Your Grasp of the Undying now strikes 2 additional nearby enemies.

entries.name: Witch Knight
entries.description_text: Direct ability damage with a two-handed weapon now reduces the remaining cooldown of your Tonics by -1 sec and grants Witching . Witching Increases magic resistances by 10 % , and melee haste by 10 % for 8 seconds, stacking 3 times.

entries.name: Bulwark of Darkness
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Dawn Blade is now increased by 5 % for each stack of Pommel Smash on the target.

entries.name: Chains of Darkness
entries.description_text: Pull all nearby enemies to you, dealing 84 + 55% shadow SP + 15% AP Shadow damage and taunting them for 3 seconds.

entries.name: Destroyer of Evil
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Dawn Blade now deals an additional 20 % of the damage dealt as Twilight Damage every 1 sec for 3 seconds. Shadow Brand Marks the target for 12 seconds, dealing 36 High Threat Shadow Damage over 12 seconds.

entries.name: Desecrate
entries.description_text: Desecrate up to 8 enemies in front of you, dealing Weapon Damage plus 18 as Shadow damage, piercing resistances. Only usable after avoiding an attack.

entries.name: Clinch Fighting
entries.description_text: Attacks which would otherwise kill you now heal you for 50 % maximum health and increases the damage of Noctis Blade by 50 % for 6 seconds. Can only occur once every 2 min.

entries.name: Undying
entries.description_text: While below 75% maximum health, Dawn Blade now increases the critical strike chance of Noctis Blade by 40 % for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Calm Under Pressure
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Stoicism by -30 sec and Burrow Bolt by -5 sec.

entries.name: Night King
entries.description_text: Noctis Blade now consumes Shadow Brand to deal 50 % increased damage.

entries.name: Wide Swings
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Noctis Blade and Grasp of the Undying by 20 % on enemies affected by Shadow Brand .

entries.name: Dark Chivalry
entries.description_text: Increases your Armor contribution from mail items by 100 % .

entries.name: Foresight
entries.description_text: Your direct Physical critical strikes now grant allies Replenishment . In addition, Dawn Blade is now guaranteed to critically strike against Undead or Demons. Replenishment Restores 1 % maximum mana every 5 sec to allies within 100 yds for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Blade of the Misbegotten
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Dawn Blade now increases your health by 15% of the damage dealt for 8 seconds, stacking 3 times.

entries.name: Shadowstorm
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Pommel Smash now has a 20 % chance to trigger a Shadowstorm . Shadowstorm Leeches 350 + 30% SP + 10% AP health from enemies within 8 yds.

entries.name: Witching Idol
entries.description_text: Drop a Witching Idol that periodically dispels fear, sleep, and charm effects every 3 sec from party members within 20 yds.

entries.name: Guardbreaker
entries.description_text: Your Pommel Smash now strikes an additional nearby enemy.

entries.name: Secret Society
entries.description_text: Increases your Shadow critical strike chance and Shadow damage dealt by 4 % and your expertise by 5 .

entries.name: No Regrets
entries.description_text: Your March of the Black King now increases your Armor by 15 % .

entries.name: Dark Juggernaut
entries.description_text: Desecrate now restores 10 + 20% shadow SP + 10% AP health plus an additional 1 % maximum health for each target struck affected by Shadow Brand .

entries.name: Knight's Seal
entries.description_text: Curse an enemy, dealing 66 + 19.2% shadow SP + 14.6% AP Shadow damage every 2 sec and applying Dark Oath to you, reducing all damage taken by -5 % for 8 seconds. Your next Desecrate within 8 seconds now restores 15 % of your maximum health and mana.

entries.name: Gaze of the Black Knight
entries.description_text: Apply a dark shield to yourself, absorbing 3255 + 700% Stamina + 41% AP damage and then gaze upon your party members, causing 25 % of the damage they take to be transferred to you for 12 seconds. Damage which reduces your health below 20 % will break the effect. Usable while stunned.

entries.name: Dark Penance
entries.description_text: Increases your Agility and your chance to parry and dodge by 2 % .

entries.name: Dark Power
entries.description_text: Level 30 Passive You now gain 1 Stamina for every 2 Agility.

entries.name: Dusk Knight
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Increases your parry rating by 40 % of your Agility and your dodge rating by 25 % of your Intellect.

entries.name: Shadow Order
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Shadow Brand by 20 % and your hit rating by 3 % of your Agility.

entries.name: Noctis Protection
entries.description_text: Casting Noctis Blade now applies a shield absorbing 166 + 200% Stamina + 10% AP damage for 4 seconds.

entries.name: Lightning Rod
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Forked Lightning now has a 20 % chance to spread an active Volt on your target to each affected enemy. Chance increases based on Static level.

entries.name: Titanstorm
entries.description_text: Casting Call Lightning or Electrocute now reduces the cooldown of Arm of Thorim and Lightning Cage by -1.5 sec.

entries.name: Voltaic Bursts
entries.description_text: Increases the periodic damage of Shock by 50 % .

entries.name: Flux Arc
entries.description_text: Your Forked Lightning and Arm of Thorim now marks enemies for 6 sec. Your Call Lightning against marked enemies deals an additional 15 % of its damage to them and nearby enemies.

entries.name: Electrocutioner
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive Dealing spell damage now has a 5 % chance to grant you Electrocutioner . Electrocutioner (Proc) Resets the cooldown of Electrocute and makes your next usable regardless of the target's health percentage. Chance increases based on Static level.

entries.name: Lord of Lightning
entries.description_text: Storm Ascendance now additionally grants you Lord of Lightning for 20 seconds. Lord of Lightning Increases the damage dealt by Forked Lightning , Call Lightning , and Electrocute by an additional 30 % and allows Electrocute to strike 3 additional enemies.

entries.name: Thunderous
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Increases the critical damage of your spells by 150 % .

entries.name: Fast as Lightning
entries.description_text: Level 30 Passive While Electrocutioner is active, your Electrocute now gains 20 % increased damage.

entries.name: Fulmination
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of Call Lightning and Arm of Thorim by 15 % against targets affected by your Volt .

entries.name: Piercing Lightning
entries.description_text: Level 40 Passive Increases your Nature spell penetration by 20 , scaling with your level. In addition, Stormbreaker now dispels 1 additional magic effect.

entries.name: Sparks
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Electrocute and Arm of Thorim now increase the target's chance to be critically hit by spells by 3 % for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Electrifying Aura
entries.description_text: Increases critical strike chance of all party and raid members by 3 % . Does not stack with similar effects.

entries.name: Electrical Charge
entries.description_text: Standing still grants you Electrical Charge every second, increasing your haste by 1 % . Upon reaching 20 stacks, your spells dont deplete Static for 10 seconds, after which the charges are depleted.

entries.name: Stormy Days
entries.description_text: Increases the tick rate of Conjure Storm by -25 % .

entries.name: Wicked Storms
entries.description_text: Increases your Nature damage dealt by 5 % .

entries.name: Ascension
entries.description_text: Level 50 Passive Increases the duration of your Storm Ascendance by 10 sec.

entries.name: Volt
entries.description_text: Fuse lightning into an enemy, dealing 150 + 114% nature SP Nature damage over 18 seconds and slowing them by -40 % . Generates 2 Static per tick.

entries.name: Lightning Cage
entries.description_text: Generates 50 Static Ascend into the air and cage yourself in lightning for 30 seconds, locking yourself in place. While inside the cage, damaging spells generate 20 Static and their range is doubled.

entries.name: Ride the Lightning
entries.description_text: Depletes 40 Static Infuse yourself with lightning and blink forward a long distance, dealing 540 + 50% SP Nature damage to all enemies in your path. Scales with modifiers to Discharge

entries.name: Forked Lightning
entries.description_text: Shoot lightning at an enemy, dealing 69 + 49% SP Nature damage, bouncing to up to 4 enemies. Generates 5 Static for each enemy struck.

entries.name: Superconductor
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of your Arm of Thorim by an additional 1 % per Static depleted.

entries.name: Dark Skies
entries.description_text: When your direct damage spells fail to critically strike, your critical strike chance is increased by 2 % for 10 seconds, stacking up to 5 times. Critically striking removes this effect.

entries.name: Improved Forked Lightning
entries.description_text: Your Forked Lightning now affects 1 additional enemy.

entries.name: Storm Barrier
entries.description_text: While Lightning Cage is active your Magic Damage taken is now reduced by -25 % and you are unable to be hit by ranged attacks.

entries.name: Tome of Lightning
entries.description_text: Increases your critical strike chance by 2 % and reduces the duration of interrupt and silence effects against you by -20 % .

entries.name: Invoking Storms
entries.description_text: Increases the spell power scaling of Shock , Call Lightning , and Arm of Thorim by 15 % .

entries.name: Crackling Devastation
entries.description_text: Increases the critical damage of Electrocute by 30 % .

entries.name: Titanic Thunderbolt
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of Shock , Conjure Storm , and Eye of the Storm by 4 % .

entries.name: Thorim's Gift
entries.description_text: Your Arm of Thorim now leaves unstable electricity beneath the target, dealing damage equal to 10 % of its damage dealt to enemies within every 1 sec for 3 seconds.

entries.name: Never Strikes Twice?
entries.description_text: Your Electrocute now has a 25 % chance to strike again.

entries.name: Jolt
entries.description_text: Increases the damage and critical strike chance of Electrocute by 10 % .

entries.name: Critical Circuit
entries.description_text: Direct critical strikes with Static spenders now refund 10 Static .

entries.name: Thundershocker
entries.description_text: While rooted by Eye of the Storm , affected enemies now take 30 % increased damage from you.

entries.name: Arm of Thorim
entries.description_text: Depletes All Static Call down a terrible beam of lightning upon an enemy, dealing 135 + 120% nature SP Nature damage and stunning them for 1 seconds. Damage and cast time increased based on Static level.

entries.name: Electric Energy
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of your Shock , Call Lightning , and Arm of Thorim by 20 % .

entries.name: Thunder Wave
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Forked Lightning has a 5 % chance to transform it into Thunder Wave . Thunder Wave (Spell) Bring lightning down upon an enemy and nearby enemies, dealing 206 + 65% arcane SP Spellstorm Damage and refreshing the duration of Volt on enemies struck. Deals 30 % increased damage to enemies affected by Volt .

entries.name: High Voltage
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Arm of Thorim's stun effect by 1 sec.

entries.name: Windsurf
entries.description_text: Command your Air Elemental to windsurf to you, intercepting the next melee or ranged attack made against you, and allowing you to cast Shock and Call Lightning while moving for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Clearsky Pendant
entries.description_text: Ally movement speed is increased by an additional 25 % to allies within your Updraft .

entries.name: Evergale
entries.description_text: Casting Call Lightning now refreshes a charge of Gale .

entries.name: Power the Elements
entries.description_text: Increases the damage dealt by your Air Elemental 's spells by 10 % and your Nature damage dealt by 2 % .

entries.name: Skyfall
entries.description_text: Depletes 40 Static Command your Air Elemental , causing its next instance of damage within 8 seconds to strike an enemy, dealing 1349 + 100% arcane SP Nature damage and increasing the movement speed of all nearby allies by 30 % for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Master Elementalist
entries.description_text: Increases the spell damage scaling of Shock by 10 % and Aeroblast by 20 % .

entries.name: Wind Gate
entries.description_text: Place a Wind Gate at target location for 1 minute. You may cast Wind Gate: Evacuate on an ally to pull them to your Wind Gate .

entries.name: Nimbus
entries.description_text: Instantly resets the cooldown of your Evacuate , Windsurf , and Unshackle .

entries.name: Everlasting Invigoration
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Invigoration by 5 sec.

entries.name: Invigoration
entries.description_text: Your Aeroblast now grants your Air Elemental a stack of Invigoration . Invigoration Increases the damage of your Air Elemental by 3 % for 15 seconds, stacking 10 times. Additional applications do not refresh duration.

entries.name: Windrunner
entries.description_text: The wind is always at your back, pushing you to move faster, increasing your movement speed and mounted movement speed by 15 % .

entries.name: Gale
entries.description_text: 3 Charges, 10 sec recharge Generates 20 Static Blast an enemy and up to 2 nearby enemies with a powerful gust of wind for 53 + 42% nature SP Nature damage.

entries.name: Lexicon of Servitude
entries.description_text: Read from your ancient lexicon, causing your next Summon: Air Elemental to be instant cast and cost no mana. Lasts 15 seconds.

entries.name: Tailwind
entries.description_text: Depletes 20 Static Tap into the swift winds, increasing your damage by 10 % and granting all allied players 5 % increased haste for 15 seconds. Does not stack with similar effects.

entries.name: Focal Point
entries.description_text: Casting Call Lightning now increases the critical strike chance of party and raid members by 5 % for 10 seconds. Does not stack with similar effects.

entries.name: Unbound Elementalist
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of your Unshackle by 20 % .

entries.name: Storm Clouds
entries.description_text: Your Body of Lightning is now automatically cast on you when you cast it on an ally.

entries.name: Flow
entries.description_text: Your Invigoration now stacks 5 additional times.

entries.name: Cyclone's Recharge
entries.description_text: Casting Shock , Gale or Electrocute now reduces the remaining cooldown of your Kiss of the Clouds by -1 sec.

entries.name: Raging Zephyr
entries.description_text: Transforms your Whirlpool into Raging Zephyr . Raging Zephyr 3 Charges, 35 sec recharge Summon a Raging Zephyr at the targeted location for 12 seconds. Every 4 sec, it will pull all enemies within 10 yds inside of it.

entries.name: Master Airbender
entries.description_text: Casting Gale now reduces the cooldown of abilities that deplete Static by -1 sec.

entries.name: Hurricanes
entries.description_text: Casting Unshackle now unshackles you, increasing your damage dealt by 15 % for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Aeromancy
entries.description_text: Casting Updraft will now cause your Air Elemental to cast its own Updraft beneath you.

entries.name: Unrelenting Winds
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of Gale by 15 % .

entries.name: Gift of Air
entries.description_text: Casting Kiss of the Clouds now empowers your Air Elemental with Gift of Air for 30 seconds. In addition, your critical strikes now extend the duration of your Tailwind by 1.5 sec. Gift of Air Increases damage dealt by 20 % , spell haste by 15 % , and heals for 13.75 every 2 sec.

entries.name: Wrath of Al'Akir
entries.description_text: Depleting Static extends the duration of your Unshackle by 3 sec.

entries.name: Child of the Storm
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of your Cloudburst and Windsurf by -20 % .

entries.name: Unshackle
entries.description_text: Depletes 50 Static Transforms your Air Elemental into a more powerful form for 15 seconds, increasing damage dealt by 25 % and spell haste by 30 % .

entries.name: Flurry
entries.description_text: Depletes 10 Static Command your Air Elemental , causing its next instance of damage to unleash a flurry of air on your target, dealing 763 + 140% nature SP Nature damage over 21 seconds, and reducing their resistances by 75 , and increasing their Magic damage taken by -2 % .

entries.name: Storm Bond
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by your Air Elemental now generates you 2 Static .

entries.name: Air Flow
entries.description_text: Reduces the cast time of Aeroblast by -0.3 sec.

entries.name: Aurat Scripts
entries.description_text: Increases the damage gained per stack of Invigoration by 2 % .

entries.name: Clear Skies
entries.description_text: Increases chance to hit with all spells and attacks by 1 % for you and party and raid members. Does not stack with similar effects.

entries.name: Cyclone's Embrace
entries.description_text: Increases the base amount absorbed by your Kiss of the Clouds by 100 % .

entries.name: Kiss of the Clouds
entries.description_text: Depletes 40 Static Grant all party and raid members a shield that absorbs 101 + 100% Intellect damage, scaling with Intellect, for 10 seconds. While active, the target suffers no spell pushback from taking damage.

entries.name: Comforting Winds
entries.description_text: Your damage dealt now increases the haste of your Air Elemental by 1 % for 10 seconds, stacking 5 times. Damage dealt by your Air Elemental now increases your haste by 1 % for 10 seconds, stacking 5 times.

entries.name: Quickdraft
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of your Updraft by 3 sec and increases its tick rate by -15 % .

entries.name: Aerodynamics
entries.description_text: Depletes 40 Static Envelop party and raid members within 40 yds in magical mist, increasing their attack or spell power by 95 for 15 seconds. Does not stack with similar effects.

entries.name: Tempest's Call
entries.description_text: Bring the power of wind and storm to all nearby allies, increasing haste by 30 % for 20 seconds. After being affected by this spell, allies cannot benefit from similar effects for 5 minutes.

entries.name: Surge of Might
entries.description_text: Emanate an aura around you for 15 seconds, causing allied players within 100 yds to deal 70% nature SP additional damage as Nature damage when they deal direct damage. Applies Exhaustion , preventing you from benefiting from similar effects for 1 minute.

entries.name: Enveloping Winds
entries.description_text: Casting Gale now causes your Air Elemental to cast Gale . Additionally, you now emanate an aura around you, increasing the Armor of party and raid members by 390 . Does not stack with similar effects.

entries.name: Blessing of Lei Shen
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Stormflow now heals you equal to the damage dealt.

entries.name: Storm Synergy
entries.description_text: Level 40 Passive Your Electrocute can now be used while channeling Stormflow .

entries.name: Hydromatic
entries.description_text: Level 50 Passive Your Electrocute is now affected by Conductive , increasing its damage by 10 % per stack.

entries.name: Washed Away
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Drown by -15 sec.

entries.name: Undertow
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of Drown by 25 % .

entries.name: Whirling Maelstrom
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Increases your spell haste by 20 % of your Intellect.

entries.name: Unbridled Flow
entries.description_text: Level 30 Passive Damage dealt by Shock is now increased by 15 % while channeling Stormflow .

entries.name: Shockingly Powerful
entries.description_text: Your Conduction now has a -25 % chance to not consume Conductive .

entries.name: Lethal Current
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of Electrocute by 30 % against enemies below 20% health.

entries.name: Stormflow
entries.description_text: Depletes 20 Static Channel a storm beam upon an enemy, dealing 112 + 160% SP Frost Damage over 8 seconds, scaling with your spell haste. Shock can be instantly cast while channeling.

entries.name: Raining and Pouring
entries.description_text: Increases the critical damage of your Torrential Wrath and Electrocute by 30 % .

entries.name: Stormcloud
entries.description_text: Summon a cloud above an enemy target's head for 15 seconds, causing them to take 20 % additional damage from your spells. Using Torrential Wrath on an enemy affected by Stormcloud causes a Geyser to erupt beneath them, dealing 571 + 25% frost SP Frost damage and knocking them up slightly.

entries.name: Torrential Rage
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Torrential Wrath and Stormflow by 15 % .

entries.name: Disciple of Thorim
entries.description_text: Reduces the cast time of your Torrential Wrath by -0.2 sec and increases your hit chance by 2 % .

entries.name: Stormcaller
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown and mana cost of Eye of the Storm by -15 % .

entries.name: Thunder Ward
entries.description_text: Depletes All Static Encase yourself in an electrical shield, removing and making you immune to all physical attacks and spells for 10 seconds. Cannot generate Static for the duration.

entries.name: Hydro Powered
entries.description_text: Increases your spell critical damage by 35 % .

entries.name: Amped Flow
entries.description_text: While channeling Stormflow , your Shock now strikes 1 additional target at 75 % value.

entries.name: Stormfury
entries.description_text: Depletes 50 Static Summon a flurry of rain, wind, and lightning from the sky for 20 seconds. Every 2 sec, enemies within 30 yds of the caster are zapped with lightning, dealing 540 + 55% nature SP Nature damage.

entries.name: Conduit
entries.description_text: Dealing Frost damage now has a 60 % chance to increase the damage the target takes from Electrocute by 15 % for 10 seconds, stacking up to 4 times.

entries.name: Cloudsurfer
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Shock by 20 % .

entries.name: Flow of Wrath
entries.description_text: Increases your critical strike chance by 15 % against enemies affected by Drown .

entries.name: Static Electricity
entries.description_text: Critical strikes with Torrential Wrath now spawn an Electrified Water Elemental to aid you in combat for 20 sec. When an Electrified Water Elemental dissipates, the cooldown of your Drown is reduced by -1.5 sec.

entries.name: Drown
entries.description_text: Attempt to drown an enemy, reducing their healing received by -20 % for 8 seconds. At the end of the duration, unleash a creature from the depths dealing cond(gt(SPFR, SPN), 83+0+SPFR*1, 83+0+SPN*1) Frost Damage. Each time you generate a stack of Conductive you increase their damage taken from this effect, stacking up to 5 times.

entries.name: Unstable
entries.description_text: Your direct damage critical strikes cause your Stormflow to tick -20 % faster for 3 seconds.

entries.name: Kinetic Energy
entries.description_text: Casting a spell that consumes Conductive now grants you a stack of Kinetic Energy . Kinetic Energy Critical strike chance increased by 2 % , stacking 3 times, for 10 seconds. Additional applications do not refresh the duration.

entries.name: Spheres of Power
entries.description_text: Your direct damage dealt now has a 25 % chance to summon a Power Sphere that will move towards your target. Can only have 1 Power Sphere up at a time. Power Sphere will redirect its movement towards enemies you cast Stormflow on. Upon reaching the target, it deals cond(gt(SPA, SPN), 697+33+SPA*0.485, 697+33+SPN*0.485) Spellstorm Damage to them and enemies within 5 yds.

entries.name: Prodigy of Lei Shen
entries.description_text: Allows your Stormflow to critically strike.

entries.name: Electrified Waters
entries.description_text: Your direct critical strikes against an enemy affected by Drown spawn an Electrified Water Elemental to aid you in combat for 20 seconds. When an Electrified Water Elemental dissipates, the cooldown of your Drown is reduced by -1.5 sec.

entries.name: Mystic Thunder
entries.description_text: Interrupt the target's current spell cast and then mark them for 5 seconds. If they cast again while marked they are silenced for 3 seconds.

entries.name: Voltaic Mastery
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Deluge is increased by 5 % for each stack of Conductive .

entries.name: Bursting
entries.description_text: Increases the stack value of Drowning by 20 % .

entries.name: Conductor In Charge
entries.description_text: Increases all damage dealt by party and raid members by 3 % and your Frost damage dealt by 5 % . Does not stack with similar effects.

entries.name: Studious
entries.description_text: Reduces the cast time of Shock by -15 % .

entries.name: Magic Elimination
entries.description_text: Increases the amount of beneficial magic effects purged by your Stormbreaker by 1 and its range by 10 yds.

entries.name: Body of Lightning
entries.description_text: Depletes 25 Static Infuse an ally with lightning for 12 seconds, regenerating 15 % of their maximum mana plus 1 % every 1 sec. While active, damage dealt deals an additional 75 + 15% nature SP Nature damage to nearby enemies

entries.name: Eye of the Storm
entries.description_text: Mark an enemy for 4 seconds. Every 1 sec, enemies near them take cond(gt(SPFR, SPN), 11+0+SPFR*0.42, 11+0+SPN*0.42) Nature damage. At the end of the duration, enemies near them also take cond(gt(SPFR, SPN), 42+0+SPFR*0.64, 42+0+SPN*0.64) Nature damage and are rooted for 4 seconds.

entries.name: Stormcloak
entries.description_text: Cover yourself in a barrier of volatile energy for 15 seconds, causing all attacks against you to have a 50 % chance to deal half damage and generate 10 Static . Stormcloak has a 60 % chance to resist dispel effects.

entries.name: Storm Rider
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Gale Guard and Cloudburst by -5 sec.

entries.name: Storm Ascendance
entries.description_text: Transform into a storm elemental for 15 seconds, increasing your Magic damage dealt by 20 % and reducing your Magic damage taken by -50 % . In addition, your damaging spells now generate an additional 10 Static . Can only occur once every sec.

entries.name: Ionic Aura
entries.description_text: Increases the maximum mana, Rage, Energy, Focus, and Runic Power of allies within 40 yds by 3 % .

entries.name: Storm Channeling
entries.description_text: While Stormcloak is active your Armor is now increased by 500 % of your Intellect.

entries.name: Concentrated Static
entries.description_text: Casting Discharge now restores 5 % more mana.

entries.name: Pulse Conversion
entries.description_text: Dispelling a magic effect with Stormbreaker now heals you for 3 % of your maximum health.

entries.name: Eye of the Tornado
entries.description_text: Your damaging critical strikes now refund 5 Static .

entries.name: Predictable Weather
entries.description_text: Every 30 sec, your next Storm Alert or Torrential Wrath is instant cast.

entries.name: Conjuration Mastery
entries.description_text: Your Conjure Storm now refunds 10 Static .

entries.name: Residual Power
entries.description_text: Reduces your Magic damage taken by -10 % .

entries.name: Power Surge
entries.description_text: Your Storm Ascendance now increases Nature damage dealt by an additional 10 % .

entries.name: Charge
entries.description_text: Charge yourself with electricity, generating 100 Static and increasing your spell haste by 30 % for your next cast. Lasts 10 seconds.

entries.name: Invigorating Winds
entries.description_text: Envelop an ally in invigorating winds, granting them immunity to silence and interrupt effects and causes them to take no pushback from damaging attacks for 20 seconds.

entries.name: Heavy Winds
entries.description_text: Increases the pushback reduction provided by Stabilizing Pressure by 15 % .

entries.name: Storm Warning
entries.description_text: Reduces the cast time of Storm Alert by -0.5 sec.

entries.name: Waterfall
entries.description_text: Dealing critical damage now reduces all of your cooldowns by -0.5 sec.

entries.name: Arcane Lightning
entries.description_text: Increases your Intellect and Spirit by 5 % .

entries.name: Airing Out
entries.description_text: Reduces the duration of incapacitate and disorient effects by -20 % .

entries.name: Lingering Storm
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of your Stormcloak , Conjure Storm and Body of Lightning by 30 % .

entries.name: Storm Chaser
entries.description_text: Dealing direct spell damage now has a 33 % chance to reduce the cast time of your next Call Lightning by -15 % for 10 seconds, stacking 2 times.

entries.name: Fog
entries.description_text: Concentrate elemental magic to create an 8 yd wide cloudy barrier at your feet for 8 seconds. Enemies are unable to target into or out of the Fog .

entries.name: Aether Mastery
entries.description_text: Allows 30 % of your mana regeneration to continue while casting and increases your critical strike chance by 2 % .

entries.name: Thunder Grip
entries.description_text: Direct damage dealt now has a 30 % chance to apply Thunder Grip to enemies. Thunder Grip Prevents enemies from mounting, fleeing, and increasing their movement speed above normal movement speed for 8 seconds.

entries.name: Altered Course
entries.description_text: Casting Discharge now increases your movement speed by 20 % for 6 seconds, stacking 2 times.

entries.name: Surge Overload
entries.description_text: Your Body of Lightning now regenerates 1 % additional maximum mana per tick.

entries.name: Exhale
entries.description_text: Depletes 20 Static Release the pressure from nearby allies, dispelling 1 movement slowing effect, repeating every 3 sec for 9 seconds.

entries.name: Wind Shift
entries.description_text: Increases your spell haste by 2 % and reduces spell pushback suffered from damaging attacks by 25 % .

entries.name: Storm Sorcery
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of Call of the Winds and Call of the Storm by 20 % .

entries.name: Aethermancy
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of your Invigorating Surge by 20 % .

entries.name: Aviana's Blessing
entries.description_text: Reduces your total threat generated by -30 % and increases the range of Gust of Wind by 3 yds.

entries.name: Improved Body of Lightning
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of your Body of Lightning by -30 sec.

entries.name: Spellstorm Mastery
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of your Aegis spells by 15 % .

entries.name: Cloudburst
entries.description_text: Create a mighty gust of wind that knocks away all nearby enemies.

entries.name: Gore
entries.description_text: 2 Charges, 8 sec recharge Generates 1 Demonfire Quickly gore an enemy, dealing 100 % Weapon Damage plus 15 .

entries.name: Murderous Might
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of abilities that spend Demonfire by 25 % .

entries.name: Burning Blade
entries.description_text: Your Skulltaker now ignores -25 % of the target's Armor.

entries.name: Hellfire Striker
entries.description_text: Increases your critical strike and hit chance by 3 % .

entries.name: Carver
entries.description_text: Level 30 Passive Critical strikes with Gore now generate 1 additional Demonfire .

entries.name: Domination
entries.description_text: Melee critical strikes now reduce the cooldown of Searing Blade by -1 sec.

entries.name: Pestilence Unbound
entries.description_text: When you use an ability that consumes Demonfire with 6 stacks, you now unleash your active Pestilence at half of their effectiveness.

entries.name: Boundless Fury
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of the unleash effect from Pestilence of Death by 30 % .

entries.name: Blood Frenzy
entries.description_text: Abilities that spend Demonfire now refund 1 Demonfire when used with at least 4 stacks.

entries.name: Hook, Line, and Sinker
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Flesh Hook and Chainwhip by -5 sec.

entries.name: Hand of Doom
entries.description_text: Increases the Weapon Damage dealt by Sever by 10% , increased by 10 % for each Demonfire you have active.

entries.name: Hellknight
entries.description_text: While above 75% health, all direct Physical damage dealt will grant a stack of Hellknight . Hellknight Movement speed increased and global cooldowns reduced by -5 % . Physical Damage and critical strike chance increased by 1 % , stacking 5 times. Lasts 20 seconds.

entries.name: Hellsmelted
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance and damage of Burning Blade by 30 % .

entries.name: Mutilation
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Gore and Sever by 10 % .

entries.name: Demonic Blade
entries.description_text: Damaging abilities that spend Demonfire now increase the damage and cost of your next 2 Gores by 25 % for 12 seconds. At the end of the duration, or when all stacks are consumed, you instantly cast Meatsaw free of cost.

entries.name: Pestilence of Death
entries.description_text: Emanate a pestilence, increasing your critical damage by 10 % .

entries.name: Jagged Edge
entries.description_text: Increases your Rage generated from damage dealt by 20 % .

entries.name: Crusher
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive Doubles the base Weapon Damage dealt by Infernal Strike and increases all critical damage dealt by 25 % .

entries.name: Knight of the Apocalypse
entries.description_text: Level 50 Passive Unleash Pestilence now triggers no cooldown on it's first use. Unleash Pestilence can only be reset this way once every 30 sec.

entries.name: Bringer of Destruction
entries.description_text: Critical damage taken now grants you 1 Demonfire and 5 Rage. Can only occur once every 3 sec.

entries.name: Knight of Pestilence
entries.description_text: Increases the critical damage of your Pestilences by 50 % .

entries.name: Gored
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Gore and Meatsaw now increases your target's damage taken from Skulltaker and Warbringer by 15 % for 10 seconds, stacking 2 times.

entries.name: Decimation
entries.description_text: Your next Skulltaker or Warbringer is guaranteed to critically strike for 25 % increased damage. Lasts 30 seconds.

entries.name: Consuming Blade
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of Gore by 25 % and your expertise by 5 .

entries.name: Screamin' Demon
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Unleash Pestilence by -15 sec.

entries.name: Absolutism
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Meatsaw now ignores -10 % of the target's Armor.

entries.name: Burning Blade
entries.description_text: Ignite your weapon, causing you to send out searing fire with each melee critical strike, dealing 270 + 32.5% AP Fire damage in a line and increasing your Armor penetration by 30 % while active. Lasts for 6 attacks. Lasts for 1 additional attack per Demonfire consumed.

entries.name: Brimstone Bludgeon
entries.description_text: Transforms your Sever into Brimstone Bludgeon . Brimstone Bludgeon Generates 1 Demonfire Bludgeon an enemy and all nearby enemies, dealing 250 % Weapon Damage. Unleashes your active Pestilence to trigger a powerful effect. Scales with modifiers to Sever .

entries.name: The Butcher
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Meatsaw now increases the damage dealt by subsequent Meatsaws by 10 % and reduces its global cooldown by -5 % for 10 seconds, stacking 5 times.

entries.name: Conqueror's Will
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of all party and raid members by 3 % . Does not stack with similar effects. In addition, Physical critical strikes now increase the target's Physical damage taken by 4 % for 8 seconds.

entries.name: Demonic Frenzy
entries.description_text: Casting Sever now increases your attack speed by 20 % for 10 seconds. Casting Gore extends the duration of this effect by 3 sec.

entries.name: Gorged
entries.description_text: Gore now heals you for 50% of the damage dealt over 3 sec and grants a stack of Gorged for 30 seconds. At 3 stacks, your next Sever will consume the stacks to leech an additional 200% of the damage dealt by it from up to 5 enemies within 5 yds. In addition, Sever now strikes an additional time after 1 sec but has a 2 increased cooldown.

entries.name: Chop Shop
entries.description_text: Each stack of Demon's Blood now increases the critical strike chance of Sever and Meatsaw by 1 % .

entries.name: Ripper
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Damaging abilities that spend Demonfire now refresh a charge of Gore .

entries.name: Hellborn
entries.description_text: Generating a stack of Demon's Blood now has a 5 % chance to unleash your active Pestilence at half of their effectiveness.

entries.name: Warbringer
entries.description_text: Transforms your Flames of Xoroth into Warbringer . Warbringer Slam the ground, dealing 65 % Weapon Damage plus 2 to nearby enemies, reducing the effectiveness of any healing by -50 % for 10 seconds. Deals increased damage per Demonfire consumed.

entries.name: Burning Swings
entries.description_text: Your Burning Blade now affects 4 additional attacks.

entries.name: Render
entries.description_text: Level 40 Passive Increases your melee haste rating by 30 % of your Strength.

entries.name: Fiend
entries.description_text: Casting Sever now removes the cost of your next Infernal Strike .

entries.name: Rain of Chaos
entries.description_text: Casting Flames of Xoroth with 6 Demonfire now calls down a Rain of Chaos . Rain of Chaos Molten rain burns enemies in the area causing 234 Fire Damage over 9 seconds.

entries.name: Hellfire Rituals
entries.description_text: Critical strikes with Skulltaker now increases the haste of your Greater Imp by 15 % for 8 seconds.

entries.name: Evil Duo
entries.description_text: Level 50 Passive Unleashing a Pestilence now causes your Greater Imp to unleash it's Pestilence . The Imp 's unleash effect is equivalent to your own unleash effect for the equivalent Pestilence .

entries.name: Burning Power
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Increases your attack power by 100 % of your Intellect and your spell damage by 50 % of your Strength.

entries.name: Brimstone Flames
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Seeking Flame is increased by 20 % on enemies affected by Pestilence of Apocalypse . Damage dealt is increased by an additional 10 % for each Demonfire you have active.

entries.name: Partners in Flames
entries.description_text: Fire damage dealt by your Greater Imp now has a 25 % chance to empower you, increasing your damage dealt by 5 % for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Seething Strikes
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Sever by 30 % against Burning targets and it now increases the targets chance to be critically struck by 3 % for 12 seconds.

entries.name: Invasion
entries.description_text: All Fire damage dealt is increased by 10 % to enemies above 80% health.

entries.name: Hellmaw
entries.description_text: Burn an enemy with a fiery strike, dealing 18 + 10% AP + 18% SP Shadowflame Damage, plus an additional 72 + 24% AP + 57.2% SP over 12 seconds. Deals 20 % increased damage per Demonfire consumed.

entries.name: Brimstone Splinters
entries.description_text: Grants Seeking Flame a 30 % chance to generate 1 additional Demonfire when it deals damage. Chance to trigger is increased by 5 % for each Demonfire you have active.

entries.name: Indiscriminate
entries.description_text: Seeking Flame now spreads Hellmaw and Melt from the target to up to 3 enemies within 6 yds.

entries.name: Grotesque
entries.description_text: While Hellfire Form is active, your Seeking Flame now has no cooldown and generates an additional Demonfire .

entries.name: Hellfire Form
entries.description_text: Enter your Hellfire Form , increasing your Fire damage dealt by 20 % and Fire critical strike chance by 15 % for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Claws of Hell
entries.description_text: When you spend at least 4 Demonfire stacks you now refresh the duration of your Unleash Apocalypse on the target.

entries.name: Flamewrath
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of Seeking Flame by 20 % .

entries.name: Hellbringer
entries.description_text: Increases the all damage dealt by party and raid members by 3 % . Does not stack with similar effects.

entries.name: Shadowflame Forge
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Hellmaw by 3 sec.

entries.name: Hellstorm
entries.description_text: Create a hellstorm, dealing 77 + 32.04% fire SP + 8% AP Fire damage to up to 8 nearby enemies. Embers then flare every 1 sec for 2 seconds, dealing 28 + 2.5% fire SP + 2.5% AP Fire damage. Duration is increased by 100 % for each stack of Demonfire consumed.

entries.name: Inferno Blast
entries.description_text: Increases your critical damage against Burning targets by 20 % .

entries.name: Hellfire Embers
entries.description_text: Increases the Fire damage dealt by your Hellfire Imp by 30 % against enemies above 80% maximum health.

entries.name: Doom
entries.description_text: Transforms your Greater Imp into a Doomguard for 12 seconds. While transformed, your Doomguard deals 20 % more damage, and its auto attacks ignite the target, dealing 10% of the damage dealt as Fire damage over 6 seconds, stacking 6 times.

entries.name: Infernal Pummeling
entries.description_text: Melt now increases the damage your target takes from Flames of Xoroth and Skulltaker by 10 % .

entries.name: To Ashes
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of abilities that spend Demonfire by 5 % .

entries.name: Calamity
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of the Unleash effect of Pestilence of Apocalypse by 25 % and its duration is increased by 5 sec.

entries.name: Pestilence of Apocalypse
entries.description_text: Emanate the Pestilence of Apocalypse , causing targets within 8 yds to take 10 % increased Fire damage from you.

entries.name: Unbound Inferno
entries.description_text: Your Infernal Strikes against enemies affected by your Flames of Xoroth now blasts nearby enemies for 75 + 10% fire SP + 5% AP Fire damage.

entries.name: Cinderblade
entries.description_text: Level 30 Passive Increases your critical strike rating by 20 % of your Intellect and your spell hit chance by 6 % .

entries.name: Into the Maw
entries.description_text: Hellmaw causes a Hellfire Explosion at the end of its duration, dealing additional Fire damage to all nearby enemies within 5 yards equal to 50 % of the periodic damage dealt over the duration.

entries.name: Seeking Flame
entries.description_text: Generates 1 Demonfire Sear an enemy, dealing 63 + 33.62% fire SP + 33% AP Fire damage.

entries.name: Ascended Warlock
entries.description_text: Your Skulltaker used with 6 stacks of Demonfire now reduces the cooldown of Doom by -5 seconds. In addition, while Doom is active, your Doomguard will now copy your Skulltaker , dealing reduced damage.

entries.name: Punisher
entries.description_text: Increases the attack power and spell power scaling of Seeking Flame by 25 % .

entries.name: Xorothian Empowerment
entries.description_text: Increases the attack power of all party and raid members 5 % . Does not stack with similar effects.

entries.name: Infernal Pursuit
entries.description_text: Increases your melee haste by 3 % and reduces the duration of root effects against you by -15 % .

entries.name: Infernal Steel
entries.description_text: Casting Skulltaker with 6 Demonfire stacks now causes your next Hellmaw within 15 seconds to tick -25 % faster and cost -50 % less Rage.

entries.name: Combusting Blade
entries.description_text: Increases your Intellect by 5 % and reduces the Rage cost of Infernal Strike by -5 .

entries.name: Fury of Xoroth
entries.description_text: Infernal Strike now grants you a stack of Xorothian Fury , increasing the chance for your next Skulltaker within 10 seconds to critically strike by 10 % per stack, up to 3 stacks. Additionally, using Skulltaker with 6 stacks of Demonfire grants you Xorothian Rage , causing your next Infernal Strike within 10 seconds to be guaranteed to critically strike.

entries.name: Greater Imp
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive Teaches you Summon: Greater Imp and increases your expertise by 10 . Summon: Greater Imp Summon a Greater Imp to aid you in combat. Greater Imp has various combat abilities that provide excellent single target damage and control.

entries.name: Brimstone Buckler
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive Successful blocks now have a 30 % chance to summon 1 Hellfire Imp to aid you in battle for 12 seconds. Can only occur once every 3 sec.

entries.name: Demon's Breath
entries.description_text: Critical strikes with Shieldgore now unleash an eruption of hellfire, causing 111 + 20% AP Fire damage and generating 1 additional Demonfire .

entries.name: Sacrificial Circle
