entries.description_text: Sacrifice your Hellfire Imps within 15 yds, healing you 15 % of your maximum health, plus an additional amount equal to 25% of each of your Hellfire Imp's maximum health. Hellfire Imps sacrificed in this way leave behind corpses.

entries.name: Soul Furnace
entries.description_text: Sacrificial Circle now grants you a damage absorption shield equal to 15% of the total health of each destroyed imp for 10 sec.

entries.name: Demonfire Command
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Implosion by -10 sec and its Rage cost by -5 .

entries.name: Hellfire Forgemaster
entries.description_text: Increases your block value by 20 % .

entries.name: Hellish Rebuke
entries.description_text: Generating a stack of Demon's Blood now has a 15 % chance to trigger a fiery explosion on up to 5 nearby enemies, dealing 96 Fire damage.

entries.name: Hellsmelted Armor
entries.description_text: Each Hellfire Imp active now increases your chance to block by 1 % .

entries.name: Imp Gang Boss
entries.description_text: Your Call: Hellfire Imp now summons 2 additional imps.

entries.name: Infernal Bulwark
entries.description_text: Casting Unleash Pestilence now generates 4 stacks of Demonfire and grants Infernal Bulwark . Infernal Bulwark (Proc) Increases block value by 20 % for 18 seconds.

entries.name: Demonic Bulwark
entries.description_text: Level 50 Passive Your successful blocks now have a 30 % chance to critically block for twice the normal amount. Chance to trigger is increased by 2 % for each Hellfire Imp you have active.

entries.name: Warden of Hellfire
entries.description_text: Increases the damage dealt by Skulltaker and Flames of Xoroth by 20 % .

entries.name: Hellfire Bellows
entries.description_text: Transforms your Flames of Xoroth into Hellfire Bellows . Hellfire Bellows Bellow fire on all enemies in a 6 yd cone in front of and behind you, dealing 252 + 17.63% AP + 40% fire SP Fire damage and reducing the cooldown of Chains of Xoroth by 0 to 0 sec per enemy hit. Cooldown is reduced by -3 sec for each Demonfire consumed.

entries.name: Imp Guards
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Each Hellfire Imp now reduces your Physical damage taken by 1 % .

entries.name: A Curse from Hell
entries.description_text: Periodic damage dealt now has a 15 % chance to reduce the cooldown of Curse of Xoroth by -3 sec. Chance to trigger is increased by 2 % for each stack of Demonfire active.

entries.name: Imp Aura
entries.description_text: Level 40 Passive Each Hellfire Imp now reduces your Magic damage taken by 1 % .

entries.name: Hellfire Resolve
entries.description_text: Level 30 Passive Increases your block rating by 15 % of your Strength and increases your hit rating by 5 % of your Strength.

entries.name: Demonfire Retaliation
entries.description_text: Grants you a 30 % chance to generate a stack of Demonfire when attacked.

entries.name: Chains of Xoroth
entries.description_text: Create demonic chains at target location that slow enemies inside by -80 % for 5 seconds. At the end of the duration, it pulls all affected enemies to it.

entries.name: Demonic Grit
entries.description_text: Grant your summons demonic grit, increasing their total health by 15 % and reducing their damage taken by by 10 % .

entries.name: Demolisher
entries.description_text: Casting Flesh Hook or Chainwhip now taunts the target for 2 seconds and reduces your Physical damage taken by -5 % for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Speed Demon
entries.description_text: Your Suffuse now increases your movement speed by 20 % .

entries.name: Legion's Presence
entries.description_text: Emanate an aura to allies within 25 yds for 15 seconds, increasing their damage dealt by 10 % . Fire damage dealt by Hellfire Imps is increased by 150 % and total health increased by 50 % while this effect is active on them.

entries.name: Call: Hellfire Abyssal
entries.description_text: Call down a Hellfire Abyssal from the sky to crash down upon the targeted 8 yd area, dealing 1500 + 100% SP + 100% AP Fire damage. The abyssal remains to aid you in battle for 15 seconds and emits an aura that reduces the damage taken by party and raid members within 40 yds by -5 % . Costs -15 less Rage for each active Hellfire Imp .

entries.name: Fiery Retribution
entries.description_text: Each time a Hellfire Imp dies, you reduce the cooldown of Sacrificial Circle by -2 sec and Implosion by -1 sec.

entries.name: Brimstone Striker
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Stoke the Flames now reduces the cooldown of Sever and Juggernaut by -4 sec.

entries.name: Forgefiend's Bulwark
entries.description_text: Successful blocks, parries and dodges now have a 30 % chance to Enrage you, increasing your damage dealt by 10 % for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Fiend of Forges
entries.description_text: Forgefiend's Bulwark now also increases your critical strike chance by 10 % .

entries.name: Hellfire Reprimand
entries.description_text: Your Hellfire Imps now have a 20 % chance on hit to launch a firebolt dealing 40% Strength Fire damage and reducing enemy attack power by 190 for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Stoke the Flames
entries.description_text: Your Skulltaker and Melt used with 6 Demonfire now refund 2 Demonfire . Skulltaker used with 6 Demonfire now deals an additional 30 % Fire damage.

entries.name: Impcaller
entries.description_text: Transforms your Call: Hellfire Imp into Impcaller . Impcaller (Aura) Your Infernal Strike now summons a Hellfire Imp to aid you in combat for 10 seconds, but its Rage cost is increased by 10 . In addition, the maximum health of your imps is increased by 30 % .

entries.name: Brimstone Knight
entries.description_text: Increases your Fire damage dealt by 3 % and dealing Fire damage increases the enemy spell damage taken by 10 % for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Pestilent Retaliation
entries.description_text: When you block an attack you now have a 5 % chance to unleash your active Pestilence at half of its effectiveness. Can only occur once every 5 sec.

entries.name: Hellfire Sieger
entries.description_text: Doubles the absorption of Black Shield while below 35% health.

entries.name: Implosion
entries.description_text: Explode with hellish fire, dealing 51 + 25% Strength + 50% fire SP + 10% AP Fire damage to nearby enemies, beckoning Hellfire Imps to aid you in battle for 12 seconds, and generating 30 Rage. Deals increased damage and increases the amount of imps summoned by 1 for each Demonfire consumed.

entries.name: Black Skull Shield
entries.description_text: Reduces the Rage cost of Shieldgore by -5 and increases its damage by 25 % .

entries.name: Hellwrath
entries.description_text: Your Demon's Blood can now stack 5 additional times and each stack now increases the absorption amount of Black Shield by 1 % .

entries.name: Curse of Xoroth
entries.description_text: Curse an enemy for 15 seconds, dealing 1575 + 100% AP Shadowflame Damage over 15 seconds. Your next Shieldgore within 12 seconds grants you Black Shield , absorbing 860 + 200% Stamina damage for 30 seconds.

entries.name: Shieldgore
entries.description_text: Transforms your Infernal Strike into Shieldgore . Shieldgore Generates 2 Demonfire Gore the target with your spiked shield, causing 21 + 35% AP High Threat Fire Damage, scaling with your block value.

entries.name: A Gift from Hell
entries.description_text: Reduces the Rage cost of Infernal Strike , Meatsaw , and Melt by -10 .

entries.name: Call: Hellfire Imp
entries.description_text: Generates 2 Demonfire Beckon 1 Hellfire Imp to aid you in battle for 12 seconds and generate 20 Rage. Threat generated by Hellfire Imps is transferred to you.

entries.name: Bulwark of Xoroth
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Shieldgore will now apply Torn Flesh , causing the target to bleed for 105 over 15 seconds.

entries.name: Chainwhip
entries.description_text: Swing a chain at an enemy dealing 8 + 45% AP + 25% SP Physical damage and silencing them for 2 seconds, generating a large amount of threat. If you successfully interrupt an enemy, this will refund 20 % of the cooldown.

entries.name: Brimstone's Blood
entries.description_text: Increases the chance of gaining a stack of Demon's Blood by 25 % .

entries.name: Chains of Malice
entries.description_text: Lock an enemy down with magical chains, stunning them and dragging them with you for 5 seconds. Every 1 sec, the enemy will suffer 16 Physical damage. Enemies that cannot be stunned or rooted cannot be dragged.

entries.name: Juggernaut
entries.description_text: Consume all of your Demon's Blood to become a juggernaut, reducing all damage taken by -30 % for 10 seconds. For the duration, you heal every 3 sec for 6 + 10% AP , increased per Demon's Blood stack consumed.

entries.name: Demon Heart
entries.description_text: Embrace your inner demon, instantly generating 6 stacks of Demonfire and 50 Rage.

entries.name: Xorothian Sigil
entries.description_text: Create a demonic sigil that protects party members within 20 yds of you, causing them to deflect the next harmful spell cast against them within 3 seconds.

entries.name: Black Shield
entries.description_text: Consume all of your Demon's Blood stacks to create a demonic shield that absorbs 860 damage, increased by 20 % per Demon's Blood stack, for 30 seconds.

entries.name: Demonskin
entries.description_text: Each stack of Demon's Blood also increases your Armor by 1 % .

entries.name: Boiling Blood
entries.description_text: Casting Suffuse now increases your healing received by 25 % for the first 6 seconds of it's duration.

entries.name: Rage of Xoroth
entries.description_text: Your critical strikes now enrage you, increasing your melee attack speed by 15 % .

entries.name: Dismemberment
entries.description_text: Damaging abilities that spend Demonfire now reduces the target's healing received by -20 % for 8 seconds.

entries.name: Ragefist
entries.description_text: Increases your maximum Rage by 10 and reduces the duration of disarm effects against you by -15 % .

entries.name: Suffusion of Essence
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Suffuse by 2 sec for each Demonfire consumed.

entries.name: Heart of Xoroth
entries.description_text: Allows Demon's Blood to stack 5 additional times.

entries.name: Harbinger of Pestilence
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of your Pestilences by 50 % .

entries.name: Spiked Chains
entries.description_text: Your Chainwhip now deals 321 + 30% AP additional Physical damage, increased by 100 % on Humanoids.

entries.name: Hellbreaker
entries.description_text: Casting Unleash Pestilence now removes all active movement impairing effects from you.

entries.name: Burning Rage
entries.description_text: Enrage, generating 15 Rage every 1 sec and making you immune to incapacitate, banish, and polymorph effects for 6 seconds. Usable while incapacitated, banished, or polymorphed.

entries.name: Omen of Rage
entries.description_text: Periodic damage and healing done has a 10 % chance to grant a stack of Demonfire .

entries.name: Darkrider
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of your Mark spells by 50 % .

entries.name: War Pig
entries.description_text: Increases your Physical damage dealt by 4 % .

entries.name: Mounted Champion
entries.description_text: Your Xorothian Warsteed is now instant cast and prevents roots and slows for 2 sec when cast, but now has a 10 sec cooldown.

entries.name: Brute Strength
entries.description_text: Increases your critical damage dealt with Physical attacks by 10 % and increases the range of Flesh Hook , Chains of Malice , and Chainwhip by 5 yds.

entries.name: Hellbound Charge
entries.description_text: 2 Charges, 60 sec recharge Briefly jump atop your Xorothian Warsteed , increasing your movement speed by 70 % for 3 seconds. Usable while indoors, but you cannot use your Mounted Combat abilities while riding your Warsteed in this way.

entries.name: Suffuse
entries.description_text: Embrace your mortal body, restoring 103 + 10% Stamina health every 3 sec, scaling with Stamina and defense rating. Lasts 3 sec for each Demonfire consumed.

entries.name: Hellstriker
entries.description_text: Direct critical strikes now increase the duration of Hellrider on you by 2 sec.

entries.name: Chain Warden
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Chains of Malice by -30 sec, and allows Flesh Hook and Chainwhip to strike up to 2 additional enemies near your primary target.

entries.name: Xorothian Strength
entries.description_text: Increases your Strength by 5 % .

entries.name: Mounted Reaver
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of all Mounted Combat abilities by -20 % .

entries.name: Demonic Rage
entries.description_text: Generating Demon's Blood stacks now generates 1 additional Rage.

entries.name: Demonfire Plating
entries.description_text: Reduces your damage taken by -2 % and increases your Stamina by 3 % .

entries.name: Taskmaster
entries.description_text: Increases your critical strike chance by 3 % plus an additional 15 % against Demons.

entries.name: Bloodied Blade
entries.description_text: Melee Physical damage dealt now generates a stack of Demon's Blood .

entries.name: Hell Blender
entries.description_text: Casting Meatsaw now has a 40 % chance to refund 10 Rage.

entries.name: Warpath
entries.description_text: While Unleash Pestilence is active it now protects your movement speed from being reduced below 90 % of normal speed.

entries.name: Xorothian Finesse
entries.description_text: Increases your chance to parry by 5 % .

entries.name: Forceful Impact
entries.description_text: Casting Raise Shield and Heavy Blow now extends the duration of your Brace by 1 sec.

entries.name: Valiant Defender
entries.description_text: Increases your maximum Energy by 15 and increases the damage of Pulverize and Broad Sweep by 10 % .

entries.name: Unscuffable
entries.description_text: Allies within 30 yds now take -10 % less Magic damage from area of effect attacks.

entries.name: High Guard
entries.description_text: Level 50 Passive After using Raise Shield , Advance or Battle Rush , you are granted High Guard . High Guard (Buff) Your next Heavy Blow within 15 seconds triggers no cooldown.

entries.name: Valiant Knight
entries.description_text: Melee ability critical strikes now cause your next Pulverize within 6 seconds to be free of cost and deal 25 % increased damage.

entries.name: Honorbound
entries.description_text: Removes the Energy cost of Shield Challenge .

entries.name: Bastion
entries.description_text: Raise your shield and lead your allies within 12 yds, reducing their damage taken by -40 % for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Shield Unit
entries.description_text: Each time you take damage, you gain 5 % of the damage taken as attack power for 1 minute.

entries.name: Retaliation
entries.description_text: Successful blocks now deal 51 + 5% AP Physical damage to the attacker, scaling with defense rating. Can only occur once per sec.

entries.name: Footman's Call
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Pulverize is increased by 15 , plus an additional amount scaling with your block value.

entries.name: Vanguard's Shield
entries.description_text: Blocking an attack or landing an auto attack now grants a stack of Vanguard for 1 minute, stacking 10 times. Vanguard's Shield Magic Damage taken reduced by -2 % . Whenever you are hit by a spell, you lose 1 stack of this effect.

entries.name: Stalwart
entries.description_text: Increases your block value by 10 % and your expertise by 4 .

entries.name: Hold the Line
entries.description_text: Command nearby allies to hold the line, making them immune to incapacitate, disorient, knockback, and grip effects for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Bring Down The Hammer!
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Heavy Blow now deals an additional 20 % of the damage dealt every 1 sec for 3 seconds.

entries.name: Vanguard's Might
entries.description_text: Your Heavy Blow now causes you to emanate an aura for 5 seconds that reduces all damage taken by -5 % for party members.

entries.name: Plate Buster
entries.description_text: Critical strikes with Ram now reduces the remaining cooldown of your Challenging Cry and Hold the Line by -4 sec.

entries.name: Hammer of the Law
entries.description_text: Smash an enemy and enemies behind them in a line, dealing 90 + 100% AP High Threat Physical damage and silencing them for 3.5 seconds.

entries.name: Valorous Strikes
entries.description_text: Auto attacks now have a 10 % chance to strike an additional time and reduce your target's chance to hit by -3 % for 15 seconds.

entries.name: King's Guard
entries.description_text: Your Pulverize and Ram now have a 10 % chance to reset the cooldown of Raise Shield .

entries.name: Knight's Conviction
entries.description_text: Increases the block value provided by Raise Shield by 25 % and your block chance by 1 % .

entries.name: Shieldlord’s Strength
entries.description_text: You may now use two-handed Maces and can now equip two-handed Maces with a shield. Your Heavy Blow and Hammer of the Law now deal additional damage scaling with your Stamina and your Stamina is increased by 15 % .

entries.name: Iron Guardian
entries.description_text: Increases your Stamina by 5 % .

entries.name: The Green Tower
entries.description_text: Reduces the Energy cost of your Formations and increases their effectiveness by 25 % .

entries.name: Order In The Court
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Hammer of the Law now reduces the damage dealt by affected enemies by -10 % for 8 seconds.

entries.name: Heavy Blow
entries.description_text: Smash an enemy and enemies behind them in a line, dealing 23 + 45% AP High Threat Physical damage, scaling with defense rating.

entries.name: Battle Wary
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of your Advance and Battle Rush by -30 % .

entries.name: With Honor
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Ram by -4 sec.

entries.name: Resilient
entries.description_text: Blocking an attack while Raise Shield is active now increases your maximum health by 308 + 10% Stamina + 11% AP for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Heavy Expert
entries.description_text: Increases your chance to parry and dodge by 4 % and increase your Armor contribution from mail and plate items by 20 % .

entries.name: Seasoned Fighter
entries.description_text: Reduces the Energy cost of Pulverize , Ram , and Broad Sweep by -10 % .

entries.name: Wreck Formation
entries.description_text: Melee critical strikes now have a 50 % chance to reset the cooldown of Hammer of the Law . Casting Standard of Valiance now increases your attack power by 10 % for 6 seconds.

entries.name: Footman's Calling
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive Your damage taken is reduced by -10 % while Tower Formation or Line Formation is active. In addition, your threat generated from Physical Damage dealt is increased significantly while Tower Formation or Line Formation is active.

entries.name: Shieldbound
entries.description_text: Your Shield Challenge no longer has a cooldown, but now costs 10 additional Energy.

entries.name: Lionheart
entries.description_text: Your Shield of Denial now strikes 1 additional enemy.

entries.name: Experienced Soldier
entries.description_text: Level 40 Passive Melee attacks now reduce the cooldown of Brace by -1 sec.

entries.name: Iron Barrier
entries.description_text: Level 30 Passive Your successful blocks now have a 50 % chance to critically block for twice the normal amount.

entries.name: Bulwark
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Increases your block value by 25 % and your hit rating by 5 % of your Stamina.

entries.name: Strength In Unison
entries.description_text: Increases your melee haste by 1% for each ally within 20 yds, up to a maximum of 20% .

entries.name: Reverberations
entries.description_text: Casting Ram now causes your next 3 melee attacks to deal an additional 30 + 10% AP Magic damage for 10 seconds.

entries.name: War's Muse
entries.description_text: Increases your critical damage by 20 % .

entries.name: Into The Fray
entries.description_text: Triggering a Sound of War now grants you an additional auto attack on your next swing.

entries.name: A Hero's Tale
entries.description_text: Increases your Energy regeneration by 10 % .

entries.name: Leading the March
entries.description_text: Increases your attack power and total Armor by 4 % .

entries.name: Pied Piper
entries.description_text: Triggering a Sound of War now increases damage of your next Ram by 20 % for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Dissonance
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Sound of War now has a 25 % chance to reduce enemies' resistances by 75 and increases their Magic damage taken by -2 % for 8 seconds.

entries.name: Frontliner
entries.description_text: Triggering a Sound of War now increases your movement speed by 40 % and allies' within 20 yds movement speed by 20 % for 2 seconds.

entries.name: Knight's Song
entries.description_text: Casting a Ballad now grants allies Knight's Song . Knight's Song Emanate an aura for 10 seconds that increases the Armor of party and raid members by 400 . Does not stack with similar effects.

entries.name: Song of Steel
entries.description_text: Boost the morale of party and raid members, increasing their attack or spell power by 95 for 15 seconds. Does not stack with similar effects.

entries.name: Show of Force
entries.description_text: Dealing damage with Ram now dispels 1 magic effect from the target.

entries.name: Stand Your Ground!
entries.description_text: While standing in your Standard of Valiance , your allies' Physical damage taken is reduced by -10 % .

entries.name: Battle Drums
entries.description_text: Place down 3 Battle Drums around you for 1 minute. Allies may click on the drums to increase their critical strike chance, haste, damage, and healing done by 10 % and causes their damage dealt to trigger a Sound of War for their next 5 instances of damage or 30 seconds.

entries.name: Inspiring Presence
entries.description_text: Emanate an aura around you for 15 seconds, causing allied players within 100 yds to deal 35% AP additional damage as Holy damage when they deal direct damage. Applies Exhaustion , preventing you from benefiting from similar effects for 1 minute.

entries.name: Champion's Presence
entries.description_text: Enrage all nearby allies, increasing their haste by 30 % for 20 seconds. After being affected by this spell, allies cannot benefit from similar effects for 5 minutes.

entries.name: Bard's Manuscript
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Hero's March by -60 sec.

entries.name: Spirit of Battle
entries.description_text: Increases chance to hit with all spells and attacks by 1 % for you and party and raid members. Does not stack with similar effects.

entries.name: Bannerman
entries.description_text: While affected by your Banner of Swiftness or Banner of Conquest , the initial damage dealt by your Standard of Valiance now deals 150 % more damage.

entries.name: Banner of Swiftness
entries.description_text: Attach a Banner of Swiftness to your back, increasing the haste of party and raid members within 40 yds by 5 % . Does not stack with similar effects.

entries.name: Banner of Conquest
entries.description_text: Attach a Banner of Conquest to your back, increasing the critical strike chance of party and raid members within 40 yds by 5 % . Does not stack with similar effects.

entries.name: Echoes of War
entries.description_text: Triggering a Sound of War now grants Echoes of War to nearby allies for 8 seconds. Echoes of War Next direct ability or spell deals 15 % of their damage as additional Magic Damage.

entries.name: Little Drummer
entries.description_text: Allies within 20 yds of you now gain 20 % chance to resist curses.

entries.name: Battle Bard
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of your Ballads by 15 % .

entries.name: Hero's March
entries.description_text: Beat the drums of war, causing your auto attacks to trigger a Sound of War and increasing your haste by 15 % for 15 seconds. In addition, allies within 10 yds of you have a 5 % chance to trigger a Sound of War on any damage dealt.

entries.name: Banner Boy
entries.description_text: Increases your haste by 5 % and the movement speed granted by Line Formation by 8 % .

entries.name: Liberation
entries.description_text: Instantly breaks an ally free of any stun, fear, or polymorph effects and grants immunity to such effects for 5 seconds. Dispels 2 harmful magic effects from the ally. Usable while stunned, feared, or polymorphed.

entries.name: Veteran of the Third War
entries.description_text: You now restore 3 % of your base health whenever you block an attack.

entries.name: Fearless
entries.description_text: Each nearby enemy within 10 yds now reduces your damage taken by 1% , up to a maximum of 10 % .

entries.name: Warbringer's Manuscript
entries.description_text: Critical strikes now reduce the cooldown of Hero's March by -1 sec.

entries.name: Cavalry Tactics
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of your Cavalry Charge by -30 sec and it now prevents root and slow effects on allies.

entries.name: Song of Battle
entries.description_text: Every 2 sec you emanate Sounds of War , dealing 71 + 12.74% AP Physical damage to all enemies within 8 yds. Lasts 15 seconds. Upon expiration, stun all enemies within 8 yds for 4 seconds.

entries.name: Powerful Voice
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of your Ballads by 10 % .

entries.name: Elegant Combat
entries.description_text: Casting a Ballad has a 20 % chance to remove the cost of the next Ram and increase its critical chance by 10 % .

entries.name: Harrowing Melody
entries.description_text: Play a harrowing melody, dealing 191 + 42% AP Magic damage and reducing all healing received by enemies within 10 yds by -30 % for 10 seconds. In addition, your next Ballad within 10 seconds is free of cost and deals 50 % increased damage.

entries.name: Inspiring Leader
entries.description_text: You pledge to inspire your allies in the midst of battle, transforming your Pulverize and your Broad Sweep into Ballads .

entries.name: You Shall Not Fall!
entries.description_text: While standing in your Standard of Valiance , allies have a -20 % increased chance to resist stun and grip effects.

entries.name: Voice of an Angel
entries.description_text: Sing a beautiful song, instantly resetting the cooldown of Liberation , Harrowing Melody , and Hero's March .

entries.name: War Drums
entries.description_text: Adds 5 % to the value of Echoes of War . In addition, performing a Sound of War now has a 40 % chance to echo, striking an additional time after 0.5 sec. Can only occur once per sec.

entries.name: Minstrel
entries.description_text: Casting a Ballad now increases your haste by 3 % , stacking 3 times, for 8 seconds.

entries.name: Soundwave
entries.description_text: Increases the damage dealt by Sound of War by 15 % .

entries.name: Dragonslayer
entries.description_text: Increases your Agility by 5 % .

entries.name: Legion Commander
entries.description_text: The damage increase of Harrowing Melody now affects an additional 2 Ballad casts and guarantees them to critically strike and deal 100 % more damage.

entries.name: Centurion Strike
entries.description_text: Stab an enemy, dealing 110 % Weapon Damage plus an additional effect based on your weapon. Sword: Triggers 3 additional auto attacks. Axe: Guaranteed to critically strike for 25 % increased damage. Mace: Ignores -50 % of your target's Armor. Polearm: Stabs the target and enemies behind them an additional time.

entries.name: Calculated Strike
entries.description_text: Your Reprisal , Broad Sweep , and Spear Throw now deal an additional 2% Weapon Damage for each Energy point you have upon casting it.

entries.name: Heroism
entries.description_text: Whenever you reach 3 stacks of Glory or 20 stacks of Favor , your next 2 Pulverizes or Broad Sweeps within 10 seconds are free of cost.

entries.name: Clinch Brawler
entries.description_text: Centurion Strike is now guaranteed to critically strike against enemies affected by Net Throw .

entries.name: Double Duty
entries.description_text: Increases your hit chance by 5 % and expertise by 4 .

entries.name: Heroic Effort
entries.description_text: Casting Centurion Strike now grants 1 stack of Glory .

entries.name: Bulwark Rush
entries.description_text: Casting Battle Rush increases your block rating by 25 % of Strength for 6 seconds.

entries.name: Mace Training
entries.description_text: While a mace is equipped, your armor penetration is increased by 8 % .

entries.name: Upper Hand
entries.description_text: Your melee auto attacks now have a 20 % chance to strike 2 additional times.

entries.name: Close Combat
entries.description_text: Removes the shared cooldown of your Standards and reduces the cooldown of Guard by -10 sec.

entries.name: Supremacy
entries.description_text: Casting Centurion Strike now refreshes a charge of Reprisal .

entries.name: Retiarius
entries.description_text: Increases your maximum Energy by 25 .

entries.name: Earthsplitter
entries.description_text: Casting Broad Sweep now increases the amount of enemies struck by your next Broad Sweep by 1 and reduces its Energy cost by -10 % for 6 seconds, stacking 3 times.

entries.name: Sword Training
entries.description_text: While a sword is equipped, your melee haste is increased by 10 % .

entries.name: No Escape
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of your Battle Rush by -10 sec when used against a rooted enemy.

entries.name: Final Verdict
entries.description_text: Give the final verdict to your target, dealing 1195 + 100% AP Physical damage and healing you for 15% of your maximum health. Only usable on enemies below 20% health. Killing blows reset the cooldown of this ability.

entries.name: Champion
entries.description_text: Your Centurion Strike now extends the duration of Raise Shield on you by 3 sec.

entries.name: Axe Training
entries.description_text: While an axe is equipped, your critical strike chance is increased by 2 % and critical damage increased by 5 % .

entries.name: Might
entries.description_text: Increases your attack power by 5 % .

entries.name: Pinned Down!
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Spear Throw now refreshes the duration of Net Throw on your target.

entries.name: Built Different
entries.description_text: Increases your Strength and Stamina by 4 % .

entries.name: Glory
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive Your Ram now grants you a stack of Glory for 30 seconds. At 3 stacks, your next Ram within 30 seconds deals 150 % increased damage.

entries.name: Overwhelming Presence
entries.description_text: Increases the attack power of all party and raid members 5 % . Does not stack with similar effects. In addition, increases your Agility by 10 % .

entries.name: Shield Training
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Increases your block rating by 10 % of your Strength.

entries.name: Shield Combat
entries.description_text: Level 40 Passive Casting Ram and Pulverize now increases your attack power based on your block rating for 6 seconds.

entries.name: Favor
entries.description_text: Level 50 Passive Critical strikes and killing blows now grant you Favor for 1 minute, stacking 20 times. At 20 stacks, your next auto attack deals an additional 500% Weapon Damage, consuming the stacks.

entries.name: One-Handed Mastery
entries.description_text: Increases your damage dealt by 10 % while a one-handed weapon is equipped.

entries.name: Waste No Movement
entries.description_text: Reduces the Energy cost of Broad Sweep , Spear Throw , and Centurion Strike by -5 .

entries.name: Tactical Combat
entries.description_text: Increases your block value by 8 % and chance to block by 2 % .

entries.name: Crashing Force
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of your Centurion Strike and Reprisal by 15 % .

entries.name: No Retreating!
entries.description_text: While in combat, every 2 sec, increase the range and Energy cost of your next Spear Throw by 1 and its damage dealt by 3 % , stacking up to 15 times.

entries.name: Momentum
entries.description_text: Melee damage dealt now reduces the cooldown of your Chivlary by -2 sec.

entries.name: Myrmidon
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Ram and Broad Sweep by 25 % .

entries.name: Deadly Blow
entries.description_text: Your Centurion Strike and Broad Sweep now bleed an additional 15 % of the damage dealt over 3 seconds.

entries.name: Legionnaire
entries.description_text: Increases the critical damage of Centurion Strike and Reprisal by 10 % .

entries.name: Polearm Training
entries.description_text: Allows you to wield polearms and to wield them with a shield equipped. While a polearm is equipped, your melee abilities have 2 yds increased range.

entries.name: Spear Throw
entries.description_text: Throw a massive spear at an enemy, dealing 45 + 35% AP Physical damage, reducing the effectiveness of any healing by -50 % for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Experienced Combatant
entries.description_text: Level 30 Passive Increases your attack power by 20 % of your Strength.

entries.name: Knight's Calling
entries.description_text: Embrace your calling, restoring 15 % of your maximum health and Energy, repeating every 5 sec for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Lord of the Arena
entries.description_text: Reduces the Energy cost of Pulverize and Broad Sweep by -5 .

entries.name: Glorious Arena
entries.description_text: Create a 10 yd ring beneath you for 15 seconds. Enemies who stand inside will gain Peril every 1 sec. Peril Each stack can be consumed by Pulverize to deal an additional 10% AP Physical Damage and reduce the cooldown of Glorious Arena by 10 % . Upon reaching 5 stacks, the stacks are instantly consumed to stun the enemy for 5 seconds.

entries.name: Pit Fighter
entries.description_text: Increases the movement speed slow of your Standard of Valiance by -15 % .

entries.name: Bloodletter
entries.description_text: Avoiding an attack now reduces the remaining cooldown of Glorious Arena by 10 % . Can only occur once per sec.

entries.name: Refuse To Die
entries.description_text: Casting Advance now resets the cooldown of Raise Shield .

entries.name: Standard Bearer
entries.description_text: Increases the radius of Standards by 10 yds and increases the effectiveness of your Honor by 20 % .

entries.name: Net Throw
entries.description_text: Toss a weighted net at an enemy that roots them for 4 seconds. While active, the target cannot dodge attacks.

entries.name: Counter Stance
entries.description_text: You automatically parry the next attack against you. Lasts for 5 attacks or 15 seconds. When you expend a charge you deal 275 damage to attackers and heal for 366 + 100% AP health.

entries.name: Standard of Rallying
entries.description_text: Throw down a Standard of Rallying for 5 minutes, reducing damage taken by -3 % and the duration of stun effects on them by -30 % on all allies within 30 yds.

entries.name: Make Room! I'm Here.
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Standard of Valiance and Broad Sweep by 50 % .

entries.name: Unstoppable
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Battle Rush by -5 sec and Advance by -30 sec.

entries.name: Shrug It Off
entries.description_text: Instantly escape the effects of any root or slow and become immune to movement slowing effects for 3 seconds.

entries.name: Recuperation
entries.description_text: Taking Physical damage or blocking a physical attack now restores 2 Energy.

entries.name: Brace
entries.description_text: Fortify your defenses, reducing all damage taken by -50 % and gaining immunity to stun effects for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Warstopper
entries.description_text: Reduces the Energy cost of Standard of Valiance by -20 .

entries.name: Shield Wall
entries.description_text: Increases your Armor contribution from your shield by 20 % .

entries.name: Press the Attack
entries.description_text: Raise your shield and press the attack, dealing 75 % Weapon Damage plus 83 to enemies in front of you and draining 10 Energy every 1 sec. Lasts 5 seconds. While active you gain 100 % increased block chance and you may block, dodge, and parry while channeling.

entries.name: Master of Arms
entries.description_text: Your Turn the Blade now guarantees you to parry 1 additional attack and the duration of its parry window is increased by 1 sec.

entries.name: Thick Shields
entries.description_text: Increases your block value by 10 % .

entries.name: Valiance
entries.description_text: Reprisal now regenerates an additional 20 Energy.

entries.name: Steel Riposte
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Counter Stance and Turn the Blade by -25 % .

entries.name: Myrmidon
entries.description_text: Removes the Energy cost of Glorious Arena and increases its damage dealt by 25 % .

entries.name: Knight's Advantage
entries.description_text: Increases your damage dealt against Humanoids by 6 % .

entries.name: Energetic
entries.description_text: Restores 5 of your Energy every 3 sec.

entries.name: Deflector
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of your Raise Shield by -5 sec and reduces its Energy cost by -10 % .

entries.name: Relentless
entries.description_text: Your Pulverizes or Rams now ignores -15 % of the target's Armor.

entries.name: Grand Entrance
entries.description_text: Leap into the air, becoming immune to crowd control effects, and then crash back down with incredible speed at your location. Upon landing, deal 400 % Weapon Damage to enemies in the impact area, plus an additional 611 + 77.25% AP over 6 seconds, ignoring Armor and knocking them into the air.

entries.name: Sturdy
entries.description_text: Increases your maximum health by 6 % .

entries.name: Honorable Demeanor
entries.description_text: Whenever you block an attack your Strength and Stamina are increased by 2 % for 10 seconds, stacking 3 times.

entries.name: Light Nets
entries.description_text: Increases the range of your Net Throw by 15 yds.

entries.name: Valiant Warrior
entries.description_text: Critical strikes with Ram now have a 50 % chance to strike again for 100 % of the damage dealt.

entries.name: Heroic Deeds
entries.description_text: Increases the reputation gains of your allies within 30 yds by 5 % and reduces damage you take by -3 % .

entries.name: Gallant
entries.description_text: Increases your Strength by 4 % and expertise by 2 .

entries.name: Valiant Effort
entries.description_text: Your auto attacks now have a 15 % chance to allow the use of Reprisal as if you had recently blocked an attack.

entries.name: Press the Line!
entries.description_text: While Line Formation is active, your movement speed cannot be reduced below 115 % , but its cost is increased by 30 Energy.

entries.name: Resolve
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of your Raise Shield by 1 sec.

entries.name: Knightly Demeanor
entries.description_text: Your attack power is increased by 1 for every 50 Armor you have.

entries.name: Reflective Shield
entries.description_text: Raise your shield and reflect the next harmful spell cast on you within 3 seconds. While active, being hit by a spell restores 20 Energy.

entries.name: Guardbreaker
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Pulverize now has a 20 % chance to reset the cooldown of Ram .

entries.name: Reckoning
entries.description_text: Unleash a powerful Oath Breaker , dealing 27 + 17.5% AP + 50% Stamina Holy damage and restoring 15 Energy for each enemy struck. Consumes your Oaths , dealing additional damage for each consumed.

entries.name: Transcendent Guardian
entries.description_text: Charging to an ally with Temple Guardian now has a 40 % chance to refresh a charge.

entries.name: Call of the Monastery
entries.description_text: Increases the attack power of all party and raid members 5 % . Does not stack with similar effects. In addition, increases your attack power by 5 % .

entries.name: Keeping the Oath
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive You now delay 40% of direct damage taken, instead taking it over 8 seconds. In addition, you no longer consume your Oaths with Oath Breakers .

entries.name: Justicar of the Light
entries.description_text: Removes the cooldown from Benediction .

entries.name: Graceful Fighter
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Increases your parry rating by 20 % of Agility and your dodge rating by 20 % of Intellect.

entries.name: Light's Ward
entries.description_text: Level 50 Passive Increases all magic resistances equal to 10% of your dodge rating and reduces your damage taken from periodic effects by -15 % .

entries.name: Patience
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Interdict by 2 sec and its cooldown by -5 sec.

entries.name: Disciplined Blows
entries.description_text: Your healing done triggers a holy pulse around healed targets, dealing 89 + 5% AP + 20% Agility Holy damage to nearby enemies. Cnly occur once every 0.5 sec.

entries.name: Holy Books
entries.description_text: Level 30 Passive Using a Libram now removes 70 % of the delayed damage from Oathkeeper . Oathkeeper 40% of damage taken is now delayed and dealt to you over 8 seconds.

entries.name: Lorescribe
entries.description_text: Level 40 Passive Casting Oath Breaker abilities now reduce the cooldown of Librams by -4 sec.

entries.name: Spiritual Abdicator
entries.description_text: Your Spiritual Abdication now reduces damage taken by an additional -5 % per copy.

entries.name: Armor of Faith
entries.description_text: Whenever the absorption shield from Staffguard breaks, inflict 207 + 20% AP + 50% holy SP High Threat Holy damage to nearby enemies.

entries.name: Fortified Body
entries.description_text: Allies within 40 yds receive 6 % more healing. Does not stack with similar effects. Additionally, increases your maximum health by 6 % .

entries.name: Parry Dance
entries.description_text: When you critically strike with auto attacks or parry an attack, your chance to parry is now increased by 3 % for 5 seconds, stacking 5 times.

entries.name: Sacred Resistance
entries.description_text: Casting Reckoning now increases your Armor by 15 % for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Absolution
entries.description_text: Taunt all enemies within 8 yds for 4 seconds and increase your movement speed by 50 % for 4 seconds.

entries.name: Lightkeeper
entries.description_text: Periodic damage dealt by Condemn now has a 15 % chance to increase your parry chance by 2 % for 8 seconds, stacking 3 times. Periodic damage dealt by Condemn also has a 15 % chance to burst, dealing 100 + 22% AP Holy damage to up to 5 enemies within 5 yds of the target.

entries.name: Conviction
entries.description_text: Casting Sacred Swing now increases your melee haste by 5 % for 15 seconds, stacking 4 times.

entries.name: Grace of Aman'thul
entries.description_text: Reduces the Energy cost of Righteous Lunge by -5 and Sacred Swing by -10 .

entries.name: Blessed Padding
entries.description_text: Increases your Armor contribution from mail items by 50 % and reduces damage taken from area of effect attacks by -10 % .

entries.name: Uther's Legacy
entries.description_text: Your Condemn now heals you for 75 % of the damage dealt.

entries.name: Faith Guard
entries.description_text: While under the effect of a Libram , your Chastise will now unleash an 8 yd line of holy power, dealing 112 + 25% AP Holy damage.

entries.name: Disciplined Mind
entries.description_text: Increases the healing of Benediction by 15 % and causes it to dispel 1 poison and disease effect.

entries.name: Way of the Monk
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Sacred Swing and Reckoning now reduces casting speed by -10 % for 10 seconds, stacking 2 times.

entries.name: Untainted
entries.description_text: Effectively healing yourself now reduces your Physical damage taken by -10 + 10% Stamina for 8 seconds. Can only occur every 15 sec.

entries.name: Sacred Swing
entries.description_text: Swing at enemies in front of you, dealing 125 % Weapon Damage plus 9 , slowing their attack and movement speed by -20 % for 10 seconds. Only usable after avoiding an attack.

entries.name: Battlepriest
entries.description_text: While above 80% health or below 20% health, you now take 20% reduced Magic damage.

entries.name: Mending Ward
entries.description_text: Oath Breakers now grant you a stack of Mending Ward for 15 seconds, stacking 3 times. Mending Ward Next instance of direct damage taken while below 35% maximum health will consume these stacks to heal you for 395 + 25% Stamina . Healing scales with your Stamina and parry rating.

entries.name: Holy Warstaff
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Reckoning by 20 % .

entries.name: Sacred Oath
entries.description_text: Critical strikes now remove 1 sec from the duration of Oathkeeper when used. Oathkeeper 40% of damage taken is now delayed and dealt to you over 8 seconds.

entries.name: Staffguard
entries.description_text: Casting Sacred Swing now grants you Staffguard , absorbing 125 + 30% Stamina damage, scaling with Stamina, parry and dodge rating, for 8 seconds.

entries.name: Bells of Light
entries.description_text: Increases your Agility, Intellect, and hit chance by 3 %

entries.name: Paragon
entries.description_text: Increases your Stamina by 10 , plus an additional amount equal to 10 % of your Agility.

entries.name: Eternal Blessing
entries.description_text: Increases your Holy damage and healing done by 15 % for 30 seconds. While active, Oath Breakers deal an additional 141 + 12% AP Holy damage to nearby enemies.

entries.name: Eternally Devoted
entries.description_text: Damage dealt through Eternal Blessing now reduces the cooldown of Libram spells by -4 sec.

entries.name: Guardian of the Light
entries.description_text: Casting Benediction now reduces the cost of your next Temple Guardian by -50 % for 6 seconds.

entries.name: Duty Calls
entries.description_text: Casting abilities that grant an Oath now increases your damage dealt and movement speed by 2 % for 15 seconds, stacking 5 times.

entries.name: Justice
entries.description_text: Your Interdict now strikes 1 additional nearby target.

entries.name: Barrier of Light
entries.description_text: Emit saving light, increasing the healing received by nearby allies by 40 % for 15 seconds. For the duration, threat generated by your allies is redirected to you.

entries.name: Light's Guidance
entries.description_text: Healing with Benediction now causes your next Benediction to heal for 25 % more for 30 seconds.

entries.name: Condemnation
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance gained through Condemn by 3 % .

entries.name: Blade Sermon
entries.description_text: Increases the Weapon Damage dealt by Zealotry by 10 % .

entries.name: Priest Training
entries.description_text: Triggering Zealotry now also heals you for 3 % of your missing health. Zealotry (Proc) Deals 40 % off-hand Weapon Damage as Holy Damage.

entries.name: Vindication
entries.description_text: Strike an enemy with zeal, dealing 31 + 28.5% AP + 35% SP Physical damage, triggering Zealotry , and granting an Oath . Oath: Your damaging abilities have a 10 % chance to trigger Zealotry . Zealotry (Proc) Deals 40 % off-hand Weapon Damage as Holy Damage.

entries.name: Upheave!
entries.description_text: Increases the critical damage of Righteous Upheaval by 20 % .

entries.name: Heaven's Finest
entries.description_text: Damaging abilities now grant Heaven's Finest for 12 seconds, stacking 6 times. Heaven's Finest Increases your movement speed by 5 % . At 6 stacks, increases your Energy regeneration by 100 % for 8 seconds. Additional applications do not refresh the duration.

entries.name: Blessing of Aggramar
entries.description_text: Righteous Lunge now has a 25 % chance to generate an additional stack of Oath: Righteous Lunge .

entries.name: Transcending Strikes
entries.description_text: Your Divine Force will now trigger a -30 sec reduced cooldown when used on enemies affected by Blade of Faith .

entries.name: Radiance
entries.description_text: Reduces the Energy cost of Vindication by -5 .

entries.name: One-Punch Man
entries.description_text: Increases the the damage of Oath Breakers and Titanstrike by 20 % .

entries.name: Pious Sweep
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Chastise by 25 % on enemies above 75% health or affected by Tranquil Circle .

entries.name: Devotion of Khaz'goroth
entries.description_text: Increases all party and raid member's melee and ranged haste by 10 % . Does not stack with similar effects. Damage dealt with auto attacks reduce the cooldown of Libram spells by -0.5 sec.

entries.name: Combat Training
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of Oaths by 20 % .

entries.name: Blessing of Eonar
entries.description_text: Using Libram spells now increases your damage dealt and healing done by 10 % for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Martial Paladin
entries.description_text: Increases your Agility by 5 % and your chance to hit by 3 % .

entries.name: Bursting Impact
entries.description_text: Increases your off-hand weapon damage by 25 % .

entries.name: Force of Golganneth
entries.description_text: Explode with holy power, dealing 310 + 25% AP + 25% holy SP Holy damage and triggering Zealotry every 1 sec to nearby enemies for 5 seconds. Zealotry (Proc) Deals 40 % off-hand Weapon Damage as Holy Damage. While active, your Temple Guardian spell has its Energy cost reduced by -50 % .

entries.name: Oath Flow
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Oath Chain by 2 sec.

entries.name: Deliverance
entries.description_text: Critically striking with Vindication or Righteous Lunge now deals 50 % additional Physical damage.

entries.name: Iron Penance
entries.description_text: Dealing damage with Zealotry now applies Iron Penance to the target, increasing their Physical damage taken by you by 1 % for 3 seconds, stacking 10 times.

entries.name: Condemnation
entries.description_text: Dealing damage with Condemn , Holy Cleave , or Blade of Faith now has a 15 % chance to trigger Zealotry if you are within melee range of your target. Zealotry (Proc) Deals 40 % off-hand Weapon Damage as Holy Damage.

entries.name: Chakra of Light
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Testaments by -30 sec and Oath Breakers now heal allies around the target for 20 + 35% SP .

entries.name: Chakra of Power
entries.description_text: Melee attacks now restore 1 Energy, plus an additional 2 Energy when they critically strike.

entries.name: Libram of Zeal
entries.description_text: Read from your Libram of Mortal Abdication , increasing your melee haste by 20 % and causes your damaging abilities to reduce the cooldown of Righteous Upheaval by -2 sec for 20 seconds.

entries.name: Fury of Aggramar
entries.description_text: Increases the damage dealt by Libram of Consecration by 100 % and the effectiveness of your Librams by 25 % .

entries.name: Zealotry
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive Your off-hand auto attacks now trigger Zealotry . Zealotry (Proc) Deals 40 % off-hand Weapon Damage as Holy Damage.

entries.name: Solemn Soldier
entries.description_text: Increases your melee haste by 5 % and expertise by 5 .

entries.name: Holy Light
entries.description_text: Your Benediction now has a 1.5 sec cast time, but now heals for 100 % more.

entries.name: Battle Hardened
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Righteous Upheaval by -5 sec.

entries.name: One With The Light
entries.description_text: Casting Oath Breakers now triggers Zealotry on your target and reduces the cooldown of Librams , Force of Golganneth , and Mortal Abdication by -1 sec. Zealotry (Proc) Deals 40 % off-hand Weapon Damage as Holy Damage.

entries.name: Might of Aggramar
entries.description_text: Physical damage dealt now has a 25 % chance to increase the tick rate and reduce cooldown of your next Blade of Faith by -10 % , stacking 5 times.

entries.name: Righteous Upheaval
entries.description_text: Unleash a dominating Oath Breaker , dealing 31 + 45% AP + 45% SP Physical damage, increased by 3 % for each time you triggered Zealotry during your Oath Chain . Consumes your Oaths , dealing additional damage for each consumed.

entries.name: Holy Upheaval
entries.description_text: Level 30 Passive Increases the effectiveness Righteous Upheaval gains per trigger of Zealotry by 100 % .

entries.name: Norgannon's Wrath
entries.description_text: Target an enemy and leap into the air. After a short delay, you blast them with immense holy force, dealing 1506 + 100% holy SP + 100% AP Holy damage to up to 10 enemies within 5 yds and reduces their damage and healing done by -10 % for 5 seconds. Damage dealt pierces all immunities, resistances, and damage absorption effects. Scales with modifiers to Chastise .

entries.name: Calm Combatant
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Increases your Holy spell damage by 30 % of your attack power.

entries.name: Unbroken Creed
entries.description_text: Level 50 Passive Damaging abilities now grants you Unbroken Creed for 15 seconds, stacking up to 3 times. When you use a damaging Oath Breaker or Divine Fury you now consume the stacks and auto attack your target an amount of times equal to your stack count.

entries.name: Fervent Castigation
entries.description_text: Casting Righteous Upheaval or Blade of Faith now grants you Oath: Retribution and starts your Oath Chain . Oath: Retribution Critical damage increased by 5 % .

entries.name: Paladin Training
entries.description_text: Triggering Zealotry now has an 8 % chance to grant you an additional auto attack on your next strike. Zealotry (Proc) Deals 40 % off-hand Weapon Damage as Holy Damage.

entries.name: Martial Training
entries.description_text: Level 50 Passive Your Chastise now deals an additional 50 % Weapon Damage.

entries.name: Light's Chosen
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Increases your spell power by 30 % of your Agility and your critical strike rating by 15 % of your Intellect.

entries.name: Warrior of Tyr
entries.description_text: Periodic damage dealt now has a 10 % chance to generate 5 Energy.

entries.name: Scourge-Defense Training
entries.description_text: Warrior of Dawn now also increases the damage and critical strike chance of your next Argent Blade by 20 % .

entries.name: Holy Tempest
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Righteous Tempest now spreads Condemn on affected enemies to a nearby enemy.

entries.name: Argent Blade
entries.description_text: Crush an enemy with argent fervor, dealing 160 % Weapon Damage plus 15 + 35% AP + 100% holy SP , healing you equal to the damage dealt, and extending the duration of your Oath Chain by 3 sec.

entries.name: Righteousness
entries.description_text: Your Chastise now always triggers Scourgebane on your target.

entries.name: Whirling Tempest
entries.description_text: While Righteous Tempest is active you gain 20% increased movement speed.

entries.name: Titanfall
entries.description_text: Your Titanstrike now heals you for twice the damage dealt.

entries.name: Divine Strikes
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Scourgebane now increases the damage of Argent Blade by 5 % for 6 seconds, stacking 10 times.

entries.name: Focused
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Blade of Faith and Righteous Tempest by 25 % .

entries.name: Righteous Tempest
entries.description_text: Unleash a whirling Oath Breaker , dealing Weapon Damage plus 7 + 25% SP damage to nearby enemies, scaling with spell power, every 1 sec for 3 seconds. Consumes your Oaths , dealing additional damage for each consumed.

entries.name: Retribution
entries.description_text: Melee damage dealt now has a 20 % chance to strike 2 additional times for 30 % of the damage dealt as Holy Damage.

entries.name: Holy Edge
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Scourgebane and Scarlet Hammer now strikes 1 additional nearby enemy.

entries.name: Chivalric
entries.description_text: Increases your critical damage with Holy spells and abilities by 15 % .

entries.name: Aggramar's Rage
entries.description_text: Increases your Holy critical strike chance by 3 % and your expertise by 5 .

entries.name: Serendipity
entries.description_text: Increases the all damage dealt by party and raid members by 3 % . Does not stack with similar effects. In addition, reduces the cost of your spells and abilities by -5 % .

entries.name: Templar Rituals
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Righteous Tempest now deals an additional 35 + 10% holy SP + 8.5% AP Holy damage, and upon dealing damage, you pull enemies within 15 yds towards you.

entries.name: Pure Focus
entries.description_text: Increases the chance to trigger Scourgebane by 5 % and your chance to hit by 2 % .

entries.name: Judgement
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Scourgebane , Scarlet Hammer , and Titanstrike by 25 % on enemies below 20% health.

entries.name: Radiant Blade
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of Oath: Righteous Lunge by 25 % .

entries.name: Divine Charge
entries.description_text: You and your party members leap upon a divine steed, increasing their movement speed by 100 % and causing them to trample nearby enemies for 119 + 20% AP + 40% holy SP Holy Damage every 1 sec for 15 seconds. While active, casting does not dismount you or your allies. Can only be used outdoors.

entries.name: Argent Knight
entries.description_text: Increases the damage dealt by Righteous Tempest and Condemn by 30 % . Additionally, Righteous Tempest now reduces all damage taken by -20 % while active.

entries.name: Testament of Strength
entries.description_text: Your next 3 Titanstrikes are usable regardless of your target's health percentage and deal 25 % increased damage. Lasts 1 minute. Applies Sacred Restraint for 1 minute. Sacred Restraint Cannot be targeted by Testaments .

entries.name: Warrior of Dawn
entries.description_text: Melee damage dealt now has a 10 % chance to reduce the Energy cost of your next Argent Blade by -50 % .

entries.name: Scarlet Training
entries.description_text: Level 30 Passive Casting Argent Blade while Warrior of Dawn is active now transforms your next Chastise into Scarlet Hammer . Scarlet Hammer Drop a scarlet hammer on an enemy for 155 % Weapon Damage plus 35 as Holy Damage and reduce their Armor by 555 for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Improved Scarlet Hammer
entries.description_text: Level 40 Passive Casting Scarlet Hammer now generates 30 Energy.

entries.name: Scarlet Champion
entries.description_text: Your damaging critical strikes now increase your Holy damage dealt by 2 % for 20 seconds. stacking 5 times. Can only occur once per sec. At 5 stacks, you are granted High General . High General Your next Chastise consumes all stacks of Scarlet Champion to deal 25 % increased direct damage, and be guaranteed to critically strike.

entries.name: Scarlet Secrets
entries.description_text: Every 2nd cast of Argent Blade now grants you Oath: Retribution . Oath: Retribution Critical damage increased by 5 % .

entries.name: Teachings of the Cathedral
entries.description_text: Your Oath: Condemn now provides 5 % additional critical strike chance.

entries.name: Light's Echo
entries.description_text: Argent Blade now has a 10 % chance to strike an additional time.

entries.name: Templar's Might
entries.description_text: Your Righteous Lunge and Chastise used on enemies affected by your Condemn now deal 6 % increased damage per stack.

entries.name: Scourgebane
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive Direct damage dealt now has a 20 % chance to strike an enemy with Scourgebane , dealing an additional 162 + 25% SP + 15% AP Holyflame Damage.

entries.name: Paladin Training
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Righteous Lunge and Argent Blade by 20 % .

entries.name: Tyr's Blessing
entries.description_text: Condemn now stacks 1 additional time.

entries.name: Legacy of the Silver Hand
entries.description_text: Casting Argent Blade or Scarlet Hammer now guarantees your next 2 instances of damage dealt by Scourgebane to critically strike. Increases the critical damage of Scourgebane by 15 % .

entries.name: Crusader's Brand
entries.description_text: Brand an enemy for 20 seconds, preventing them from mounting, fleeing, or increasing their movement speed above normal movement speed and when they deal direct damage they take 243 + 27.5% holy SP + 18.5% AP Holy Damage. While marked enemies can always be seen by the Crusader even while stealthed or invisible.

entries.name: Holy Combatant
entries.description_text: Your Argent Blade now also extends the duration of Interdict on your target by 1 sec.

entries.name: Pious
entries.description_text: Increases all primary attributes by 5 % .

entries.name: Determined
entries.description_text: Your Temple Guardian now makes your next ability within 5 seconds free of cost.

entries.name: Testament of Will
entries.description_text: Break an ally free of worldly constraints, making them immune to all movement impairing effects for 10 seconds. Applies Sacred Restraint for 1 minute. Sacred Restraint Cannot be targeted by Testaments .

entries.name: Sacred Candle
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Testament of Faith by -60 sec and the duration of Sacred Restraint by -30 sec.

entries.name: Deep Meditation
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of your Oath Chain by 5 sec.

entries.name: Spiritual
entries.description_text: Increases your Energy regeneration by 20 % .

entries.name: Tyr's Guard
entries.description_text: Testament of Hope now summons an additional copy of yourself.

entries.name: Interdict
entries.description_text: Forbid an enemy from sinning, silencing them for 6 seconds. If they are an Undead or Demon they are unable to be healed for the duration.

entries.name: Libram of Fervor
entries.description_text: Read from your Libram of Fervor , granting you spell power equal to 30 % of your Agility and attack power equal to 30 % of your Intellect for 20 seconds.

entries.name: Pulverizing
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Condemn now has a 15 % chance to consecrate the earth around you with holy fervor, dealing 91 + 22.5% holy SP + 10% AP Holy damage to nearby enemies.

entries.name: Sanctify
entries.description_text: Your Libram spells now grant you 10 % increased melee haste for 20 seconds.

entries.name: Finesse
entries.description_text: Increases your critical strike chance by 2 % and reduces the duration of disarm effects against you by -15 % .

entries.name: Divine Force
entries.description_text: Leap at an enemy with divine force, stunning them for 6 seconds, dealing 20 + 100% SP + 55% AP Holy damage, and interrupting non-player spellcasting for 3 seconds.

entries.name: Tenacious Defender
entries.description_text: Casting Libram of Tenacity now also heals you for 20 % of your maximum health.

entries.name: Libram of Tenacity
entries.description_text: Read from your Libram of Tenacity , reducing your Physical Damage taken by -30 % for 20 seconds.

entries.name: Courage
entries.description_text: Increases your movement speed and reduces the duration of movement slowing effects on you by -10 % .

entries.name: Holy Constitution
entries.description_text: Increases your damage dealt versus Undead by 5 , scaling with level, and increases your chance to resist disease effects by 30 % .

entries.name: Sturdy
entries.description_text: Increases your maximum health and Energy by 5 % .

entries.name: Judgement of the Gods
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of Titanstrike by 50 % .

entries.name: Deep Secrets
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of your Librams and Testaments by 10 sec.

entries.name: Final Prayer
entries.description_text: Doubles the healing done to you by Testament of Fortitude and Testament of Faith .

entries.name: Sacred Defense
entries.description_text: When you take Physical damage you now strike back at enemies for 15 % of the damage dealt as Holy damage. Can only occur once per sec.

entries.name: Silverhand Incantation
entries.description_text: Chant a silverhand incantation and toss a holy hammer at your target, charging you to them and removing Sacred Restraint from you and them if they are an ally. Upon reaching your target you deal 300 + 200% AP Holy damage to all nearby enemies and heal nearby allies for the same amount.

entries.name: Testament of Hope
entries.description_text: Summons 2 copies of yourself that charge at a nearby enemy and aid you in combat for 20 seconds. While within 15 yds of you, each copy reduces all damage you take by -10 % . Applies Sacred Restraint for 1 minute. Sacred Restraint Cannot be targeted by Testaments .

entries.name: Holy Crusader
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Divine Force by -30 sec.

entries.name: Scarlet Judicator
entries.description_text: Your Divine Force now strikes 2 additional enemies near the primary target.

entries.name: Improved Benediction
entries.description_text: Benediction now grants your target armor based on your Agility and Stamina for 15 sec.

entries.name: Binding Scripture
entries.description_text: Healing an ally now redirects 10 % of their damage taken to you and reduces your damage taken by -5 % for 10 seconds, stacking 3 times.

entries.name: Judicator
entries.description_text: Increases your parry and dodge chance by 3 % .

entries.name: Sacred Style
entries.description_text: Increases your Holy healing done and received by 8 % .

entries.name: Testament of Fortitude
entries.description_text: Meditate for 15 seconds, restoring 5 % of your maximum health every 1 sec and reducing damage taken by -50 % . Each second you will also remove 1 disease effect from yourself. Applies Sacred Restraint for 1 minute. Sacred Restraint Cannot be targeted by Testaments .

entries.name: Blade of Faith
entries.description_text: Unleash a devastating Oath Breaker on an enemy dealing 119 + 140% SP + 70% AP Holy damage over 21 seconds. This ability can critically strike. Consumes your Oaths , dealing additional damage for each consumed.

entries.name: Martyr
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of Gift of Zeal by 20 % .

entries.name: Mark of Aggramar
entries.description_text: Reduces the Energy cost of your Testaments by -50 % .

entries.name: Blessed Strikes
entries.description_text: Reduces the Energy cost of your Oath Breakers by -10 .

entries.name: Profound Enlightenment
entries.description_text: Attain enlightenment, reducing the remaining cooldown of Testaments by 50 % .

entries.name: Liberty
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of your Libram spells by -30 sec.

entries.name: Hematoma
entries.description_text: Your Bloodbolt now heals for an additional 20 % of the damage dealt.

entries.name: Aneurysm
entries.description_text: Counter the enemy's spellcast, preventing any spell from that school of magic from being cast for 4 seconds. Successfully interrupting an enemy heals you for 5 % of your maximum health.

entries.name: Sacrificial Rite
entries.description_text: Requires Mortal Form Invoke a dark ritual, increasing your haste by 20 % for 15 seconds. While active, attackers are afflicted with Cursed Blood . Can only occur once per sec. At the end of the duration, your healing done is increased by 15 % and you are healed for 795 + 150% SP over 15 seconds.

entries.name: Valanar's Vengeance
entries.description_text: Requires Mortal Form Launch a powerful blood bolt at an enemy, dealing 188 + 127.75% SP Shadow damage. Each stack of Thirst reduces the cast time of this ability and increases its damage.

entries.name: Dark Presence
entries.description_text: Increases spell haste of all party and raid members by 3 % . Does not stack with similar effects. In addition, increases your spell haste by 3 % .

entries.name: Dominion of Blood
entries.description_text: Your Vampiric Fang now heals you for an additional 50% of the damage dealt.

entries.name: Darkfallen's Embrace
entries.description_text: Increases your spell haste by 3 % and increases the range of your Sanguine spells and Bloodbolt by 5 yds.

entries.name: The Cup Runneth Over
entries.description_text: Increases the spell power scaling of Bloodmoon Blast , Taldaram's Torment and Bloodbolt by 20 % .

entries.name: Blood Lord
entries.description_text: Grants your Bloodsore a -15 % chance to provide its benefits without being consumed.

entries.name: Swarm of Flies
entries.description_text: Your Bloodbolt now refreshes the duration of Taldaram's Torment .

entries.name: Crimson Terror
entries.description_text: Your Transgression now grants spell damage equal to 50 % of your Spirit for the duration.

entries.name: Vampiric Fang
entries.description_text: Expends Thirst Stacks Steal 36 + 34% SP health from an enemy. Damage increased by 10 % for each Thirst stack. Clears Insatiable and Thirst stacks.

entries.name: Cunning of Atherann
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Increases your spell damage by 25 % of your Stamina and Spirit.

entries.name: Reckless Abandon
entries.description_text: Level 40 Passive Each stack of Thirst now increases your critical strike chance by 1 % .

entries.name: Bloodwell Eruption
entries.description_text: Increases the radius of Sanguine Rupture by 5 yds and its critical strike chance by 10 % .

entries.name: Atherann's Anguish
entries.description_text: Unleash a hemoplague upon the target area, accumulating 30% of the damage you deal to affected enemies for 10 seconds, and then exploding for that amount of Shadow damage. Damage caused by this ability cannot critically strike.

entries.name: Agonizing Pain
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by your Atherann's Anguish now causes enemies hit to bleed, dealing 1405 + 100% shadow SP Shadow damage over 10 seconds.

entries.name: The Council Assembled
entries.description_text: Atherann's Anguish now costs -25 less Rage. Taldaram's Torment now increases the damage of your next Valanar's Vengeance or Keleseth's Calamity by 3 % per tick for 10 seconds, stacking 5 times. Valanar's Vengeance and Keleseth's Calamity now reduce the cooldown of Malediction by -5 sec.

entries.name: Essence Harvester
entries.description_text: Being struck by an enemy while below 35% health instantly resets the cooldown of your Vampiric Fang and grants you Wretched . Can only occur once per minute. Wretched Generates 10 Rage and 1 stack of Thirst every 1 sec for 10 seconds. Vampiric Fang removes this effect.

entries.name: Blood Banquet
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Valanar's Vengeance and Taldaram's Torment by 15 % .

entries.name: Twisted Magic
entries.description_text: Your direct harmful critical strikes increase the target's Shadow damage taken from you by 2 % , stacking up to 5 times, for 12 seconds.

entries.name: Fearmonger
entries.description_text: Increases the tick rate and cost of Taldaram's Torment by -30 % .

entries.name: Atherann's Wickedness
entries.description_text: Increases your Shadow damage dealt by 4 % and increases your hit chance by 3 % .

entries.name: Night Feast
entries.description_text: Each point of Rage now increases the damage of Bloodbolt by 1% , but its Rage cost is increased by 10 .

entries.name: Blood Craving
entries.description_text: Requires Mortal Form You crave blood for 12 seconds, for the duration you cannot be interrupted or silenced, and you regain 5 % of your maximum health and 15 % of your missing Rage every 2 sec.

entries.name: Keleseth's Calamity
entries.description_text: Requires Mortal Form Bend blood in an area, dealing 177 + 69% shadow SP Shadow damage to enemies. Each stack of Thirst reduces the cast time of this ability and increases its damage.

entries.name: Cardiac Arrest
entries.description_text: Your Valanar's Vengeance now deals an additional 50% of its initial damage dealt over 10 seconds, healing you for 50% of the damage dealt.

entries.name: Torture
entries.description_text: Increases the leech of Vampiric Feast by 50 % . Consuming at least 9 stacks of Thirst with Vampiric Fang now extends the duration of Transgression by 5 sec.

entries.name: Blood Constructor
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Animated Blood by 1 sec per stack of Thirst .

entries.name: Cursed Ground
entries.description_text: Increases the cast time of Sanguine Rupture by 2 sec, but now when you strike at least 5 enemies it causes them to bleed out, dealing an additional 352 Shadow damage over 2 seconds.

entries.name: Malediction
entries.description_text: Condemn an enemy, dealing 248 + 77.33% shadow SP Shadow damage over 12 seconds and increasing the damage they take from your next 5 direct damage spells by 20 % .

entries.name: Lifedrinker
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of your Vampiric Fang by 25 % .

entries.name: Vampyr Lord
entries.description_text: Increases the damage dealt by your Animated Blood by 35 % .

entries.name: Blood Prince's Command
entries.description_text: Your Bloodbolt is now guaranteed to critically strike on enemies affected by Taldaram's Torment .

entries.name: Enthraller
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of Valanar's Vengeance and Keleseth's Calamity by 10 % .

entries.name: Blood Parasites
entries.description_text: Your Taldaram's Torment now generates 3 additional Rage per tick and increases spell critical strike chance against the target by 3 % for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Dark Frenzy
entries.description_text: Increases spell haste of all party and raid members by 3 % . Does not stack with similar effects. In addition, while a Cursed Form is active, your global cooldowns are reduced by -25 % .

entries.name: Rage
entries.description_text: Increases your spell damage by 15 % of your attack power and the damage dealt by Reave by 10 % .

entries.name: Aortic Assault
entries.description_text: Extend the duration of your active Cursed Form by 3 sec and strike nearby enemies every 1 sec for 3 seconds, each strike causing 20 + 12% AP Physical damage.

entries.name: Crimson Expedition
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of your Bloodbolt , Blood Shards , and Aortic Assault by 10 % .

entries.name: Fang Over Fang
entries.description_text: Casting Bloodfang Bite now has a 20 % chance to reset the cooldown of Reave .

entries.name: Endure the Curse
entries.description_text: Reduce all damage taken by -30 % for 10 seconds. While active, taking damage that would reduce your health below 10% will instantly heal you for 30 % of your maximum health. Can only occur once.

entries.name: Night Hunter
entries.description_text: Your Veinburst now has a 40 % chance to not trigger a cooldown when cast. Your Bloodbolt now has a 40 % chance to refund half of its Rage cost when cast.

entries.name: Shadow Pact
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of your Shields by 50 % .

entries.name: Gore Tome
entries.description_text: For the first 5 sec after activating a Cursed Form , your Bloodfang Bite is now guaranteed to critically strike.

entries.name: Dark Intent
entries.description_text: When you Lunge at an enemy you now heal for 5 % of your maximum health.

entries.name: Terrorizer
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Veinburst , Bloodfang Bite , and Claw Sweep on enemies below 35% health by 25 % .

entries.name: Dark Hunt
entries.description_text: Increases your Shadow damage dealt by 10 % against bleeding targets.

entries.name: Gore Barrage
entries.description_text: Reduces the cost of spells that cost health and Animated Blood by -30 % .

entries.name: Barely Human
entries.description_text: Increases your armor penetration and the damage of spells that cost health by 15 % .

entries.name: Sanguine Scripture
entries.description_text: Upon exiting Accursed Form , you gain 70 % movement speed and spell haste for 5 seconds.

entries.name: Inhumane
entries.description_text: Dealing damage with Aortic Assault will now launch 1 Blood Shard , dealing 18 + 15% AP + 35% SP Arcane damage to your target.

entries.name: Killer Instinct
entries.description_text: Each point of Rage now increases the critical strike chance of Veinburst and Reave by 0.5 % , up to a maximum of 50% .

entries.name: Reave
entries.description_text: Lacerate an enemy, dealing 125 % Weapon Damage plus 26 . If the enemy is bleeding, below 35% health, or if you are behind them, deal 100 % additional Shadow damage for each condition met.

entries.name: Everlasting Hunt
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Blood Shards now reduces the cooldown of Veinburst and Reave by -1.5 sec.

entries.name: Dark Sigil
entries.description_text: Increases critical strike chance of all party and raid members by 3 % . Does not stack with similar effects. In addition, you now heal for 15 % of all critical damage dealt.

entries.name: Crimson Feast
entries.description_text: Every 5 second you remain in a Cursed Form now reduces the cooldown of your Bloodsurge by -5 sec.

entries.name: Blood Scent
entries.description_text: While in Accursed Form , you now deal 15% increased damage to targets below 35% maximum health. Dealing direct damage to enemies below 35% maximum health now leeches health equal to 10 % of the damage dealt.

entries.name: Accursed Form
entries.description_text: Transforms your Blood Curse into Accursed Form . Accursed Form (Cursed Form) Embrace your demonic curse for 30 seconds, entering an improved Cursed Form , increasing your attack power by 50 % of your Agility and causing your melee attacks to reduce all healing done to the target by -20 % for 10 seconds, stacking 2 times.

entries.name: Battleweaver
entries.description_text: Casting Cursed Form abilities now has a 50 % chance to generate 1 Blood Shard for 10 minutes, up to 8 . Dealing damage with Bloodbolt will launch 1 Blood Shard , dealing 18 + 15% AP + 35% SP Arcane damage to your target.

entries.name: Veinburst
entries.description_text: Requires Mortal Form Blast an enemy, dealing 123 + 25% AP + 85% shadow SP Shadow damage. Deals 25 % increased damage to bleeding targets.

entries.name: Blood Pact
entries.description_text: Increases your maximum Rage by 20 and you now regenerate 4 Rage every 5 sec.

entries.name: Corrupted Blood
entries.description_text: When you use Taldaram's Torment on a Humanoid or Beast it now corrupts their blood, increasing your damage dealt against them by 10 % .

entries.name: Clotting
entries.description_text: At the end of Aortic Assault 's duration, all enemies in a 10 yd frontal cone suffer 600 + 50% AP Physical damage. Damage dealt by this effect is increased by 25 % against bleeding targets.

entries.name: Cruel Intent
entries.description_text: When you Lunge at an enemy you now strike them 3 times with auto attacks.

entries.name: Leeching Tome
entries.description_text: Your Bloodbolt now leeches 50 % more health, but it now costs 5 additional Rage.

entries.name: One Man's Curse...
entries.description_text: Removes the health cost of Accursed Form and entering it now instantly restores 15 % of your maximum health.

entries.name: Hemoburst
entries.description_text: Requires Mortal Form Unleash a powerful burst of blood at an enemy, dealing 1480 + 65% AP + 50% SP Shadow damage. This ability is guaranteed to critically strike against bleeding targets. Extends the duration of your next Cursed Form by 5 sec for 30 seconds, stacking 2 times.

entries.name: Cursed Blood
