entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Taldaram's Torment now has a 20 % chance to internally rupture, causing it to deal its damage an additional time to all enemies near the target.

entries.name: Unchained
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive Your damaging Mortal Form spells can now be cast while moving.

entries.name: Forbidden Power
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Increases your spell critical strike rating by 30 % of your Agility and spell hit rating by 5 % of your Agility.

entries.name: Blood Shards
entries.description_text: Level 30 Passive Shadow Damage dealt now generates 1 Blood Shard , plus 1 additional if it critically strikes, for 10 minutes, up to 8 . Dealing damage with Veinburst will now expend all stacks of Blood Shards , each dealing 18 + 9% AP + 15% SP Arcane damage to your target.

entries.name: The Hunter and the Hunted
entries.description_text: Level 50 Passive When you activate a Cursed Form you now charge to your target if they are within 20 yds. If they're an enemy you root them for 2 seconds. Upon expiration, your Accursed Form can be reactivated to cause you to erupt in a burst of blood magic, leeching 364 + 33% shadow SP + 12.5% AP health from nearby enemies and teleporting you backwards.

entries.name: Puncturing Fangs
entries.description_text: Your Bloodmoon Blast now generates 3 additional Rage per hit.

entries.name: Ultra Instinct
entries.description_text: Direct ability critical strikes now increase your spell and ability critical strike chance and critical damage by 3 % for 10 sec. Each additional critical strike increases this by an additional 3 % , but reduces its duration by -1 sec.

entries.name: Vitality
entries.description_text: Increases your Stamina while in Eternal Curse by an additional 10 % .

entries.name: Heightened Reflexes
entries.description_text: Increases your chance to dodge by 4 % and your expertise by 5 .

entries.name: Rejuvenating Shadows
entries.description_text: Nearby party and raid members receive 6 % more healing. Does not stack with similar effects. In addition, increases the health leeched by Bloodbolt by 50 % .

entries.name: Bloodmoon Power
entries.description_text: Level 50 Passive Periodic damage dealt by Rotclaw now hits -50 % more often and your Bloodfang Bite , Claw Sweep , and Bloodbolt additionally scales with dodge rating.

entries.name: Uncanny Movement
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Increases your Agility by 25 % and your hit rating by 5 % of your Agility. In addition, Claw Sweep now generates additional threat.

entries.name: Feral Strength
entries.description_text: Level 30 Passive While in Eternal Curse , you now gain 50 % more attack power from Agility and Strength.

entries.name: Shadows In The Night
entries.description_text: While above 75% health, your damage taken is reduced by -5 % .

entries.name: Blood Moon
entries.description_text: While below 75% health, you now heal for 3 % of all damage you deal.

entries.name: Coated In Blood
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of Blood Pact by 50 % .

entries.name: Blood Mark
entries.description_text: Increases the Physical damage taken by enemies within 5 yds of you by 3 % .

entries.name: Enraging Wounds
entries.description_text: Level 40 Passive Melee critical strikes now leech 46 + 18.5% Stamina health from the target, scaling with your Stamina.

entries.name: Night Hunter's Howl
entries.description_text: Howl into the souls of nearby enemies, dealing 71 + 28.5% AP Shadow damage and slowing their movement speed by -60 % for 6 seconds.

entries.name: Monstrous Hunger
entries.description_text: Enrage for 10 seconds, causing the next 6 Bloodfang Bites to have a -50 % reduced global cooldown and cost and to trigger Call of the Darkwing . Call of the Darkwing Calls 1 to 2 Shadow Bats to appear from the shadows and strike the target for 28 + 40% SP + 20% AP Physical Damage, healing you equal to the damage dealt.

entries.name: Bloodguard
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Blood Pact by 4 sec.

entries.name: No Mercy
entries.description_text: Allows your Thick Pelt to affect an additional hit.

entries.name: Blood Plague
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance and critical damage of Ravenous Strike and Claw Sweep by 10 % against Diseased targets.

entries.name: Appetite for Blood
entries.description_text: Increases the damage dealt by Bloodfang Bite and Claw Sweep by 20 % against Humanoids and Beasts.

entries.name: Packleader
entries.description_text: Casting Howl spell now enrages your summons, increasing their damage dealt by 10 % for 8 seconds.

entries.name: Eternal Hunt
entries.description_text: Increases your maximum health and reduces the cost of your spells and abilities by 5 % .

entries.name: Thick Pelt
entries.description_text: Physical damage taken now reduces the Physical damage taken from the next attack within 10 seconds by -15 + 20% AP . Can only occur once every 5 sec.

entries.name: Coated In Darkness
entries.description_text: Casting Bloodbolt or Bloodfang Bite now reduces the cooldown of your Blood Pact by -0.5 sec.

entries.name: Rabid
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Howl spells by -25 % .

entries.name: Uncanny Speed
entries.description_text: Increases your melee haste by 5 % and your movement speed and mounted movement speed by 20 % .

entries.name: Dark Mark
entries.description_text: Reduces the chance to hit for enemies within 5 yds of you by -3 % .

entries.name: Screech of the Darkwing
entries.description_text: Your effects that trigger Call of the Darkwing now trigger an additional Call of the Darkwing . Can only occur once per sec.

entries.name: Shadow Strength
entries.description_text: Casting Howl spells now deal 65 + 25% Stamina + 25% Agility + 10% AP Shadow damage to all nearby enemies and triggering Call of the Darkwing now reduces the cooldown of all Howl spells by -1 sec. Can only occur once per sec.

entries.name: Cursed Strikes
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Rotclaw and Hypovolemic Shock by 50 % .

entries.name: Bloody Claws
entries.description_text: You now generate 20 % increased Rage from damage dealt and critical strikes with auto attacks now reduces the cooldown of Animated Blood , Blood Veil , and Blood Pact by 1 sec.

entries.name: Eyes In The Night
entries.description_text: Allies within 20 yds are protected by Shadow Colony , giving them a 40 % chance to trigger a Call of the Darkwing when they take direct damage. Can only occur once every 5 sec. If allies have less health than you when this occurs, generate a large amount of threat against the enemy that triggered it.

entries.name: Rotclaw
entries.description_text: 2 Charges, 6 sec recharge Ravage all nearby enemies, dealing 28 + 10% AP Shadow damage, generating Rage and infecting their wounds, causing them to bleed for 24 + 46% AP Shadow damage over 4 seconds.

entries.name: Festering Maw
entries.description_text: Healing with Bite Wound now reduces the cooldown of Lunge by 1 sec.

entries.name: Infection
entries.description_text: Auto attacking a bleeding target will now infect the wound, increasing their chance to be critically struck from you by 1 % for 6 seconds, stacking 10 times.

entries.name: Enduring
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Bloodbolt by 25 % , plus an additional 25 % while below 35% health.

entries.name: Iron Claws
entries.description_text: Allows Rotclaw 's periodic effect to stack up 2 additional times for 50 % longer duration and cause you to ignore 3 % of the target's armor per stack.

entries.name: Petrified Legions
entries.description_text: Physical damage you deal or take now has a 10 % chance to trigger a Call of the Darkwing . Call of the Darkwing Calls 1 to 2 Shadow Bats to appear from the shadows and strike the target for 28 + 40% SP + 20% AP Physical Damage, healing you equal to the damage dealt.

entries.name: Blood Howl
entries.description_text: Taunts nearby enemies within 10 yds, forcing them to attack you for 5 seconds.

entries.name: Eternal Presence
entries.description_text: Increases the attack power of party and raid members by 5 % . Does not stack with similar effects. In addition, you now gain attack power equal to 15 % of the damage taken for 10 seconds. Can only occur once every 10 sec.

entries.name: Enraging Howls
entries.description_text: Casting Howl spells now increases the damage dealt and reduces damage taken by nearby party members by 5 % for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Eternal Resolve
entries.description_text: Activate your eternal resolve for 30 seconds, sending you into a feral frenzy, increasing your melee attack speed, maximum health, and healing received by 50 % .

entries.name: Grim Omen
entries.description_text: Critical strikes with Ravenous Strike or Bloodfang Bite , or using Howl spells, now triggers Call of the Darkwing . Call of the Darkwing Calls 1 to 2 Shadow Bats to appear from the shadows and strike the target for 28 + 40% SP + 20% AP Physical Damage, healing you equal to the damage dealt.

entries.name: Bloody Sacrifice
entries.description_text: Increases your healing received by 15 % .

entries.name: Crimson Curse
entries.description_text: Your direct damage critical strikes increase the damage the target takes from bleed effects by 30 % for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Predator
entries.description_text: Your Claw Sweep , Sanguine Mend , and Sanguine Rupture can now strike 1 additional nearby target.

entries.name: Saturating Sutures
entries.description_text: Your periodic damage and healing has a 15 % chance to reduce the cost your next Sanguine Mend by -100 % for 8 seconds.

entries.name: Transfusion
entries.description_text: Swap health percentages with an ally. Increases the lower health percentage of the two to 40 % , if below that amount.

entries.name: Blood Veil
entries.description_text: Create a magical veil around an ally, absorbing 50 % of incoming damage, up to a maximum of 511 + 150% Spirit + 75% AP for 8 seconds.

entries.name: Liquify
entries.description_text: Requires Mortal Form Dissipate into a pool of blood, making you immune to damage from spells and attacks, but preventing you from attacking or casting spells and slowing your movement speed by -30 % for 6 seconds. Usable while stunned, feared or confused.

entries.name: Shadow Howl
entries.description_text: Let loose a dark howl that inspires your allies, granting immunity to movement impairing effects to all allies for 6 seconds.

entries.name: Adrenaline
entries.description_text: Reduces the duration of bleed, root, and movement slowing effects against you by -25 % .

entries.name: Alacrity
entries.description_text: Increases all primary stats by 4 % .

entries.name: Bloodmoon Power
entries.description_text: Your Liquify now cleanses all negative effects when used.

entries.name: Mortal Wounds
entries.description_text: Your direct harmful critical strikes with spells and abilities now cause the target to bleed for 306 + 6% AP + 30% SP over 6 seconds.

entries.name: Blood Moon
entries.description_text: Your Animated Blood now spawns an additional amalgam.

entries.name: Scarlet Delirium
entries.description_text: Requires Mortal Form Flood the minds of up to 5 nearby enemies with visions of unraveling flesh, fearing them for 40 seconds ( 8 sec versus players) while draining their life essence, siphoning 8 + 15% SP health every 3 sec. Damage caused may interrupt the effect.

entries.name: Fleshcraft
entries.description_text: Mend blood and bone, healing an ally for 50 % of their maximum health and applies Sated . Sated Cannot be affected by Fleshcraft for 3 minutes.

entries.name: Veins of Vengeance
entries.description_text: Increases your chance to resist curse effects by 15 % .

entries.name: Blood Pact
entries.description_text: Invoke a blood pact, exchanging health for enhanced reflexes, increasing your chance to dodge and reducing the chance for ranged attacks to hit you by 50 % for 12 seconds. While active you can dodge or parry while casting.

entries.name: Blood Trails
entries.description_text: Periodic damage and healing now causes targets to spill a pool of blood beneath them. Allies in a Cursed Form who move through the pools of blood gain Trail of Blood for 6 seconds. Trail of Blood Movement speed cannot be reduced below 80 % . Movement speed increased by 20 % . Damage dealt increased by 5 % .

entries.name: Bloodleaper
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of your Lunge by -10 sec.

entries.name: Visceral Magic
entries.description_text: Adds 40 % to the Armor contribution from items by Blood Shield .

entries.name: Blood Runs Cold
entries.description_text: Your Blood Pact now also increases your healing received by 20 % .

entries.name: Vampiric Pools
entries.description_text: When Liquify ends, you now leech 474 + 100% SP health from nearby enemies.

entries.name: Infected Blood
entries.description_text: Periodic damage dealt now reduces the enemy's movement speed by -30 % .

entries.name: Easy Prey
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Hemostasis by 1 sec.

entries.name: Dark Mending
entries.description_text: Reduces the cast time of Sanguine Mend by -0.5 sec.

entries.name: Blood Rush
entries.description_text: Periodic damage dealt now has a 20 % chance to grant you Blood Rush . Can only occur once every 5 sec. Blood Rush Increases your haste by 20 % for 5 seconds.

entries.name: Everhungry
entries.description_text: Direct critical strikes now increase your haste by 10 % for 5 seconds.

entries.name: Blood Bond
entries.description_text: Bond yourself to an ally for 30 minutes, causing direct damage taken by the ally to generate 1 Rage and 3 % base health and redirect their threat generated to you. In addition, while out of combat, you and your bonded ally have 30 % increased movement speed.

entries.name: Dark Curse
entries.description_text: Increases critical strike chance by 3 % .

entries.name: Crimson Etchings
entries.description_text: Removes the health cost of your Blood Shield and Vital Shield .

entries.name: Life Scent
entries.description_text: Increases your stealth detection significantly.

entries.name: Wicked Howl
entries.description_text: Let loose a wicked howl, increasing your maximum health by 30 % for 20 seconds.

entries.name: Nightmare
entries.description_text: While above 50% maximum health, abilities that cost Rage now consume 2 % of your maximum health to damage or heal your target for an additional 10 % of the value.

entries.name: Blood Clot
entries.description_text: Your Scarlet Delirium now deals 100 % increased damage.

entries.name: Mucking Around
entries.description_text: Reduces the cast time of Scarlet Delirium by -1 sec, but increases the health cost by 100 % .

entries.name: Bloodbound Etchings
entries.description_text: Your Blood Shield now increases your health regeneration by 50 % more.

entries.name: Hemostasis
entries.description_text: Trap an enemy in a blood orb, horrifying them in place for 4 seconds. Reactivating this ability within 4 seconds, instantly pops the Hemostasis , dealing 137 + 43% AP + 103% shadow SP Shadow damage and reducing their healing received by -60 % for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Night Stalker
entries.description_text: All damage and healing done is increased by 5 % at night.

entries.name: Bloodbender
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of Offerings by 20 % .

entries.name: Coagulation
entries.description_text: Your Blood Shield now also dispels 1 bleed effect from you with each tick.

entries.name: Infuse
entries.description_text: Accumulates 10% of all damage dealt to the target and unleashes it after 10 seconds, dealing Shadow damage and absorbing healing done to the target equal to the damage done for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Blood Redistribution
entries.description_text: Increases the maximum health restored by Fleshcraft by 25 % .

entries.name: Raging Hunger
entries.description_text: Triggering Pooled Vitality now also generates 3 Rage.

entries.name: Aortic Aegis
entries.description_text: Your Blood Veil now applies to the party members of the target.

entries.name: Sovereignty
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Crimson Tide now grants you Sovereignty . Sovereignty Reduces the cost of your next Bloodbolt within 12 seconds by -10 % and causes it to strike 1 additional nearby enemy for each target damaged, stacking up to 5 times.

entries.name: Dark Essence
entries.description_text: Casting Cursed Form abilities or Bloodbolt will now heal allies affected by Blood Rituals for 114 + 10% healing every 1 sec for 3 seconds.

entries.name: Flesh Foundry
entries.description_text: Your critical strikes now reduce the cooldown of Fleshcraft and the duration of Sated on the target by -4 sec. In addition, increases your critical strike rating by 15 % of your Spirit.

entries.name: Organ Orbs
entries.description_text: Each stack of Pooled Vitality now increases your Spirit by 3 % .

entries.name: Gift of Lana'thel
entries.description_text: Become blessed by Lana'thel, increasing your spell power by 25 % of your Spirit and your hit rating by 4 % of your Spirit.

entries.name: Crimson Scion
entries.description_text: Direct damage dealt now has a 10 % chance to make your next Sanguine Mend within 10 seconds instant cast.

entries.name: Hemal Excision
entries.description_text: Cut into an ally's vital essence, siphoning all curse effects from them. You may reactivate this ability again within 10 seconds to place these curse effects on an enemy.

entries.name: Vampyr's Kiss
entries.description_text: Curse an enemy, causing them to bleed for 174 Shadow damage over 30 seconds. All periodic damage dealt to an enemy affected by Vampyr's Kiss is replicated on them equal to 25 % of the value.

entries.name: Dissipation
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Fleshcraft and the duration of the Sated debuff by -60 sec.

entries.name: Black Heart
entries.description_text: Your Vampyr's Rage now regenerates 20% of your maximum Rage.

entries.name: Crimson Tide
entries.description_text: Requires Mortal Form Create a pool of blood beneath up to 10 enemies within 10 yds of you, causing them to bleed for 165 + 140% SP Shadow damage over 15 seconds. Empowered : Radius increased by 5 yds and costs -100 % less Rage.

entries.name: Pooled Vitality
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive Spells that cost health now grant a stack of Pooled Vitality , stacking 10 times. Mortal Form spells that cost Rage consume 10 stacks of Pooled Vitality to become empowered.

entries.name: Blood-Cursed Weapons
entries.description_text: Casting Crimson Tide now additionally increases the haste of all party and raid members by 5 % for 15 seconds. Does not stack with similar effects.

entries.name: Fleshbending
entries.description_text: Your critical strikes now increase the critical strike chance of all party and raid members by 5 % for 10 seconds. Does not stack with similar effects.

entries.name: Invigorated Flesh
entries.description_text: Increases chance to hit with all spells and attacks by 1 % for you and party and raid members. Does not stack with similar effects.

entries.name: Acquired Taste
entries.description_text: Casting Infuse or Vampyr's Kiss now generates 2 additional stacks of Pooled Vitality .

entries.name: Heartbreak
entries.description_text: Unleash a powerful surge of blood, dealing 172 + 50% shadow SP + 100% Spirit Shadow damage to an enemy, and healing 12 allies within 20 yds of the target for 162 + 30% healing + 100% Spirit . Empowered : Increases your party and raid members attack or spell power by 95 for 20 seconds, plus an additional 95 for you, scaling with level.

entries.name: Purify Blood
entries.description_text: Emanate an aura for 15 seconds, causing allied players to deal 70% shadow SP additional damage as Shadow damage when they deal direct damage. Applies Exhaustion , preventing you from benefiting from similar effects for 1 minute.

entries.name: Blood-Cursed Armor
entries.description_text: You now emanate an aura around you, increasing the Armor of party and raid members by 390 . Does not stack with similar effects.

entries.name: Waves of Blood
entries.description_text: Each tick of Crimson Tide now has a 10 % chance to heal a nearby ally for 25 % of the damage dealt.

entries.name: Universal Donor
entries.description_text: Casting Infuse or Vampyr's Kiss now increases the healing received by all allies by 6 % for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Heart Rupturer
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Claw Sweep , Sanguine Rupture , Ravenous Strike and Bloodmoon Blast by 20 % .

entries.name: Darkfallen Lament
entries.description_text: Chant a sinister ritual, healing up to 12 allies affected by Blood Rituals for 648 + 80% healing over 8 seconds and leeching 684 + 800% healing health from enemies within 10 yds over 8 seconds. While active, you are immune to silence and interrupt effects, but cannot move.

entries.name: Vitality For Later
entries.description_text: Consuming Pooled Vitality now heals up to 10 allies within 30 yds for 176 + 25% SP + 50% Spirit , scaling with Spirit and healing power.

entries.name: Lingering Essence
entries.description_text: Periodic damage and healing done now has a 50 % chance to reduce the cooldown of Vampyr's Kiss by -1 sec.

entries.name: Arterial Bind
entries.description_text: Place a pool of blood on the ground beneath enemies and allies, healing allies for 203 + 33% healing every 1 sec and silencing all enemies for 4 seconds.

entries.name: Dark Liturgy
entries.description_text: Requires Mortal Form Form a blood bond, healing a friendly target for 77 + 35% SP + 25% Spirit and applying Blood Rituals to them, bouncing to up to 10 nearby allies, healing for less for each target struck. Blood Rituals Causes Bloodmoon Blast to heal marked allies for 178 + 7% healing + 8.5% Stamina .

entries.name: Adrenaline Boost
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of abilities that require Cursed Form on enemies above 75% or below 35% health by 20 % . In addition, melee critical strikes now have a 50 % chance to make your next Dark Liturgy or Bloodmoon Blast instant cast.

entries.name: Spice of Life
entries.description_text: Your periodic damage and healing now has a 10 % chance to grant a stack of Pooled Vitality .

entries.name: Consolidation
entries.description_text: Increases your haste by 5 % .

entries.name: Gorge
entries.description_text: Instantly gain 10 stacks of Pooled Vitality every 5 sec for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Dark Blood
entries.description_text: Reduces the cost of your abilities that require Cursed Form and increases the healing done by Blood Rituals by -25 % .

entries.name: Bloodcraft
entries.description_text: Your damage dealt by Darkfallen Lament now applies Bloodcraft to affected enemies, reducing damage dealt by -2 % for 5 seconds, stacking 4 times.

entries.name: Hemoglobe
entries.description_text: Coalesce a powerful sanguine orb above you, healing up to 12 allies within 20 yds for 4247 + 84.38% healing + 337.5% Spirit + 262.5% Stamina over 15 seconds. Generates 2 stacks of Pooled Vitality , and 150 Rage every 2 sec.

entries.name: Excess Blood
entries.description_text: Your healing done now has a 10 % chance to heal the target for an additional 240 + 3% healing over 6 seconds.

entries.name: Gruesome Rituals
entries.description_text: Your damage dealt is now increased by 1 % for each stack of Pooled Vitality .

entries.name: Cursed Blood
entries.description_text: Increases the damage dealt and spell power scaling of Bloodbolt , Bloodmoon Blast , and Crimson Tide by 20 % . In addition, damage dealt by Bloodbolt now reduces all resistances by 75 and increases the target's Magic damage taken by 2 % for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Red Thirst
entries.description_text: Enrage allies within 40 yds, increasing haste by 30 % for 20 seconds. After being affected by this spell, allies cannot benefit from similar effects for 5 minutes.

entries.name: Sanguine Scion
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of Sanguine Mend and Bloodbolt by 10 % .

entries.name: Horn of War
entries.description_text: Generates 1 Advantage Emanate an aura for 30 seconds that grants 5 % increased critical strike chance to party and raid members. Does not stack with similar effects. While active, you generate 3 Focus every 1 sec.

entries.name: Blow the Horns!
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Horn spells by -25 % .

entries.name: Freedom
entries.description_text: Free up to 10 nearby allies within 15 yds of you for 8 seconds, causing them to become immune to roots and snares, and allowing their critical strikes to increase their movement speed by 30 % for 5 seconds.

entries.name: Survivalist
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Survival Potion by -25 % .

entries.name: Venom-Coated Seeds
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Snapseed now reduces the enemy's chance to hit by -15 % for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Wingman
entries.description_text: Reduces all damage taken by -2 % for each War Falcon or Dragonhawk you have active.

entries.name: To The Skies!
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Bushcraft Glider by -30 sec.

entries.name: Dream Flowers
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive Your damaging critical strikes now spawn a green Dream Flower at a random location within 15 yds of you. Dream Flower (Spawner) When an ally runs over the flower, they consume it to heal for 3 % maximum health and gain 40 % increased movement speed for 5 seconds. Can only occur once per sec.

entries.name: Hunting Tactics
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Skullpiercer is increased by 30% against Poisoned targets.

entries.name: War Falconer
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldowns of Falcon's Call by -30 sec.

entries.name: Falcon Guide
entries.description_text: Falconstrike and Battle Screech now increase your movement speed by 30 % for 3 seconds.

entries.name: Falcon Charmer
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of War Falcons by 3 sec.

entries.name: Thread The Needle
entries.description_text: Critical strikes with Quick Shot or Falconstrike now reduce the cast time and cost of your next ability that consumes Advantage by -34 % for 15 seconds, stacking 3 times.

entries.name: Emerald Arrow
entries.description_text: Set up a powerful magical arrow and then shoot it, dealing 10 + 20% ranged AP Nature damage to the target, increased by 30 % for each stack of Advantage . Creates an enchanted flare on the ground, causing nearby enemies to take 224 + 20% ranged AP Nature damage every 2 sec, lasting 2 sec for each stack of Advantage .

entries.name: Frenzy
entries.description_text: Enrage all nearby allies, increasing their haste by 30 % for 20 seconds. After being affected by this spell, allies cannot benefit from similar effects for 5 minutes.

entries.name: Battle Prowess
entries.description_text: Increases chance to hit with all spells and attacks by 1 % for you and party and raid members. Does not stack with similar effects.

entries.name: Aerial Assault
entries.description_text: Removes the Focus cost of Falcon's Call , allows it to strike 2 additional targets, and increases its range by 10 yds.

entries.name: Guidance
entries.description_text: Increases your Physical and Nature damage dealt by 1 % for each War Falcon or Dragonhawk you have active.

entries.name: Scavenger
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Battle Screech and reduces the cooldown of Snapseed by 5 sec.

entries.name: Defense of the Ancients
entries.description_text: You now emanate an aura around you, increasing the Armor of party and raid members by 390 . Does not stack with similar effects.

entries.name: Gutpiercer
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by War Falcons and Dragonhawks now has a 15 % chance to reduce the enemy's resistances by 75 and increase their Magic damage taken by -2 % for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Battle Screech
entries.description_text: Empower party and raid members within 40 yds, increasing their attack or spell power by 65 for 15 seconds. Does not stack with similar effects.

entries.name: Highlander
entries.description_text: Each time you spawn a green Dreamflower you are granted 1 stack of Highlander . Highlander (Stacks) At 3 stacks, your next Falconstrike within 10 seconds deals 25 % increased damage and reduces the enemy's healing received by -40 % for 8 seconds.

entries.name: Plumes of War
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of Falconstrike and Emerald Arrow by 15 % . In addition, critical strikes with Falconstrike now increase the damage of subsequent Falconstrikes by 5 % for 15 seconds, stacking 5 times.

entries.name: Cunning
entries.description_text: Increases your Focus regeneration by 15 % .

entries.name: Whipvine Arrow
entries.description_text: Launch an arrow with magical vines attached to it at your target, dealing 78 + 33% ranged AP Nature damage and rooting them for 40 seconds ( 8 sec vs players). Damage caused may interrupt the effect. Hits 1 additional nearby target per stack of Advantage .

entries.name: Horn of Alacrity
entries.description_text: Generates 1 Advantage Emanate an aura for 30 seconds that grants 5 % increased haste to party and raid members. Does not stack with similar effects. While active, you generate 3 Focus every 1 sec.

entries.name: Pecking
entries.description_text: Your War Falcons and Dragonhawks now have a 25 % chance to deal additional Physical damage to 3 nearby enemies.

entries.name: Woodland Arrow
entries.description_text: Shoot a magical arrow, dealing 38 + 35% ranged AP Physical damage and reducing the cooldown of active Horn spells by -15 sec. Damage increased by 30 % for each stack of Advantage .

entries.name: Command Aura
entries.description_text: Emanate an aura for 15 seconds, causing allied players to deal 35% ranged AP additional damage as Stormstrike Damage when they deal direct damage. Applies Exhaustion , preventing you from benefiting from similar effects for 1 minute.

entries.name: Falcon Diving
entries.description_text: Killing an enemy that yields experience or honor now summons a War Falcon to aid you in combat for 12 seconds. Can only occur once every 4 sec.

entries.name: Quel'dorei Poison
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Woodland Arrow and Emerald Arrow now poison enemies for 3 seconds, dealing 91 + 10% ranged AP Nature damage every 1 sec.

entries.name: Phoenix Plumes
entries.description_text: Your Skullpiercers and Woodland Arrows used with 5 stacks of Advantage now restore 3 % Focus and summon a War Falcon for 6 seconds.

entries.name: Thalassian Brand
entries.description_text: Mark an enemy for total destruction, increasing your allies ranged attack power against the target by 300 and dealing 1120 Nature damage every 3 sec for 15 seconds. The marked target can always be seen by the Ranger whether it stealths or turns invisible

entries.name: Falcon's Call
entries.description_text: Call down war falcons upon a targeted area, slowing up to 8 enemies within the area by -60 % for 5 seconds. A Falcon is summoned for each enemy affected for 12 seconds.

entries.name: Coordination
entries.description_text: Your War Falcons and Dragonhawks now grant you a stack of Coordination when they deal damage. Coordination (Proc) Increases your critical strike chance and critical damage by 1 % for 15 seconds, stacking 10 times.

entries.name: Backstep
entries.description_text: Leap backwards up to 10 yds.

entries.name: Forest Herald
entries.description_text: Casting Toxic Dart and abilities that spend stacks of Advantage now have a 20 % chance to spawn a green Dreamflower at a random location nearby within 15 yds of you. Dream Flower (Spawner) When an ally runs over the flower, they consume it to heal for 3 % maximum health and gain 40 % increased movement speed for 5 seconds.

entries.name: Windrunner's Reach
entries.description_text: Increases the range of your ranged abilities by 5 yds. In addition, your critical strike chance against Undead, Beasts, and Dragonkin is increased by 2 % .

entries.name: Falcon's Aid
entries.description_text: Periodic damage dealt now has a 10 % chance to summon a War Falcon to aid you in battle for 6 seconds.

entries.name: Razorquills
entries.description_text: Increases the tick rate of Toxic Dart and Emerald Arrows by -20 % .

entries.name: Dragonhawk Tamer
entries.description_text: Using a Horn now summons a Dragonhawk to assist you in combat for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Forest Fighter
entries.description_text: Your Skullpiercers or Emerald Arrows used with 5 stacks of Advantage now reduce the cooldown of Woodland Arrow by -5 sec.

entries.name: Strike Where It Hurts
entries.description_text: Your ability critical strikes now increase the damage the target takes from bleeds by 30 % for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Deadshot
entries.description_text: Generates 2 Advantage Shoot a powerful arrow at the target dealing 250 % Ranged Weapon Damage plus 20.1 . Only usable on enemies below 20% health.

entries.name: Hawkeye
entries.description_text: You now fire an arrow every 3 sec at enemies within 30 yds affected by your Hunting Shot , dealing 75 % Ranged Weapon Damage. Scales with Hunting Shot modifiers.

entries.name: Neurotoxin Arrow
entries.description_text: Shoot at an enemy's throat with a toxin-laced arrow, dealing 25 + 36.07% ranged AP Nature damage and silencing them for 1 seconds. Duration increased by 1 sec per stack of Advantage .

entries.name: Devastating Shots
entries.description_text: Increases your critical strike chance by 2 % and your hit chance by 1 % .

entries.name: New-Age Archery
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Skullpiercer and Precision Shot by 20 % .

entries.name: Improved Serrated Shot
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Serrated Shot by 30 % .

entries.name: Opportunist
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of Precision Shot by 50 % on enemies above 80% health.

entries.name: Lethal Wounds
entries.description_text: Increases the tick rate of your periodic damage effects by -20 % .

entries.name: Serrations
entries.description_text: Increases your damage against bleeding or Poisoned targets by 5 % .

entries.name: Hunting Shot
entries.description_text: Fire a shot that ricochets between 3 enemies, dealing Ranged Weapon Damage plus 6 to each enemy. Generates 1 stack of Advantage for each enemy hit.

entries.name: Skirmish
entries.description_text: Increases your critical strike chance by 15 % and reduces your Focus costs by -25 % . Lasts 4 sec for each stack of Advantage .

entries.name: Corrosive Poison
entries.description_text: Your ranged abilities against Poisoned targets now ignores 25 % of enemy armor.

entries.name: Precision Shot
entries.description_text: Precisely shoot an enemy from a great distance, inflicting 24 + 48.5% ranged AP Physical damage. Damage increased by 25 % for each stack of Advantage . Usable while in Elude .

entries.name: Pathfinder
entries.description_text: Your Adrenaline Rush now incurs a -90 % reduced cooldown when used while Elude is active.

entries.name: Studded Arrows
entries.description_text: Increases the ranged weapon damage dealt by Quick Shot by 10 % .

entries.name: Superb Shot
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Auto Shot now restores 4 Focus.

entries.name: Archery Master
entries.description_text: Critical strikes with Quick Shot now generate an additional stack of Advantage .

entries.name: Pierced
entries.description_text: Critical strikes with Skullpiercer and Precision Shot cause the enemy to bleed for an additional 50% damage of the damage dealt over 4 seconds.

entries.name: An Arrow for Everything
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of Quivers by 25 % .

entries.name: Skirmisher
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive Increases the damage and tick rate of Toxic Dart by -30 % , but reduces the duration of its damaging effect by -30 % .

entries.name: Sniper's Focus
entries.description_text: Consuming Advantage now has a 20 % chance per Archery Point spent to refund 20 Focus.

entries.name: Nimble
entries.description_text: Level 30 Passive Increases your ranged haste by 20 % of your Agility.

entries.name: Bleeding Edge
entries.description_text: Level 40 Passive Allows the periodic damage dealt by Serrated Shot to critically strike.

entries.name: Light Arrows
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Precision Shot by 20 % when used from 40 yds or further away from your target.

entries.name: One Shot, One Kill
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Deadshot by 75 % .

entries.name: Sharpshooter
entries.description_text: Level 50 Passive Adds 25 % to the bonuses that your stacks of Advantage provide.

entries.name: A Quick Demise
entries.description_text: Auto shots now have a 20 % chance to extend the duration of your Serrated Shot by 2 sec.

entries.name: Silent, But Deadly
entries.description_text: Direct Physical damage dealt now has an 8 % chance to allow you to use Deadshot regardless of the targets health for 8 seconds.

entries.name: Swiftshot
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Precision Shot now increases enemy Physical damage taken by 4 % for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Boots of Elvenkind
entries.description_text: Increases your Agility by 5 % and reduces the duration of movement slowing effects on you by -20 % .

entries.name: Maximum Power
entries.description_text: Abilities used with 5 stacks of Advantage now refresh the duration of your active Skirmish by 5 sec.

entries.name: Brutal Shot
entries.description_text: Fire a volley of powerful shots that pierce through Armor, dealing 450 % Ranged Weapon Damage plus 300 to all targets in a 40 yd line. While Skirmish is active this ability is guaranteed to critically strike.

entries.name: Headshots Only
entries.description_text: Periodic damage dealt with Serrated Shot and Toxic Dart now increases the damage of your next Precision Shot within 8 seconds by 10 % , stacking 10 times.

entries.name: Masterful Archery
entries.description_text: While in Elude , gain a stack of Masterful Archery every 2 sec. Masterful Archery (Aura) Your next Precision Shot now deals 10 % increased damage for 10 seconds, stacking up to 5 times.

entries.name: Incendiary Shot
entries.description_text: Shoot a burning arrow dealing 791 + 35% ranged AP + 45% fire SP Fire damage to an enemy and up to 5 enemies within 6 yds, and causing your next 3 direct damage Advantage spenders to deal 50 % of their damage to nearby enemies. Direct damage increased by 20 % for each stack of Advantage .

entries.name: Mortal Shots
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Crippling Shot by -4 sec.

entries.name: Hunting with Precision
entries.description_text: Your Hunting Shot now deals 25 % increased damage for each subsequent target it ricochets to.

entries.name: Deadeye
entries.description_text: Increases the range of your ranged abilities and Auto Shot by 5 yds.

entries.name: Knuckleduster
entries.description_text: Periodic damage dealt now generates 5 Focus.

entries.name: Excessive But Necessary
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Elude and Knockout by -4 sec.

entries.name: Trueshot Lodge Training
entries.description_text: Increases your off-hand weapon damage by 25 % . While wielding a polearm, your Physical damage dealt is increased by 3 % .

entries.name: Lacerations
entries.description_text: Level 40 Passive Allows the periodic damage dealt by Ravage to critically strike.

entries.name: Dastardly
entries.description_text: Level 50 Passive Increases your critical damage dealt by 15 % on enemies above 80% health or below 20% health.

entries.name: Throatpunch
entries.description_text: Punch an enemy in the throat, interrupting the enemy's spellcast, preventing any spell from that school of magic from being cast for 2 seconds.

entries.name: Viper's Bite
entries.description_text: Generates 2 Advantage Unleash 4 quick strikes over 1 seconds to an enemy, each dealing 85 % Weapon Damage. If the target is bleeding, each strike deals an additional 400 + 25% AP Physical damage. If the target is poisoned, each strike deals Nature damage instead of Physical damage.

entries.name: Assassin
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Knockout and Crippling Shot by 1 sec.

entries.name: Polearm Craft
entries.description_text: While a polearm is equipped, your chance to trigger your Weapon Crafts and their damage dealt is increased by 25 % .

entries.name: Tip of the Spear
entries.description_text: While you have a polearm equipped, your Wild Strike now has a 15 % chance to strike 3 additional times.

entries.name: Quick-Witted
entries.description_text: Avoiding an attack now causes you to quickly stab an enemy with one of the arrows from your quiver, dealing 1 + 100% AP Physical damage and reducing their attack speed by -20 % for 8 seconds.

entries.name: Ravage
entries.description_text: Generates 1 Advantage Ravage an enemy, causing them to bleed out dealing 112 + 23.72% AP Physical damage over 12 seconds.

entries.name: Beatdown
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Auto attacks now have a 5 % chance to reveal a fault in the enemy's defenses, causing your next instance of Physical ability damage to ignore Armor. Chance increased by 15% while wielding a polearm.

entries.name: Dice Games
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of Wild Strike and Assault by 5 % .

entries.name: Underhanded
entries.description_text: Increases the attack power scaling of Skullpiercer by 15 % .

entries.name: Stalker
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Cutthroat by -15 sec, but reduces the range of Cutthroat by -10 yds.

entries.name: Pilfering
entries.description_text: Adds 10 % to the damage dealt by Dirty Blades and causes its damage dealt to heal you equal to 50 % of the value.

entries.name: Jagged Cuts
entries.description_text: Increases the damage and duration of Toxic Dart and Ravage by 25 % .

entries.name: Marked for Death
entries.description_text: While you have daggers equipped, direct critical strikes on enemies below 35% health now have a chance to allow the use of abilities as if you were in Elude for 5 sec.

entries.name: Wild Man
entries.description_text: Your Wild Strike now strikes 2 additional nearby enemies, but deals reduced damage with each enemy struck.

entries.name: Stonemason's Secret
entries.description_text: Your Skullpiercer used with 5 stacks of Advantage now extends the duration of Dirty Blades by 6 sec.

entries.name: Ambuscade
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Skullpiercer and Flank by 20 % , plus an additional 35 % if you have a polearm equipped.

entries.name: Hookshot
entries.description_text: Launch a hook at a target attempting to lodge it into an open wound, dealing 66 + 100% AP Physical damage. If the target is bleeding, you can reactivate this to pull yourself to them, dealing 150 % Weapon Damage and generating 2 Advantage

entries.name: Barbed Quills
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Wild Strike and Quills will now tear into enemies, causing them to bleed for 78 Physical damage over 9 seconds, stacking 4 times. Damage dealt by Quills now spreads your periodic effects to 5 enemies within 10 yds and extends their duration by 2 sec.

entries.name: Instinctual Combatant
entries.description_text: Casting Instinct now also restores 40 extra Focus and guarantees your next 3 Skullpiercers or Assaults within 20 seconds to critically strike. In addition, Instinct now grants you an additional 10 % of your Agility as melee attack power.

entries.name: Dirty Blades
entries.description_text: For 4 seconds, your melee auto attacks deal an additional 30 % (doubled with a dagger equipped) of the damage dealt as Nature damage and reduces your target's healing received by -20 % for 8 seconds, stacking 2 times. Duration increased by 4 sec for each stack of Advantage . Usable while in Elude .

entries.name: Quills
entries.description_text: Launch darts at up to 5 nearby enemies, dealing 15 + 30% AP Ranged Physical damage. Deals 50 % additional damage and strikes 1 additional target for each stack of Advantage .

entries.name: Outmaneuver
entries.description_text: Teleport to an enemy, summon a decoy beneath them, and mark them for 8 seconds. Dealing melee damage to them adds a stack to this effect, up to 20 stacks. Reactivating this ability within 8 seconds deals 1 + 55% AP Physical damage to your target, increased by 20 % for each stack on the target, and then teleports you back to your decoy. Usable while in Elude .

entries.name: Assault
entries.description_text: Assault a low health enemy, dealing 100 % Weapon Damage ( 175 % with a dagger equipped) plus an additional 8 + 100% AP Physical damage. If the target is bleeding, this deals 50 % increased damage. Damage increased by 30 % for each stack of Advantage . Only usable on enemies below 20% health.

entries.name: Highwayman
entries.description_text: Direct critical strikes while behind your target increase your haste by 15 % for 5 seconds, or for your next 2 attacks.

entries.name: Close Quarters
entries.description_text: Increases your attack power and Agility by 3 % .

entries.name: Bounty Hunter
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Flank and Rusty Shiv now increases the target's damage taken from your Advantage spenders by 25 % for 8 seconds.

entries.name: 'Tactical' Advantage
entries.description_text: Knockout and Bushwhack now increases your damage dealt against the target by 10 % for 5 seconds.

entries.name: Focused Fighter
entries.description_text: Reduces the Focus cost of Flank , Blackjack , and Wild Strike by -10 % .

entries.name: Guile of the Cutthroat
entries.description_text: Increases party and raid member's melee and ranged attack power by 5 % . Does not stack with similar effects. In addition, increases your damage dealt by 3 % .

entries.name: Banditry
entries.description_text: Increases your critical strike chance by 2 % and Focus regeneration by 15 % .

entries.name: Rub It In
entries.description_text: Level 30 Passive Each stack of Advantage spent now gives you a 20% chance to refund 1 stack of Advantage .

entries.name: Ravager
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive Your Wild Strike now generates 1 additional Advantage . Removes the minimum range of your ranged abilities.

entries.name: Assassin
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of Instinct by 25 % .

entries.name: Survival Kit
entries.description_text: Your Survival Potion now also heals you for 10 % of your maximum health with each tick.

entries.name: Lethal Cunning
entries.description_text: Entering Elude generates 1 stack of Advantage and 10 Focus every 5 sec for 30 seconds.

entries.name: Endurance Training
entries.description_text: Increases your maximum Focus by 20 .

entries.name: Sly
entries.description_text: Your Woodland Adept now triggers a -10 % reduced cooldown for each stack of Advantage active when cast.

entries.name: Bloody Focus
entries.description_text: Reduces the Focus cost of Toxic Dart by -15 .

entries.name: Guise
entries.description_text: Instantly generates 5 stacks of Advantage and allows you see nearby stealthed enemies for 5 seconds. Usable while stealthed.

entries.name: Elven Tactics
entries.description_text: You now have a -20 % chance to not consume Advantage on cast.

entries.name: Double The Pace
entries.description_text: Increases all party and raid member's melee and ranged haste by 10 % . Does not stack with similar effects. In addition, increases your critical strike chance by 2 % .

entries.name: Elusive Character
entries.description_text: Increases your damage dealt by 10 % for 12 seconds after leaving Elude .

entries.name: Outlaw
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of your Adaptations by 20 % .

entries.name: Whats Yours Is Mine
entries.description_text: Removes the Focus cost of Snatch .

entries.name: Surefooted
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Adrenaline Rush by -30 sec.

entries.name: Natural Disguise
entries.description_text: Instantly dispels all movement slowing effects from allies within 30 yds and transforms them into a bush, stealthing them for 20 seconds.

entries.name: Adrenaline Rush
entries.description_text: Surge with vitality, dispeling all harmful effects from yourself and increasing your movement speed by 40 % for 10 seconds. Usable while stealthed.

entries.name: Forest Dweller
entries.description_text: While in Elude , gain 20 % increased movement speed and regenerate 3 % maximum health every 3 sec.

entries.name: Onslaught
entries.description_text: Your senses heighten, causing you to instantly generate 5 Advantage and allowing the use of abilities that require Elude for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Crippling Shot
entries.description_text: Fire a crippling shot at an enemy slowing movement speed by -50 % and knocking them off their mounts, making them unable to mount again for 5 seconds.

entries.name: Briar Veil
entries.description_text: Thorns and leaves swirl around you, masking your movements for 10 seconds, increasing your dodge chance by 50 % and causing dodging attacks to restore 2 % maximum health and 5 Focus.

entries.name: Knockout
entries.description_text: Knock an enemy out, incapacitating them for 4 seconds and removing bleed and poison effects from them. Damage caused will interrupt this effect. Usable while in Elude .

entries.name: Grace
entries.description_text: Increases your Agility and movement speed by 4 % .

entries.name: Grappling Arrows
entries.description_text: Increases the range of Snatch by 15 yds.

entries.name: Heightened Senses
entries.description_text: Reduces the Focus cost Adrenaline Rush by -50 % and increases the movement speed granted by 20 % .

entries.name: Blur
entries.description_text: Increases your chance to dodge and parry by 4 % .

entries.name: Survival Expert
entries.description_text: Increases the dodge chance provided by Briar Veil by 25 % .

entries.name: Guile of the Ranger
entries.description_text: Your Instinct now additionally increases your critical strike rating by 20 % of your Agility.

entries.name: No Mercy
entries.description_text: Increases the critical damage of Flank by 10 % .

entries.name: Rapid Strikes
entries.description_text: Melee and ranged auto attacks now have a 25 % chance to strike an additional time for 50 % of the damage dealt. Can only occur once per sec.

entries.name: Pinpoint Accuracy
entries.description_text: Critical strikes with direct damaging abilities now generate 4 Focus.

entries.name: Deft Hands
entries.description_text: Increases your melee and ranged haste by 5 % .

entries.name: Camper
entries.description_text: Reduces the cast time of your Bushcraft abilities by -50 % .

entries.name: Snapseed
entries.description_text: Toss a snapseed at an enemy, dealing 27 + 30% ranged AP Physical damage and knocking them back.

entries.name: Resourceful
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Crippling Shot and Snapseed by -20 % .

entries.name: Cutthroat
entries.description_text: Shoot a powerful arrow that deals Weapon Damage plus 40 and stuns the target for 1 seconds. Duration increased by 1 sec per stack of Advantage .

entries.name: Snatch
entries.description_text: Snatch an enemy's melee weapons, disarming them for 4 seconds. If you are disarmed, you also return your weapon to yourself.

entries.name: Woodland Stalker
entries.description_text: While in Elude , your critical strike chance is now increased by 20 % .

entries.name: Dirty Fighter
entries.description_text: Increases the chance for Flank to critically strike by 50 % and increases your chance to resist root effects by 25 % .

entries.name: Woodland Adept
entries.description_text: Slip into the shadows, entering an improved stealth mode, increases your movement speed by 25 % for 10 seconds, and applies Elude .

entries.name: Improved Waterskins
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of your Waterskins by 25 % .

entries.name: Survival Potion
entries.description_text: Drink a survival potion, dispelling all poison and disease effects and removing 1 poison and disease effect every 3 sec for 9 seconds.

entries.name: Infinity Crash
entries.description_text: Increases the critical damage of Discordance and Chromatic Shard by 50 % .

entries.name: Deconstruction
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of Unmake by 5 % .

entries.name: Mind Melt
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Melt Reality now also reduces the target's primary attributes by -3 % for 15 sec, stacking 5 times.

entries.name: Crown of Power
entries.description_text: Increases the tick rate of Melt Reality by -25 % .

entries.name: Unearthed Power
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Anomaly Spikes now also increases your damage and critical strike chance with Chromatic Shard by 6 % per stack.

entries.name: Chronological
entries.description_text: Every 20 sec, your next Discordance within 10 seconds is instant cast.

entries.name: Null Orbs
entries.description_text: Periodic critical damage dealt now has a 20 % chance to grant a Null Orb for 15 seconds. Null Orb (Proc) Increases the critical damage of Chromatic Shard and Anomaly Spikes based on your spell critical strike rating. Critically striking with Chromatic Shard removes Null Orb .

entries.name: Anomaly Spikes
entries.description_text: Periodic damage dealt now has a 8 % chance to launch an Anomaly Spike at your target. Anomaly Spike Deals cond(gt(SPA, SPS), 161*1+SPA*0.25, 161*1+SPS*0.25) Chromatic Damage.

entries.name: Infinite Horizon
entries.description_text: Increases the all damage dealt by party and raid members by 3 % . Does not stack with similar effects. In addition, your Unmake and Timerend gain an additional 20 % bonus spell scaling.

entries.name: Shifting Chaos
entries.description_text: Your Chromatic Shard and Anomaly Spikes now deal an additional 20 % their damage dealt as Chromatic Damage all nearby enemies.

entries.name: Eternity
entries.description_text: Your Clasp of Infinity now increases your damage dealt to the target by 15 % .

entries.name: Distorted Time
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Timerend by -2 sec and increases the duration of Decomposition by 3 sec.

entries.name: Hourglass of Eternity
entries.description_text: Periodic damage dealt now has a 5 % chance to grant you 25 % increased haste for 5 seconds.

entries.name: Paradox
entries.description_text: Casting Melt Reality now causes your next Unmake or Reverse Wound within 6 seconds to become instant and cost -50 % less mana.

entries.name: Melt Reality
entries.description_text: Melt the target's reality, dealing cond(gt(SPFR, SPS), 48+0+SPFR*0.23, 48+0+SPS*0.23) Chromatic Damage every 3 sec for 30 seconds. While active, periodic damage dealt to the target is replicated for 20 % of the value to all enemies near them.

entries.name: Chromatic Shard
entries.description_text: Fling a shard of chaos at an enemy, dealing 209 + 150% SP Chromatic Damage, piercing immunities and resistances. Dealing damage with Anomaly Spikes reduces the cast time of this ability by -10 % for 30 seconds, stacking 10 times.

entries.name: Slipstream
entries.description_text: Target an enemy and slip them into a pocket dimension for 5 seconds, banishing them and making them immune to damage. Activate this ability again before the duration expires to choose a new location to place that enemy within 20 yds.

entries.name: Warpstriker
entries.description_text: Reduces the cost of your spells by -5 % and the chance for your spells to be dispelled by 10 % .

entries.name: Aeon Rend
entries.description_text: Your Chromatic Shard now has a 25 % chance to strike again and incur no cooldown.

entries.name: Incarnation of Chaos
entries.description_text: Transform into an Incarnate of Chaos , instantly resetting the cooldown of Chromatic Shard and causing your next cast to not incur a cooldown. In addition, your damage dealt is increased by 15 % for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Black Hole
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Chromatic Shard , Melt Reality and Unmake by 15 % against slowed enemies.

entries.name: Gift of the Timeways
entries.description_text: Casting Melt Reality now causes your Timerend and Unmake 's periodic damage to benefit from haste for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Destabilize Time
entries.description_text: Reduces enemy casting speed by -10 % for 20 seconds, increasing by -10 % every time they cast. Gaining stacks does not extend the duration of the spell.

entries.name: Chaotic Time
entries.description_text: While Incarnation of Chaos is active, your Melt Reality deals 30 % increased damage and replicates an additional 20 % In addition, periodic damage dealt now has a 5 % chance to reduce the cooldown of Incarnation of Chaos by -1 sec.

entries.name: Infinite Keeper
entries.description_text: Using Unmake on an enemy affected by your Timerend now causes the enemy to erupt in a vortex of sand, dealing 81 Chromatic Damage every 1 sec to up to 8 enemies for 6 seconds in an 8 yd radius.

entries.name: Time Means Nothing
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Chromatic Shard now increases the target's spell damage taken by 10 % for 30 seconds.

entries.name: Erasion
entries.description_text: Increases the chance to trigger Anomaly Spikes by 5 % and their damage by 20 % .

entries.name: Timerend
entries.description_text: Transforms your Wand of Time into Timerend . Timerend Rend the fabric of time, dealing 36 Chromatic Damage over 6 seconds.

entries.name: Infinite Power
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive Casting damaging spells now reduces your damaging spell cooldowns by 10 % of their remaining cooldown.

entries.name: End of Time
entries.description_text: At the end of the duration of Clasp of Infinity , you launch an Anomaly Spike at affected enemies and their damage dealt is reduced by -10 % for 4 seconds. Anomaly Spike Deals cond(gt(SPA, SPS), 161*1+SPA*0.25, 161*1+SPS*0.25) Chromatic Damage.

entries.name: Magic Erosion
entries.description_text: Your Decomposition now applies Magic Erosion to the target, increasing attackers chance to hit the target with spells by 3 % for 30 seconds.

entries.name: Chaos Fusion
entries.description_text: While Incarnation of Chaos is active, you may now cast Chromatic Shard while moving, but the duration of Incarnation of Chaos is reduced by -3 sec.

entries.name: Excruciating Discord
entries.description_text: Your Discordances used with Chronological are now guaranteed to critically strike.

entries.name: Pure Chaos
entries.description_text: While Incarnation of Chaos is active, all damage dealt now has a 10 % chance to lock yourself in a time loop for 3 seconds, making you unable to cast any spells other than Chromatic Shard . While active, you cast Chromatic Shard free of cost, repeating every 1 sec.

entries.name: Warping Reality
entries.description_text: Level 30 Passive Casting Waves of Time now grants you Warped Reality for 10 seconds. Warped Reality (Proc) Allows you to cast Unmake and Melt Reality while moving for 10 seconds.

entries.name: End of Time
entries.description_text: Level 50 Passive Mind Melt now also increases the target's periodic damage taken from you by 6 % per stack.

entries.name: Timelost Power
entries.description_text: Your Discordance now strikes 3 additional enemies.

entries.name: Gift of the Infinite Dragonflight
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Increases your spell damage by 40 % of your Spirit and your spell hit rating by 3 % of your Spirit.

entries.name: Infinite Guard
entries.description_text: Level 40 Passive Increases the effectiveness of your Temporal Resilience , Temporal Swiftness , and Temporal Restoration spells by 100 % .

entries.name: Wand Expert
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Increases your ranged attack power by 100 % of your Spirit.

entries.name: Caverns of Time
entries.description_text: Your Discordance now generates 1 Echo Fragment .

entries.name: Singularity Core
entries.description_text: Continuum Spell Empower your Wand attacks to deal an additional 50 % Ranged Weapon Damage plus 2 + 25% SP + 12% ranged AP additional Arcane damage for 3 sec plus 5 sec per Echo Fragment . Can only have 1 Continuum spell active at a time.

entries.name: Aether Compression
entries.description_text: Continuum Spell Artificer's Wand and Reverse Wound can be cast while moving for 5 seconds. Duration increased by 5 sec per Echo Fragment . Can only have 1 Continuum spell active at a time.

entries.name: Arc Collision
entries.description_text: Distortion Spell Create a timestorm around an enemy that causes them and up to 2 nearby enemies to take 270 + 24% SP Arcane damage, repeating over 4 seconds. Duration increased by 2 sec for each Echo Fragment consumed.

entries.name: Cheating Time
entries.description_text: Casting Shatter Echo now extends the duration of your Flux Emitter by 4 sec. Cannot be extended beyond maximum duration.

entries.name: Fate Twister
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Unstable Chronoglass by -30 sec.

entries.name: Clocked In
entries.description_text: Casting Discordance now makes your next Artificer's Wand within 10 seconds instant cast and causes it to generate an additional Echo Fragment .

entries.name: Artificer's Empowerment
entries.description_text: Increases your Spirit by 8 % .

entries.name: Reverse Engineering
entries.description_text: Periodic damage and healing now has a 15 % chance to increase your haste by 15 % for 6 seconds and grant allies Replenishment . Replenishment Restores 1 % maximum mana every 5 sec to allies within 100 yds for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Artificer's Wand
entries.description_text: Transforms your Unmake into Artificer's Wand . Artificer's Wand Focus to unleash 2 wand attacks dealing Ranged Weapon damage plus 5 over 1 seconds. Generates 1 Echo Fragment .

entries.name: Intuition
entries.description_text: Level 50 Passive Increases your critical damage by 25 % .

entries.name: Time Is A Circle
entries.description_text: Level 40 Passive Casting Wand of Time now extends the duration of your Continuum spells by 3 sec. Continuum spells cannot be extended beyond their maximum duration.

entries.name: Conduction Burst
entries.description_text: Your Shatter Echo now deals 20 % additional damage while a Continuum spell is active.

entries.name: Flux Emitter
entries.description_text: Continuum Spell Empower Wand attacks to affect up to 2 additional nearby enemies for 3 sec plus 5 sec per Echo Fragment . Affected attacks deal less damage per additional enemy hit. Can only have 1 Continuum spell active at a time.

entries.name: Hands of Time
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of your Accelerate and Decelerate spells by 25 % .

entries.name: Pulse Driver
entries.description_text: Singularity Core now increases the damage of Shatter Echo while its active by 30 % and allows Shatter Echo to trigger its damage.

entries.name: Wand Mastery
entries.description_text: Wand of Time and Shatter Echo now have a 25 % chance to unleash Crystal Cannon , launching 2 quick lesser Wand auto attacks at the enemy over 1 seconds, scaling with Spirit. While Paradox Cannon is active, the chance to trigger this effect is increased by 10 % .

entries.name: Timemage
entries.description_text: Reduces the duration of harmful magic effects on you by -30 % .

entries.name: Shatter Echo
entries.description_text: Distortion Spell Launch a distorted echo from your wand at an enemy, dealing 90 % Ranged Weapon damage plus cond(gt(SPA, SPH), 4+0+SPA*0.3, 4+0+SPH*0.3) Arcane damage. Damage increased by 40 % for each Echo Fragment consumed.

entries.name: Infinity Stone
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of all party and raid members by 3 % . Does not stack with similar effects. In addition, increases your critical strike chance by 3 % .

entries.name: Hyperwand
entries.description_text: Increases the damage and critical damage of your Shatter Echo by 30 % .

entries.name: Wand Master
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Wand of Time and Artificer's Wand by 10 % .

entries.name: Bronze Echoes
entries.description_text: Reduces the cast time of Artificer's Wand by -0.2 sec.

entries.name: Erode Armaments
entries.description_text: Your Wand attacks now reduce enemy attack power by 208 for 5 seconds.

entries.name: Magic Sensitivity
entries.description_text: Critical strikes with Shatter Echo now increases the enemy's damage taken from you by 10 % for 8 seconds.

entries.name: Sporadic Incantations
entries.description_text: Your Flux Emitter now strikes 1 additional enemy.

entries.name: Echo Fragments
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive Wand of Time now generates an Echo Fragment , which can be used to unleash Distortion and Continuum spells. Decomposition is now a Distortion spell, dealing increased damage based on how many Echo Fragments you have.

entries.name: Tamed Incantations
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Continuum spells per Echo Fragment consumed by 0.5 sec.

entries.name: Archaeology
entries.description_text: Your Discovery now also generates 3 % of your base mana and health.

entries.name: Temporal Convergence
entries.description_text: Your Wand of Time now has a 40 % chance to reset its own cooldown.

entries.name: Crystal Cannon
entries.description_text: Level 30 Passive Casting Discordance now unleashes the Crystal Cannon , launching 2 quick lesser Wand attacks at the enemy over 1 seconds, scaling with Spirit.

entries.name: Borrowed Time
entries.description_text: Taking Physical damage now heals you equal to 10 % of the damage dealt. Can only occur once per sec.

entries.name: Paradox Cannon
entries.description_text: Continuum Spell Generate 1 Echo Fragment every 3 sec for 5 seconds, plus an additional 5 sec per Echo Fragment consumed. Can only have 1 Continuum spell active at a time.

entries.name: Unstable Chronoglass
entries.description_text: Place an Unstable Chronoglass at target location for 30 seconds that will redirect the next 3 offensive enemy spell casts onto itself.

entries.name: Splitting Time
entries.description_text: Your Crystal Cannon now strikes 2 additional nearby enemies.

entries.name: Resonance
entries.description_text: Casting Artificer's Wand or Crystal Cannon now has a 35 % chance to reduce the cooldown of Hasten by -1 sec.

entries.name: Concentrated Fate
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of your Echo Fragments by 20 % .

entries.name: Elder Wand
entries.description_text: Your Wand attacks now have a 30 % chance to increase the damage of Artificer's Wand against the target by 3 % for 15 seconds, stacking 10 times.

entries.name: Discovery
entries.description_text: Casting Artificers's Wand and Wand of Time now grants Discovery for 30 seconds, stacking 4 times. Discovery At 3 stacks, your next Wand of Time or Artificer's Wand causes an additional 1 + 21.2% arcane SP + 25% Spirit + 10% ranged AP Arcane Damage, scaling with Spirit.

entries.name: Through The Aeons
entries.description_text: Activating an Aeon now increases your mana regeneration from Spirit by 100 % for 8 seconds.

entries.name: Carbon Dating
entries.description_text: Each stack of Sands of Time now also increases the healing of your Epoch by 10 % .

entries.name: Endless Sands
entries.description_text: Casting Epoch now grants you Endless Sands . Endless Sands Cast time of your next Reverse Wounds within 15 seconds is reduced by -20 % , stacking up to 5 times.

entries.name: Cycling Aeons
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of your Aeons by -50 % .

entries.name: Aeon of Oblivion
entries.description_text: Increases Epoch 's mana cost by 30 % , critical strike chance by 10 % , and healing done by 15 % . In addition, healing with Epoch now increases the target's damage dealt by 3 % for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Aeon of Resilience
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive Teaches you Aeon of Resilience . Aeon of Resilience Reduces Epoch 's cast time by -25 % and it's mana cost by -10 % , and healing done by it now reduces the target's damage taken by -5 % for 6 seconds.

entries.name: The Vast Infinite
entries.description_text: All party and raid members become one, equally sharing 25% of all damage dealt to them for 10 seconds, up to a maximum of 100% of their total health. At the end of the duration, all affected allies are healed equal to the total damage shared split evenly amongst all allies.

entries.name: Time Wizard
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of your Reverse Wound , Epoch , and Correct the Mistake by 8 % .

entries.name: Timeline Tether
entries.description_text: Your periodic damage and healing reduces the cooldown of your Fortify Timeline by -1 sec.

entries.name: Time Beacon
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of effects applied by your Aeons by 4 sec.

entries.name: Keep Accelerating
entries.description_text: Your Accelerated Recovery now applies to an additional nearby target.

entries.name: Epic Recovery
entries.description_text: When you cast Epoch you now also cast a Rank 1 Epoch on up to 5 allies affected by Accelerated Recovery .

entries.name: Timeless
entries.description_text: While Endless Sands is active, the mana costs of your spells and abilities is reduced by -3 % per stack.

entries.name: Timeblender
entries.description_text: Guarantees healing done by Fabric of Time to critically strike and gives it an additional charge. Fabric of Time (Timeblender) 2 Charges, 15 sec recharge Alter the fabric of time, healing an ally for 529 + 64% healing . Your next Aeon used within 8 seconds will trigger with no cooldown.

entries.name: Nozdormu's Gaze
entries.description_text: Your Time Out! now regenerates -2 % less mana per tick, but casting it now instantly restores 15 % of your maximum mana.

entries.name: Overcorrection
entries.description_text: Overhealing done by Correct the Mistake now applies a heal over time effect to the ally equal to 30% of the healing done over 5 seconds.

entries.name: Converge the Infinite
entries.description_text: Casting Fortify Timeline now grants you Converge the Infinite . Converge the Infinite Your next Correct the Mistake has a 1 sec increased cast time, but heals for 30 % more and is guaranteed to critically strike. Successfully healing an ally in this way reduces the cooldown of Fortify Timeline by 8 % .

entries.name: Continuum Restoration
entries.description_text: Restore the continuum at target location for all allies and enemies, removing all beneficial magic effects from enemies and harmful magic effects from allies. This dispel is potent enough to remove magic effects that are normally undispellable

entries.name: Aeon of Protection
entries.description_text: Increases Epoch 's cast time by 15 % , healing done by 15 % , and causes it to apply a damage absorption shield equal to 30% of the amount healed for 8 seconds.

entries.name: Aeon of Renewal
entries.description_text: Reduces Epoch 's healing by -30 % , but causes it to heal for an additional 50 % of the amount healed over 3 seconds.

entries.name: Fabric of Time
entries.description_text: Alter the fabric of time, healing an ally for 158 + 64% healing . Your next Aeon used within 8 seconds will trigger with no cooldown or cost.

entries.name: Sands of Life
entries.description_text: Increases your healing power by 25 % of your Spirit.

entries.name: Correct the Mistake
entries.description_text: Retell the fate of party members within 30 yds, healing them for 91 + 68.57% healing .

entries.name: Buy Time
entries.description_text: Put all enemies and allies in an 8 yd radius in target area into a stasis, banishing them for 6 seconds, making them invulnerable to all effects but unable to move. Casting Unmake on a target will remove this effect.

entries.name: Orderly Protector
entries.description_text: Healing done by your Epoch now increases the healing of Fabric of Time by 10 % for 10 seconds, stacking 10 times. Each stack gives you a 2 % chance when you cast Fabric of Time to reset its own cooldown.

entries.name: Titan's Gaze
entries.description_text: Your Time Out! no longer breaks on damage, but now only reduces damage taken by 15% .

entries.name: Ripple
entries.description_text: Channel for up to 5 seconds. When the channel ends, if you channeled for at least 1.5 sec, allies within 40 yds are healed based on the duration of the channel. While channeling, you are immune to stun effects.

entries.name: Mark of Order
entries.description_text: Healing done by Fortify Timeline now applies Mark of Order . Mark of Order Increases the healing of your next Reverse Wound on the target by 10 % for 20 seconds. Every 1 sec for the duration, they gain an additional stack of this effect, up to 5 .

entries.name: A Ripple In Time
entries.description_text: Your damaging and healing critical strikes now reduce the remaining cooldown of Ripple by -1 sec.

entries.name: Displacement
entries.description_text: Displaces a party or raid member and pulls them to you, dispelling root and snare effects from them.

entries.name: Ideal Time
entries.description_text: Every 30 sec, your next ability is guaranteed to critically strike.

entries.name: Chronicler
entries.description_text: Casting Fortify Timeline now extends the duration of Accelerated Recovery on all targets within 40 yds by an additional 10 sec.

entries.name: Bronze Timeways
entries.description_text: Casting Correct the Mistake now grants 2 stacks of Endless Sands . Endless Sands Cast time of your next Reverse Wounds within 15 seconds is reduced by -20 % , stacking up to 5 times.

entries.name: Shimmering Shard
entries.description_text: Activating Aeon spells now grants you 4 % increased damage and healing for 20 seconds, stacking 3 times.

entries.name: Time Skip
entries.description_text: Your Roll Back now removes 1 additional harmful effect.

entries.name: Wonders of Time
entries.description_text: Increases the spell haste of all party and raid members by 3 % . Does not stack with similar effects. Additionally, all healing done now has a 10 % chance to grant you Endless Sands . Endless Sands Cast time of your next Reverse Wounds within 15 seconds is reduced by -20 % , stacking up to 5 times.

entries.name: Cadence of Time
entries.description_text: Your critical strikes with Epoch now grant Cadence of Time , increasing the healing of Ripple by 10 % for 15 seconds. Stacks 5 times.

entries.name: Shield of the Ages
entries.description_text: When hit by a damaging critical strike, your damage taken is reduced by -3 % , and healing received is increased by 5 % for 3 seconds, stacking 3 times.

entries.name: Dimensional Divergence
entries.description_text: Swap places with a target. If they're an enemy, you steal -80 % of their movement speed for 3 seconds.

entries.name: Waves of Time
entries.description_text: Blast enemies in a frontal cone with time fractals, knocking them back slightly. The knockback repeats 1 additional time after 2 sec.

entries.name: Clasp of Infinity
entries.description_text: Conjure a magical binding upon an enemy that bounces to nearby enemies, rooting them in place for 4 seconds.

entries.name: Temporal Dissonance
entries.description_text: Chronostasis now slows your target's movement speed by an additional -10 % .

entries.name: Gravity Bomb
entries.description_text: Place a gravity bomb on the target. After 6 seconds they explode for 979 + 120% SP + 30% ranged AP Chromatic Damage in a 10 yds radius. Directly before the explosion occurs, all enemies within 15 yds are teleported to the initial target.

entries.name: Temporal Anomaly
entries.description_text: Augment reality for 10 seconds, causing 50% of the damage taken to be absorbed and converted into healing at the end of the duration.

entries.name: Tripping the Rift
entries.description_text: Casting Clasp of Infinity now reduces the cooldown of Backtrack by -10 sec.

entries.name: Timeguard
entries.description_text: Place a magical guard on an ally for 2 minutes, causing the next 3 instances of direct damage that would reduce the target below 35% health to deal 40 % less damage.

entries.name: Constant Recovery
entries.description_text: Healing done by Reverse Wound now increases all healing taken the target receives by 6 % for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Accelerated Recovery
entries.description_text: Accelerates the bodies natural healing process, healing the target for 60 + 115% healing over 15 seconds.

entries.name: Unearthed Pools
entries.description_text: Reduces the cast time of Unmake by -15 % and reduces the mana cost of your instant spells by 10 % .

entries.name: Infinite Sands
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Infinite Clone by -60 sec.

entries.name: Life Cycles
entries.description_text: Reduces the cast time of your Babify by 0.25 sec and its mana cost by -15 % .

entries.name: Rippling Power
entries.description_text: Increases your Spirit by 8 % .

entries.name: The Bieko Effect
entries.description_text: While Hasten is active the cooldowns of Dimensional Divergence , Temporal Anomaly , and Temporal Focus are reduced by 10 % every 2 sec.

entries.name: Charm of Power
entries.description_text: Increases the damage dealt by Gravity Bomb by 50 % .

entries.name: Entropy Reversal
entries.description_text: Reduces the duration of disease effects by -40 % .

entries.name: Expediting Time
entries.description_text: Reduces the channel time of your Time Out! by -40 % .

entries.name: Ahead of the Game
entries.description_text: Every 10th instance of your damage dealt or healing now gives you 60 increased spell power for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Timekeeper
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of Timeguard by 25 % .

entries.name: Mass Babify
entries.description_text: Instantly transform all enemies within 10 yds into a baby, preventing them from acting for 40 seconds, damage dealt will interrupt this effect. While babified, enemies will rapidly regenerate health. Scales with modifiers to Babify .

entries.name: Chaos Omen
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of your Gravity Bomb by -30 sec, and its explosion occurs -3 sec faster.

entries.name: Perfect Timing
entries.description_text: Increases your haste by 4 % and reduces your spell pushback suffered from damaging attacks by 35 % .

entries.name: Fortify Timeline
entries.description_text: Fortify the current timeline, instantly healing all allies for 100 + 40% SP and extending the duration of Accelerated Recovery on them by 5 sec.

entries.name: Eternal
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of your Accelerated Recovery by 6 sec and Decomposition by 3 sec.

entries.name: Entropy Overload
entries.description_text: Increases your chance to resist movement slowing effects by 20 % .

entries.name: Desynchronization
entries.description_text: Shift an enemy out of sync with the present, causing their grip to fail, disarming their melee and ranged weapons for 6 seconds. Upon removal, they are resynced, preventing them from regenerating their health for 6 seconds.

entries.name: Improved Reverse Wound
entries.description_text: Reduces the cast time of Reverse Wound by -0.3 sec.

entries.name: Temporal Focus
entries.description_text: You lock yourself into a perfect moment, removing and becoming immune to banish, silence, and interrupt effects for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Unmaker of Realities
