entries.description_text: While Hasten is active the ally now has a 25 % chance when they deal damage to strike the target an additional time equal to 30 % of the damage dealt.

entries.name: Mind Over Matter
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of your Wisdom spells by 20 % .

entries.name: Timewalking
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Waves of Time by -4 sec.

entries.name: Maker of Realities
entries.description_text: Casting Hasten now also always reduces the cast time of your healing spells by an additional -20 % .

entries.name: Luck
entries.description_text: Allows 40 % of your mana regeneration to continue while in combat.

entries.name: Infinite Shield
entries.description_text: Shield an ally with 10 charges of Infinite Shield for 30 seconds. Each time they take damage, they will be healed for 190 + 25% SP and lose 1 charge. Can only occur once per sec and can only affect 1 target at a time.

entries.name: Infinity
entries.description_text: Removes the cooldown of Infinite Shield .

entries.name: Impeccable Timing
entries.description_text: Your periodic damage and healing effects can now critically strike.

entries.name: Procrastination
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Timeguard by -30 sec.

entries.name: Cycle of Death
entries.description_text: Increases your spell haste by 5 % .

entries.name: Plague Science
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Your diseases and Crypt Swarm now deal 100 % increased damage to enemies below 20% health.

entries.name: Death Commander
entries.description_text: Periodic damage dealt now has a 10 % chance to increase your and your Undead minion's haste by 20 % for 8 seconds.

entries.name: Unholy Erosion
entries.description_text: Level 50 Passive Increases your spell penetration by 50 , scaling with your level.

entries.name: Crypt Explosion
entries.description_text: Casting Command spells on an enemy now applies Crypt Plague to 3 enemies near the primary target.

entries.name: Putricide's Formula
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Undead minions has a 10 % chance to blast up to 3 nearby enemies for 71 + 30% SP Plague damage.

entries.name: Rotting Flesh
entries.description_text: Level 30 Passive Applying Crypt Plague to an enemy now additionally adds Rotting Flesh to your Undead minions, increasing their damage dealt by 2 % per stack for 5 sec.

entries.name: Fiend
entries.description_text: Increases the damage and critical damage of Lichfrost by 20 % against diseased targets.

entries.name: Rotting Flesh
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Flesh to Worms by 25 % and allows its periodic damage to scale with your spell haste.

entries.name: Plague of Undeath
entries.description_text: Disease an enemy dealing 32 + 25% shadow SP Plague damage every 3 sec and reduces the targets Holy healing received by -40 % for 20 seconds. If Plague of Undeath is dispelled, the enemy takes 456 + 125% shadow SP Plague damage and is stunned for 5 seconds.

entries.name: Waking Crypts
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Crypt Plague by 50 % and Crypt Swarm now deals 4 % more damage for each Necromancer disease you have on the target.

entries.name: Master of Death
entries.description_text: Casting Command spells on an enemy now applies Crypt Plague .

entries.name: Unholy Runes
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Crypt Swarm by 15 % .

entries.name: Pandemic
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by your Undead minions now reduces the cooldown of Virulency by -1 sec.

entries.name: Wormfood
entries.description_text: Upon fully channeling Crypt Swarm , you summon a Rotling that will run towards the enemy and explode after 5 sec for 320 + 33.5% SP Plague damage.

entries.name: Fleshcrafting
entries.description_text: Increases the duration Unholy Frenzy by 5 sec and casting Command spells now reduces its cooldown by -1 sec.

entries.name: Expediting Death
entries.description_text: Each stack of Expunge now increases the target's damage taken from your Plague of Undeath by an additional 5 % .

entries.name: Virulency
entries.description_text: Reinvigorate your diseases, refreshing all diseases on the target enemy and copying them, preserving their power and duration. You may use this abilty again within 10 sec to Infest another target, applying the copied diseases.

entries.name: Dark Harvester
entries.description_text: Increases your critical strike and hit chance by 3 % .

entries.name: Raise: Gargoyle
entries.description_text: Raise a fallen Gargoyle to aid you in combat, occupying 3 Life Force . Command : Shoots necrotic bile at an enemy, dealing 73 + 65% SP Plague damage, dealing 50% increased damage for each of your diseases on the target.

entries.name: Necrosis
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of your diseases by 25 % .

entries.name: Lichplague
entries.description_text: Disease an enemy, dealing 151 + 22% SP Plague damage every 3 sec for 18 seconds. Damage increased by 4 % for each Necromancer disease on the enemy.

entries.name: Muck Summoner
entries.description_text: Periodic damage dealt now has an 5 % chance to summon 2 to 3 Rotlings that will run towards the enemy and explode after 5 sec for 320 + 33.5% SP Plague damage.

entries.name: Creeping Plagues
entries.description_text: You may now Infest an additional target after using Virulency .

entries.name: Apothecary's Cauldron
entries.description_text: Increases the spell haste of all party and raid members by 3 % . Does not stack with similar effects. In addition, increases your Magic damage dealt by 3 % .

entries.name: Expunge
entries.description_text: Casting Command spells on an enemy now applies Expunge if they are Diseased . Expunge (Talent) Increases the target's damage taken from your Necromancer diseases by 10 % for 10 seconds, stacking 2 times.

entries.name: Rot Fetishist
entries.description_text: Your Virulency now applies Rot Fetishist for 10 seconds, causing you to replicate 20% of your periodic damage dealt as direct damage.

entries.name: Plague Revenant
entries.description_text: Critical strikes now apply a stack of Crypt Plague .

entries.name: Flesh to Worms
entries.description_text: Disease an enemy, dealing 15 + 11.06% shadow SP Plague damage and generating Runic Power every 3 sec for 18 seconds.

entries.name: Parasite Plague
entries.description_text: Damage dealt now has a 5 % chance to apply Parasites for 8 seconds. Parasites Your Undead minions feast upon the parasites on hit, leeching 15 % of their damage dealt as Plague Damage to the target.

entries.name: Mutation
entries.description_text: For the next 15 seconds your diseases mutate causing them to act with accelerated lethality, allowing your freshly applied diseases to tick -50 % faster.

entries.name: Withering
entries.description_text: Level 40 Passive Allows Crypt Plague to stack 5 additional times.

entries.name: Damnation
entries.description_text: Increases your Shadow damage by 5 % , doubled against enemies below 35% health.

entries.name: Swarmer
entries.description_text: Increases the Runic Power generated by Crypt Swarm by 2 per tick.

entries.name: Foul Contagion
entries.description_text: Applying Crypt Plague now extends the duration of Flesh to Worms on the target by 1 sec.

entries.name: Festering Decay
entries.description_text: Reduces the cost of Command spells by -15 % and causes them to increase the target's spell damage taken by 10 % for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Touch of Death
entries.description_text: Allows Expunge to stack an additional time and increases the range of your Death spells by 20 % .

entries.name: Creeping Crypt
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of Flesh to Worms by 25 % against enemies below 35% maximum health.

entries.name: Crypt Plague
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive Damage dealt by Crypt Swarm now applies 1 stack of Crypt Plague and Lichfrost applies 2 stacks. Crypt Plague (Damage) Deals 2 + 6% SP Plague Damage every 2 sec for 10 seconds, stacking 10 times. Additional applications do not refresh duration.

entries.name: Tundra Warriors
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive Casting any spell now has a 25 % chance to grant you Tundra Warriors . Tundra Warriors (Proc) For 10 seconds, the critical strike chance of your Undead minions is increased by 4 % , stacking 3 times.

entries.name: Necrotic Chains
entries.description_text: Every 3rd Command spell now freezes the target in place for 5 seconds. Damage dealt may end this effect.

entries.name: Raising the Kirin Tor
entries.description_text: Your Command spells now have a 40 % chance to refund a portion of their Runic Power cost.

entries.name: Glacial Impact
entries.description_text: Requires Frozen Target Call down icy boulders onto a Frozen enemy, dealing 84 + 100% frost SP Frost damage.

entries.name: Champion of Kel'Thuzad
entries.description_text: Your Skeletal Mages now only cost 1 Life Force .

entries.name: Refreshing Chill
entries.description_text: Casting Command spells now has a 20 % chance to reset the cooldown of Ice Barrage and make your cast next within 15 seconds free of cost.

entries.name: Frigid Winds
entries.description_text: Increases the chance to trigger Refreshing Chill by 5 % .

entries.name: Heartchill
entries.description_text: Chill an enemy's heart, interrupting their current spell cast. Successfully interrupting a spell also reduces their movement speed and haste by -80 % for 3 seconds.

entries.name: Ice Mastery
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Increases your spell power by 30 % of your Intellect.

entries.name: Frozen Power
entries.description_text: Level 30 Passive Increases your critical damage with Frost spells by 50 % .

entries.name: Lich Form
entries.description_text: Transform into a Lich , becoming Undead increasing your Frost damage dealt by 10 % . While active you generate 3 Runic Power every 5 sec.

entries.name: Blood and Ice
entries.description_text: Each Skeletal Warrior or Skeletal Rogue now increases the damage of your Ice Barrage by 8 % .

entries.name: Frigid Death
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Glacial Impact by 20 % .

entries.name: Army of the North
entries.description_text: Chant a powerful ritual that brings forth 1 Rotting Frost Giant near you to aid you in combat for 30 seconds and generate 30 Runic Power, repeating every 3 sec for 15 seconds. For the duration, your Undead minions are guaranteed to critically strike.

entries.name: Hoarfrost Hands
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Lichfrost's movement speed slow by 4 sec and your hit chance by 4 % .

entries.name: Frozen Bodies
entries.description_text: When you kill an enemy that yields experience or honor or critically strike with Frost damage you now gain a stack of Frozen Bodies . Frozen Bodies Increases the damage of your next Glacial Impact by 3 % for 20 seconds, stacking 10 times. Reaching 10 stacks causes your next Glacial Impact within until cancelled to critically strike for 50% increased damage.

entries.name: Soulfreeze
entries.description_text: All Frost damage you deal to Frozen targets now has a 25 % chance to unleash Soulfreeze on them. Soulfreeze Launch a chain of frost at an enemy, dealing 354 + 35% frost SP Frost Damage every 1 sec for 3 seconds. Each tick generates 3 to 8 Runic Power.

entries.name: Command: Bonefreeze
entries.description_text: Command your Skeletal Mages to freeze enemies at target location for 40 seconds ( 8 sec vs players). Damage taken may end the effect.

entries.name: Ner'zhul's Blessing
entries.description_text: Every 3rd Command spell now makes your next Lichfrost within 10 seconds guaranteed to critically strike.

entries.name: Champion of Kel'thuzad
entries.description_text: Level 50 Passive While your Lich Form is active, your Champion spells will now cooldown faster.

entries.name: Arch Lich
entries.description_text: Critical strikes with Frost spells now refund 3 % of your maximum mana.

entries.name: Giant Bones
entries.description_text: Casting Unholy Frenzy now summons a Rotting Frost Giant to aid you in combat for the duration.

entries.name: Frigidness
entries.description_text: Increases your critical damage by 50 % against Frozen targets.

entries.name: Runic Reservoir
entries.description_text: Increases your Frost damage by 5 % and your maximum Runic Power by 15 .

entries.name: Chilling Presence
entries.description_text: Increases critical strike chance of all party and raid members by 3 % . Does not stack with similar effects. In addition, increases the critical strike chance of Ice Barrage by 20 % against Frozen targets.

entries.name: Bone Legion
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Lichfrost by 10 % and its Runic Power generated by 25 % .

entries.name: Frigid Power
entries.description_text: Increases the spell power scaling of Lichfrost and Ice Barrage by 20 % .

entries.name: Master Lich
entries.description_text: Soulfreeze now increases the enemy's Frost damage taken by you by 5 % per tick for 8 sec, stacking 3 times.

entries.name: Permafrost
entries.description_text: Gives your spells a 15 % chance to grant you the Permafrost , which treats your next 2 spells cast as if the target were Frozen . Lasts 12 seconds.

entries.name: Glacier Lord
entries.description_text: Your Glacial Impact is now guaranteed to critically strike against Frozen targets.

entries.name: Ice Barrage
entries.description_text: Unleash a relentless volley of glacial shards, dealing 19 + 35% SP Frost damage every 0 sec for 1 seconds. At the end of the duration, you entomb your target in ice, freezing them for 4 seconds.

entries.name: Death and Ice
entries.description_text: While a Skeletal Mage is active the critical strike chance of your Undead minions is now increased by 10 % .

entries.name: Piercing Icicles
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Ice Barrage by 20 % .

entries.name: Curse of the Lich
entries.description_text: Increases the range of your Rime spells by 6 yds and increases the Frost critical strike chance of you and your summons by 3 % .

entries.name: Dominion of Frost
entries.description_text: Critical strikes dealt by your Undead minions now reduce the cooldown of Unholy Frenzy by -3 sec.

entries.name: Freeze Dry
entries.description_text: Your Glacial Impact now generates 20 Runic Power.

entries.name: Crown's Call
entries.description_text: Increases your Intellect by 5 % and the Frost damage dealt by your Undead minions by 10 % .

entries.name: Deathly Chill
entries.description_text: Reduces the channel and cast time of Ice Barrage by -25 % .

entries.name: Harrowing Winds
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Glacial Impact now deals an additional 50 % of the damage dealt as Frost damage to enemies within 6 yds of the primary target.

entries.name: Icecrown
entries.description_text: Your Frost damage dealt now increases your allies' critical strike chance against the enemy by 1 % for 10 seconds, stacking 3 times.

entries.name: Raise: Skeletal Mage
entries.description_text: Raise a Skeletal Mage to aid you in combat, occupying 2 Life Force . Command : Unleashes ice at your target and enemies within 6 yds, dealing 51 + 80% frost SP Frost damage.

entries.name: Summoner
entries.description_text: Reduces the mana cost and cooldown of Sacrifice Undead by -20 % .

entries.name: Anti-Magic Shell
entries.description_text: When you summon a Raised minion, it now raises with a shield absorbing Magic damage equal to 40 % of their maximum health.

entries.name: Animate: Tomb King
entries.description_text: Animate a Tomb King to aid you in combat for 15 seconds. While active, all of your Undead minion's attacks deal an additional 10 % of the damage dealt as Plague damage.

entries.name: Forbidden Technique
entries.description_text: Casting Command spells now reduces the cooldown of your Animates by -1 sec.

entries.name: Animate: Plaguefather
entries.description_text: Animate a Plaguefather to aid you in combat for 15 seconds. Damage dealt by this minion will emit Zombie Plague , dealing 79 + 10% SP Plague damage to nearby enemies, and reducing their attack power by 223 .

entries.name: Underking
entries.description_text: Casting Command spells now grants you a stack of Underking for 20 seconds. At 10 stacks, the cooldown of Animate: Tomb King , Animate: Bone Wraith or Animate: Plaguefather is reduced by -15 sec at random.

entries.name: Mindless Fury
entries.description_text: Casting Animate or Command spells now increases your haste by 1 % for 10 seconds, stacking 5 times.

entries.name: Lich's Prodigy
entries.description_text: Your Glacial Tap now generates an additional 20 Runic Power, but its cost is increased by 25 % .

entries.name: Unstoppable Frenzy
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of your Unholy Frenzy by -60 sec.

entries.name: Summoning Prodigy
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Skeletal Archers by 3 sec.

entries.name: Raise: Ghoul
entries.description_text: Raise a Ghoul to aid you in combat occupying 1 Life Force . Its auto attacks restore 21 + 3.53% Intellect + 3.53% SP health to you. Command : Expels leeching plague that strikes up to 5 nearby enemies, dealing 30 + 37.5% SP + 50% Intellect Plague damage, and healing you for 35 + 22% SP + 50% Intellect for each Ghoul .

entries.name: March of the Dead
entries.description_text: Beckon the restless dead to rise and march forward. When they reach an enemy they explode, dealing 700 + 75% SP Plague damage to nearby enemies and slowing their movement speed by -70 % for 3 seconds.

entries.name: Graverobber
entries.description_text: Reduces the mana cost and cast time of your Raise and Animate spells by -30 % .

entries.name: Long March
entries.description_text: Removes the cooldown from March of the Dead , but gives it a 1 sec cast time.

entries.name: Crypt Keeper
entries.description_text: Your Crypt Swarm now bounces to 2 additional nearby enemies, at 30 % reduced value per enemy struck.

entries.name: Master Animator
entries.description_text: Increases your maximum Life Force by 1 .

entries.name: Ghoul Mastery
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by your Ghouls now has a 15 % chance to transform them into a Frenzied Ghoul . Frenzied Ghoul (Proc) Transformed into a Frenzied Ghoul , increasing haste by 40 % for 10 seconds. Immune to movement slowing effects.

entries.name: Summoning Ritual
entries.description_text: Summon a ritual circle at your location for 1 minute. While active, you may cast Ritual Return to return to it. Ritual Return Teleport back to the position of your Scourge Transporter and remove all movement slowing effects from you.

entries.name: Bone King
entries.description_text: Casting Command spells now has a 15 % chance to make your next Lichfrost within 5 seconds instant cast.

entries.name: Runic Animation
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Animate: Skeletal Archers and Command: Hook by -20 % .

entries.name: Skeletal Artillery
entries.description_text: Your Animate: Skeletal Archers now summons 1 additional Skeletal Archer .

entries.name: Putrifier
entries.description_text: Increases the durations of Ghoulify and Mass Grave by 25 % .

entries.name: Summoning Adept
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive Increases your maximum Life Force by 1 .

entries.name: Diabolical
entries.description_text: Level 40 Passive Casting spells now grants you 1 stack of Diabolical , stacking up to 15 times, for 20 seconds. Damage dealt by your Crypt Swarm will consume a stack to deal 10 % increased damage per stack.

entries.name: Deadly Bond
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Casting Command spells now has a 30 % chance to cause their next use within 6 seconds to be free of cost.

entries.name: Unrelenting Army
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Harvest Plague now has a 20 % chance to summon a Lesser Zombie to aid you in combat for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Depravity
entries.description_text: Increases the melee haste of your Undead minions by 5 % and gives their critical melee auto attacks an 50 % chance to trigger Bone Club , dealing 40 % of the damage dealt as Shadow Damage.

entries.name: Fetid Mark
entries.description_text: Dealing Shadow damage now increases the damage the target takes from your Skeletal Warriors by 1 % for 10 seconds, stacking 10 times.

entries.name: Summoning Expert
entries.description_text: Level 30 Passive Increases your maximum Life Force by 1 and your Undead minion's Stamina by 10 % .

entries.name: Plague Horde
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by your Undead minions now has a 10 % chance to cast Plague Horde on themselves for 5 seconds and emit Zombie Plague , dealing 79 + 10% SP Plague damage to their target. Plague Horde Enrage for 5 seconds, increasing their critical strike chance by 10 % .

entries.name: Flesh Symbiosis
entries.description_text: Each Abomination or Decaying Colossus active now increases your total Armor and magic resistance by 30 % and causes you to periodically regenerate 2 % maximum health every 5 sec.

entries.name: Chomp
entries.description_text: Critical strikes dealt by your Abominations and Decaying Collosi now Chomp your target, dealing 150 + 112.5% SP damage to them.

entries.name: Sepulchral Might
entries.description_text: Increases your Stamina by 5 % . Increases your spell damage by an amount equal to 15 % of the total of your Raised minion's Stamina.

entries.name: Grave Mastery
entries.description_text: Level 50 Passive Reduces the cost of all Animates , Raises , and Command spells by -20 % .

entries.name: Animate: Bone Wraith
entries.description_text: Animate a Bone Wraith to aid you in combat for 15 seconds. While active, it will periodically unleash a Bonestorm , striking up to 5 nearby enemies for 30 + 40% SP Physical damage every 1 sec for 5 seconds.

entries.name: Unrelenting
entries.description_text: Reduces the channel time of your Crypt Swarm by -25 % .

entries.name: Animate: Bone Construct
entries.description_text: Animate a Bone Construct to aid you in combat for 20 seconds. It moves at a slow speed, but upon reaching an enemy, deals 1560 + 200% SP + 50% AP Shadow damage, piercing all invulnerabilities, resistances, and immunities.

entries.name: Army of the Dead
entries.description_text: While only 1 Abomination is active, the critical strike chance of your Ghouls is increased by 10 % and haste by 10 % .

entries.name: Animate: Skeletal Archer
entries.description_text: Animate 3 Skeletal Archers to aid you in combat for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Plague Protection
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of your Wards by 25 % .

entries.name: Scourge Disciple
entries.description_text: Each active Skeletal Archer now increases your haste by 5 % .

entries.name: Corpse Wagon
entries.description_text: Increases all damage dealt by party and raid members by 3 % . Does not stack with similar effects. In addition, increases the damage of Corpse Explosion by 25 % .

entries.name: Raise: Decaying Colossus
entries.description_text: Raise a Decaying Colossus to aid you in combat, occupying 3 Life Force . While active, 25 % of all damage taken by the caster is taken by the Decaying Colossus . Command : Unleash a powerful attack dealing Weapon Damage plus 100 to all enemies in front of it.

entries.name: Phylactery
entries.description_text: Create a Phylactery near you for 2 minutes. Upon taking damage which would bring you below 10% health, become a Shade , protecting you from all physical attacks and spells, but during that time you cannot attack or cast spells. Reaching your Phylactery in this state revives you with 40 % of your maximum health. If you do not reach it in time you will die.

entries.name: Lich Essence
entries.description_text: Reduces the cast time of Lichfrost by -15 % and reduces your spell pushback suffered from taking damage by 50 % .

entries.name: Tears of Lordaeron
entries.description_text: Direct critical strikes now generates 5 Runic Power.

entries.name: Fetid Ward
entries.description_text: Activate a Fetid Ward on yourself and your Undead minions for 30 minutes. While active, 30 % of your damage dealt heals you and your minions, split evenly amongst them, and healing received is increased by 10 % .

entries.name: Raise: Abomination
entries.description_text: Raise an Abomination to aid you in combat, occupying 3 Life Force . It is surrounded by a disease cloud, dealing 9 + 25% SP Nature damage to enemies when they deal damage and reducing their attack speed by -20 % for 15 seconds. Command : Instantly unleashes an empowered disease cloud around it.

entries.name: Corpse Commander
entries.description_text: Reduces the Runic Power cost of Corpse Explosion by -20 .

entries.name: Foul Invocation
entries.description_text: Transform into an undead monstrosity for 20 seconds, increasing your maximum health by 30 % . While transformed you are immune to Fear, Sleep, Charm, and Disease effects.

entries.name: Winds of Northrend
entries.description_text: Increases the amount slowed by Lichfrost by -15 % .

entries.name: Deadly Defense
entries.description_text: Each of your summons now reduces your damage taken by 1 % , up to a maximum of 10 % .

entries.name: Dead Man Walking
entries.description_text: Reduces the duration of root and slow effects against you by -25 % .

entries.name: Command: Blight
entries.description_text: Command your Decaying Colossus to blight the ground in a 10 yd radius beneath it, reducing healing received by -60 % for enemies inside for 20 seconds.

entries.name: Frost Runes
entries.description_text: Dealing Magic damage now has a 15 % chance to increase your haste by 10 % for 12 seconds.

entries.name: Raise: Banshee
entries.description_text: Raise a Banshee to aid you in combat, occupying 2 Life Force . It will channel on your target, dealing damage and draining their mana over time. Command : Drains 20 % of your target's mana (up to a maximum of 40 % of their own maximum mana) and deals Frost damage equal to the mana drained.

entries.name: Mass Grave
entries.description_text: Transform up to 5 nearby enemies into a ghoul, fearing them for 40 seconds ( 8 ). Only affects Humanoids. While above 50 Runic Power this spell is instant cast.

entries.name: Naxxramas Prodigy
entries.description_text: Increases your Shadow and Frost resistances by 0.5 per level.

entries.name: Disciple of Kel'thuzad
entries.description_text: Increases your spell haste by 4 % .

entries.name: Animate: Frost Wyrm
entries.description_text: Animate a Frost Wyrm that flies behind the Necromancer that blasts nearby enemies every 2 sec for 30 seconds, dealing 1500 + 14.88% frost SP + 14.88% Intellect Frost damage.

entries.name: Living Dead
entries.description_text: Reduces the mana cost of Lichfrost and Crypt Swarm by -10 % .

entries.name: Reclaimed Life
entries.description_text: Reduces the cast time of your Raise spells by -15 % .

entries.name: Ner'zhul's Blessing
entries.description_text: Increases your maximum Runic Power by 20 % .

entries.name: Game of Bones
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of your Champion spells by -60 sec.

entries.name: Bone Tithe
entries.description_text: Siphon life from your undead minions, sacrificing 40 % of their health to grant yourself an absorb shield equal to half of the health stolen for 20 seconds. Usable while stunned.

entries.name: Glacial Tap
entries.description_text: Tap into necrotic energies, instantly regenerating 30 Runic Power.

entries.name: Death's Due
entries.description_text: Force a target to accept the reality of death, removing any invulnerability or immunity effects from them and cursing them for 5 seconds. If the target's health is below 20% at the end of duration, they take 800 + 200% SP Shadowfrost Damage.

entries.name: Gravedigger
entries.description_text: Reduces the cast time of Sacrifice Undead by -0.5 sec.

entries.name: Improved Mandates
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of your Mandates by 20 % .

entries.name: Create Frozen Reliquary
entries.description_text: Create 1 Frozen Reliquary that restores 30 % of your missing mana. Allies may only use a Frozen Reliquary once per minute.

entries.name: Study of Death
entries.description_text: When you cast Unholy Frenzy you now summon 3 Greater Zombies to aid you in combat for 14 seconds. Damage dealt by your Undead minions now reduces the cooldown of Unholy Frenzy by -0.5 sec.

entries.name: Command: Hook
entries.description_text: Command your Abominations to hook an enemy to their location, slowing their movement speed to a halt for 2 seconds.

entries.name: Vampiric Aura
entries.description_text: While you are below 50% health, your Undead minions now heal you for 10 % of their damage dealt.

entries.name: Icecrown Scriptures
entries.description_text: Increases your Shadow and Frost damage dealt against Humanoids and Undead by 4 % .

entries.name: Cobalt-Plated Armor
entries.description_text: Increases the Armor of your Undead minions by 300 , scaling with your level.

entries.name: Hulking Hordes
entries.description_text: Increases your maximum health and the maximum health of your summons by 5 % .

entries.name: Putrid Summoner
entries.description_text: Each Undead Stance now provides an additional bonus: Undead: Assault : Increases your critical strike chance against Humanoids by 5 % . Undead: Protect : Reduces your threat generated by -75 % . Undead: Pacify : Reduces your damage taken by -10 % .

entries.name: Overwhelming Force
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by your Undead minions now has a 5 % chance to restore 2 Runic Power and 2 % of your maximum mana.

entries.name: Life For Power
entries.description_text: You absorb 20 % of healing taken and gain a shield for the amount absorbed, lasting 10 seconds.

entries.name: Lich Commander
entries.description_text: Reduces the cost of your Command spells by -15 % .

entries.name: Spirit of the Phoenix
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive Upon taking damage that would otherwise kill you, you are instead transformed into the Spirit of the Phoenix for 15 seconds. While transformed, your spells have no mana cost and your Spirit is increased by 100 % . At the end of the duration, you will be reborn. Can only occur once every 10 min.

entries.name: Ashen Priest
entries.description_text: Level 30 Passive Your critical heals now grant allies Replenishment . In addition, 20 % of your mana regeneration continues while in combat. Replenishment Restores 1 % maximum mana every 5 sec to allies within 100 yds for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Kael's Command
entries.description_text: Generates 50 Heat Command your Phoenix to go dormant for 10 seconds. While dormant, it radiates healing to nearby allies for 611 + 100% healing every 2 sec.

entries.name: Scepter of Fire
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Inferno by 5 sec, causing its end of duration explosion of healing to trigger every 5 sec instead.

entries.name: Sageweaving
entries.description_text: Consuming an Ember now reduces the cast time of your next Cinderheart or Kindle by -15 % for 12 seconds, stacking 2 times.

entries.name: Touched by Fire
entries.description_text: Your Cinderheart , Ember Touch , and Kindle now gains an additional 15 % of your bonus healing spell power.

entries.name: Flame Bonding
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Your Inferno Barrier now triggers a -15 sec reduced cooldown when used on an ally other than yourself.

entries.name: Cauterizing Wounds
entries.description_text: Healing done by Ember Touch now grants you Flamecasting . Flamecasting Increases your spell haste by 5 % for 15 seconds. Stacks 5 times. Additional applications do not refresh duration.

entries.name: Fueling the Fire
entries.description_text: Using Ember Touch on your Roaring Pyre or Phoenix will cause them to erupt in flames, healing 12 allies within 30 yds for 232 + 100% Spirit , additionally scaling with Spirit. Allied Pyromancers can also fuel the fire with your Roaring Pyre and Phoenix .

entries.name: Spirit of Fire
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of your absorption effects by 20 % .

entries.name: Rekindle
entries.description_text: Healing done by Kindle now increases your healing done on the target 5 % for 20 seconds, stacking 2 times.

entries.name: Veins of Fire
entries.description_text: Flamecasting now also grants 3 % increased Spirit per stack.

entries.name: Phoenix Egg
entries.description_text: Summon a Phoenix for 1 minute at the target location that heals nearby party members for 117 + 15% healing every 5 sec. You may only have 1 Phoenix active at a time.

entries.name: Unfathomably Hot!
entries.description_text: Each tick of Cleansing Flames now generates 5 additional Heat .

entries.name: Blessing of the Inferno
entries.description_text: Reduces the healing done by Inferno by -20 % , but increases its chance to trigger by 50 % .

entries.name: Fiery Faith
entries.description_text: Level 40 Passive Increases your spell critical strike rating by 15 % of your Spirit.

entries.name: Burning Passion
entries.description_text: Level 50 Passive Effective healing critical strikes now generate 10 Heat .

entries.name: Brilliance
entries.description_text: Flamecasting can now stack 2 additional times. Flamecasting Increases your spell haste by 5 % for 15 seconds. Stacks 5 times. Additional applications do not refresh duration.

entries.name: Roaring Pyre
entries.description_text: Conjure a Roaring Pyre at the target location for 20 seconds. Allies within 30 yds of the bonfire are healed for 35 + 10% healing + 50% Spirit , scaling with your Spirit and healing spell power, every 2 sec and their Spirit is increased by 10 % .

entries.name: Scorching Spirit
entries.description_text: Increases your Spirit by 10 % .

entries.name: Burn Impurities
entries.description_text: Burn away 1 harmful magic effect and 1 disease effect from an ally.

entries.name: Burning Crescendo
entries.description_text: Increases the tick rate of your Phoenix Egg by -2 sec.

entries.name: Ember Charm
entries.description_text: Reduces the cast time of Cinderheart and Kindle by -15 % .

entries.name: Soothing Flames
entries.description_text: Healing done by Kindle and Cinderheart now additionally heals the target for 30% of the healing done over 3 seconds.

entries.name: From The Ashes
entries.description_text: Increases your healing done to allies below 35% health by 25 % .

entries.name: Inferno
entries.description_text: Direct healing critical strikes have a 50 % chance to create an Inferno around the target. Can only occur once every 5 sec. Inferno Engulf an ally in cleansing flames for 5 seconds, healing them for 161 and party and raid members within 40 yds of them for 91 every 1 sec. At the end of the duration, party and raid members are healed for 383 to 403 .

entries.name: Offering of Executus
entries.description_text: When your Phoenix dies or expires, it now heals all allies within 30 yds equal to its maximum health.

entries.name: Sunstrider Array
entries.description_text: For 15 seconds, you generate 1 Ember every 3 sec and your Cinderheart generates double the amount of Heat with each cast.

entries.name: Tender Touch
entries.description_text: Effective healing done by Ember Touch now heals up to 3 of the lowest health allies near your target for an additional 15 % of the amount healed.

entries.name: Lucifron's Rage
entries.description_text: Effective healing done by your Phoenix now causes allies to deal additional Fire damage with all attacks for 6 seconds.

entries.name: Concentrated Fire
entries.description_text: Increases the damage and healing of Cleansing Flames by 20 % .

entries.name: Living Flame
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of Ember Touch by 10 % .

entries.name: Invigoration
entries.description_text: Healing done by your Phoenix now generates you 5 Heat .

entries.name: Lifebinder's Fire
entries.description_text: Generating an Ember now increases your healing done by 3 % for 8 seconds, stacking 5 times.

entries.name: Cleansing Flames
entries.description_text: Generates 10 Heat Each Tick Spread cleansing flames on 5 allies and enemies in front of you, damaging or healing for 87 + 44.4% SP over 3 seconds.

entries.name: Warmth
entries.description_text: You now radiate warmth to nearby allies, healing the lowest health nearby ally equal to 25 % of your periodic damage dealt.

entries.name: Phoenix Dive
entries.description_text: Command your Phoenix to swoop to the target ally and shield allies in their path with fire, absorbing 175 + 50% SP + 100% Spirit damage for 30 seconds, scaling with your Spirit.

entries.name: Shielded by Flames
entries.description_text: Healing critical strikes now apply an absorption shield to allies equal to 30 % of the healing done for 8 seconds.

entries.name: Neltharion's Resolve
entries.description_text: Place Neltharion's resolve on all party members, warding them against fear. The next fear effect used against the target will fail, using up the ward. Lasts 1 minute.

entries.name: Molten Storm
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance and damage of Lava Shard by 10 % .

entries.name: Searing Power
entries.description_text: Increases the spell power scaling of Flare Bolt by 20 % .

entries.name: Embrace the Fire
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Blaze and Ignite by 20 % .

entries.name: Legacy of Ragnaros
entries.description_text: Pyroclasm now causes your next 3 Lava Shards within 12 seconds to trigger no cooldown and be free of cost.

entries.name: Flames of Focus
entries.description_text: Adds 1 additional stack to Flamecasting and increases its duration by 5 sec.

entries.name: Pyroclastic Flow
entries.description_text: Flare Bolt now increases the damage of subsequent Flare Bolts by 3 % for 10 seconds, stacking 5 times. Flames of Neltharion and Explode now increase the damage of subsequent Explodes or Flames of Neltharion by 3 % for 5 seconds, stacking 5 times.

entries.name: Explosive
entries.description_text: Increases the tick rate of Blaze and Ignite by -10 % .

entries.name: Rapid Incineration
entries.description_text: Consuming Embers now reduces the cooldown of Lava Shard and Pillar of Flame by 10 % .

entries.name: Pillar of Flame
entries.description_text: Generates 20 Heat Per Target Create a pillar of lava beneath an enemy, dealing 36 + 31.24% fire SP Fire damage. Deals an additional 92 + 34.36% fire SP Fire damage to enemies near the primary target.

entries.name: Fired Up!
entries.description_text: Your Ember spenders are now instant and have a 30 % chance to refund their cost and increases your chance to critically strike by 20 % for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Flamespiller
entries.description_text: Critical strikes with Explode or Flames of Neltharion now extend the duration of Fired Up by 0.5 sec.

entries.name: Heat Wave
entries.description_text: Flamecasting stacks now also increase the damage of Explode and Flames of Neltharion by 4 % per stack.

entries.name: To Ashes
entries.description_text: Damaging critical strikes now generate 10 Heat and restore 3 % of your base mana.

entries.name: Combustion
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Explode is now increased by 15% for each of your Pyromancer periodic effects on the target.

entries.name: Wreath of Flames
entries.description_text: Periodic Fire damage now has a 10 % chance to grant a stack of Flamecasting , or 2 stacks if they critically strike. Flamecasting Increases your spell haste by 5 % for 15 seconds. Stacks 5 times. Additional applications do not refresh duration.

entries.name: Roasted Alive
entries.description_text: Increases the chance to trigger Fired Up by 20 % .

entries.name: Magnitude 10
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of Flare Bolt by 5 % .

entries.name: Sizzle
entries.description_text: When Flamecasting expires your active Pyromancer periodic effects flare up on all enemies, instantly striking them with Flare Bolts . Flare Bolt Generates 20 Heat Invoke flames upon an enemy, dealing 19 + 57.1% fire SP Fire damage.

entries.name: Melting Point
entries.description_text: Critical strikes with Fire spells now increases the chance for the enemy to by critically hit with spells by 3 % for 12 seconds.

entries.name: Fiery Passion
entries.description_text: Increases the spell haste of all party and raid members by 3 % . Does not stack with similar effects. In addition, your spell haste is increased by 3 % .

entries.name: Pyroclasm
entries.description_text: Consumes 1 Ember Create a pyroclasm instantly consuming your Burning effects on a target to deal the two times total periodic damage plus an additional 2100 to 2220 over 10 seconds, piercing absorption effects and resistances.

entries.name: Flames of the Firelord
entries.description_text: Your periodic damage dealt now has a 5 % chance to grant you Eruption for 5 sec.

entries.name: Stoke
entries.description_text: Critical strikes with Ignite and Infernus now extend their own duration on the target by 3 sec, up to a maximum of 12 sec.

entries.name: Pyromaniac
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of Ember spenders by 5 % .

entries.name: Ignite
entries.description_text: Generates 10 Heat Per Tick Burn an enemy, inflicting 119 Fire damage over 21 seconds. If Ignite is dispelled it will cause 437 + 150% fire SP Fire damage to the dispeller. Castable while moving.

entries.name: Residual Power
entries.description_text: Each active Ember now reduces the cast time of Explode by -8 % .

entries.name: Pyromantic Accelerants
entries.description_text: Your Flames of Neltharion and Explode now deal 15 % increased damage to Burning targets.

entries.name: Incinerator
entries.description_text: Level 40 Passive Increases your spell penetration by 30 , scaling with your level.

entries.name: Lighting the Fuse
entries.description_text: Level 30 Passive Allows your periodic effects to critically strike and increases your spell critical strike chance by 15 % of your Intellect.

entries.name: Infernus
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Lava Shard now applies Infernus , causing enemies to Burn , dealing an additional 1122 + 72% SP Fire damage over 18 seconds.

entries.name: Scorched
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Direct critical strikes with Ember spenders now Scorch the target, Burning them for an additional 30% of the damage dealt over 3 seconds.

entries.name: Burned
entries.description_text: Level 50 Passive Direct Fire damage dealt now applies Burned to the target for 15 seconds. Burned (Proc) Increases the targets damage taken from your periodic effects by 3 % stacking 5 times.

entries.name: Dark Iron Legacy
entries.description_text: Targets affected by the disorient from Meteor take an additional 40 % increased damage from the next Explode or Lava Shard .

entries.name: Cataclysmic Power
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Flare Bolt by 3 % for each periodic effect you have on the target.

entries.name: Destroyer's Legacy
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Lava Shard on enemies affected by Blaze now blasts nearby enemies for 20 % of the damage dealt as Fire damage.

entries.name: Arsonist
entries.description_text: Increases the critical damage of your Ember spenders by 10 % .

entries.name: Perpetual Burning
entries.description_text: The duration of Blaze is now increased by 1 sec for each Ember you have when you cast it.

entries.name: Blackrock Mountaineer
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Eruption by -30 sec.

entries.name: Mad Aspect's Scepter
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Destroyer's Maw by 20 % .

entries.name: Firefall
entries.description_text: Generates 10 Heat Per Target Call down streaks of fire upon an enemy and up to 8 enemies within 15 yds of them, dealing 79 + 31.24% fire SP Fire damage.

entries.name: Draconic Rage
entries.description_text: Consuming Embers now has a 25 % chance to trigger Dragon's Wrath on all enemies affected by Blaze .

entries.name: Destroyer's Maw
entries.description_text: Generates 30 Heat Unleash a vicious draconic maw on an enemy, dealing 103 + 100% fire SP Fire damage that cannot be resisted.

entries.name: Soul of the Dragon
entries.description_text: Casting Flare Bolt now has a 15 % chance to cast it again free of cost.

entries.name: Wild Magic
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Dragon's Wrath now has a 50 % chance to become unstable, dealing 50 + 16.5% Intellect % additional damage as Magic damage, but burning 85 + 40% Intellect mana. Both the damage dealt and mana burned scale with your Intellect.

entries.name: Cinderstorm
entries.description_text: Reduces all threat generated by Firefall by -25 % and increases its critical strike chance by 10 % .

entries.name: Aspect of Magic
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Dragon's Wrath now increases your Intellect by 3 % for 20 seconds, stacking 10 times. Consuming an Ember now increases your critical strike chance by 2 % and your critical damage by 4 % for 20 seconds, stacking 5 times.

entries.name: Death From Above
entries.description_text: Root enemies in a 40 yd line for 3 seconds and then soar forward in a blaze of glory, dealing 776 + 100% fire SP Fire damage every 1 sec to enemies beneath you for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Molten Fury
entries.description_text: Increases the damage and healing provided by Eruption by 15 % , but reduces its duration by -50 % .

entries.name: Lifebringer's Blessing
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Aspect of Time now heals you equal to 200 % of the damage dealt.

entries.name: Blackflight Resurgence
entries.description_text: Level 50 Passive Legacy of Deathwing now also increases the damage of your next Destroyer's Maw or Firefall by 25 % .

entries.name: Flames of the Aspects
entries.description_text: Casting Destroyer's Maw now grants 2 stacks of Flamecasting . Flamecasting Increases your spell haste by 5 % for 15 seconds. Stacks 5 times. Additional applications do not refresh duration.

entries.name: Earthwarder
entries.description_text: Being struck by a melee attack while Draconic Aspect is active now has a 20 % chance to make your next Flare Bolt within 8 seconds instant cast.

entries.name: Echo of Nozdormu
entries.description_text: Transforms your Explode into Echo of Nozdormu . Echo of Nozdormu Obliterate an enemy, dealing 120 + 105% SP Chromatic Damage and reducing all spell and ability cooldowns by 5 % .

entries.name: Searing Flames
entries.description_text: Increases the spell bonus scaling of Lava Shard by 30 % .

entries.name: Alexstrasza's Gift
entries.description_text: Increases the damage and healing of your Ember spenders by 15 % .

entries.name: Draconic Invocation
entries.description_text: Invoke all of the Dragon Aspects, instantly generating 5 Embers .

entries.name: Agonizing Burns
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Blaze by 20 % and allows it to benefit from your spell haste.

entries.name: Aspect of Eternity
entries.description_text: Allows the periodic damage of Blaze to critically strike. In addition, damage dealt by Echo of Nozdormu or Aspect of Time now has a 20 % chance to guarantee your next Blaze within 8 seconds to critically strike and increase its critical damage by 100 % and duration by 25 % .

entries.name: Aspect's Blessing
entries.description_text: Your next Echo of Nozdormu or Flames of Neltharion is guaranteed to critically strike and triggers Aspect of Time , casting an additional time for 30 % of the damage dealt. Lasts 15 seconds. Damage dealt in this way can trigger up to 3 additional times.

entries.name: Expediting Power
entries.description_text: Your Echo of Nozdormu now reduces the cooldown of Aspect's Blessing by an additional 5 % .

entries.name: Aspect of Time
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Damage dealt by Echo of Nozdormu and Flames of Neltharion now has a 33 % chance to cast an additional time for 30 % of the damage dealt. Damage dealt in this way can trigger this effect up to 3 additional times.

entries.name: Timed Attacks
entries.description_text: Increases your spell haste by 4 % .

entries.name: Ascender
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Dragon Leap by -5 sec.

entries.name: Invocation of Flames
entries.description_text: Your Draconic Invocation now grants 5 stacks of Flamecasting . In addition, allows Flamecasting to stack 5 additional times and increases its duration by 5 sec.

entries.name: Overwhelming Flames
entries.description_text: Your Lava Shard now spreads Blaze to up to 1 additional enemy within 8 yds of the primary target.

entries.name: Breath of Neltharion
entries.description_text: Breath superheated flames in a cone in front of you that melts the weapons of affected enemies, disarming their melee and ranged weapons for 6 seconds.

entries.name: Inner Flame
entries.description_text: Increases critical strike chance of all party and raid members by 3 % . Does not stack with similar effects.

entries.name: Flames of Execution
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Blaze is increased by 25 % on enemies below 35% of their maximum health.

entries.name: Black Magic
entries.description_text: Generating Heat now reduces the cooldown of Draconic Invocation and Essence of Malygos by 3 % . Can only occur once per sec.

entries.name: Legacy of Deathwing
entries.description_text: Level 40 Passive Consuming Embers now has a 30 % chance to reset the cooldown of Destroyer's Maw and Firefall and grant you Legacy of Deathwing . Legacy of Deathwing Your next Destroyer's Maw or Firefall within 10 seconds is instant cast and free of cost.

entries.name: Dragon's Edge
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive Direct critical strikes now generate an additional 20 Heat .

entries.name: Critical Pressure
entries.description_text: Increases your Intellect and critical strike chance by 3 % .

entries.name: Flames of Fate
entries.description_text: Your Aspect's Blessing now affects 2 additional casts of Echo of Nozdormu , but its cooldown is doubled, and its mana cost is increased by 50 % .

entries.name: Fire and Brimstone
entries.description_text: Generating an Ember now increases the damage and healing of Ember spenders by 1 % for 10 seconds, stacking 5 times.

entries.name: Draconic Tempest
entries.description_text: Your Dragon's Wrath now melts enemies, increasing their chance to be hit by spells by 3 % for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Ignis Fatalis
entries.description_text: Ignis Ultimatus is now guaranteed to critically strike, has 20 % more critical damage, and channels 0.5 sec faster.

entries.name: Purifying Flames
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Essence of Malygos by 3 sec.

entries.name: Gaze of Ysera
entries.description_text: Set Ysera's gaze upon an enemy, putting them to sleep for 40 seconds ( 8 sec vs players). Direct damage dealt may interrupt this effect.

entries.name: Hasty Incantation
entries.description_text: Increases the range of Flame Step by 10 yds.

entries.name: Superheated
entries.description_text: Consuming or generating an Ember now has a 10 % chance to superheat you, increasing all damage and healing done by 10% for 6 sec.

entries.name: Firestorm
entries.description_text: Create a fiery tornado at a location for 10 seconds. Enemies who enter its radius suffer 313 + 40% fire SP Fire damage and are knocked back slightly.

entries.name: Searing Speed
entries.description_text: Dealing periodic damage or healing now has a 15 % chance to grant you Searing Speed . Searing Speed Increases your movement speed by 50 % for 2 seconds.

entries.name: Flamecasting
entries.description_text: Generating Heat now has a 25 % chance to grant Flamecasting . Flamecasting Increases your spell haste by 5 % for 15 seconds. Stacks 5 times. Additional applications do not refresh duration.

entries.name: Dragonscales
entries.description_text: When you are stunned, damage taken is reduced by -20 % for 3 seconds.

entries.name: Ysera's Blessing
entries.description_text: Reduces the cast time of Gaze of Ysera by -0.5 sec and causes it to have a -10 % reduced chance to break from damage.

entries.name: Grace of Alexstrasza
entries.description_text: Burns off all movement impairing effects from all allies in a 20 yd radius around you and grants them stun, slow and root immunity for 4 seconds.

entries.name: Constant Burning
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Spellburn by -4 sec and increases its duration by 1 sec.

entries.name: Fiery Intent
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Cataclysm by 30 sec.

entries.name: Pyromancy
entries.description_text: Increases your critical damage by 100 % .

entries.name: Heated
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Dragon Leap now generates 10 Heat .

entries.name: Binding Flames
entries.description_text: When you use Essence of Malygos on an ally other than yourself, you now instantly regenerate 25 % of your missing mana.

entries.name: Lava-Drenched
entries.description_text: Reduces the chance for your spells to be dispelled by -30 % .

entries.name: Obliteration
entries.description_text: Eruption now also increases spell haste and movement speed by 20 % for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Circle of Fire
entries.description_text: Creates a circle of fire at the target location for 10 seconds, dealing 223 + 31% fire SP Fire damage and incapacitating all enemies inside for 6 seconds.

entries.name: Hot Headed
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Circle of Fire by -30 sec and increases its disorient duration by 1 sec. Enemies disoriented by Circle of Fire cannot receive any healing.

entries.name: Hellscape
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Blaze by 4 sec.

entries.name: Ignis Ultimatus
entries.description_text: Channel for 2 seconds, gathering a surge of fiery power before unleashing it in a 50 yd line, dealing 1094 + 100% fire SP Fire damage to enemies while also healing allies for 814 + 200% healing . Ignores invulnerabilities, immunities, and resistances. Consumes Flamecasting stacks to increase this spell's damage and healing by 15 % per stack.

entries.name: Volcanic Shell
entries.description_text: Generates 50 Heat Conjure a shield of magma and fire around you, absorbing 500 + 200% fire SP damage. Lasts 10 seconds.

entries.name: Flaming Finesse
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of your Seal spells by 20 % .

entries.name: Bright Flames
entries.description_text: Increases the amount absorbed by Inferno Barrier by 10 % and the damage it deals by 15 % .

entries.name: Al Dente
entries.description_text: Targets affected by Gaze of Ysera now take 15 % increased Fire damage.

entries.name: Blessing of the Firelands
entries.description_text: Each stack of Heat now increases the damage dealt by Dragon Leap by 6 % .

entries.name: Fire Safety
entries.description_text: Increases your Fire damage and healing by 2 % and reduces your threat generated by -10 % .

entries.name: Chains of Fire
entries.description_text: Reduces the cast time of Cindergrip by 0.25 sec and increases its range by 10 yds.

entries.name: Flamer
entries.description_text: Increases your spell haste by 4 % .

entries.name: Fiery Demeanor
entries.description_text: Reduces spell pushback suffered from damaging attacks by 50 % and increases the pushback resistance provided by Ascension of Thaurissan by 15 % .

entries.name: Shazzrah's Boon
entries.description_text: Consuming an Ember now regenerates 2 % of your maximum mana.

entries.name: Dragon Leap
entries.description_text: Leap to a target location and come crashing down, dealing 29 + 30% fire SP Fire damage to up to 10 nearby enemies.

entries.name: Cataclysm
entries.description_text: Launch into the air, dealing 11 Fire damage, knocking back enemies within 6 yds and dazing them for 6 sec. Upon landing, deal -5 Fire damage, knock back enemies within 6 yds and daze them for 6 sec.

entries.name: Magma Guardian
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of your Skin spells by 50 % .

entries.name: Essence of Malygos
entries.description_text: Imbue an ally with the essence of Malygos, restoring 4 % of their maximum mana every 1 sec for 6 seconds. If used on yourself this effect is doubled.

entries.name: Meteor
entries.description_text: Generates 50 Heat Call down a meteor in an 8 yd area, dealing 122 + 125% fire SP Fire damage to 8 enemies and disorienting them for 4 seconds. Direct damage dealt will break the effect.

entries.name: Ember Touch
entries.description_text: Consumes 1 Ember Warm an ally with everliving flames, healing them for 83 + 45% SP + 100% Spirit , additonally scaling with your Spirit.

entries.name: Inferno Barrier
entries.description_text: Generates 30 Heat Shield an ally with molten lava, absorbing 84 + 55% fire SP damage. While active, attackers take 4 + 10% Spirit Fire damage each time they deal damage to them. Lasts 30 seconds.

entries.name: Dragon's Bane
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of Lava Shard and Cinderheart by 6 % against Burning targets.

entries.name: Encroaching Presence
entries.description_text: Your melee critical strikes reduce the cooldown of Rift and Gaze of C'Thun by -3 sec.

entries.name: Netherstrike
entries.description_text: Generates 10 Insanity Strike an enemy quickly for 125 % Weapon Damage plus 48 Shadow damage, purging 1 beneficial magic effect from them. Only usable on enemies below 35% health.

entries.name: Tentacle of N'Zoth
entries.description_text: Target an enemy and summon a Tentacle of N'Zoth on the ground near them that will silence them and deal 117 + 75% SP Shadow damage every 2 sec for 8 seconds. If your target runs out of range, the tentacle will seek a new target. The tentacle gains health based on your Stamina. If the tentacle dies, the silence effect will end.

entries.name: Abyssal Cleave
entries.description_text: Your Gaze of C'Thun now strikes 1 additional nearby enemy.

entries.name: Oblivion's Embrace
entries.description_text: Increases the critical damage of your Hammer of Twilight by 25 % .

entries.name: Shadow Fiend
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of your Voidborne by -90 sec and increases its duration by 5 sec.

entries.name: Instilling Fear
entries.description_text: While above 60 Insanity , your Netherstrike and Gaze of C'Thun now gain 10 % increased critical strike chance.

entries.name: God Blade
entries.description_text: Your Rift now guarantees your next Hammer of Twilight to critically strike.

entries.name: Hand of N'Zoth
entries.description_text: Your Hammer of Twilight , Entropic Slam , and Gaze of C'Thun now refreshes a charge of Blade of the Empire .

entries.name: Void Rage
entries.description_text: Increases the Shadow damage increased through Shadow of the Void by 5 % .

entries.name: Netherborne
entries.description_text: Increases the critical damage of Netherstrike by 25 % .

entries.name: Shadow Strikes
entries.description_text: Blade of the Empire now has a 30 % chance to cause your next auto attack to hit twice.

entries.name: Rift
entries.description_text: Apply a dark boon to yourself for 15 seconds, causing your next Hammer of Twilight to deal an additional 80 % of its damage dealt as Shadow damage. Creates a rift in front of you that absorbs the next 690 + 150% AP healing taken by enemies that step inside and reduces their periodic healing received by -50 % for 10 seconds while inside.

entries.name: Voidforged Edge
entries.description_text: Your auto attacks now deal an additional 10 % of the damage dealt as Shadow damage.

entries.name: Residual Energy
entries.description_text: Doubles the duration of Shadow of the Void .

entries.name: Hysterical Momentum
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Blade of the Empire increases your melee haste by 3 % for 8 seconds, stacking 3 times.

entries.name: Abyssal Edge
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of Blade of the Empire by 2 % and reduces its mana cost by -25 % .

entries.name: Eldritch Obelisk
entries.description_text: Create an Eldritch Obelisk beneath you for 20 seconds, increasing the damage of your Tentacles by 100 % and the movement speed of allies by 40 % while near it.

entries.name: Obliteration
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive Your Gaze of C'Thun now gains an additional 15 base damage and healing.

entries.name: Warrior of the Old Gods
entries.description_text: Increases the Weapon Damage dealt by Hammer of Twilight and Entropic Slam by 20 % .

entries.name: Glory to N'Zoth
entries.description_text: While Shadow of the Void is active, you now take -15 % reduced damage.

entries.name: Void Strength
entries.description_text: Level 40 Passive Increases your Shadow spell damage by 50 % of your Strength and your spell hit chance by 5 % of your Strength.

entries.name: Touch of the Void
entries.description_text: Increases your Magic damage dealt by 3 % and Hammer of Twilight now increases the target's spell damage taken by 10 % for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Shadow of the Void
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive While above 40 Insanity , melee attacks and abilities trigger Shadow of the Void . Shadow of the Void Restores 5 % of your maximum mana and increases your Shadow Damage dealt by 10 % for 8 seconds.

entries.name: Blessing of N'Zoth
entries.description_text: Level 50 Passive Increases your attack power by 100 % of your Intellect.

entries.name: Twilight Domination
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by your Tentacles reduces the cooldown of Eldritch Obelisk by -2 sec. In addition, increases the effectiveness of Eldritch Obelisk by 25 % .

entries.name: End Times
entries.description_text: Increases the range of Blade of the Empire , Netherstrike , and Hammer of Twilight by 25 yds and reduces their mana costs by -50 % for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Voidseeker
entries.description_text: Melee attacks now have a 10 % chance to reset the cooldown of your Netherstrike , allowing the next use regardless of the target's health for 8 seconds.

entries.name: Empire's Grasp
entries.description_text: Teleport an enemy to your position and slow their movement speed by -60 % for 4 seconds.

entries.name: Teachings of Mythrax
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Presence of N'Zoth and Presence of Y'Shaarj by 25 % .

entries.name: Who Needs Sanity?
entries.description_text: Each stack of Insanity increases the critical damage of your Netherstrike by 1 % .

entries.name: Voidborne
entries.description_text: Tap into your inner voidborne rage, increasing your damage dealt and critical strike chance by 25 % , and granting you immunity to stun effects for 15 seconds. Generates 1 Insanity every 1 sec.

entries.name: Eye of N'zoth
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance and critical damage of your Tentacles by 10 % .

entries.name: Twilight's Call
entries.description_text: Level 30 Passive Critical strikes with Hammer of Twilight now refund 20 Insanity .

entries.name: Nutcase
entries.description_text: Your Shadow of the Void now also increases your critical damage dealt by 10 % .

entries.name: Book of N'Zoth
entries.description_text: Your Shadow of the Void now stacks 1 additional time.

entries.name: Seething Void
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Empire's Grasp by -5 sec.

entries.name: Horrific Visions
entries.description_text: While above 40 Insanity , your chance to trigger Dark Revelation is now increased by 10 % .

entries.name: Call of C'Thun
entries.description_text: Your Darkwither 's healing reduction now stacks 3 additional times and its tick rate is increased by -25 % .

entries.name: Sunderer of Realities
entries.description_text: Casting Wrath of the Black Empire now causes your subsequent Wraths of the Black Empire , within 15 seconds, to deal 15 % more damage each and unleash Apocalyptic Skies upon the enemy. Apocalyptic Skies Spawns a void portal that casts either Gaze of C'thun , Horrorbolt , or Obliteration Beam before disappearing.

entries.name: Unrelenting Void
entries.description_text: Periodic or channeled damage now increases the damage the enemy takes from you by 2 % for 10 seconds, stacking 10 times.

entries.name: Dread
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Darkwither by 30 % .

entries.name: Horrorbolt Volley
entries.description_text: After casting 3 Horrorbolts , it transforms into Horrorbolt Volley for 15 seconds. Horrorbolt Volley Generates 10 Insanity Inflict sheer horror on up to 5 enemies, dealing 607 + 28% shadow SP Shadow damage.

entries.name: Darkwither
entries.description_text: Generates 10 Insanity Wither an enemy, dealing 135 Shadow damage over 15 seconds. Each instance of damage reduces their periodic healing taken by -5 % , stacking up to 4 times.

entries.name: Occultism
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of Wrath of the Black Empire by 10 % .

entries.name: Dark Revelation
entries.description_text: Grants your Horrorbolt and Wrath of the Black Empire a 20 % chance to reset the cooldown of Gaze of C'thun .

entries.name: Eldritch Devastation
entries.description_text: Channel upon an enemy, chaining to nearby enemies, dealing 60 + 132% shadow SP Shadow damage over 6 seconds, dealing less damage with each enemy struck.

entries.name: Apocalyptic Skies
entries.description_text: Casting Wrath of the Black Empire now spawns a void portal that casts either Gaze of C'thun , Horrorbolt , or Obliteration Beam before disappearing.

entries.name: Yawning Decay
entries.description_text: Every 3rd Horrorbolt cast causes your next successful Horrorbolt to deal an additional 50% of the initial damage to the target over 3 seconds.

entries.name: Embrace the Void
entries.description_text: Reaching 60 Insanity increases your damage dealt by 10 % for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Depths of Madness
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Gaze of C'Thun now has a 15 % to chance to spawn a void portal that casts either Gaze of C'thun , Horrorbolt , or Obliteration Beam before disappearing.

entries.name: Servant of C'Thun
entries.description_text: Casting Gaze of C'thun now always triggers your Presence of C'Thun while it is active. Presence of C'Thun (Buff) Increases your haste by 20 % for 6 seconds.

entries.name: Worrysome Idol
entries.description_text: Increases your spell haste by 4 % and causes you to regenerate mana equal to 1 % of your missing mana every 10 sec.

entries.name: Mind Rot
entries.description_text: Periodic or channeled damage dealt now has a 25 % chance to curse your target, applying Mind Rot . Mind Rot (Trigger) Increases the chance for allies to hit with all spells against the afflicted enemy by 3 % for 10 seconds. If this effect is dispelled, your critical strike chance is increased by 30 % for 5 seconds.

entries.name: Terror
entries.description_text: Increases the spell damage bonus of Horrorbolt by 10 % and Wrath of the Empire by 20 % .

entries.name: Inner Turmoil
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Wrath of the Black Empire by 25 % .

entries.name: Abyssal Destruction
entries.description_text: Periodic or channeled damage dealt now reduces the cooldown of your Obliteration Beam by -1 sec and grants 1 stack of Abyssal Destruction . Abyssal Destruction Increases the damage dealt of your next Obliteration Beam by 5 % , stacking 10 times, for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Misery
entries.description_text: Casting Gaze of C'Thun now reduces the cooldown of Psychic Suppression and Grasp of Zek'voz by -1 sec.

entries.name: Psychic Suppression
entries.description_text: Lift an enemy into the air, stunning them and dealing 30 + 55% shadow SP + 10% AP Shadow damage every 1 sec for 5 seconds. The target takes 15 % more spell damage from all sources while you are channeling this spell.

entries.name: Whispers of C'Thun
entries.description_text: Level 30 Passive Your Gaze of C'Thun now generates 10 Insanity .

entries.name: Corrupting Whispers
entries.description_text: Damage dealt has a 15 % chance to grant you Corrupting Whispers . Corrupting Whispers (Aura) Increases your Magic Damage dealt by 20 % , reduces your mana costs by -30 % , and prevents Insanity from decaying for 8 seconds.

entries.name: Call of N'Zoth
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Darkwither by 9 sec.

entries.name: Obliteration Beam
entries.description_text: Generates 10 Insanity Unleash a beam of eldritch energy, dealing 126 + 65% shadow SP Shadow damage to an enemy and all nearby enemies. While above 60 Insanity , deals 20 % more damage.

entries.name: Corruptor's Gaze
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of your Tentacles by 20 % .

entries.name: Glimpse of Madness
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Obliteration Beam by -20 % and it now applies Madness to all targets struck. Madness Your Gaze of C'thun causes 3 % increased damage, stacks up to 5 times.

entries.name: Visions
entries.description_text: Increases the spell haste of all party and raid members by 3 % . Does not stack with similar effects. In addition, your Shadow damage is increased by 3 % .

entries.name: Foulness
entries.description_text: Increases the damage bonus provided by your Corrupting Whispers by 5 % .

entries.name: Moment of Clarity
entries.description_text: Reduces spell pushback suffered from damaging attacks by 35 % and increases mana generated by Sanity Tap by 5 % .

entries.name: Absolute Horror
entries.description_text: Reduces the cast time of Horrorbolt and Wrath of the Black Empire by 0.3 sec.

entries.name: Cunning Nature
entries.description_text: Increases your chance to hit by 3 % and reduces threat generated by Shadow damage spells by -15 % .

entries.name: Feeding Darkness
entries.description_text: Increases the range of your Corruption spells by 3 yds and their chance to critically strike by 2 % .

entries.name: Dark Revelation
entries.description_text: Level 40 Passive Grants all periodic damage and damage dealt a 6 % chance to reset the cooldown of Gaze of C'Thun and generate 5 Insanity .

entries.name: Blessing of C'Thun
entries.description_text: Level 50 Passive Your Darkwither can now critically strike and your spell hit rating is increased by 5 % of your Intellect.

entries.name: Ancient Curse
entries.description_text: Generates 20 Insanity Curse an enemy, dealing 326 + 100% SP Shadow damage and increasing all Shadow damage they take from you by 10 % for 10 seconds. Upon expiration, it deals an additional 1233 + 100% shadow SP Shadow damage to the target.

entries.name: Dark Magician
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Increases your critical damage dealt by 50 % and your spell power by 30 % of your Intellect.

entries.name: Blessing of Yogg-Saron
entries.description_text: Level 50 Passive Increases your attack power by an amount equal to 3 times your spell critical strike rating.

entries.name: Persistent Prayers
entries.description_text: Increases the duration and absorption amount of Void Shield and Forbidden Ritual by 25 % .

entries.name: Corrupt Fate
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Dark Veil by -60 sec.

entries.name: Blade of the Depths
entries.description_text: While Herald of the Depths is active, your Forbidden Ritual will cooldown faster.

entries.name: Void Power
entries.description_text: Your healing power is increased based on your main-hand weapon damage.

entries.name: Yogg-Saron's Embrace
entries.description_text: Increases your attack power and your maximum mana by 10 % .

entries.name: Saronite Cube
entries.description_text: Melee ability damage now reduces the duration of Wracked Mind by -1 sec on all allies within 30 yds.

entries.name: Dark Reservoir
entries.description_text: Increases the bonus healing power scaling of Eldritch Mending by 25 % .

entries.name: As The Prophecy Foretold
entries.description_text: Melee critical strikes now refresh a charge of Blade of the Empire and restore 3 % of your base mana.

entries.name: Saronite Blessing
entries.description_text: Melee critical strikes now apply Saronite Blessing to you. Saronite Blessing (Buff) Your melee attack speed is increased by 25 % and your melee auto attacks heal the lowest health ally for an additional 100 % of the damage dealt. Lasts for 15 seconds or 10 attacks.

entries.name: Twisted Sanity
entries.description_text: Allies affected by your Black Blood are now healed for 30 % of the damage dealt by your Tentacles .

entries.name: Abyssal Covenant
entries.description_text: Link yourself to an ally for 30 minutes, transfering 10 % of all damage taken by them to you and causing 20 % of all damage you deal to be converted into healing for them. Can only be applied to 1 ally at a time.

entries.name: Dark Protection
entries.description_text: Allies affected by Abyssal Covenant now also take 20 % increased healing from you.

entries.name: Dark Prophet
entries.description_text: Healing done by Abyssal Covenant now heals 5 of the lowest health nearby allies and healing done by Black Blood can now critically strike.

entries.name: Shadow Training
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Increases the healing done by Eldritch Mending by 50 % and Gaze of C'Thun by 100 % . In addition, you are now unable to miss your attacks and you cannot be parried or dodged.

entries.name: Void-Touched
entries.description_text: Level 30 Passive Direct healing done now applies Void-Touched . Void-Touched (Stacks) Marks the ally for 30 seconds, stacking 10 times. When you cast Gaze of C'Thun , all stacks are consumed to heal all allies affected by Void-Touched for 304 + 35% healing , increased based on how many stacks were on them.

entries.name: Visions of the Empire
entries.description_text: Increases the damage converted into healing through Abyssal Covenant by 10 % .

entries.name: Dark Matter
entries.description_text: Channeling Satiate now heals all allies within 30 yds for 208 + 20% healing every 1 sec for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Devour Curse
entries.description_text: Devour dark magic on an ally, dispelling 2 curse effects from them and healing you for 90 + 65% SP .

entries.name: Eldritch Eye
entries.description_text: Invoke the Old Gods for 15 seconds, removing the cast time of your next 3 Eldritch Mendings or Malevolences and causing them to critically strike.

entries.name: Dark Veil
entries.description_text: Channel a shield of void energies upon an ally, causing both you and them to absorb 875 + 100% healing + 25% AP damage, stacking 5 times, every 1 sec for 5 seconds. At the end of the duration, if the shield holds, you teleport to them. While channeling you are immune to stuns and silences.

entries.name: Saronite Mind
entries.description_text: Your Eldritch Eye now has 1 additional charge.

entries.name: Forbidden Resilience
entries.description_text: While Herald of the Depths is active, you now take -15 % less damage and have a 25 % increased chance to resist dispel effects.

entries.name: Blade of Yogg-Saron
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Blade of the Empire now heals the lowest health ally for 35 % of the damage dealt plus 198 + 20% healing + 5% AP .

entries.name: Forbidden Ritual
entries.description_text: Chant a forbidden ritual that places a shield on all nearby allies that absorbs 225 + 50% healing damage for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Dark Rites
entries.description_text: While Herald of the Depths is active, your movement speed cannot be reduced below 100 % of normal value.

entries.name: Shadow Pennant
entries.description_text: You now heal the lowest health ally affected by Black Blood for 50 % of your auto attack damage.

entries.name: Blessing of Yogg-Saron
entries.description_text: While Herald of the Depths is active, you now transform into a Faceless Monstrosity , increasing your critical healing and critical strike chance by 20 % , but reducing its duration by -5 sec. In addition, while active you are now immune to fear, horrify, and polymorph effects.

entries.name: Malevolence
entries.description_text: Generates 10 Insanity Smash an enemy with eldritch force, dealing 40 + 10% AP + 52% SP Shadow damage and applying Black Blood to 5 nearby allies, healing them for 25 + 10% AP , repeating every 3 sec for 15 seconds. Usable while moving.

entries.name: Malevolent Power
entries.description_text: Every 3rd melee ability you cast now causes your next Eldritch Mending to become instant cast and cost -20 % less mana.

entries.name: Ancient Rituals
entries.description_text: Casting Satiate now refreshes the duration of Black Blood on all allies within 30 yds. Dark Infusion bounces one additional time after its third infusion, expanding to the three lowest-health nearby party or raid members.

entries.name: Forbidden Strength
entries.description_text: While Herald of the Depths is active, the critical strike chance of Blade of the Empire is increased by 10 % .

entries.name: Void Barrier
entries.description_text: Casting Herald of the Depths now increases the absorption of your next Void Shield within 10 seconds by 100 % .

entries.name: Dark Infusion
entries.description_text: 3 Charges, 30 sec recharge Infuse an ally with dark energy, healing them for 44 the next time they take damage. When the heal occurs, Dark Infusion is consumed and expands to the two lowest-health nearby party or raid members. Each secondary infusion heals when triggered, then expands to three nearby allies.

entries.name: Dark Chants
entries.description_text: Reduces the cast time of Forbidden Ritual by 1 sec and allows Black Blood to stack up to 2 times.

entries.name: Horrific Revelations
entries.description_text: Every 1 sec while Hand of Yogg-Saron is active, you now trigger a Horrific Revelation on the target and generate 5 Insanity . Horrific Revelation Heals a friendly target for 144 + 67.85% SP , scaling with Insanity , and increases their critical strike chance by 1 % , stacking 15 times, for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Lead the Covenant
entries.description_text: 50 % of all healing done to allies through Abyssal Covenant is now replicated to you.

entries.name: Protection From Light
entries.description_text: Reduces all damage taken by party and raid members by -3 % . In addition, your Holy damage taken is reduced by -10 % .

entries.name: Hand of Yogg-Saron
entries.description_text: Tether yourself to an ally for 15 seconds, increasing all damage they deal and reducing all damage they take by 15 % .

entries.name: Tales of Woe
entries.description_text: Your Dark Veil now performs its effect -50 % faster.

entries.name: Prophetic Compulsion
entries.description_text: While Black Blood is active on an ally, healing done to them by your Gaze of C'Thun has a 15 % increased chance to critically strike.

entries.name: Stare Into The Abyss
entries.description_text: Removes the cast time of your Corrupt Mind .

entries.name: Black Prayer
entries.description_text: All direct damage dealt now has a 5 % chance to unleash a Black Prayer on all enemies near the target for 9 seconds. Black Prayer Deals 136 + 12% shadow SP + 0.5% AP Shadow Damage every 3 sec and reduces attack speed by -20 % .

entries.name: Void Hunger
entries.description_text: Satiate now also regenerates an additional 1 % mana per tick and no longer increases damage taken during the channel.

entries.name: Lost in the Void
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Embrace the Void by 4 sec and it now heals you for an additional 50 % of the damage taken while active and its cooldown is reduced by -60 sec.

entries.name: Improved Sermon of Dread
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of Sermon of Dread by 40 % .

entries.name: Eldritch Command
