entries.description_text: Casting Gaze of C'thun now has a 30 % chance to cause your Tentacles to blast the enemy with eldritch energy, dealing 81 + 22.5% shadow SP + 10% AP Shadow damage.

entries.name: Embodied Presences
entries.description_text: Increases the chance to trigger your Presences by 5 % .

entries.name: Devourer
entries.description_text: Your Devour Magic now dispels 1 additional magic effect.

entries.name: Shroud of Pride
entries.description_text: Your Abyssal Ward now stacks 3 additional times.

entries.name: Corrupt Mind
entries.description_text: Generates 10 Insanity Corrupt the mind of an enemy and spread madness, fearing them in place for 40 seconds ( 8 sec vs players), bouncing to up to 2 nearby enemies. Damage dealt may end this effect.

entries.name: Ungodly Blessing
entries.description_text: Reduces the duration of curse effects on you by -40 % .

entries.name: Crystalline Reflection
entries.description_text: Increases the chance for Void Shield to resist dispel effects on allies by -50 % and it now also reflects 50 % of the damage absorbed.

entries.name: Wicked Thoughts
entries.description_text: Increases your maximum mana, your movement speed, and mounted movement speed by 15 % .

entries.name: Mind Leak
entries.description_text: While above 60 Insanity , you gain -5 % reduced damage taken.

entries.name: Split Mind
entries.description_text: Void Shield now applies to an additional nearby ally but its duration is reduced by -30 % . Killing an opponent that yields experience or honor removes Wracked Mind from you.

entries.name: Entropic Singularity
entries.description_text: Create a void zone for 5 seconds at target location that slows enemies' movement speed while inside. The slow increases in intensity based on how close to the middle of the zone the enemy is.

entries.name: Dark Calling
entries.description_text: Taking damage while below 35% health now summons 3 Manifestations of Y'shaarj for 10 sec, which will attack enemies and heal you for 2% of your base health. Can ony occur once every 2 minutes.

entries.name: Gift of C'Thun
entries.description_text: Increases your Shadow damage dealt by 4 % and healing done by 4 % .

entries.name: Mass Nightmare
entries.description_text: Spread nightmares of the black empire to up to 5 nearby enemies, horrifying them for 5 seconds and interrupting non-player spellcasting for 3 seconds.

entries.name: Darkward
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of your damage absorption effects by 10 % .

entries.name: Eternal Grasp
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of your Tentacles by 25 % .

entries.name: Embrace the Void
entries.description_text: Become one with the void, preventing you from dying for 6 seconds, or until you take damage equal to a maximum of 100% of your total health. When the effect ends you instantly regenerate health equal to 50 % of the damage taken while active.

entries.name: Dismay
entries.description_text: Increases the movement speed slowed by Grasp of Zek'voz by -20 % .

entries.name: Void-Enchanted Armor
entries.description_text: Increases your chance to resist dispel effects by -20 % .

entries.name: Grasp of Zek'voz
entries.description_text: Hinder an enemies momentum with void chains, slowing their movement speed by -30 % for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Doomsayer
entries.description_text: Reduces the mana cost of your Presences by -50 % .

entries.name: Empire's Blessing
entries.description_text: Reduces the mana cost of Void Shield by -20 % .

entries.name: Hallucination
entries.description_text: Create 3 copies of yourself that run in a random direction for 3 seconds and may briefly trick enemies into ignoring you. Significantly reduces your threat and removes all movement impairing effects from you.

entries.name: Empire Commander
entries.description_text: Increases all primary attributes by 4 % .

entries.name: Void Shield
entries.description_text: Shields an ally, absorbing 195 + 60% SP damage for 30 seconds and applying Wracked Mind . Wracked Mind Cannot be affected by Void Shield . Lasts for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Shadow Words
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of your Whispers by 25 % .

entries.name: Vision of Doom
entries.description_text: Behold a vision of doom, causing direct damage or healing done to apply Vision of Doom to nearby targets for 3 seconds. Can only occur once every 3 sec. At the end of the duration, they are damaged or healed for 100 % of the damage or healing that doomed them. Lasts for 1 minute or 5 instances of damage or healing. Doomed enemies are unable to be healed and the damage or healing done by this effect can critically strike.

entries.name: Mind Games
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Hallucination by -5 sec and reduces its mana cost by -20 % .

entries.name: Twisted Seal
entries.description_text: Create a warped sigil that bends hostile force away from you, deflecting all spells for 5 seconds, but making you unable to attack or cast spells. Casters whose magic is deflected are silenced for 3 seconds.

entries.name: Eyes of Eternity
entries.description_text: Healing an ally with Gaze of C'Thun now additionally reveals nearby stealthed enemies for 8 seconds.

entries.name: Abyssal Ward
entries.description_text: Coalesce an Abyssal Ward reducing your damage taken by 50 % for 10 seconds or 5 attacks. For the duration, each attack received will decrease the value by -10 % . Usable while stunned.

entries.name: Rapid Incantations
entries.description_text: While above 60 Insanity , you gain 5 % increased haste.

entries.name: Eldritch Screams
entries.description_text: Your Corrupt Mind now also applies Mind Rot to nearby enemies. Mind Rot (Trigger) Increases the chance for allies to hit with all spells against the afflicted enemy by 3 % for 10 seconds. If this effect is dispelled, your critical strike chance is increased by 30 % for 5 seconds.

entries.name: Disdain
entries.description_text: Removes the cooldown of Grasp of Zek'voz , but increases its mana cost by 25 % .

entries.name: Overwhelming Void
entries.description_text: Your Mass Nightmare now triggers a 60 sec reduced cooldown when used at or above 80 Insanity .

entries.name: Twilight Shieldtoss
entries.description_text: Hurl a cursed shield, dealing 40 Shadow damage to up to 3 enemies, reduced by 20 % with each jump. Damage increased by 1 % for each stack of Insanity .

entries.name: Eldritch Strength
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Hammer of Twilight and Entropic Slam by 25 % and they now generates a large amount of threat.

entries.name: Dreadfall
entries.description_text: Raise your shield and charge towards an enemy, dealing 50% AP Shadow damage to enemies you pass through, generating additional threat.

entries.name: Eldritch Bastion
entries.description_text: Increases your Armor contribution from your shield by 15 % .

entries.name: Voidwarding
entries.description_text: Reduces damage taken by party and raid members by -3 % . Does not stack with similar effects. In addition, increases all of your resistances by 5 , scaling with level.

entries.name: Everpresent
entries.description_text: Increases the chance to trigger Presences by 10 % .

entries.name: Adaptive Combatant
entries.description_text: Increases your parry chance by 3 % and dodge chance by 2 % .

entries.name: Bulwark of Y'shaarj
entries.description_text: Increases your block chance by 5 % , plus an additional 10 % while above 40 Insanity .

entries.name: Wavering Hope
entries.description_text: While above 60 Insanity , the cooldown of your Twilight Shieldtoss and Gaze of C'thun is reduced by -25 % .

entries.name: General of Y'shaarj
entries.description_text: Dealing damage with Twilight Shieldtoss now heals you for 10 % of the damage dealt.

entries.name: Malignant Armor
entries.description_text: Increases your attack power by 2 for every 100 armor value you have.

entries.name: Void-Enhanced Shield
entries.description_text: Increases your block value by 20 % . While above 60 Insanity , the value of this effect is doubled.

entries.name: In And Out of Insanity
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of your damage absorption effects by 20 % .

entries.name: Bulwark of Horror
entries.description_text: Avoiding an attack now has a 40 % chance to refresh a charge of Blade of the Empire .

entries.name: Blessing of Y'Shaarj
entries.description_text: Level 50 Passive While transformed into a void monstrosity your damage dealt is now also increased by 20 % .

entries.name: Dreadful
entries.description_text: Increases your critical strike rating equal to your block rating. In addition, critical strikes now reduce the cooldown of Dreadfall and Dreadnought by 1 sec.

entries.name: Shadowy Symbiosis
entries.description_text: Your successful blocks now have a 20 % chance to critically block for twice the normal amount. This effect is doubled while above 60 Insanity .

entries.name: Void Augmentation
entries.description_text: While Dreadnought is active, your Twilight Shieldtoss has a -3 sec reduced cooldown.

entries.name: Embodiment of Y'shaarj
entries.description_text: Increases the amount that Void Shield absorbs by 100 % . Absorbing damage grants you 20 % of the absorbed value as spell power for 8 seconds.

entries.name: Twilight Guardian
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Twilight Shieldtoss now shields you for 50 % of the damage dealt for 8 seconds.

entries.name: Eldritch Force
entries.description_text: Every 5th critical strike with abilities now transforms your next Gaze of C'Thun into Eldritch Force . Eldritch Force Generates 30 Insanity Send out a wave of force, dealing 631 + 76.26% SP + 12.5% AP Shadow damage to enemies in front of you and reducing their movement speed by -30 % for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Strength of the Sha
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Increases your spell damage by 25 % of your Strength and your spell hit rating by 6 % of your Intellect.

entries.name: Deep Secrets
entries.description_text: Level 30 Passive Each point of Insanity now reduces mana costs of your instant cast spells and abilities by 1 % .

entries.name: Void Reaver
entries.description_text: Avoiding or absorbing an attack now has a 20 % chance to make your next Blade of the Empire deal 20 % more damage and hit an additional nearby enemy.

entries.name: Y'Shaarj's Enforcer
entries.description_text: Increases the damage dealt by your Twilight Shieldtoss by 100 % but it to no longer bounces.

entries.name: Tentacle of Y'shaarj
entries.description_text: Summon a Tentacle of Y'shaarj near you for 30 seconds. When summoned and whenever Gaze of C'thun is used, it slams the ground dealing Physical damage, scaling with Stamina, to all enemies in a 10 yd frontal cone.

entries.name: Eldritch Entities
entries.description_text: Critical strikes with abilities now summon a Manifestation of Y'shaarj for 10 seconds, which will attack enemies and heal you for 2 % of your base health.

entries.name: Twilight Incarnate
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Twilight Shieldtoss now generates 3 Insanity .

entries.name: Crushing Dissonance
entries.description_text: Unleash a wave of maddening resonance, interrupting the current spell cast of all enemies around you and preventing any spell in that school from being cast for 2 seconds.

entries.name: Bouncing Thoughts
entries.description_text: Your Twilight Shieldtoss now hits an additional enemy for every 20 Insanity you have.

entries.name: Strength of the Black Empire
entries.description_text: Level 40 Passive Dreadnought now sheds your mortal form, transforming you into a void monstrosity, reducing your damage taken by -10 %

entries.name: Entropic Retaliation
entries.description_text: Blocking an attack now increases your critical strike chance by 2 % for 6 seconds, stacking up to 5 times.

entries.name: Bulwark of Shadow
entries.description_text: While above 80 Insanity , your Void Shield has 30 % increased value.

entries.name: Void Tolerance
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Abyssal Ward by -30 sec.

entries.name: Inner Darkness
entries.description_text: Blocking an attack now generates 3 Insanity .

entries.name: Void Strikes
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Blade of the Empire and Entropic Slam is now increased based on your defense rating.

entries.name: Boon of Y'shaarj
entries.description_text: You now gain an additional 2 mana per point of Intellect.

entries.name: Moonstone Hilt
entries.description_text: Increases your parry chance by 2 % and block value by 15 % .

entries.name: Moon Guard
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive You now gain Intellect equal to your Strength.

entries.name: Will of Elune
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Aspect of the Stars now strikes 2 additional nearby enemies.

entries.name: Asteroid Belt
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Every 15 sec, you now gain Asteroid Belt . In addition, your hit rating is increased by 5 % of your Intellect and your expertise is increased by 8 . Asteroid Belt Block rating, parry rating, and block value increased based on how much mana you had when this was applied for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Crystal Shield
entries.description_text: Level 30 Passive Increases your Stamina by 10 % and increases your spell damage by 25 % of your attack power.

entries.name: Celestial Guard
entries.description_text: Level 40 Passive Increases the effectiveness of consuming Scattered Stars by 50 % .

entries.name: Dance In The Starlight
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Blanket of Stars by -10 sec.

entries.name: Blade of the Moon
entries.description_text: Consuming Scattered Stars now has a 15 % chance to transform Celestial Strike into Moonblade for 8 seconds. Moonblade Devastate an enemy, dealing 130 % Weapon Damage plus 100% Intellect Arcane damage and regenerating 15% missing mana.

entries.name: Celestial Divination
entries.description_text: Increases your chance to dodge by 5 % .

entries.name: Moonflares
entries.description_text: Avoiding melee attacks will call down a Moonflare at the attacker, dealing 66 Arcane damage. Can occur only once per second.

entries.name: Coalesced Resilience
entries.description_text: Reduces your damage taken by an amount equal to 1% of your maximum mana.

entries.name: Starbound
entries.description_text: Increases your healing done and received by 10 % , doubled while below 20% health.

entries.name: Starlight Duelist
entries.description_text: Blocking or parrying an attack now increases your damage dealt by 10 % for 6 seconds.

entries.name: Font of Magic
entries.description_text: Each time you spend a cumulative 100 % of your maximum mana, you heal for 4 % of your maximum health.

entries.name: Cosmic Crown
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Aegis spells by 3 sec.

entries.name: Lunar Knight
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of your Moonblade and Starsweep by 50 % and their chance to critically strike by 20 % .

entries.name: Chosen of the Moon
entries.description_text: Become the chosen of the moon, reducing all Physical damage taken by -60 % and taunting all enemies within 8 yds for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Moonlit Bulwark
entries.description_text: Grants you a shield for an amount equal to your maximum mana for 10 seconds. Usable while stunned.

entries.name: Dancing in the Moonlight
entries.description_text: Level 50 Passive Parrying an attack now regenerates 15 of your Energy and deals 65 % Weapon Damage to the attacker.

entries.name: Starlit Finesse
entries.description_text: Increases your hit and critical strike chance by 3 % .

entries.name: Improved Eclipse of Fury
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of Eclipse of Fury by 40 % .

entries.name: Blanket of Stars
entries.description_text: Cover your shield in a blanket of stars for 8 seconds, increasing your block chance and block value by 100 % .

entries.name: Enchanted Aegis
entries.description_text: Your successful blocks now have a 50 % chance to critically block for twice the normal amount.

entries.name: Starsweep
entries.description_text: Consumes Scattered Stars Sweep an enemy and all nearby enemies with your astral blade, dealing 30 + 30% AP + 35% SP Arcane damage. Every Scattered Star consumed reduces the cooldown of this spell by -3 sec. Consume Scattered Stars Deals 7 + 18.22% SP Arcane Damage and restores 8 % maximum mana for each Scattered Star .

entries.name: Enduring Moon
entries.description_text: Critical strikes now increase the target's spell damage taken by 10 % for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Starburst
entries.description_text: Applies 1 Scattered Star Per Hit Smash up to 8 enemies, dealing 2 + 30% arcane SP + 15% AP Arcane damage, scaling with block value and maximum mana and reducing their attack speed by -20 % for 10 seconds. Consuming a Scattered Star reduces the remaining cooldown of Starburst by -2 sec.

entries.name: Shrouded Stars
entries.description_text: Reduces damage taken by all party and raid members by -3 % . Does not stack with similar effects.

entries.name: Moonveil Screen
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Starsunder and Moonflare by 20 % .

entries.name: Starcovered Night
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Blanket of Stars by 4 sec.

entries.name: Pulsar Explosion
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Celestial Cleave by 10 % and allows it to affect 1 additional enemies.

entries.name: Tyrande's Guidance
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of your Starburst by 10 % .

entries.name: Starburst Invigoration
entries.description_text: Increases your Energy regeneration by 15 % .

entries.name: Nebula
entries.description_text: Blocking enemy attacks now applies Scattered Stars to the attacker.

entries.name: Astral Reconstitution
entries.description_text: Surround yourself with lunar light, causing 30 % of damage taken to be converted into mana for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Mooncharged Blades
entries.description_text: Blocking an attack allows your next Starsunder to hit an additional nearby enemy and cost -30 % less mana.

entries.name: Vengeful Inspiration
entries.description_text: Increases your attack speed by 10 % and causes critical strikes with melee attacks to apply a Scattered Star .

entries.name: Blessed By The Stars
entries.description_text: Your ranged damage dealt now has a 15 % chance to unleash a Scattered Star .

entries.name: Rapid Cycle
entries.description_text: Lunar Phase now increases your ranged haste by 4 % per stack.

entries.name: Lunar Resplendence
entries.description_text: Increases your healing done to allies below 20% health by 30 % .

entries.name: Enchanted Water
entries.description_text: Increases the healing of Touch of Moonlight by 10 % and reduces spell pushback suffered from damaging attacks by 35 % .

entries.name: Lunar Cascade
entries.description_text: Critical strikes with Moonflow and Prayer of Elune now apply Eclipsing Arrows to the target for 20 seconds. Casting Huntress Shot heals marked allies for 235 + 30% SP .

entries.name: Full Cycle
entries.description_text: Hand of Elune gains the following Full Moon and New Moon effects. Full Moon: Healing increased by 10 % . New Moon: Cost reduced by -10 % .

entries.name: Tear Drops
entries.description_text: Healing through Aspect of the Goddess now increases the target's healing taken from you by 1 % for 10 sec, stacking up to 10 times.

entries.name: Lunar Phasing
entries.description_text: Cosmic Shift now dispels all harmful effects from the target.

entries.name: Healing Prayers
entries.description_text: Prayer of Elune gains an additional 20 % of your bonus healing effects.

entries.name: Lunar Revelation
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of Moonflow by 10 % .

entries.name: Rampaging Waters
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Scattered Stars now increases your healing by 1 % and critical strike chance by 1 % for 10 seconds, stacking 10 times.

entries.name: Lunar Swiftness
entries.description_text: Moon Arrow now reduces the cast time of the next Hand of Elune within 8 seconds by -20 % , stacking 5 times.

entries.name: Elune's Grace
entries.description_text: Critical heals with Hand of Elune now increase the target's armor by 10 % for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Moonwell Acuity
entries.description_text: Level 30 Passive The Lunar Eclipse effect of Moonwell Splash now causes it to affect 3 targets.

entries.name: Flow of Waters
entries.description_text: Increases critical strike chance of all party and raid members by 3 % . Does not stack with similar effects. In addition, increases your critical strike chance by 3 % .

entries.name: Lunar Prophecy
entries.description_text: Casting Moon Arrow now reduces the cooldown of Prayer of Elune by -3 sec.

entries.name: Stellar Convergence
entries.description_text: Applies Eclipsing Arrows to all party and raid members within 40 yds.

entries.name: Mending Surge
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Stellar Convergence by -30 sec.

entries.name: Prayer of Elune
entries.description_text: Say a prayer to Elune, healing up to 12 allies within 40 yds for 77 + 27.57% healing , and dispel 1 harmful magic effect from them.

entries.name: Teachings of Elune
entries.description_text: Increases the healing of Hand of Elune and Moonflow by 10 % .

entries.name: Goddess Watch Over
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of Aspect of the Goddess by 25 % .

entries.name: Final Prayer
entries.description_text: Your Prayer of Elune now dispels 1 additional effect.

entries.name: Celestial Form
entries.description_text: Ascend into a celestial form for 15 seconds, increasing your critical strike chance by 10 % . While active, critical strikes now reduce the remaining cooldown of all healing spells by 10% and apply a Scattered Star to your target and up to 4 enemies within 5 yds of them.

entries.name: Elune's Favor
entries.description_text: Hand of Elune and Touch of Moonlight now heal for an additional 50 % of their value over 10 seconds.

entries.name: Moon Priest
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive Your Huntress Shot now has a Lunar Eclipse effect. Huntress Shot : Applies 2 additional Scattered Stars .

entries.name: Moonlit Slumber
entries.description_text: Put an enemy to sleep for 30 seconds ( 6 sec vs players). Damage dealt will end the effect. While sleeping, you drain 98 mana from them every 3 sec.

entries.name: Aspect of the Goddess
entries.description_text: While active, your healing done is increased by 10 % and your spells and abilities will not be able to miss. In addition, consuming Scattered Stars now heals up to 5 allies around the target for 73 + 14.97% healing .

entries.name: Cosmic Shift
entries.description_text: Shift the target ally out of the physical plane, granting improved stealth for 10 seconds. Does not break on damage taken.

entries.name: Rippling Moonwater
entries.description_text: Your healing effects now apply Moonwater to the target, stacking 5 times. Moonwater Dealing damage will consume a stack to heal you.

entries.name: Lunar Blessing
entries.description_text: Increases your healing done by 3 % , plus an additional 3 % on Poisoned or Diseased targets.

entries.name: Elune's Blessing
entries.description_text: Level 50 Passive Your Hand of Elune now gains an additional 30 % of your bonus healing.

entries.name: Moon Gazing
entries.description_text: Level 40 Passive Your critical strikes now generate a stack of Lunar Phase . Can only occur once per sec.

entries.name: Eclipsing Arrows
entries.description_text: Healing done by Hand of Elune or Touch of Moonlight now marks allies for 20 seconds. Casting Huntress Shot now heals marked allies for 235 + 30% SP .

entries.name: Cycle of the Moon
entries.description_text: Every 10 seconds, you cycle between Full Moon and New Moon . Full Moon Increases your critical strike chance by 5 % . New Moon Damage dealt has a 25 % chance to apply Scattered Stars .

entries.name: Phase Guider
entries.description_text: Increases the bonus healing scaling of Moonwell Splash and the healing done through Aspect of the Goddess by 20 % .

entries.name: Last Prayer
entries.description_text: Casting Stellar Convergence now resets the cooldown of Prayer of Elune .

entries.name: Enchanted Stream
entries.description_text: Increases the critical healing of Hand of Elune and Moonflow by 15 % .

entries.name: Celestial Mind
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive You now passively gain 1 stack of Lunar Phase 1 sec faster.

entries.name: Moonflow
entries.description_text: Send forth moonwell waters to all nearby allies, healing them for 49 + 22.86% healing . Lunar Eclipse : Triggers with no cooldown and consumes Scattered Stars from enemies you are in combat with within 40 yds. Consume Scattered Stars Deals 7 + 18.22% SP Arcane Damage and restores 8 % maximum mana for each Scattered Star .

entries.name: Cosmic Strides
entries.description_text: Aspect of the Cosmos no longer slows enemy movement speed. Instead, your melee and ranged attacks now grant you 5 % increased movement speed for 4 seconds, stacking 3 times.

entries.name: Eye of Elune
entries.description_text: Increases your critical strike chance by 5 % .

entries.name: Hunter's Sight
entries.description_text: Aspect of the Huntress now increases your chance to hit by 3 % .

entries.name: Celestial Shot
entries.description_text: Level 40 Passive Increases the effectiveness of consuming Scattered Stars by 40 % .

entries.name: On The Hunt
entries.description_text: Starfire Shot now increases the damage the enemy takes from your Huntress Shot by 10 % for 8 seconds, stacking 2 times.

entries.name: Starfire Power
entries.description_text: Casting Starfire Shot now has a 20 % chance to grant you Drawstring of Elune for 5 sec. Drawstring of Elune (SLS) Huntress Shot and Starcall apply an additional stack of Scattered Stars and your ranged ability attack range is increased to 50 yds.

entries.name: Astral Lancer
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Increases the critical damage of Lunar Lance by 50 % .

entries.name: Lo'sho Amplification
entries.description_text: Level 50 Passive Scattered Stars now burn enemy mana equal to 10 % of the damage dealt.

entries.name: Tyrande's Training
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance and critical damage of Starfire Shot by 10 % against Burning targets.

entries.name: Tyrande's Vigilance
entries.description_text: Reduces the cast time of Starfire Shot by -0.5 sec.

entries.name: Ishnu-alah
entries.description_text: Moon Arrow restores an additional 4 % of your maximum mana.

entries.name: Lunar Splinters
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of consuming Scattered Stars by 10 % .

entries.name: Exemplary Draw
entries.description_text: Moon Arrow deals 20 % more damage and increases the target's spell damage taken by 10 % for 12 seconds.

entries.name: Starfire Shot
entries.description_text: Consumes Scattered Stars Fire an enchanted arrow, dealing 100 % Ranged Weapon Damage plus 62+66+POWER1*0.01 Arcane damage, scaling further based on your maximum mana. Consume Scattered Stars Deals 7 + 18.22% SP Arcane Damage and restores 8 % maximum mana for each Scattered Star .

entries.name: Sentinel's Focus
entries.description_text: Starfire Shot now has a 20 % chance to fire a free Huntress Shot at the target.

entries.name: Night Hunter
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Huntress Saber by -60 sec.

entries.name: Moonmancer
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Starcall by -50 % .

entries.name: Lunar Amplification
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Trueshot by 25 % .

entries.name: Starcall
entries.description_text: Blast the target enemy and all enemies near them with lunar fire that deals 70 + 33% arcane SP Arcane damage, applying Scattered Stars . Consuming a Scattered Star reduces the remaining cooldown by -1.5 sec. Scattered Stars Can be consumed by spells to deal additional Arcane Damage. Lasts 30 seconds, stacking 4 times.

entries.name: Arrows In The Night
entries.description_text: Your Huntress Shots now strike 3 additional enemies and explode with astral energy for 10 seconds, dealing 30 + 8.14% arcane SP + 3% ranged AP Arcane damage. Damage dealt by Starcall reduces the cooldown of this ability by -2 sec.

entries.name: Arrow of the Goddess
entries.description_text: Fire a star-infused arrow hitting enemies in a line, dealing 400 % Ranged Weapon Damage plus POWER1*0.25 Arcane damage, scaling with maximum mana and applying Scattered Stars to them. Scattered Stars Can be consumed by spells to deal additional Arcane Damage. Lasts 30 seconds, stacking 4 times.

entries.name: Huntress of Elune
entries.description_text: Increases your damage dealt by 5 % on enemies further than 30 yds.

entries.name: Shattered Stars
entries.description_text: Increases the range of Starshatter by 10 yds.

entries.name: Enduring Hunt
entries.description_text: Reduces the mana cost of Huntress Shot and Trueshot by -15 % .

entries.name: Drawstring of Elune
entries.description_text: Huntress Shot and Starcall apply an additional stack of Scattered Stars and your ranged ability attack range is increased to 50 yds for 20 seconds.

entries.name: Cascade
entries.description_text: Every 8th Scattered Star you consume increases the damage of your next Starcall by 50 % .

entries.name: Celestial Prowess
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of Lunar Lance and Starfire Shot by 5 % .

entries.name: Moon Runner
entries.description_text: Increases the movement slowing effect of Aspect of the Cosmos by -5 % per stack.

entries.name: Starcrash
entries.description_text: Increases the damage dealt by consuming Scattered Stars by 10 % .

entries.name: Elune's Blessing
entries.description_text: Increases party and raid member's melee and ranged haste by 10 % . Does not stack with similar effects.

entries.name: Unleashed Wisps
entries.description_text: Dealing damage with Scattered Stars has a 30 % chance to launch a Wisp at your target, dealing 80 + 13.5% arcane SP Arcane damage to nearby enemies.

entries.name: Omnipresent Moon
entries.description_text: Your Lunar Lances now strikes an additional nearby enemy.

entries.name: Star-Guided Arrows
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Scattered Stars now has a 25 % chance to refresh a charge of Trueshot .

entries.name: Explosive Moonlight
entries.description_text: Level 30 Passive Increases your ranged attack power by 30 % of your Intellect and your hit rating by 3 % of your Intellect.

entries.name: Tyrande's Guidance
entries.description_text: Increases the critical damage dealt by Starfire Shot by 20 % .

entries.name: Huntress Training
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive Increases your haste rating by 8% of your Intellect.

entries.name: Aspect of the Cosmos
entries.description_text: Melee and ranged damage dealt has a 40 % chance to slow enemy movement speed by -20 % for 10 seconds, stacking 2 times and apply Scattered Stars . Scattered Stars Can be consumed by spells to deal additional Arcane Damage. Lasts 30 seconds, stacking 4 times.

entries.name: Bright Moon
entries.description_text: Allows Lunar Phase to stack 4 additional times.

entries.name: Mu'sha's Resilience
entries.description_text: Reduces Arcane damage taken by -15 % .

entries.name: Protected by the Stars
entries.description_text: Increases your Armor by 300 % of your Intellect and reduces the duration of stuns and disarms against you by -25 % .

entries.name: Star Citizen
entries.description_text: Increases effectiveness of Celestial Mind by 20 % .

entries.name: Galaxy
entries.description_text: Your Scattered Stars can now stack 2 additional times.

entries.name: The Stars Align
entries.description_text: Increases your maximum mana by 10 % .

entries.name: Enchanted Well
entries.description_text: Reduces the cast time of Moonwell Splash by -0.3 sec.

entries.name: Moonwell Tides
entries.description_text: Casting Vial of Moonwell Water now additionally heals you equal to 25% of your current mana.

entries.name: Shooting Star
entries.description_text: Sprint forward with astral magic at your feet, increasing your movement speed by 60 % for 4 seconds. While active, you cannot be slowed and cannot stop moving.

entries.name: Cosmic Duality
entries.description_text: Dealing damage grants you Cosmic Harmony , increasing the healing of your next ability within 6 seconds by 5 % . Effective healing grants you Cosmic Wrath , increasing the damage of your next ability within 6 seconds by 5 % .

entries.name: Moonblessed Aspects
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of Aspects by 15 % .

entries.name: Lunar Anomaly
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Lunar Lance by 50 % .

entries.name: Elune's Presence
entries.description_text: Gain the blessing of a goddess, granting all party or raid members within 40 yds 20 % temporary maximum health for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Guided Blades
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Warden's Blade by -5 sec.

entries.name: Glaive Tossing
entries.description_text: Increases the range of Warden's Blade by 20 yds.

entries.name: Flow of Mana
entries.description_text: Increases your Intellect and Strength by 5 % .

entries.name: Star-Charged
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of your Aspects by -5 sec.

entries.name: Universal Power
entries.description_text: Your Aspect of the Cosmos now stacks 1 additional time.

entries.name: Moonlight Ripple
entries.description_text: Reduces the mana cost of your Aegis spells by -10 % .

entries.name: Moonwalk
entries.description_text: Increases your movement speed by 20 % at night.

entries.name: Nightborne Armaments
entries.description_text: While below 35% health, your damage taken is reduced by -10 % .

entries.name: Twinkle Toes
entries.description_text: Increases the movement speed granted by Shooting Star by 20 % .

entries.name: Constellation Barrier
entries.description_text: Reduces all Magic damage taken by -5 % .

entries.name: Pouch of Stardust
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance and critical damage of consumed Scattered Stars by 10 % .

entries.name: Moonlit Lancer
entries.description_text: Your Lunar Lance now deals additional Arcane damage over 20 sec.

entries.name: Starbarian
entries.description_text: Increases your haste by 4 % .

entries.name: Astral Aegis
entries.description_text: Drains 30 % Maximum Mana For 10 seconds, direct Magic damage taken will silence the attacker for 1 seconds and deal 57 + 18% arcane SP Arcane damage to them.

entries.name: Vial of Moonwell Water
entries.description_text: Drink from your enchanted moonwell vial, instantly removing all crowd control effects and making you immune to them for 3 seconds. Usable while stunned, feared, or polymorphed.

entries.name: Moonwell
entries.description_text: Creates a zone blessed by moonwell waters for 15 seconds at the target location. All allied players standing within the well receive 25 % more healing, and their mana regeneration is increased by 100 % .

entries.name: Second Moon
entries.description_text: Every 10th Scattered Star consumed now launches a comet at an enemy dealing 304 + 30% arcane SP Arcane damage to 5 enemies within 5 yds.

entries.name: Continual Starfall
entries.description_text: Astral Flares called down by Aspect of the Stars now increase your haste by 3 % for 5 seconds, stacking 3 times.

entries.name: Infused Aegis
entries.description_text: Drains 30 % Maximum Mana Instantly counterattack any enemy that strikes you from the front in melee for Arcane damage, lasting 10 seconds. Can only occur once per sec per enemy.

entries.name: Way of the Goddess
entries.description_text: Reduces the duration of harmful magic effects on you by -25 % .

entries.name: Reverse Magic
entries.description_text: Reverse the next spell cast on you within 3 seconds, reflecting it back to its caster. Reversing a spell in this way drains 600 + 20% SP of the attacker's mana.

entries.name: Starshatter
entries.description_text: Call down the power of the stars, sending forth Elune’s astral light in a line outward from you, stunning enemies struck for 5 seconds and applying a Scattered Star .

entries.name: Astral Projection
entries.description_text: Reduces the Energy cost of Celestial Strike and Moon Arrow by -10 .

entries.name: Touch of Moonlight
entries.description_text: Drains 10 % Maximum Mana Quickly heal an ally with Elune's touch, scaling with maximum mana.

entries.name: Moonstone
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Lunar Lance by 20 % .

entries.name: Moonlit Impaler
entries.description_text: Increases your Arcane damage by 5 % and your hit chance by 2 % .

entries.name: Stellar Amplification
entries.description_text: Dealing damage with Scattered Stars now has a 15 % chance to make your next Astral Blade free of cost.

entries.name: Astral Finesse
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Astral Blade by -4 sec.

entries.name: Vigil of the Watchers
entries.description_text: Increases critical strike chance of all party and raid members by 3 % . Does not stack with similar effects.

entries.name: Rally The Sentinels
entries.description_text: Sentinel Glaive now restores 20 % of your maximum mana and applies a Scattered Star to the enemy.

entries.name: Wrath of Elune
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Sentinel Glaive by -5 sec.

entries.name: Maiev's Guard
entries.description_text: Critical strikes with Astral Blade now strike 2 additional times, one for 40 % of the damage dealt and the other for 20 % of the damage dealt.

entries.name: Star Pupil
entries.description_text: Your damaging critical strikes now grant you a stack of Star Pupil . Star Pupil Reduces the cast time of Moonwell Splash by -25 % for 8 seconds, stacking 4 times. While this is active, Moonwell Splash is castable while moving.

entries.name: Bonds of Justice
entries.description_text: Send forth bonds of justice to an enemy, tethering them to you for 8 seconds. If the tether is broken through expiration or the target runs at least 10 yds from you, they are gripped back towards you, taking 441 + 120% arcane SP Arcane damage.

entries.name: Pulverizing Blade
entries.description_text: Casting Warden's Blade now grants you Pulverizing Blade . Pulverizing Blade Next 5 Starsunders within 20 seconds deal increasing damage, scaling with 10% of Intellect, with each subsequent use, stacking 5 times.

entries.name: Shadowsong's Mandate
entries.description_text: Increases your critical strike chance by 15 % for 10 seconds. While active, your damaging critical strikes have a 40 % chance to trigger Warden's Blade .

entries.name: Infused Blades
entries.description_text: Your Astral Blade now has a 30 % chance to reset its own cooldown and refund its maximum mana cost.

entries.name: Celestial Glaives
entries.description_text: Level 30 Passive Your Scattered Stars can now stack 2 additional times.

entries.name: Astral Blade
entries.description_text: Drains 25 % Maximum Mana Strike an enemy with precision, dealing 16 + 100% SP + 20% AP Arcane damage, increased further based on your maximum mana. Increases your dealt to the enemy by 15 % for 5 seconds.

entries.name: Sentinel Glaive
entries.description_text: Throw a sentinel glaive at an enemy, dealing Weapon Damage plus 53 as Arcane damage, increased further based on your maximum mana, and increasing their resource costs by 15 % for 8 seconds.

entries.name: Fan of Knives
entries.description_text: Applies 1 Scattered Star Per Hit Unleash hidden blades upon nearby enemies, dealing 10 + 30% SP Arcane damage scaling with maximum mana. Consuming a Scattered Star reduces the remaining cooldown of Fan of Knives by -2 sec. Scattered Stars Can be consumed by spells to deal additional Arcane Damage. Lasts 30 seconds, stacking 4 times.

entries.name: Warden Training
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Warden's Blade by -25 % .

entries.name: Scattering Blades
entries.description_text: Your Warden's Blade now increases the chance to trigger Aspect of the Warden by 10 % for 8 seconds.

entries.name: Astral Combatant
entries.description_text: Lunar Lance and Umbral Blade increase the enemy damage taken from Scattered Stars by 10 % for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Celestial Surge
entries.description_text: Increases the damage dealt by consuming Scattered Stars by 10 % .

entries.name: Spirit of Vengeance
entries.description_text: Fan of Knives now marks enemies with Vengeance for 10 seconds. Successfully marking an enemy increases the range of your next Astral Blade by 25 yards. Casting Astral Blade on a marked enemy causes it to deal 30 % more damage.

entries.name: Fury of the Stars
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Astral Blade by 10 % .

entries.name: Lethal Pursuit
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Fan of Knives by -5 sec.

entries.name: Warden's Precision
entries.description_text: Your Warden's Blade now launches an additional 2 blades at the target, dealing 49 + 24.5% SP Spellstrike Damage.

entries.name: Highest Order
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Shadowsong's Mandate by -25 % and increases the chance to trigger Warden's Blade by 60 % .

entries.name: Aspect Mastery
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of your Aspects by 10 % and their chance to trigger by 5 % .

entries.name: Pierce The Night
entries.description_text: Your Fan of Knives now applies an additional stack of Scattered Stars to each enemy struck.

entries.name: Moontouched Weapons
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Aspect of the Warden by POWER1*0.01 , scaling with maximum mana.

entries.name: Wrath of the Moon
entries.description_text: Increases your Arcane critical damage dealt by 20 % .

entries.name: Lunar Charge
entries.description_text: After using Shooting Star , your next Celestial Strike , Starsunder or auto attack ends the effect to deal 87 + 28.75% arcane SP + 4.65% AP Arcane damage, increased based on distance travelled.

entries.name: Umbral Blade
entries.description_text: Consumes Scattered Stars Slash an enemy, dealing 97 + 63.5% arcane SP + 20% AP Arcane damage to them and nearby enemies. Each additional enemy beyond the first takes 20 % less damage.

entries.name: Warrior of Elune
entries.description_text: Increases your melee haste by 5 % and movement speed by 10 % . Movement speed granted by this talent stacks with Moonwalk .

entries.name: Avatar of Vengeance
entries.description_text: Transform into an Avatar of Vengeance , teleporting to your target and increasing your Intellect by 25 % for 30 seconds. For the duration, the range of Astral Blade is increased by 30 yards and will teleport you to your target. If your target is an enemy, you strike them dealing 50 + 22% Intellect + 6.5% arcane SP Arcane damage per 1 sec for 8 seconds, scaling with Intellect.

entries.name: Warden Training
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive Critically striking with Starsunder now applies an additional stack of Scattered Stars . Scattered Stars Can be consumed by spells to deal additional Arcane Damage. Lasts 30 seconds, stacking 4 times.

entries.name: Astral Blessing
entries.description_text: Level 50 Passive Damaging critical strikes now reduce the cooldown of Warden's Blade by -1 sec.

entries.name: Lunar Combatant
entries.description_text: Level 40 Passive Increases the effectiveness of consuming Scattered Stars by 50 % .

entries.name: Astral Onslaught
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Astral Blade by 7 sec.

entries.name: Halt
entries.description_text: Teleport to a target location, silencing all enemies around you for 4 seconds.

entries.name: Maiev's Discipline
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Increases your critical strike rating by 12 % of your Intellect and your expertise by 10 % of your Intellect.

entries.name: A Pious Life
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Horusath Blast and Rapture by 15 % .

entries.name: Flames of the Father
entries.description_text: Your Fire damage dealt is increased by 10 % against Burning targets.

entries.name: Day Cycles
entries.description_text: Level 50 Passive While in Sunrise , the remaining cooldown of Horusath Blast is reduced by 10 % every 1 sec. While in Sunset , the remaining cooldown of Rapture is reduced by 10 % every 1 sec.

entries.name: Lights of Absolution
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Horusath Blast now grants you Light of Absolution for 10 seconds. Lights of Absolution Damage dealt by Solar Flares now restores 2 % missing health, Energy, Focus, Runic Power, and Rage to allies within 40 yds. Can only occur once every 0.5 sec.

entries.name: Dawnsear
entries.description_text: Blast an enemy with burning light, dealing 88 + 100% fire SP Fire damage.

entries.name: Solar Concord
entries.description_text: Resets the cooldown of Horusath Blast while in Sunrise and Rapture while in Sunset and causes their damage dealt to launch a Solar Flare . Lasts 15 seconds. Solar Flare (Damage) Deals 137 + 26% SP Holyflame Damage and reduces the target's chance to hit by -3 % for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Spears of Glory
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Radiant Flame now has an 15 % chance to grant you Spears of Glory . Spears of Glory Your next Dawnsear within 10 seconds is instant cast and deals 25 % increased damage.

entries.name: Holy Fervor
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of Sunrise and Sunset by 20 % .

entries.name: Adjudication
entries.description_text: Casting Rapture now causes your next Dawnsear within 10 seconds to strike your target twice and launch a Solar Flare at the target. Solar Flare (Damage) Deals 137 + 26% SP Holyflame Damage and reduces the target's chance to hit by -3 % for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Sunwell
entries.description_text: Become an embodiment of the sun for 30 seconds that periodically dispels fear, sleep, and charm effects every 3 sec from allies within 40 yds.

entries.name: Sun Gate
entries.description_text: Shift 25 yds forward at light speed, removing all root effects. This leaves behind a Sun Gate for 15 seconds that allies can interact with to blink themselves the same distance forward. Allies can only use Sun Gate every 90 seconds.

entries.name: Radiant Flame
entries.description_text: Launch radiant spheres at an enemy each dealing 31 + 20.69% SP Holyflame Damage, repeating every 1 sec for 4 seconds.

entries.name: Radiant Fury
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Radiant Flame is now increased by 10 % on enemies below 35% health.

entries.name: Moment of Triumph
entries.description_text: Horusath Blast or Rapture now have a 20 % chance to not incur a cooldown on cast.

entries.name: Learning Light
entries.description_text: Entering Sunset or Sunrise increases your spell haste by 20 % . Lasts for 10 seconds or 3 casts.

entries.name: Soul of Light
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of An'she's Blessing by -60 sec.

entries.name: Scorch Marks
entries.description_text: Casting Dawnsear and Sunflare now have a 40 % chance to grant Scorch Marks for 10 seconds. Scorch Marks Your next Radiant Flame has no mana cost, ticks -50 % faster, and its duration is reduced by -50 % .

entries.name: Harsh Lessons
entries.description_text: Casting Dawn now grants Scorch Marks . Scorch Marks Your next Radiant Flame has no mana cost, ticks -50 % faster, and its duration is reduced by -50 % .

entries.name: Solar Champion
entries.description_text: Increases the range of your Piety spells by 20 % and reduces the threat generated by them by -20 % .

entries.name: Sunburn
entries.description_text: Reduces the cast time of Rapture by -0.5 sec.

entries.name: Grace
entries.description_text: Increases the spell damage bonus of Dawnsear by 20 % and Sunflare by 10 % .

entries.name: Flames of Absolution
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Horusath Blast now launches a Solar Flare at up to 5 enemies within 5 yds of your target. Solar Flare (Damage) Deals 137 + 26% SP Holyflame Damage and reduces the target's chance to hit by -3 % for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Burning Cascade
entries.description_text: Reduces the cast time and mana cost of Dawnsear and Sunflare by -10 % .

entries.name: Sun's Hope
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Solar Flares now grants you 1 Solar Power and increase the targets chance to be critically struck by spells by 3 % for 8 seconds. Solar Flare (Damage) Deals 137 + 26% SP Holyflame Damage and reduces the target's chance to hit by -3 % for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Solar Conduit
entries.description_text: Reduces the cast time of Dawnsear by -20 % while Dawn is active.

entries.name: Purgation
entries.description_text: Dealing damage with Radiant Flame now increases the target's Holy and Fire damage taken from you by 1 % for 8 seconds, stacking 8 times.

entries.name: The Coming Dawn
entries.description_text: While Dawn is active, damage dealt by Radiant Flame now reduces the cooldown of Dawnfall and Solar Concord by -1 sec.

entries.name: Fire from the Heavens
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Damage dealt by Radiant Flame now has a 10 % chance to launch a Solar Flare at your target. Solar Flare (Damage) Deals 137 + 26% SP Holyflame Damage and reduces the target's chance to hit by -3 % for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Photosynthetic
entries.description_text: Increases your spell haste by 3 % , plus an additional 1 % during the day.

entries.name: Rapture
entries.description_text: Call down a streak of sun light to smite your target, dealing 111 + 200% fire SP Fire damage to them and nearby enemies, piercing all immunities, but dealing less damage with each enemy struck.

entries.name: Pious
entries.description_text: Level 40 Passive Increases your critical damage dealt by 150 % and your critical strikes grant allies Replenishment . Replenishment Restores 1 % maximum mana every 5 sec to allies within 100 yds for 15 seconds.

entries.name: City of Light
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Radiant Flame now restores 3 % of your missing health and mana.

entries.name: Burn The Heretics
entries.description_text: Increases your damage and healing by 10 % against targets below 35% health. Additionally, when Scorch Marks are consumed you now gain 10 % increased Magic damage for 8 seconds.

entries.name: Struck by the Sun
entries.description_text: Level 30 Passive Increases your Holy and Fire spell damage by 30 % and your spell hit rating by 6 % of your Intellect.

entries.name: Wrath of God
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of Sunflare and Dawnsear by 3 % and reduces spell pushback suffered from damaging attacks by 50 % .

entries.name: Sunlight
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive Fulfilling your Vow now unleashes Sunlight restoring 25 + 15% healing health to up to 5 allies within 40 yds, prioritizing the lowest health allies.

entries.name: Blightbreaker
entries.description_text: Increases the tick rate of Mercy by -50 % , but increases its mana cost by 100 % .

entries.name: Touch of Light
entries.description_text: Enemies struck by Blessing of Absolution now deal -20 % reduced damage for 5 seconds.

entries.name: Stalwart
entries.description_text: Melee critical strikes against you prevent you from being critically struck again for 4 seconds.

entries.name: Holy Form
entries.description_text: Ascend into a holy form, increasing your healing done by 10 % , increasing your Holy critical strike chance by 5 % , and reducing your threat generated by -50 % .

entries.name: Sun Worship
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Increases your healing power by 15 % of your Intellect and your spell haste rating by 25 % of your Intellect.

entries.name: Heaven’s Appraisal
entries.description_text: Level 40 Passive Increases the effectiveness of your Fulfillment effects by 25 % . In addition, the Fulfillment effect granted by Vow of Dawn now triples the amount of targets struck.

entries.name: Blazing Chariot
entries.description_text: Increases the healing and damage of Radiance by 125 % .

entries.name: Gateway to Heaven
entries.description_text: Whenever you use Dawn you now apply Radiance to yourself for 6 sec. Radiance Every 2 sec you burst with light, healing nearby allies for 36 + 20% SP + 10% AP and damaging nearby enemies for 37 + 40% SP + 15% AP . Lasts 10 seconds.

entries.name: The Redeemer
entries.description_text: Level 50 Passive When you critically heal your target, they will be healed for 30% of the amount originally healed the next time they take damage. Lasts 15 seconds.

entries.name: Blessing of Purity
entries.description_text: Protect a Blessed ally, making them immune to all damage for 4 seconds but reducing their damage and healing done by -25 % .

entries.name: Sanctified
entries.description_text: Healing a target affected by Bless refunds 25 % of the mana cost of the spell.

entries.name: Blessing of Retribution
entries.description_text: Guard a Blessed ally, deflecting the next harmful spell cast on them within 1 minute.

entries.name: Improved Radiant Cascade
entries.description_text: Increases the healing done and reduces the mana cost of Radiant Cascade by -15 % .

entries.name: Pure Heart
entries.description_text: Removes the damage penalty provided by Blessing of Purity .

entries.name: Sun Strength
entries.description_text: Radiant Cascade is now guaranteed to critically strike on allies affected by Bless .

entries.name: Divine Vision
entries.description_text: Increases your Holy damage and healing done by 4 % .

entries.name: Glaring Rays
entries.description_text: Increases the spell haste of all party and raid members by 3 % and your spell haste by an additional 3 % . Does not stack with similar effects.

entries.name: Heat Wave
entries.description_text: Healing with Illumination and Shine now additionally heals the target's nearby allies for 10 % of the value.

entries.name: An'she's Guidance
entries.description_text: Increases your Holy critical strike chance by 2 % and reduces spell pushback suffered from damaging attacks by 50 % .

entries.name: Blessing of Triumph
entries.description_text: Redeem a Blessed ally for 20 seconds, granting 25 % increased haste and 10 % increased damage. If the ally falls below 35% maximum health they are healed for 10 % of their direct damage dealt for the remaining duration.

entries.name: Hope
entries.description_text: Your critical heals now reduce the cooldown of Solar Invocation spells by -1 sec. Can occur only once per sec.

entries.name: Savior
entries.description_text: Increases your healing on targets below 20% health by 30 % .

entries.name: Blessing of Absolution
entries.description_text: Empower a Blessed ally to unleash a burst of holy energy in front of them, dealing 32 + 150% healing Holy damage enemies in a 10 yd frontal cone and generating additional threat.

entries.name: Faith
entries.description_text: Direct healing done now increases the target's Armor by 10 % for 20 seconds.

entries.name: Sunbeams
entries.description_text: Reduces the cast time of Radiant Cascade by -15 % .

entries.name: Empowered Holy Form
entries.description_text: Doubles the effectiveness of your Holy Form .

entries.name: Bless
entries.description_text: Bless an ally, restoring 5 % of their maximum health every 10 sec for 5 minutes. Can only affect 1 ally at a time.

entries.name: Angelic
entries.description_text: Reduces the cast time of Illumination by 0.25 sec.

entries.name: Daybreak
entries.description_text: Make a prayer, healing an ally for 155 + 59.5% healing .

entries.name: Everglow
entries.description_text: Your Radiant Cascade now bounces to 2 additional allies.

entries.name: Lightward
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Blessing of Purity by 2 sec.

entries.name: Solar Priest
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Solar Invigoration by -30 sec. In addition, whenever allies effectively heal with Shine they now cast Illumination . Can only occur once every 6 sec. Illumination (Rank 11 ) Illuminate an ally, healing them for 1373 + 68% healing .

entries.name: Harmonious Bells
entries.description_text: Your Mercy now affects 4 additional allies near the primary target.

entries.name: Gleaming Light
entries.description_text: Increases healing of Illumination and Daybreak by 10 % .

entries.name: Mercy
entries.description_text: Grant mercy to an ally, abolishing 2 disease effects, repeating every 3 sec for 12 seconds.

entries.name: Ancient Rites
entries.description_text: Increases your Intellect by 2 % and causes you to regenerate mana equal to 1 % of your maximum mana every 20 sec.

entries.name: Cultivate Divinity
entries.description_text: Effectively healing with Radiant Cascade has a 20 % chance to increase the healing of your next Illumination by 20 % . Effectively healing with Illumination has a 40 % chance to increase the healing of your next Radiant Cascade by 20 % .

entries.name: Solar Invigoration
entries.description_text: For 15 seconds, your allies take 20 % increased healing and their direct damage dealt now causes them to cast Shine . Can only occur once every 2 sec. Shine (Rank 8 ) Shine holy light upon an ally, healing for 511 + 29.47% SP .

entries.name: Lead Me Not Astray
entries.description_text: Doubles the healing done by Bless .

entries.name: Hot Spot
entries.description_text: Casting Daybreak now causes your next 2 Shines within 10 seconds to have a -25 % reduced cast time.

entries.name: Blessed One
entries.description_text: Increases your chance to block by 5 % and reduces the duration of movement slowing effects by -20 % .

entries.name: Glorious Defender
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of Gavels by 25 % .

entries.name: Dawn's Arrival
entries.description_text: Casting Dawnbreak now has a 40 % chance to reset the cooldown of Gavels and causes the next one to not incur a cooldown.

entries.name: Hope
entries.description_text: When the absorption shield from The Chosen is depleted, it explodes for 80 + 25% AP + 45% holy SP Holy damage, split between enemies within 8 yds.

entries.name: Dawnguard
entries.description_text: Fulfilling a Vow now increases your block chance by 2 % for 15 seconds, stacking 5 times.

entries.name: Shining Shield
entries.description_text: Activating Dawn now grants Shining Shield for 8 seconds. Shining Shield Increases your Armor contribution from your shield by 50 % .

entries.name: Divine Right
entries.description_text: Increases your chance to critically strike and to parry attacks by 2 % and your spell hit chance by 5 % .

entries.name: Valiance
entries.description_text: Increases your melee attack speed by 15 % and your first auto attack on a target hits twice.

entries.name: Luminary Mendicant
entries.description_text: Increases the mana restored by Vow of Grace by 100 % .

entries.name: Blessing of Kings
entries.description_text: Critical strikes now reduce the cooldown of Hammer of Kings and Solar Prayer by -1 .

entries.name: Justicar's Wrath
entries.description_text: Bring holy wrath down upon an enemy, dealing 508 + 55% SP + 25% AP High Threat Holy damage and increasing the target's spell damage taken by 10 % for 15 seconds.

entries.name: The Chosen King
entries.description_text: Casting Hammer of Kings now also increases your critical strike chance by 10 % for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Seraphic Bulwark
entries.description_text: 2 Charges, 25 sec recharge Raise your blessed shield, increasing your block value by 100 % . Lasts for 5 blocks or 10 seconds.

entries.name: Stand Against Darkness
entries.description_text: During the day you now deal -10 % more Holy damage and take -10 % reduced periodic damage.

entries.name: Protector of the Flame
entries.description_text: Avoiding an attack now also deals 648% fire SP + 3% AP Fire damage to the attacker. Can only occur once per sec.

entries.name: Calm
entries.description_text: Calm an enemy, disarming their melee and ranged weapons for 6 seconds. If your target is an Undead or Demon, they are also unable to attack or move for 6 seconds. Enemies that are immune to silence effects cannot be affected by this.

entries.name: Angelic Presence
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive Avoiding an attack now has a 20 % chance to grant you Angelic Presence . Angelic Presence Your next Illumination within 15 seconds is instant cast and free of cost.

entries.name: Sun-Touched Armor
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Increases your Armor by 150 % of your Strength and Intellect and increases your total Stamina by 15 % .

entries.name: Solar Discernment
entries.description_text: Level 40 Passive Increases your critical strike rating and expertise rating by 12 % of your Intellect.

entries.name: Solar Eclipse
entries.description_text: Dawnbreak now unleashes a burst of holy energy after a 1 seconds delay, dealing 22 + 12.5% holy SP + 10% AP Holy damage to nearby enemies.

entries.name: Holy Strength
entries.description_text: Level 30 Passive Increases your spell power by 100 % of your Strength.

entries.name: Sunflare Aegis
entries.description_text: Blocking attacks now has a 30 % chance to grant you Hammer of Kings for 4 sec. If Hammer of Kings is already active, you increase the duration by 4 sec. Hammer of Kings Become anointed by the light, summoning a blessed hammer that encircles you dealing 43 + 12% AP + 22% holy SP Holyfire Damage to nearby enemies every 3 sec for 12 seconds.

entries.name: Clarity of the Heavens
entries.description_text: Level 50 Passive Increases your block value by 50% of your Intellect.

entries.name: Sun Disc
entries.description_text: You now emit an aura that causes all nearby allies to receive 6 % increased healing. Does not stack with similar effects. In addition, the healing done by Illumination is increased by 20 % .

entries.name: Grace
entries.description_text: Increases your chance to dodge by 5 % .

entries.name: Heat Death
entries.description_text: Your Solar Eclipse now reduces the enemies chance to hit by -3 % for 15 sec.

entries.name: Blessed Bulwark
entries.description_text: Avoiding an attack now has a 25 % chance to regenerate 5 % of your base mana.

entries.name: Gleaming Armor
entries.description_text: Reduces your spell damage taken by -5 % , plus an additional -5 % while above 80% health.

entries.name: Solar Nova
entries.description_text: Emit a powerful holy light in an 8 yd radius, dealing 93 + 50% holy SP + 5.06% AP Holy damage to all nearby enemies. Reduces the cooldown of your Solar Invocation spells by -1 sec for each target struck. This ability is guaranteed to critically strike against Undead or Demons.

entries.name: Sun Strider
entries.description_text: Critical strikes with Gavels or Dawnbreak now increases the healing of your next Illumination within 20 seconds by 15 % , stacking up to 3 times. Consuming the stacks increases your critical block chance and movement speed by 10 % for 8 seconds.

entries.name: Adjudicator
entries.description_text: Your Justicar's Wrath now deals an additional 50 % of its damage dealt to the target and enemies around them, healing you for 10% of the damage dealt.

entries.name: Together In Conquest
entries.description_text: Your Solar Invocation spells now causes your Illumination to heal an additional nearby ally at 70% effectiveness for 10 seconds. In addition, Illumination now reduces the cooldown of Solar Invocation spells by -1 sec.

entries.name: Sacred Vessel
entries.description_text: Expending Angelic Presence increases your critical strike chance and healing by 1 % for 20 seconds, stacking up to 10 times. Additional applications do not refresh the duration.

entries.name: Scroll of Hope
entries.description_text: Read from a scroll of hope, reducing Magic damage taken by party and raid members within 15 yds by -30 % for 10 seconds. If any ally falls below 35% of their maximum health while this is active they are instantly healed once for 15 % of their maximum health.

entries.name: Bastion of Hope
entries.description_text: Critical strikes now bless you, regenerating 41 + 15% SP mana and increasing all of your primary stats by 10 % for 5 seconds.

entries.name: Sun Warrior's Guidance
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of Gavels and Dawnbreak by 5 % .

entries.name: Paying The Tithe
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of Dawnbreak by 10 % and your Seraphic Bulwark now lasts for 2 additional blocks.

entries.name: The Chosen
entries.description_text: Your Illumination now shields you for 30 % of the amount healed.

entries.name: Judgement
entries.description_text: Increases the critical damage of Gavels by 15 % and they are now guaranteed to critically strike against Undead enemies.

entries.name: Hammer of Kings
entries.description_text: Become anointed by the light, summoning a blessed hammer that encircles you dealing 43 + 12% AP + 22% holy SP Holyfire Damage to nearby enemies every 3 sec for 12 seconds.

entries.name: Dawnbreak
entries.description_text: Radiate holy light from your shield on enemies in front of you, dealing 23 + 25% SP + 10% AP Holyfire Damage, scaling with your block value.

entries.name: Glare
entries.description_text: Flash powerful light that deals 20 + 27.41% SP Holy damage and stuns enemies within 8 yds for 5 seconds.

entries.name: Suncharged
entries.description_text: Your Judgement Day now applies Suncharged to the target every 1 sec, stacking 10 times. At the end of the duration, or when Judgement Day ends, the enemy takes 487 + 30% AP + 50% holy SP Holy damage, increased for each stack on the target.

entries.name: Gleaming Vigil
entries.description_text: Reduces your Physical damage taken by -5 % , plus an additional 5 % while above 80% health.

entries.name: Devoted to the Light
entries.description_text: Removes the cost of your Solar Invocation spells and they now generate 5 % of your missing mana when cast.

entries.name: Final Vows
entries.description_text: Fulfilling your Vow of Grace now also reduces the cooldown of the triggered ability by 10% .

entries.name: Fortuitous
entries.description_text: Removes the cast time of Glare while above 80% health.

entries.name: Unbreakable Focus
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Gavels and Horusath Blast by -20 % .

entries.name: New Day
entries.description_text: Start anew, reseting the cooldown of Paragon , Chosen of the Light , and Judgement Day .

entries.name: Guiding Glow
entries.description_text: Allows Dawn to affect 3 additional casts.

entries.name: Solar Invocation: Resplendence
entries.description_text: Invoke the grace of An'she for 8 seconds, causing your llluminations to be instant cast and guaranteed to critically strike, but cost 100 % more mana.

entries.name: Zealous
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Radiance by -30 sec, but reduces its duration by -4 sec.

entries.name: Hegemony
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Radiance by 5 sec.

entries.name: Radiance
entries.description_text: Every 2 sec you burst with light, healing nearby allies for 36 + 20% SP + 10% AP and damaging nearby enemies for 37 + 40% SP + 15% AP . Lasts 10 seconds.

entries.name: Horusath Blast
entries.description_text: Blast an enemy with the power of the sun, dealing 73 + 100% holy SP Holy damage and reducing their attack power by 235 for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Angelic Light
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Glare by -30 sec.

entries.name: Solar Might
entries.description_text: Increases your Strength and Intellect by 5 % .

entries.name: Circle of Valor
entries.description_text: Place a 10 yd holy circle at target location for 15 seconds. Allies that stand inside of it will divert 30 % of all damage taken to the caster, and will be healed for 50 + 42.5% SP + 12.5% AP every 2 sec.

entries.name: Blessed Armor
entries.description_text: Increases your spell power by 1 for every 125 Armor you have.

entries.name: Devoted to the Sun
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of your Solar Invocation spells by -5 sec.

entries.name: Sun Stride
entries.description_text: Rush forward at a high speed for 2 seconds.

entries.name: Sun Shield
entries.description_text: Reduces your chance to be hit by spells by -3 % .

entries.name: Solar Invocation: Revelation
entries.description_text: Invoke An'she to root an enemy for 4 seconds with holy shackles or heal an ally for 10 % maximum health and increase their movement speed by 50 % for 4 seconds.

entries.name: Nysoni's Blessing
entries.description_text: Dawn will now provide an additional effect based on your specialization.

entries.name: Enveloped in Light
entries.description_text: Increases your armor contribution from mail and plate items by 10 % and reduces Shadow damage taken by -3 % .

entries.name: Solar Prayer
entries.description_text: Recite a solar prayer, instantly healing you for 25 % of your maximum health plus an additional 100 + 100% SP , scaling with spell power. Usable while stunned.

entries.name: Solar Invocation: Conquest
entries.description_text: Invoke the spirit of An'she to instantly generate 10 Solar Power and refunds 10 % of your maximum mana.

entries.name: Exorcism
entries.description_text: Sanctify now dispels 1 additional effect.

entries.name: Swift Justice
entries.description_text: Increases your haste by 3 % .

entries.name: Censure
entries.description_text: Dealing direct damage to an enemy affected by Chains of Light will now cause it to chain to a nearby enemy. Can only occur once per sec.

entries.name: Taking Vows
entries.description_text: Your Vow of Light now heals for an additional 5 % of damage taken or direct healing done by you.

entries.name: Sintorcher
entries.description_text: Increases your damage and healing done by 3 % and your critical strike chance against Undead by 2 % .

entries.name: Pure Light
entries.description_text: While above 80% health you now deal 10 % increased damage and healing.

entries.name: Solar Guardian
entries.description_text: Reduces the duration of stun effects on you by -20 % .

entries.name: Warmth
entries.description_text: Direct healing now increases the target's health by 300 for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Light The Way
entries.description_text: Healing done by Shine or Illumination now increases the targets movement speed by 20 % for 3 seconds.

entries.name: Devotee
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of your Devotions by 20 % .

entries.name: Twilight
entries.description_text: Applying Vow of the Eclipse now blinds enemies struck, increasing their chance to miss their next attack by -10 % for 6 seconds, stacking 5 times. Does not work on bosses. In addition, increases the effectiveness of the Fulfillment effect of Vow of the Eclipse by 100 % .

entries.name: Valkyrie's Watch
entries.description_text: Damage that would take you below 35% health and damage taken while below 35% health is reduced by 25 % .

entries.name: Holy Conquest
entries.description_text: Reduces the mana cost of Paragon , Chosen of the Light , and Judgement Day by -50 % .

entries.name: Impartial
entries.description_text: Increases your Strength and maximum mana by 5 % and your expertise by 5 .

entries.name: Valkyr's Grip
entries.description_text: Increases your off-hand Weapon Damage dealt by 20 % and reduces the duration of disarm effects by -15 % .

entries.name: Judgement of the Valkyrie
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Judgement Day by -15 sec.

entries.name: Trial of Valor
entries.description_text: Fulfilling a Vow now reduces the cooldown of Horusath Blast by -2 sec.

entries.name: Holy Giant
entries.description_text: Level 50 Passive Doubles the effectiveness of Vow of the Valkyr .

entries.name: Blessed Hammer
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Solar Invocation spells by -10 sec.

entries.name: March of the Valkyr
entries.description_text: Increases the all damage dealt by party and raid members by 3 % . Does not stack with similar effects. In addition, your chance to parry is increased by 5 % .

entries.name: Vow of the Valkyr
entries.description_text: Auto attacks generate 1 Solar Power and deal 10 % increased damage. Fulfillment : Melee ability damage triggers an auto attack with each weapon. Only 1 Vow can be active at a time.

entries.name: Gift of the Sun
entries.description_text: Increases your critical strike chance with Holy spells and abilities by 50 % on enemies above 80% health.

entries.name: Valkyr's Grip
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive Allows you to dual wield and to wield a Two-Handed Mace, Sword, or Polearm in each hand and your chance to hit is increased by 6 % .

entries.name: Radiant Power
entries.description_text: Each stack of Sunwalker now increases the critical strike chance of Shine by 3 % .

entries.name: Arbiter of Light
entries.description_text: While Vow of Light is active, your Gavel of Light now restores an additional 100 % health equal to the damage dealt.

entries.name: Leap of the Valkyrie
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Sun Stride by -4 sec.

entries.name: Champion's Arrival
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Champion of the Sun and Chains of Light by 5 sec.

entries.name: Light of the Sun
entries.description_text: Parrying an attack now restores 3 % of your maximum health and increases your chance to parry the next attack by 30 % .

entries.name: Valorous Champion
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Increases your attack power by 25 % and your spell hit rating by 5 % of your Strength.

entries.name: It's Always Sunny
entries.description_text: Activating Dawn now reduces the cooldowns of Radiance , Valkyr's Calling , and Sunslam by 10 % .

entries.name: Last Call
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Valkyr's Calling by 1 sec.

entries.name: Arbiter of Grace
entries.description_text: While Vow of Grace is active, your Glorious Execution now regenerates an additional 15 % mana equal to the damage dealt.

entries.name: Sunwalker
entries.description_text: Dealing melee damage now generates a stack of Sunwalker . Sunwalker Reduces the cast time and mana cost of your next Shine by -20 % for 30 seconds, stacking 5 times.

entries.name: Odyn's Vanguard
entries.description_text: Melee attacks now have a 20 % chance to reset the cooldown of Glorious Execution .

entries.name: By The Light
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of Valkyr's Calling by 50 % .

entries.name: Justice
entries.description_text: Spin and strike with both weapons dealing 40 % Weapon Damage plus 6 + 20% fire SP to up to 5 enemies within 5 yds. Your main-hand strike will deal Fire damage and your off-hand strike will deal Physical damage.

entries.name: Radiant Halberd
entries.description_text: Direct Physical damage dealt now reduces the cooldown of Champion of the Sun by -1 sec.

entries.name: Light's Blessing
entries.description_text: Casting Sunslam now reduces the cooldown of Pendant of the Sun by -10 sec.

entries.name: Divine Retribution
entries.description_text: Accumulates 25% of your damage dealt to on the target and unleashes it after 8 seconds, damaging enemies within 10 yds as Holy damage.

entries.name: Fervor of the Sun
entries.description_text: Fulfilling a Vow now increases the damage of your Sunslam by 10 % for 1 minute, stacking 5 times.

entries.name: Pendant of the Sun
entries.description_text: Activate your pendant of the sun, refreshing the duration and all charges of Dawn .

entries.name: Atone, Or Else
entries.description_text: Fervor of the Sun now stacks up to 3 additional times.

entries.name: Sunsworn
entries.description_text: Increases your Physical damage dealt by 6 % and auto attacks now have a 10 % chance to restore 3 % of your maximum mana.

entries.name: Sunslam
entries.description_text: Slam an enemy every 1 sec with the might of the sun, dealing 28 + 15.94% AP Holy damage and stunning them for 1 seconds. Lasts 3 seconds. Only usable while Dawn is active. Usable while moving.

entries.name: Vindicator
entries.description_text: Your Glorious Execution now ignores -10 % of the target's armor while Vow of the Valkyr is active.

entries.name: Knight of Dawn
entries.description_text: Your Glorious Execution now has a 20 % chance to strike 1 additional time.

entries.name: Fanaticism
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of Gavels and Horusath Blast and reduces their mana cost by -20 % .

entries.name: Valkyr's Calling
entries.description_text: Target an enemy and leap into the air, becoming immune to all physical attacks and spells for 2 seconds. At the end of the duration, you charge back down, dealing 428 + 100% AP + 22.5% SP Holy damage to all enemies within 8 yds.

entries.name: Radiant Marks
entries.description_text: Reduces the channel time of Sunslam by 1 sec.

entries.name: Solar Empowerment
entries.description_text: Fulfilling your Vow now unleashes a chain of light at your target, dealing 91 + 23% holy SP + 10% AP Holy damage and then bouncing to up to 5 additional enemies, dealing reduced damage with each strike.

entries.name: Sun's Gift
entries.description_text: Level 30 Passive Your Horusath Blast now deals additional damage scaling with your attack power and grants allies Replenishment . Replenishment Restores 1 % maximum mana every 5 sec to allies within 100 yds for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Champion of the Sun
entries.description_text: Become a champion of An'she, causing your melee auto attacks to deal an additional 50 % of the damage dealt as Holy damage. Lasts 20 seconds.

entries.name: Herald of Purity
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Justice now has an 8 % chance to reset its own cooldown.

entries.name: Blessed Magic
entries.description_text: Casting Horusath Blast now resets the cooldown of Glorious Execution .

entries.name: Glorious Execution
entries.description_text: Strike with both weapons dealing Weapon Damage plus 8 Physical damage and regenerate mana equal to 5 % of the damage dealt.

entries.name: I Need More Explosions!
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Sticky Bomb Explosions by 15 % .

entries.name: Rocket Launcher
entries.description_text: Fire a powerful rocket at an enemy that deals 126 + 35% ranged AP + 35% fire SP Fire damage.

entries.name: Explosive Inventor
entries.description_text: Spider Bomb Factory now also summons a Heavy Spider Bomb . Heavy Spider Bombs move slowly, and deal 1231 + 55% ranged AP Fire damage when they reach their target and slow their movement speed by -70 % for 2 seconds.

entries.name: Buster Scope
entries.description_text: Increases the critical damage of Rocket Launcher by 10 % .

entries.name: Mega Scope
entries.description_text: Increases the range of Rocket Launcher by 10 yds.

entries.name: Explosives Expert
entries.description_text: Direct harmful ability critical strikes from you or your summons now restores 4 % of your maximum mana.

entries.name: Aftermath
entries.description_text: Casting Sticky Bomb now causes your next 2 Scrap Shots within 10 seconds to cast -50 % faster and deal 25 % increased damage.

entries.name: Incendiary Bullets
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Scrap Shot by 15 % and increases your chance to hit by 2 % .

entries.name: Duobombers
entries.description_text: Build: Spider Bomb now creates an additional Spider Bomb that rushes towards your target.

entries.name: Tank Buster
