entries.description_text: Your Scrap Shot now ignores 25 % of the target's Armor when damaging Burning targets.

entries.name: Rockadier
entries.description_text: Empowers the next 6 Scrap Shots or Rocket Launchers within 30 seconds deal additional Fire damage equal to 100 % of the damage dealt to up to 10 enemies around the target.

entries.name: Build: Spider Bomb Factory
entries.description_text: Build a Spider Bomb Factory in front of you for 20 seconds. For the duration, Bomb Toss and Rocket Launcher will summon 3 Spider Bombs , that will immediately run towards your target and detonate dealing 250 + 30% ranged AP Fire damage. Using Scrap Shot will redirect the Spider Bombs to your new target.

entries.name: Rocket Turrets
entries.description_text: Allows Machine Synergy to stack 2 additional times and using Rocket Launcher now causes your Sentry Turret to also cast Rocket Launcher . Machine Synergy Increases damage dealt by 5 % and haste by 3 % , stacking 3 times, for 6 seconds.

entries.name: Short Fuse
entries.description_text: Sparked and Ready now also increases the critical strike chance of Rocket Launcher by 20 % .

entries.name: Build: Firepot Drone
entries.description_text: 3 Charges, 10 sec recharge Build a Firepot Drone that flies towards your target, dropping a bomb along its path and exploding upon landing, dealing 182 + 17.5% ranged AP + 55% fire SP Fire damage in a 5 yd radius, leaving oil on the ground for 6 seconds that slows enemies within by -30 % .

entries.name: War Crimes
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Explosive Augmentation and Tracer Augmentation now has a 50 % chance to apply an additional stack of Napalm to enemies. Napalm (Damage) Fire Damage taken by you is increased and healing received reduced by -3 % for 8 seconds. Stacks 10 times.

entries.name: Napalm
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive Dealing direct Fire damage now applies Napalm to your target. Napalm (Damage) Fire Damage taken by you is increased and healing received reduced by -3 % for 8 seconds. Stacks 10 times.

entries.name: Bomb Toss
entries.description_text: Lob a bomb at an enemy, dealing 36 + 30% ranged AP + 50% fire SP Fire damage and reducing their armor by -5 % for 15 seconds, stacking 4 times.

entries.name: Build: Oil-Spill Pylon
entries.description_text: Build an Oil-Spill Pylon at target location for 10 seconds, spilling oil in an 8 yd radius that reduces enemies movement speed by -60 % and increases their Fire damage taken by you by 15 % . Sticky Bomb Explosions and Firepot Drone deal 20 % increased damage to enemies inside.

entries.name: Tracer Augmentation
entries.description_text: Add a Tracer Augmentation to your gun for 1 hour, causing your ranged attacks to mark enemies for 5 seconds, stacking 5 times. After the duration they explode for 80 + 8% ranged AP + 15% fire SP Fire damage, increased based on stacks. Marked enemies are prevented from entering stealth or invisibility for 20 seconds.

entries.name: Build: Spider Bomb
entries.description_text: Build a Spider Bomb that will immediately run towards your target and detonate dealing 250 + 30% ranged AP Fire damage in an 8 yd radius. Using Scrap Shot will redirect the Spider Bombs to your new target.

entries.name: Grenadier
entries.description_text: When you reach 5 stacks of Napalm on a target you refresh 1 charge of Build: Firepot Drone .

entries.name: Boom Hour
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of Bomb Toss and Firepot Drone by 10 % .

entries.name: Hyperblast Barrage
entries.description_text: Unleash a barrage of shrapnel, dealing 831 + 36% ranged AP + 55% fire SP Fire damage to enemies in a line, applying a lesser Sticky Bomb to each target struck that deals 297 + 10% fire SP + 50% AP Fire damage after 3 sec. After 3 seconds, your active Sentry Turret will also fire a Hyperblast Barrage .

entries.name: Rocket Pack
entries.description_text: Fire critical strikes now reduce the remaining cooldown of Rockadier by -3 sec.

entries.name: Gazlowe's Wisdom
entries.description_text: You now spawn 2 Shrapnel Mines under your target when Sticky Bomb explodes. Shrapnel Mine When you use Remote Detonation , deal 264 + 25% AP + 38.5% SP Physical damage to up to 5 enemies within 10 yds. The mine lasts 1 minute.

entries.name: Target Acquired
entries.description_text: Your Sticky Bomb Explosions and Spider Bomb now deal 30 % increased damage when it strikes only 1 target.

entries.name: Bomb Builder
entries.description_text: Increases your and your summons Fire Damage dealt by 5 % .

entries.name: Rocket Barrage
entries.description_text: Increases the amount of stacks of Tracer Augmentation by 5 , and its duration by 7 sec, and causes damage dealt by Bomb Toss on enemies with 10 stacks to launch a Rocket Barrage at their location. Rocket Barrage (Damage) Deals 1290 + 17.5% AP + 11% fire SP Fire Damage to nearby enemies after 5 seconds.

entries.name: Flamethrowing
entries.description_text: When you Bomb Toss , your Sentry Turret unleashes flames on your target, dealing 89+18+ranged AP*0.12+SPFI*0.4. Fire damage to enemies in a 30 yd line.

entries.name: Machine Synergy
entries.description_text: Casting Scrap Shot now adds a stack of Machine Synergy to your active pet and Sentry Turret . Machine Synergy Increases damage dealt by 5 % and haste by 3 % , stacking 3 times, for 6 seconds.

entries.name: Bomber Man
entries.description_text: Level 30 Passive While Bombastic is active, your Bomb Tosses will additionally reduce the cooldown of Sticky Bomb by -1 sec.

entries.name: Boomshot
entries.description_text: Every 4th Scrap Shot now causes your next Scrap Shot within 15 seconds to deal 25 % increased damage.

entries.name: The BIG Guns!
entries.description_text: Increases the attack power of all party and raid members 5 % . Does not stack with similar effects. In addition, increases your ranged attack power by 3 % .

entries.name: Drone Striker
entries.description_text: Firepot Drone and Scrap Shot now deal 2 % increased damage for each stack of Napalm on the enemy. Napalm (Damage) Fire Damage taken by you is increased and healing received reduced by -3 % for 8 seconds. Stacks 10 times.

entries.name: Bombastic
entries.description_text: Level 30 Passive Casting Build: Spider Bomb now resets the cooldown of Bomb Toss and causes your next Bomb Toss within 15 seconds to trigger no cooldown, global cooldown, or cost.

entries.name: Bomb Squad
entries.description_text: Level 40 Passive Increases your Fire spell power by 50 % of Agility.

entries.name: Sparked and Ready!
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Fire damage dealt has a 5 % chance to grant you Sparked and Ready! . Sparked and Ready! Causes your next Rocket Launcher , within 10 seconds, to be instant cast and deal 20 % increased damage.

entries.name: Surprise Launch!
entries.description_text: When Rocket Launcher is used on enemies affected by Sticky Bomb it is now guaranteed to critically strike.

entries.name: Rocket Engineering
entries.description_text: Direct harmful ability critical strikes now apply an additional stack of Tracer Augmentation to the target while active on the enemy.

entries.name: Resourceful Tech
entries.description_text: Your Zap! is now guaranteed to critically strike allies affected by Nanobots .

entries.name: Field Medic
entries.description_text: Increases your and your summons critical strike chance by 5 % .

entries.name: Stim Augmentation
entries.description_text: Add a Stim Augmentation to your gun for 1 hour, causing your direct healing abilities to heal up to 3 nearby friendly players for an additional 20 % of the amount healed.

entries.name: Emergency Circumvented
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of Emergency Heal by 15 % and allows the periodic healing done by Med Pack to critically strike.

entries.name: Improved Graftbolts
entries.description_text: Level 50 Passive Your Graftbolts now stacks 2 additional times.

entries.name: Graftbolts
entries.description_text: Level 40 Passive Effective healing done now has a 25 % chance to grant you Graftbolts Graftbolts Restores 15 % maximum mana to your pet and increases the damage and healing done by your summons by a percentage equal to 10% of your healing spell power for 6 seconds. .

entries.name: J27 Upgrade
entries.description_text: Reduces the mana cost of your Nanobots by -10 % and they now last 10 additional sec.

entries.name: Bandage Gun
entries.description_text: Healing from Stim Augmentation now affects 2 additional allies near the primary target.

entries.name: Electromagnetic Resistors
entries.description_text: Nanobots now grant a 30 % chance to resist movement impairing effects for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Eureka!
entries.description_text: Direct healing critical strikes now increase the healing done by your next Repair Shot or Emergency Heal by 30 % for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Build: Noise Box
entries.description_text: Build a Noise Box for 15 seconds that periodically unleashes screeching noise on nearby enemies, interrupting spellcasts and preventing spells of that school from being cast for 3 seconds.

entries.name: Zap!
entries.description_text: Fires a long range zap of electricity that heals an ally for 254 + 150% healing . Scales with modifiers to Repair Shot .

entries.name: Cybernetic Revivification
entries.description_text: All nearby allies receive 6 % more healing. Does not stack with similar effects. In addition, your Alarm Beacon now dispels fear, charm, and sleep effects from 1 additional ally.

entries.name: Trust the Science!
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Zap! by -5 sec.

entries.name: Build: Restorative Beacon
entries.description_text: 3 Charges, 15 sec recharge Throw down a restorative beacon for 15 seconds which projects a field that heals raid and party members in the area for 92 every 3 sec.

entries.name: Scientific Nature
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Increases your healing power by 20 % of your Intellect and your critical strike rating by 15 % of your Intellect.

entries.name: Build: ZIGGI-6K
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive Teaches you Build: ZIGGI-6K . Build: ZIGGI-6K Build ZIGGI-6K , the latest in regenerative technology, to aid you in healing allies until dismissed.

entries.name: Master Builder
entries.description_text: Reduces the mana cost of all Build abilities by -25 % .

entries.name: Stim Shots
entries.description_text: Your Stim Augmentation now heals for an additional 10 % of the amount healed.

entries.name: Self-Sustaining Technology
entries.description_text: Damage or healing done by your pet or summons now heals you equal to 15 % of the value. In addition, damage or healing done by you now restores health and mana to your pet equal to 15 % of the value. Each of these effects can only occur once per sec.

entries.name: Nanobot Cleanser
entries.description_text: Send Nanobots to an ally removing 1 poison and disease effect every 3 sec for up to 15 seconds. Nanobot Cleanser can only be sent to 1 target at a time and can't be dispelled.

entries.name: Improved Emergency Heal
entries.description_text: Increases the healing and reduces the mana cost of Emergency Heal by -20 % .

entries.name: Macro Designer
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of your Beacons by 5 sec and Med Pack by 3 sec.

entries.name: Fine Tuning
entries.description_text: Increases critical strike chance of all party and raid members by 3 % . Does not stack with similar effects. In addition, not critically healing now increases your critical strike chance by 1 % , stacking 10 times, until your next effective critical heal.

entries.name: Nanobot Swarm
entries.description_text: Send Nanobots to an ally, dealing 15 + 17.1% SP damage to nearby enemies every 4 sec for 1 minute. All threat generated by you is redirected to the target. Nanobot Swarm can only be sent to 1 target at time and cannot be dispelled.

entries.name: Emergency Enhancer
entries.description_text: Zap! now causes your active Build abilities to zap the lowest health nearby ally, healing them for 490 + 90% healing .

entries.name: Epiphany!
entries.description_text: Casting Beacon abilities now reduces the cooldown of My Greatest Invention! by -20 sec.

entries.name: My Greatest Invention!
entries.description_text: Show off your Greatest Invention , healing party and raid members in a 30 yd radius for 823 + 65% healing every 2 sec for 9 seconds.

entries.name: Healing Radiator
entries.description_text: Periodic healing done by Nanobot Reconstruction now restores 27 + 4.03% healing health to 5 allied players within 10 yds of the affected target.

entries.name: Rejuvenating Gadget
entries.description_text: Critical strikes with Zap! now apply Rejuvenating Gas to up to 12 allies within 8 yards of your target that restores 15% of the value of the shot as health every 2 sec for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Inventor's Tool Belt
entries.description_text: Increases your and your pet's Intellect by 10 % and you are both now unable to miss your attacks.

entries.name: Over-Repaired
entries.description_text: Increases the healing done by Repair Shot by 15 % .

entries.name: Technician
entries.description_text: Reduces spell pushback suffered from damaging attacks by 35 % and increases your critical healing by 10 % .

entries.name: Stim Pack
entries.description_text: Effective healing with Stim Augmentation now reduces the cooldown of Med Pack by -3 sec.

entries.name: Combat Symbiosis
entries.description_text: Electrify an allies' body, increasing their haste by 20 % and causing damage dealt by them to heal nearby allies for 15 % of the value. Lasts for 15 seconds, or 20 attacks.

entries.name: Mana Capacitors
entries.description_text: Reduces the cost of Overcharge by -15 % and reduces its cooldown by -10 % .

entries.name: Rapid Fire Healing
entries.description_text: Casting Repair Shot or Emergency Heal now has a 15 % chance to refresh a charge of Beacons .

entries.name: Combat Crafter
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive While in your Mechsuit , damage dealt by your summons now has a 20 % chance to grant you 5 Scrap and 2 % of your maximum mana.

entries.name: Battle Engineer
entries.description_text: Level 30 Passive Your ranged damage dealt now has a 20 % chance to refresh a charge of Makeshift Dynamite .

entries.name: Turbo Upgrade!
entries.description_text: Level 40 Passive Increases the effectiveness of your Mechsuit by 100 % .

entries.name: Junker
entries.description_text: Casting Spanner Smash and Scrap Shot now increases your pet's attack power by 5 % for 15 seconds, stacking 2 times.

entries.name: Mechanical Extender
entries.description_text: Casting Scrap Shot and Mechsuit abilities now increases the chance to trigger Overload by 3 % for 10 seconds, stacking 10 times. When Overload triggers, all stacks are consumed.

entries.name: Mechanical Synergy
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Sticky Bomb Explosion and Mechsuit abilities by 15 % .

entries.name: Overload
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Mechsuit: Combustion and Mechsuit: Laser Beam now have a 40 % chance to strike 2 additional times for 30 % of the damage dealt.

entries.name: Mechsuit: Activate Jets
entries.description_text: Launch forward and slow your falling speed. When you hit the ground you blast nearby enemies for 275 Fire damage based on time in the air.

entries.name: Haywired State!
entries.description_text: Casting Mechsuit abilities now causes your pet to enter a haywired state for 6 seconds. Haywired State! Auto attacks now zap up to 10 nearby enemies for 159 + 35% AP Stormstrike Damage and damaged enemies take 20 % increased damage from your summons.

entries.name: Turbo Guns
entries.description_text: Reduces the cast time of your Mechsuit: Combustion by 0.25 sec and its damage is increased by 20 % .

entries.name: Cogmaster
entries.description_text: Increases your critical strike chance by 2 % and gives ranged critical strikes a 50 % chance to generate 3 Scrap .

entries.name: Regeneration Enhancement
entries.description_text: When you enter your Mechsuit , it now refunds 20 % of your base mana, repeating every 20 sec while inside.

entries.name: Bombs? BOMBS!
entries.description_text: Increases the detonation speed of Sticky Bomb by -1 sec and reduces its cooldown by -2 sec.

entries.name: Junkyard Loiter
entries.description_text: When you deal damage with Mechsuit: Laser Beam or Mechsuit: Combustion you now launch a Lesser Sticky Bomb on each target struck. Lesser Sticky Bomb Throws a bomb that sticks to the enemy for 3 sec. At the end of the duration the bomb will explode, dealing 17 + 5% fire SP + 2.5% AP Fire Damage to the target.

entries.name: Augmechtation
entries.description_text: Your Mechsuit now increases your damage by an additional 10 % while active.

entries.name: Engine Augmentation
entries.description_text: For 8 seconds after activating your Mechsuit , all damage dealt will now generate 3 Scrap .

entries.name: Flame Jets
entries.description_text: While inside your Mechsuit , damage dealt by your Scrap Shot and Makeshift Dynamite now applies Living Flame to the target. Living Flame (Damage) Deals 32 Fire Damage every 2 sec and increases the damage the target takes from your Mechsuit: Combustion by 10 % for 4.5 seconds, stacking 5 times.

entries.name: Master Technician
entries.description_text: Scrap Shot and Mechsuit abilities now grants your Sentry Turret a stack of Master Technician , stacking 10 times. At 10 stacks, your Sentry Turret will unleash a beam dealing 725 + 75% fire SP + 40% AP Fire damage in a 25 yd line, piercing invulnerabilities.

entries.name: Mechsuit: Laser Beam
entries.description_text: Blast an enemy with a laser, dealing 100 % Ranged Weapon Damage plus 18 as Fire Damage and forcing your pet to charge to the enemy for 24 Physical Damage.

entries.name: Master Builder
entries.description_text: Reduces the cast time of Build abilities by -50 % .

entries.name: Offensive Utility
entries.description_text: While in your Mechsuit , casting Sticky Bomb reduces the channel time of your next Gatling Gun within 5 seconds by -30 % .

entries.name: Fine Tuned
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike and hit chance of you and your summons by 4 % .

entries.name: Build: Scrapmaw
entries.description_text: Build a Scrapmaw to accompany the Tinker until dismissed.

entries.name: Turret Upgrade Z-15
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Sentry Turrets now has a 30 % chance to cause 47 + 20% AP additional Nature damage and increase critical strike chance of the turret by 1 % , stacking 5 times, for 8 seconds.

entries.name: Arclight Core
entries.description_text: Makeshift Dynamite now marks enemies for 6 seconds. The next damaging ability used on this target by your pet consumes the mark to deal 491 + 20% fire SP + 20% ranged AP Fire damage.

entries.name: Augmentor
entries.description_text: While Piercing Augmentation or Aether Augmentation is active, your ranged haste is increased by 10 % .

entries.name: Overclocked Machine
entries.description_text: Overclock your pet for for 20 seconds, increasing its damage dealt by 20 % and allowing it's attacks to trigger Hardwired Haymaker on the target enemy. Additionally, your pet will trigger Overclocked Smash every 5 sec.

entries.name: Upgrade!
entries.description_text: Upgrade nearby Sentry Turrets to a Molten Grenade Turret for 1 minute. Molten Grenade Turret Upgrades the Sentry Turret to fire grenades, increasing its attack speed significantly and causing it to deal 133 Fire Damage in an 8 yd radius, plus an additional 95 + 15% fire SP + 8.5% AP Fire Damage over 1.5 seconds.

entries.name: Clockwork Guardians
entries.description_text: $ab

entries.name: Mechanical Enhancements
entries.description_text: Increases all party and raid member's melee and ranged haste by 10 % . Does not stack with similar effects. In addition, the range of your offensive ranged abilities and Auto Shot is increased by 10 yds.

entries.name: Sprocket Loaded
entries.description_text: Casting Makeshift Dynamite now resets the cooldown of your Mechsuit abilities.

entries.name: Defensive Utility
entries.description_text: Your Mechsuit will now increase your armor by an additional 50 % .

entries.name: Mechsuit: Combustion
entries.description_text: Launch a massive ball of fire at an enemy that also damages nearby enemies, dealing 70 + 20% ranged AP Fire damage. Usable while moving.

entries.name: Slam the Cogs!
entries.description_text: Increases the damage dealt by you and your summons by 4 % .

entries.name: Flak Guns
entries.description_text: Your Mechsuit: Combustion now has 10 % increased critical strike chance and 15 % increased critical damage.

entries.name: Scrapper
entries.description_text: Search and rummage through nearby debris, gaining 10 Scrap and 25 mana every 1 sec for 5 seconds. Not usable in combat.

entries.name: Arclight Adept
entries.description_text: Increases the critical damage of your Mechsuit abilities by 15 % .

entries.name: Blazewrought Titan
entries.description_text: $ad

entries.name: Makeshift Dynamite
entries.description_text: 2 Charges, 8 sec recharge Generates 10 Scrap Load dynamite into your gun and launch it at an enemy, dealing 100 % Ranged Weapon Damage plus 12 as Fire damage. Usable while moving.

entries.name: Hacking the Enemy
entries.description_text: Your Piercing Augmentation now ignores an additional 10 % of your target's armor and grants you -10 increased spell penetration.

entries.name: Nano-Repair Tech
entries.description_text: You and your pet now regenerate 3 % of your maximum health every 8 sec.

entries.name: Rocket Boots
entries.description_text: 3 Charges, 30 sec recharge Activate your Rocket Boots , dispelling root effects and launching you forward.

entries.name: Efficiency
entries.description_text: Reduces the mana cost of all spells and abilities by -10 % .

entries.name: Deathball
entries.description_text: Launch 3 Deathballs in a line, increasing in speed the further they travel. They explode when they come into contact with an enemy, dealing 1150 + 35% ranged AP Fire damage to nearby enemies, increased based on distance traveled. Bot and Build abilities reduce the cooldown of this ability by -2 sec.

entries.name: Kinetic Shield
entries.description_text: Create magnetic shields of kinetic energy on an ally target for 8 seconds, reducing damage taken by -40 % and making them immune to stun effects. Usable while stunned.

entries.name: Nanobot Reconstruction
entries.description_text: Send Nanobots to an ally, healing them for 420 over 1 minute. Nanobot Reconstruction can only be sent to 1 target at a time and cannot be dispelled.

entries.name: Scrapshielding
entries.description_text: Your critical strikes now grant you a shield that absorbs 177 + 15% AP + 60% SP damage.

entries.name: Rocket Bombardment
entries.description_text: Casting Sticky Bomb now causes your Sentry Turret to fire a rocket cluster on its next attack, causing 126 Fire damage to enemies within 5 yds of the target.

entries.name: Build: Alarm Beacon
entries.description_text: 3 Charges, 15 sec recharge Throw down an alarm beacon for 10 seconds, removing fear, charm and sleep effects from up to 1 ally within 20 yds every 1 sec.

entries.name: I'm The Creator Now
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by your summons now has a 40 % chance to increase your attack power and spell power by 9 for 30 seconds, stacking 3 times.

entries.name: Mechanical Enhancements
entries.description_text: Reduces your damage taken from bleed effects by -10 % and the duration of bleed effects on you by -20 % .

entries.name: Backup Fuel
entries.description_text: Falling below 35% health now refreshes all charges of Rocket Boots . Can occur only once every 3 min.

entries.name: Hasty Tech
entries.description_text: Reduces the cast time of Scrap Shot and Repair Shot by -15 % .

entries.name: Maniacal
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Sticky Bomb and Deploy Blast Mine by -2 sec.

entries.name: Flexible Thinking
entries.description_text: Increases Agility and Intellect by 4 % .

entries.name: Mechaplating
entries.description_text: Whenever your summons critically strike, reduce your and your pet's damage taken by -2 % for 15 seconds, stacking 4 times.

entries.name: Concussive Spanner
entries.description_text: Your Spanner Smash will now apply Concussion to the target. Concussion Your target is unable to critically strike and their total primary attributes are reduced by -5 % for 8 seconds.

entries.name: Cutting Edge Technology
entries.description_text: Increases the tick rate and healing done of Nanobot Reconstruction by 20 % .

entries.name: Modulator
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of your Modules by 20 % .

entries.name: Clockwork Ingenuity
entries.description_text: Increases the maximum health of your summons by 10 % .

entries.name: Mechanosoldier
entries.description_text: Increases the damage reduced by Kinetic Shield by -10 % and its duration by 2 sec.

entries.name: Innate Brilliance
entries.description_text: While Aether Augmentation is active, every 4th Scrap Shot now grants you Innate Brilliance . Innate Brilliance (Buff) Your next Scrap Shot has 5 yds increased range, deals 15 % increased damage, and drains 125 + 10% ranged AP of your target's mana. Lasts 10 seconds.

entries.name: Frozen Bomb Launcher
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by your Sentry Turrets will now slow enemy movement speed by -15 % for 10 seconds, stacking 3 times.

entries.name: Medical Degree
entries.description_text: Increases the cooldown of Med Pack by 30 sec, but allows it to affect up to 4 additional targets around your ally.

entries.name: Goblin Depravity
entries.description_text: Air Strike now drops Tear Gas , dealing 132 + 11% nature SP + 100% AP Nature damage every 2 sec for 12 seconds.

entries.name: Auto Resuscitation Device
entries.description_text: Attach a resuscitation device to your target ally for 20 seconds. When the target would otherwise die, they are instead healed for 50 % of their maximum health.

entries.name: Explosive Personality
entries.description_text: Increases your ranged attack power by 50 % of your Intellect.

entries.name: Macro-Gravity Zone
entries.description_text: Create a macro-gravity zone at target location for 8 seconds. Enemies within the zone have their movement speed slowed by -50 % and gain 1 stack of Macro-Gravity every 1 sec. Macro-Gravity At 6 stacks, the affected enemy will be stunned for 6 seconds.

entries.name: Refined Gunpowder
entries.description_text: Increases your haste and your damage dealt against Mechanical creatures by 3 % .

entries.name: Build: Repulsion Unit
entries.description_text: Build a Repulsion Unit that periodically knocks nearby enemies back every 5 sec for 20 seconds.

entries.name: Enhanced Procedures
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Med Pack by 100 % and it's healing by 75 % .

entries.name: Function Over Form
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of Aether Augmentation by 50 % .

entries.name: Build: Destructo-Bot
entries.description_text: Build a Destructo-Bot that you can see through and directly control. The bot is capable of exploding, dealing massive Fire damage to enemies nearby and disorienting them for 3 seconds.

entries.name: Bunker Operative
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Kinetic Shield , Discombobulate! , and Repulsion Unit by -20 % .

entries.name: Air Strike
entries.description_text: Mark the target location for an Air Strike . After 7 seconds, it deals 1250 Fire damage to up to 12 enemies caught within the blast. This ability always critically strikes.

entries.name: Ventilation
entries.description_text: Direct magic damage taken now has a 50 % chance to increase all magic resistances of allies within 8 yds of you by 15 for 6 seconds.

entries.name: Med Pack
entries.description_text: Toss a med pack to an ally, healing for 204 + 120% SP over 6 seconds and cleanses all bleed, poison and disease effects.

entries.name: Rotting Away
entries.description_text: Your Wilt now has a 15 % chance when it deals damage to strike again as Shadow damage.

entries.name: Blightfang
entries.description_text: Casting Serpent's Fang now spawns a Mushroom below the target that will explode after 2 sec, dealing 217 + 12.5% SP Nature damage to nearby enemies.

entries.name: Decay
entries.description_text: Apply Wilt to up to 5 enemies at target location and drop a Mushroom that will explode after 2 sec, dealing 217 + 25% nature SP Nature damage all enemies within 5 yds.

entries.name: Venoxis Rage
entries.description_text: Your Mycosis now enrages your Fungarians for 6 seconds, increasing its damage and attack speed by 30 % for 6 seconds.

entries.name: Fungic
entries.description_text: You now apply Fungic to enemies affected by Lethargy , dealing an additional 20% of the damage dealt by your Venom Bolt or Serpent's Fang as Nature damage over 3 seconds, stacking up to 2 times.

entries.name: From Life Comes Death
entries.description_text: For 20 seconds, when you kill an enemy that yields experience or honor they now spawn a Mushroom beneath them. Can only occur once per sec. Mushroom (dmg) Drop a Mushroom near the target that explodes after 2 sec, dealing 217 + 35% SP Plague Damage to all nearby enemies.

entries.name: Suffocating Coils
entries.description_text: $af

entries.name: Shadra's Gift
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Increases your spell damage by 25 % of your Intellect and your haste rating by 20 % of your Intellect.

entries.name: Cycle of Decay
entries.description_text: Level 50 Passive When you cast any spell you now have a 20 % chance to gain Cycle of Decay . Cycle of Decay (Proc) Your Venom Bolt is now castable while moving and casts -30 % faster for 6 seconds.

entries.name: Wilt
entries.description_text: Wilt the life of an enemy with vile poison, dealing 144 Nature damage over 18 seconds.

entries.name: Mycosis
entries.description_text: Fungus grows throughout the body of an enemy, dealing 153 + 65% nature SP Nature damage and applying a shield that absorbs the next 100 + 200% SP healing done to them for 8 seconds. Deals 20 % increased damage for each stack of Fungal Growth on the target.

entries.name: Serpent Lord's Ring
entries.description_text: Draw power from the Serpent Lord's Ring instantly regenerating 20 % of your maximum mana and causing your Mycosiss to trigger no cooldown and be free of cost for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Limb Decayer
entries.description_text: Reduces the cast time and increases the mana cost of Decay by 50 % .

entries.name: Spore
entries.description_text: Inject an enemy with parasitic spores, dealing 20 + 17.5% nature SP Shadow damage, plus an additional 231 over 21 seconds. After 10 sec, drop a Mushroom below the target that explodes after 2 sec, dealing 217 + 25% nature SP Nature damage to nearby enemies.

entries.name: Wilting Away
entries.description_text: Your Wilt now strikes an additional nearby enemy.

entries.name: Rotpriest
entries.description_text: Increases your spell critical damage by 100 % .

entries.name: From Death Comes Life
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Spore now reduces the cooldown of Decay by -1 sec.

entries.name: A Pit of Snakes
entries.description_text: Serpent's Fang now increases the damage of subsequent Serpent's Fangs by 15 % for 8 seconds, stacking up to 3 times.

entries.name: Venom Saturation
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of your poison effects by 25 % against enemies above 50% health.

entries.name: Fungal Growth
entries.description_text: Shadow and Nature damage dealt now has a 35 % chance to increase periodic damage you deal to the target by 2 % for 30 seconds, stacking 10 times.

entries.name: Envenom
entries.description_text: Reduces the cast time of Venom Bolt by -0.3 sec.

entries.name: Prophetic Speaker
entries.description_text: Each time you spawn a Mushroom , you now reduce the cooldown of Decay by -1 sec.

entries.name: Necessary Preparations
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Wilt by 20 % and it now increases the chance to hit the target with spells by 3 % for 20 seconds.

entries.name: Infestation
entries.description_text: Periodic damage dealt now has a 10 % chance to reduce the cooldown of Serpent's Fang and Fungal Assailant by 20% of the remaining cooldown.

entries.name: Rot Lich
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive Direct damage dealt now has a 20 % chance to reset the cooldown of Serpent's Fang and grant you Rot Lich . Rot Lich (Proc) Your next Serpent's Fang within 15 seconds is free of cost.

entries.name: Captivation
entries.description_text: Increases Mycosis 's damage through Fungal Growth stacks by 5 % .

entries.name: Septic Trauma
entries.description_text: Harmful critical strikes now increase the duration of Wilt by 2 sec.

entries.name: Sporelord
entries.description_text: Fungal Assailant now spawns 3 Mushrooms below the target. Mushroom (dmg) Drop a Mushroom near the target that explodes after 2 sec, dealing 217 + 35% SP Plague Damage to all nearby enemies.

entries.name: Serpent's Embrace
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Serpent's Fang and its spell power scaling by 15 % .

entries.name: Sepsis Bloom
entries.description_text: Create pustules that swell and then burst, disorienting a target enemy for 6 seconds. All of your Venomancer poison effects are purged from the target, dealing damage equal to their remaining duration at the end of the duration.

entries.name: Acid Bolt
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Venom Bolt by 10 % and its critical strike chance by 2 % .

entries.name: Fungal Link
entries.description_text: Increases the spell haste of all party and raid members by 3 % . Does not stack with similar effects. In addition, the range of your Rot spells is increased by 20 % and the threat they generate is reduced by -20 % .

entries.name: Fungal Assailant
entries.description_text: Summon a Fungarian to attack an enemy, dealing 226 + 65% SP Nature damage, and instantly apply Debilitating Venom to your target. Lasts 20 seconds. Debilitating Venom (Slow) Movement speed slowed by -40 % for 8 seconds. Can be used in any form.

entries.name: Intoxicating Venoms
entries.description_text: Level 40 Passive Mycosis is now enhanced based on your currently active Venom . Debilitating Venom : Reduces the cast time by -20 % . Blight Venom : Extends the duration of Spore on the target by 4 sec. Adrenal Venom : Strikes 1 additional nearby target.

entries.name: Protraction
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of your Venomancer periodic damage effects by 3 sec.

entries.name: Mycelial Ring
entries.description_text: Create an 8 yd ring beneath you for 10 seconds that deals 59 Nature damage every 1 sec to enemies inside and immediately grows 12 Mushrooms in a circle around you. At the end of the duration, up to 15 allies inside are healed for 845 + 65% nature SP . Can be used in any form.

entries.name: Lethargy
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by your Wilt now applies Lethargy to affected enemies. Lethargy (Dummy) Reduces an enemy's chance to hit and increases their Nature Damage taken by you by -5 % for 6 seconds. Dispelling this effect increases the dispeller's resource costs by 100 % for 5 seconds.

entries.name: Fungal Allies
entries.description_text: Fungal Assailant now summons 2 additional Fungarians .

entries.name: Withering Venom
entries.description_text: Inject an enemy with a devastating venom, dealing 16 + 20% nature SP Nature damage every 3 sec for 21 seconds. Damage is dealt slowly at first, and builds up over time.

entries.name: Brood Lord
entries.description_text: Augments Spider Form into a Brood Lord , causing your Brood Mark spenders to launch webs at the target, sticking to them for 10 seconds. Each webbed target has their movement speed slowed by -25 % . Critically striking an enemy who is webbed summons 1 to 2 Spiderlings to aid you in combat for 8 seconds.

entries.name: Venomous Bite
entries.description_text: Increases the amount of times Brood Marks can stack by 2 .

entries.name: Contagion
entries.description_text: For 15 seconds, all periodic damage dealt now has a 30 % chance to burst dealing 92 + 20% shadow SP Shadow damage to 8 enemies within 8 yds.

entries.name: Bile Eruption
entries.description_text: Triggering a Venom now has a 25 % chance to generate you 5 Energy.

entries.name: Virulent Opening
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of your poisons by 20 % on enemies above 75% health.

entries.name: Black Widow
entries.description_text: Damage dealt to enemies below 35% health now reduces the cooldown of Noxious Empowerment by -2 sec. In addition, your Widowmaker now deals 20 % increased damage to enemies below 35% health.

entries.name: Potency
entries.description_text: Increases the damage dealt by Venom Fang by 15 % and causes it to increase the target's chance to be critically struck by spells by 3 % for 15 seconds.

entries.name: One Man's Poison...
entries.description_text: Casting spells that consume Brood Marks now has a -25 % chance to refund their Brood Mark cost.

entries.name: Lethality
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of Widow's Kiss on Diseased targets by 30 % .

entries.name: Shadra's Seance
entries.description_text: Facemelter now ticks -20 % faster and the duration is increased by 6 sec.

entries.name: Boding Dread
entries.description_text: Increases your Shadow damage dealt and your critical strike chance with Shadow spells by 3 % .

entries.name: Bugging
entries.description_text: Harmful spells cast out of Skulk increase the damage you deal to the enemy by 30 % for 4 seconds.

entries.name: Blistering Fangs
entries.description_text: Casting spells that consume Brood Marks now refunds 30 Energy when used with at least 5 Brood Marks on your target.

entries.name: Tunneler
entries.description_text: Your Spindlebind now has 2 charges, a 25 sec cooldown, and deals increased damage. Spindlebind (Tunneler) 2 Charges, 25 sec recharge Command a tunnel beetle to attack your target from below, inflicting 159 + 65% nature SP Nature damage and rooting them for 4 seconds.

entries.name: Nature Against Nature
entries.description_text: Each stack of Nerubian Sting now increases the damage dealt to the target by your Widowmaker and Venom Fang by 8 % .

entries.name: Rotting Sores
entries.description_text: Increases the tick rate of Rotfang by -20 % and allows its periodic damage dealt to critically strike.

entries.name: Brood Marks
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive Your Venom Fang now applies a Brood Mark for 15 seconds, stacking 5 times. Some abilities will consume them for an additional effect.

entries.name: Essence of Decay
entries.description_text: Critical strikes with Widow's Kiss now apply 1 additional Brood Mark .

entries.name: Prowler
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Increases your spell damage by 25 % of your Intellect and your hit rating by 3 % of your Intellect.

entries.name: Widow's Fang
entries.description_text: Level 50 Passive Your Venom Fang now costs -20 % less Energy when while Widow's Kiss is active.

entries.name: Vulnerability
entries.description_text: Level 40 Passive While Blight Venom is active, your auto attacks now have a 10 % chance to apply it. In addition, your offensive critical strikes now increase the target's spell damage taken by 10 % for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Caustic
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Noxious Empowerment by -60 sec.

entries.name: Corrosive Toxin
entries.description_text: Withering Venom now deals an additional 1 + 125% shadow SP Shadow damage at the end of its duration.

entries.name: Noxious Empowerment
entries.description_text: Enrage for 12 seconds, increasing your chance to trigger Venoms by 50 % , your Energy regeneration by 100 % , and increasing your damage dealt by 20 % for 12 seconds.

entries.name: Nerubian Sting
entries.description_text: Applies 1 Brood Mark Sting an enemy, dealing 26 + 25% shadow SP Shadow damage and an additional 20 + 50% shadow SP over 15 seconds, stacking up to 3 times.

entries.name: Deadly Kiss
entries.description_text: Increases critical damage dealt by Widow's Kiss , Widowmaker and Venom Fang by 50 % against Poisoned targets.

entries.name: Corrosive Bile
entries.description_text: After using Facemelter , your next Widowmaker within 15 seconds now deals 20 % increased damage and strikes 2 additional nearby enemies.

entries.name: Widow's Kiss
entries.description_text: Every 3rd Venom Fang becomes Widow's Kiss , dealing increased damage and granting you increased haste. Widow's Kiss (Transform) Applies 1 Brood Mark Bite an enemy for 41 + 50% shadow SP + 10% AP Shadow damage, increasing your haste by 20 % for 4 seconds. Scales with modifiers to Venom Fang .

entries.name: Glory To Shadra!
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of Venom Fang and Nerubian Sting by 10 % .

entries.name: Virulent Resonance
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of Brood Marks by 10 % and your hit chance by 5 % .

entries.name: Venomagus
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Blight Venom by 20 % .

entries.name: Facemelter
entries.description_text: Requires Spider Form Consumes Brood Marks Spray poison upon an enemy and nearby enemies, dealing Nature damage over 15 seconds. 1 Mark: 88 + 93.75% nature SP Nature damage. 2 Marks: 112 + 120% nature SP Nature damage. 3 Marks: 144 + 153.75% nature SP Nature damage. 4 Marks: 182 + 195% nature SP Nature damage. 5 Marks: 245 + 262.5% nature SP Nature damage.

entries.name: Deadly Neurotoxins
entries.description_text: Critical strikes with Venom Fang and Nerubian Sting now deals an additional 25 % of their direct damage instantly as Nature damage. Damage dealt in this way has a 40 % chance to extend the duration of Rotfang by 1 sec.

entries.name: Vile Fangs
entries.description_text: Periodic damage dealt now has a 10 % chance to generate a Brood Mark .

entries.name: Withered
entries.description_text: Increases the spell power scaling of Withering Venom by 15 % .

entries.name: Death Spray
entries.description_text: Periodic damage dealt now has a 5 % chance to remove the Energy cost from your next Venom Fang or Widow's Kiss within 8 seconds and increase its damage by 20 % . Can occur only once every 2 sec.

entries.name: Cunning of the Nerub'ar
entries.description_text: Augments your Spider Form , increasing your damage dealt by 10 % and causing it to allow your Nerubian Sting to stack 1 additional time.

entries.name: Drown In Poison
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Venomtip Poison by 30 % .

entries.name: Unbreakable
entries.description_text: Allows Exposed Flesh to stack 5 additional times and increase your Physical damage taken by -1 % less.

entries.name: Reformed
entries.description_text: Level 30 Passive Clearing Exposed Flesh stacks inside Beetle Form now restores health based on stacks cleared.

entries.name: Expulsion
entries.description_text: Clears Exposed Flesh stacks to poison nearby enemies for 5 seconds, and an additional 1 sec per cleared stack, dealing 15 + 10% nature SP + 5% AP Nature damage every 1 sec.

entries.name: Potent Expulsion
entries.description_text: Increases the damage dealt by Expulsion by 20 % .

entries.name: Barbed Stinger
entries.description_text: Clears Exposed Flesh stacks and flings a Barbed Stinger into an enemy for 10 seconds, plus an additional 1 sec per cleared stack. Recasting this ability on the same target will rip the stinger out, pulling them to you and dealing Nature damage, scaling based on how long the stinger was left in them.

entries.name: Beetle Poison
entries.description_text: Allows Wicked Poison to stack an additional time.

entries.name: Reconstructive Carapace
entries.description_text: Reduces the amount of Rage drained by Carapace Regeneration by -3 .

entries.name: Slimy Stingers
entries.description_text: Carapace Crash now creates a pool of Beetle Slime under each enemy struck. Beetle Slime Deals 49 Nature Damage to up to 10 enemies within 5 yds every 2 sec for 8 seconds.

entries.name: Catalyst
entries.description_text: Generates 15 Rage plus 5 every 1 sec and reduces the cost of all of your spells and abilities by -25 % for 10 seconds. Prevents out of combat Rage decay for its duration.

entries.name: Venomtip Poison
entries.description_text: Spray poison on an enemy and all enemies near them, dealing 30 + 11% nature SP + 10% AP Nature damage and reducing their attack speed by -20 % for 0 seconds.

entries.name: Poisonous
entries.description_text: Level 40 Passive Increases your spell damage by 30 % of your attack power and allows periodic damage dealt by Expulsion to critically strike.

entries.name: Natural Weapons
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of all Beetle Form abilities by 10 % .

entries.name: Pendo's Charm
entries.description_text: Increases the rage generated by your damage dealt by 15 % .

entries.name: Cover
entries.description_text: Casting Harden now clears Exposed Flesh .

entries.name: Impale
entries.description_text: Fire spikes through the floor impaling all enemies in a 15 yd line for 83 + 51.07% shadow SP Shadow damage and stunning them for 3.5 seconds.

entries.name: Regrow Exoskeleton
entries.description_text: Clears Exposed Flesh stacks to reduce your damage taken by -20 % for 5 seconds and an additional 1 sec per stack.

entries.name: Regenerative Properties
entries.description_text: Reduces all damage taken by -5 % , but damage taken now has a 10 % chance to shatter your exoskeleton, removing this damage reduction effect. When your exoskeleton shatters you regenerate 12 % of your maximum health over 12 seconds, after this duration your exoskeleton regenerates.

entries.name: Exposed Flesh
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive Hostile attacks against you now have a 50 % chance to grant a stack of Exposed Flesh . Exposed Flesh Generates 10 Rage and increases your Physical Damage taken 3 % for 20 seconds, stacking 10 times.

entries.name: Slimy
entries.description_text: Direct damage taken now has a 20 % chance to create a pool of Beetle Slime under the enemy. Beetle Slime Deals 49 Nature Damage to up to 10 enemies within 5 yds every 2 sec for 8 seconds. Can only occur once every 3 sec.

entries.name: Charmed Plating
entries.description_text: Reduces damage taken by all party and raid members by -3 % . Does not stack with similar effects. In addition, reduces your chance to be hit by spells by -2 % .

entries.name: Reinforced Exoskeleton
entries.description_text: Increases your maximum health and your dodge chance by 3 % .

entries.name: Shadra's Gift
entries.description_text: Dealing damage with Barbed Stinger now increases the target's Nature damage taken by 5 % for 12 seconds.

entries.name: Wicked Barbs
entries.description_text: Your Barbed Stinger and Chitin Rush now applies Wicked Poison . Wicked Poison Deals 60 + 5.67% shadow SP + 3.2% AP Shadow Damage every 2 sec for 6 seconds.

entries.name: Empowered Exoskeleton
entries.description_text: Removes the Rage cost of Chitin Rush and increases its range by 5 yds.

entries.name: Alacrity
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Chitin Rush now increases your dodge chance by 1 % for 5 seconds, stacking 8 times.

entries.name: Vile Fury
entries.description_text: Reduces the Rage cost of Hivebreak and Carapace Crash by -3 and increases your chance to hit by 2 % .

entries.name: Toxic Expulsion
entries.description_text: Hivebreak now consumes -2 sec of Venomtip Poison's duration to gush toxic slime, dealing 20 Nature damage to 5 enemies within 5 yds.

entries.name: Wicked Poison
entries.description_text: Critical strikes with Chitin Rush , Carapace Crash , and Hivebreak now apply Wicked Poison . Wicked Poison Deals 60 + 5.67% shadow SP + 3.2% AP Shadow Damage every 2 sec for 6 seconds.

entries.name: Molt
entries.description_text: Shatters your exoskeleton, instantly applying 15 stacks of Exposed Flesh and increasing your movement speed by 30 % for 8 seconds.

entries.name: Spider Lord
entries.description_text: Augments Beetle Form into a Spider Lord , reducing damage taken by -5 % , and while Locust Swarm is active your summons now gain 30 % increased haste and damage. Casting Hivebreak now has a 40 % chance, and melee auto attacks now have a 5 % chance, to summon 1 Scarab to aid you in combat for 12 seconds.

entries.name: Venomics
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of your Venoms by 30 % .

entries.name: Locust Swarm
entries.description_text: Leeches 67 + 10% SP + 3% AP health from nearby enemies every 2 sec for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Agitation
entries.description_text: Dodging an attack now generates 3 Rage.

entries.name: Enchanted Chitin
entries.description_text: Increases your Armor contribution from mail by 25 % .

entries.name: Charm of Warding
entries.description_text: When a stack of Exposed Flesh is applied you are now healed for 1 % of your maximum health.

entries.name: Carapace Regeneration
entries.description_text: 3 Charges, 20 sec recharge Regenerate your carapace, reducing your Physical damage taken by -4 % and restoring 1 % maximum health every 1 sec, draining 10 Rage every tick to remain active, stacking 3 times.

entries.name: Poison for Everyone!
entries.description_text: Reduces the Rage cost of Venomtip Poison by -10 .

entries.name: Protogenesis
entries.description_text: Level 50 Passive Critical strikes dealt with direct damage now apply Protogenesis to you, stacking 10 times. Protogenesis Heals for 65 every 3 sec for 10 seconds. At 10 stacks, all stacks are consumed and the cooldown of Expulsion is reduced by -3 sec.

entries.name: Cunning
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of Chitin Rush by 20 % and its critical damage by 10 % .

entries.name: Deadly Sting
entries.description_text: Dealing periodic damage now has a 10 % chance to make your next Hivebreak within 8 seconds free of cost and deal 50 % increased damage.

entries.name: Chitinous Surge
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Chitin Rush by -3 sec and increases its damage by 15 % .

entries.name: Magic Shell
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Increases all primary attributes by 15 % while in Beetle Form . In addition, increases your hit rating by 3 % of all primary attributes.

entries.name: Relentless
entries.description_text: Increases your Energy and mana regeneration rate by 20 % .

entries.name: Lifeblood
entries.description_text: Embrace Shadra's lifeblood, reducing your damage taken and pushback from casting spells by -20 % and causing all damage taken to cast Rejuvenating Venom . Lasts for 10 seconds. Rejuvenating Venom (Heal) Heal a random ally within 30 yds of your target for 67 + 9.2% healing over 6 seconds.

entries.name: Green Salve
entries.description_text: Rapidly heal an ally for 30 over 6 seconds. At the end of the duration, this will seek another nearby ally with the lowest health and heal them for 13 + 24.46% healing .

entries.name: Runed Carapace
entries.description_text: Whenever you take Magic damage, reduce damage taken by that magic school by -10 % for 10 seconds. Can only occur once every 30 sec per school of magic.

entries.name: Celerity
entries.description_text: Increases your movement speed by 60 % for 10 seconds. Leaving Spider Form will cancel this effect. Usable while Skulking .

entries.name: Playing With Poison
entries.description_text: Increases your Nature damage and healing done by 5 % .

entries.name: Ambush Predator
entries.description_text: Casting Burrow will now apply Tunnel Below to you. While Skulk is active every 1 sec you reduce the cooldown of Burrow by -1 sec.

entries.name: Empowering Pheromones
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of your Pheromones by 20 % and their duration by 50 % .

entries.name: Reinforced Shell
entries.description_text: Increases your total armor by 20 % . In addition, while Spider or Beetle form is active your attacks are unable to be parried or dodged.

entries.name: Envenomed Weapons
entries.description_text: Envenoms the weapons of all nearby allies for 30 minutes, giving them a 5 % chance to launch a jet of poison at their target whenever they deal damage, dealing 8 + 10% nature SP + 10% AP Nature damage.

entries.name: Enduring Exoskeleton
entries.description_text: Direct damage taken now has a 30 % chance to generate 2 Rage and 3 % base mana. Can only occur once per sec.

entries.name: Burrow
entries.description_text: Burrow beneath the ground for 8 seconds, becoming immune to all physical attacks and spells, but unable to move or act for the duration. While burrowed, you can choose a new location within 30 yds to unburrow.

entries.name: Acute Senses
entries.description_text: Increases your Intellect and Agility by 5 % .

entries.name: Adrenal Venom
entries.description_text: Activate Adrenal Venom for 120 minutes, giving your casts a 25 % chance to increase your haste by 6 % for 6 seconds, stacking 3 times. You can have a maximum of 2 unique Venoms active at a time.

entries.name: Avatar of Shadra
entries.description_text: Damage and healing done now has a 10 % chance to apply Curse of Shadra for 10 seconds. Dealing damage or healing with Serpent's Fang , Claw Strike , or Venom Fang on an enemy that is cursed will deal damage or heal them for an additional 25 % of the value and heal you for 90 .

entries.name: Versatile and Deadly
entries.description_text: Reduce all damage taken while in Beetle Form by -3 % and increases your movement speed while in Spider Form by 5 % .

entries.name: Blightcap Injestion
entries.description_text: Increases your chance to resist poison and disease effects by 30 % .

entries.name: Fury of Shadra
entries.description_text: Increases your damage and healing against targets below 35% health by 15 % .

entries.name: Fury of Anub'Rekhan
entries.description_text: Increases your maximum mana, Energy, and Rage by 10 % .

entries.name: Weakening Venom
entries.description_text: Activate Weakening Venom for 120 minutes, giving your casts a 35 % chance to deal 59 + 12.5% SP Shadow damage and reduce an enemy's attack power by 234 for 8 seconds. You can have a maximum of 2 unique Venoms active at a time.

entries.name: Genesis
entries.description_text: Increases your haste by 4 % .

entries.name: Tranquil Essence
entries.description_text: Reduces the threat generated by your healing spells by -10 % and increases your periodic healing by 5 % .

entries.name: Pinch
entries.description_text: Disarm an enemy's melee weapons with your claws for 5 seconds and apply Weakening Venom to them for 10 sec. Weakening Venom (Proc) Deals 59 + 12.5% SP Shadow Damage and reduces attack power by 23 .

entries.name: Surprise Strategy
entries.description_text: Critical strikes now have a 15 % chance to increase the healing of your next Shadra's Prayer by 20 % and make it instant cast for 10 seconds. Can only occur once per 5 sec.

entries.name: Toxic Stride
entries.description_text: Embrace Shadra's blessing, granting you immunity to all silence and interrupt effects and allowing you to cast your spells while moving for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Venomancy Expert
entries.description_text: Reduces the cost of all spells and abilities by -5 % .

entries.name: Hive Instinct
entries.description_text: The swarm stirs within you, preparing you for battle, instantly generating 100 Rage or Energy. Usable while Skulking .

entries.name: Venomizer
entries.description_text: Increases the proc chance of all Venoms by 10 % .

entries.name: Tome of Ahn'kahet
entries.description_text: Damage and effective healing done now has an 8 % chance to grant Tome of Ahn'kahet for 15 seconds. Tome of Ahn'kahet The next spell has its costs reduced by -100 % .

entries.name: Chitinous Spikes
entries.description_text: Taking direct damage has a 20 % chance to retaliate for 5 % of the damage taken.

entries.name: Hallucinogenic Venom
entries.description_text: Allows 50 % of your mana to regenerate while in combat.

entries.name: Shadra's Lair
entries.description_text: Designate the area around you as your Lair for 8 seconds. Enemies are unable to target into or out of the Lair and their movement speed is slowed by -60 % .

entries.name: Mamba Mentality
entries.description_text: Critical strikes with Venom Bolt , Hivebreak , or Venom Fang now increase your movement speed by 20 % for 3 seconds.

entries.name: Master of Venoms
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of your Venoms by 50 % .

entries.name: Skin Shedder
entries.description_text: Reduces the cost of shapeshift spells by -50 % .

entries.name: Shadra's Balm
entries.description_text: Envelop an ally with a restorative balm, healing them for 14 + 25.17% healing every 3 sec for 18 seconds.

entries.name: Spindlebind
entries.description_text: Emit webs at all enemies behind you, rooting them for 4 seconds, and unleashing a beetle on the trapped enemy from below, inflicting 61 + 40% nature SP Nature damage.

entries.name: Widow's Watch
entries.description_text: Allies affected by Shadra's Balm now have a 20 % increased chance to resist poison and curse effects.

entries.name: Ophidian Renewal
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Shadra's Balm and Mending Mist and Shadra's Prayer by 3 sec.

entries.name: Shadra's Presence
entries.description_text: Allies within 100 yds receive 6 % more healing. Does not stack with similar effects. In addition, your Antivenom now dispels 1 additional effect.

entries.name: Mycelial Synchronization
entries.description_text: Casting Shadra's Aid on an ally now also casts it on yourself.

entries.name: Melioration
entries.description_text: Your Serpent's Fang now refreshes a charge of Alkahest .

entries.name: Shadra's Gift
entries.description_text: Reduces the cast time of Shadra's Prayer by -10 % and your spell pushback suffered from damaging attacks by 35 % .

entries.name: Soothing Venoms
entries.description_text: Increases the critical healing of Shadra's Prayer by 25 % .

entries.name: Spirit of the Jungle
entries.description_text: Increases the proc chance of Rejuvenating Venom by 10 % .

entries.name: Toxic Communion
entries.description_text: Extend the duration of Shadra's Balm and Mending Mist by 15 sec on all allies within 30 yds.

entries.name: Serpent Lord's Ritual
entries.description_text: Direct healing done now has a 5 % chance to grant you 5 sec of Serpent Lord's Amulet . Serpent Lord's Amulet Draw power from the Serpent Lord's Amulet , increasing your spell haste by 20 % and reduces your mana costs by -50 % for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Advisor's Perfidy
entries.description_text: Increases the bonus healing scaling of Serpent's Fang , Mending Mist , and Shadra's Balm by 15 % .

entries.name: Ritualistic
entries.description_text: Casting Green Salve now also refunds you 20 % of your base mana.

entries.name: Occultist
entries.description_text: Level 40 Passive Casting Green Salve or Serpent's Fang now has a 30 % chance to refresh a charge of Alkahest .

entries.name: Sage
entries.description_text: Direct healing done by Alkahest now spreads an active Shadra's Balm from the primary target to a nearby ally.

entries.name: Sublime Extraction
entries.description_text: Casting Green Salve now resets the cooldown of Serpent's Fang and removes the cost of your next Serpent's Fang for 8 seconds.

entries.name: Bountiful Gifts
entries.description_text: Increases the healing of Shadra's Prayer , Green Salve , and Alkahest by 10 % .

entries.name: Mycelial Healing
entries.description_text: All effective healing done now increases your periodic healing done to an ally by 1 % for 30 seconds, stacking 10 times.

entries.name: Venom Fanatic
entries.description_text: Your Serpent's Fang now strikes 2 additional nearby enemies.

entries.name: Blight Antidote
entries.description_text: Inject an ally with a powerful magic antidote, dispelling 2 curse effects from them.

entries.name: Spiritual Healing
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Increases your spell critical strike rating and your healing power by 20 % of your Intellect.

entries.name: Ritual Healing
entries.description_text: Level 50 Passive Every 9 sec, your Shadra's Prayer will now restore 1 % of the target's maximum mana, 8 Energy or Focus, 4 Rage and 4 Runic Power.

entries.name: Shadra's Vigil
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive Healing done by Serpent's Fang now applies Shadra's Vigil to allies. Shadra's Vigil The next 5 instances of periodic healing by you on this target will heal them for an additional 10 % of the value.

entries.name: Venomcult Scrolls
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Green Salve by -2 sec and increases the healing done at the end of the duration by 50 % .

entries.name: Extraction
entries.description_text: For 15 seconds, your Intellect and Spirit are doubled and all critical periodic healing done by you restores 5 % of your missing mana.

entries.name: Vizier Form
entries.description_text: $bb

entries.name: Worship
entries.description_text: Allows all critical heals to increase periodic healing the target receives from you by 10 % for 5 seconds.

entries.name: The Antidote
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Rejuvenating Venom by 2 sec and increases its tick rate by -30 % .

entries.name: Fangbinder
entries.description_text: Increases the healing of Serpent's Fang by 50 % and Serpent's Fang can no longer miss.

entries.name: Lifemender
entries.description_text: Your Serpent's Fang now heals up to 5 additional nearby allies and Alkahest now heals an additional nearby target.

entries.name: Book of Shadra
entries.description_text: Doubles the duration, cooldown, and healing of Green Salve . In addition, it now seeks another nearby ally to heal every 6 sec, instead of at the end of the duration.

entries.name: Venom Glands
entries.description_text: Increases your healing done by 15 % on allies below 35% health or if they are Poisoned .

entries.name: Cycle of Rebirth
entries.description_text: Effective periodic healing with Shadra's Balm now has a 10 % chance to make your next Alkahest within 8 seconds is free and instant.

entries.name: Good Venom
entries.description_text: Rejuvenating Venom will now affect 1 additional nearby ally.

entries.name: Fang Blessing
entries.description_text: Increases your critical strike chance by 3 % .

entries.name: Mending Mist
entries.description_text: Spread a precarious mist to up to 8 allies within 30 yds, healing them for 9 + 15% healing every 1 sec for 7 seconds. After 1.69 sec, all allies within 30 yds are healed for an additional 104 + 23.1% healing .

entries.name: Serpent Lord's Amulet
entries.description_text: Draw power from the Serpent Lord's Amulet , increasing your spell haste by 20 % and reduces your mana costs by -50 % for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Alkahest
entries.description_text: 2 Charges, 12 sec recharge Bless an ally with Shadra's grace, healing them for 85 + 31.44% healing and extending the duration of Shadra's Prayer on them by 9 sec.

entries.name: Venom Weaving
entries.description_text: Your Serpent's Fang now increases the healing of your next 2 Alkahests by 25 % .

entries.name: Shadra's Aid
entries.description_text: Envelop an ally in Shadra's grace, reducing all damage taken by -20 % and causing direct damage taken to restore 3 % maximum health for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Mycelial Replenishment
entries.description_text: Increases your critical strike chance and critical healing done by 20 % for 20 seconds and instantly restore 30 % of your maximum mana, but consumes all stacks of Mycelial Healing on all nearby allies. While active, all periodic critical strikes heal for an additional 20 % of the healing done.

entries.name: Genocide
entries.description_text: Increases the critical damage and critical strike chance of Slaughter by 10 % .

entries.name: Ravenous Thirst
entries.description_text: Reduces the Runic Power cost of Ghastly Screech and Soul Strike by -10 .

entries.name: Blood Harvester
entries.description_text: Increases critical strike chance of all party and raid members by 3 % . Does not stack with similar effects.

entries.name: Blood Frenzy
entries.description_text: Casting Harvest Time with an enemy targeted within 20 yds of you now unleashes a Blood Frenzy . Blood Frenzy Deals 1 + 36% AP Shadow Damage to your target every 0.75 sec for 7.5 seconds. At the end of the duration, the target takes an additional 457 + 45% AP Shadow Damage.

entries.name: Crimson Wraith
entries.description_text: Increases your critical stike damage by 10 % .

entries.name: Slaughter
entries.description_text: Generates 1 Reaped Soul Eradicate an enemy with your scythe, dealing 130 % Weapon Damage plus 14 . Only usable on enemies below 35% health.

entries.name: Harvest Time
entries.description_text: Increases your damage and critical strike chance by 15 % and gives your spells that require Soul Infusion a -50 % to not consume the effect for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Blood Fueled
entries.description_text: Increases the healing absorbed by Doomrend by 30 % .

entries.name: The Time Has Come
entries.description_text: Your abilities now deal 10 % more damage against slowed targets.

entries.name: Crow's Harvest
entries.description_text: Strike all nearby enemies for 55 % Weapon Damage plus 6 . Damage dealt harvests a Soul Fragment , up to a maximum of 3 .

entries.name: Dark Fate
entries.description_text: Reduces the cost of Crow's Harvest by -10 Runic Power.

entries.name: Ruin
entries.description_text: $bd

entries.name: Harvesting Grounds
entries.description_text: Create a harvesting ground at the target location for 10 seconds, enemies inside have their melee and ranged haste and movement speed reduced by -20 % For the duration, enemies that try to exit the harvesting ground will be pulled back to its center.

entries.name: Darkrend Scythe
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Doomrend and Crow's Harvest now applies a bleed, dealing 56 + 8.5% AP Physical damage every 2 sec for 10 seconds, stacking 5 times. Additional applications do not refresh the duration.

entries.name: Sanguine Harvester
entries.description_text: Increases your melee haste by 10 % .

entries.name: Doomer
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Doomrend and Slaughter by 30 % .

entries.name: Redshade
entries.description_text: $bf

entries.name: Crimson Death
entries.description_text: Your Slaughter now has a 20 % chance to cast an additional time free of cost.

entries.name: Shudder Scythe
entries.description_text: Your Murder is transformed into Shudder Scythe , which costs additional Runic Power but deals increased damage and generates Soul Fragments . Shudder Scythe (Transform) Strike an enemy 5 times, each dealing 30 % Weapon Damage, scaling with level, and granting you a Soul Fragment with each strike.

entries.name: Red Wake
entries.description_text: Direct damage critical strikes now generate an additional Soul Fragment .

entries.name: Haunter
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Soulrend by 10 sec.

entries.name: Blood Knight
entries.description_text: Critical strikes with Doomrend now refund a Reaped Soul .

entries.name: Deathbringer
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Blood Frenzy and Harvest Time by 100 % .

entries.name: Hungering Scythe
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Deathwind by 4 sec and Crow's Harvest now deals 15 % additional damage to enemies inside.

entries.name: Hemorrhage
entries.description_text: Increases the damage and critical strike chance of your abilities by 10 % against enemies below 35% health.

entries.name: Callous Soul
entries.description_text: Increases the amount of armor Soulrend causes you to ignore by 10 % .

entries.name: Unbound
entries.description_text: Your Reliquary of the Lost is now guaranteed to critically strike for 25 % increased damage on enemies below 20% health.

entries.name: The Grim Reaper
entries.description_text: Your Ghost Claw transforms into Wraith Claw and now has 2 charges. Wraith Claw 2 Charges, 15 sec recharge Chill an enemy with a ghostly claw, slowing and stealing -50 % of their movement speed for 8 seconds. Whenever you kill an enemy, refund a charge of this ability. Scales with modifiers to Ghost Claw .

entries.name: Harvester
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive You now heal yourself equal to 15 % of all damage dealt.

entries.name: Sever
entries.description_text: Attempt to drain an enemies vitals, leeching 22 + 31.03% AP health, interrupting casting and preventing any spell from that school from being cast for 3 seconds.

entries.name: Crimson Thirst
entries.description_text: Your Physical damage dealt to enemies now grants Crimson Thirst for 20 seconds, stacking 5 times. Crimson Thirst (Stacks) Your next Murder within 15 seconds deals 10 % increased damage and costs -10 % less Runic Power per stack. At 5 stacks, it also heals you equal to 50 % of the damage dealt.

entries.name: This Is My Domain
entries.description_text: Level 50 Passive Increases the amount healed through the Harvest - Level 10 Passive by 10 % and causes being in your Harvesting Grounds to increase this effect by an additional 25 % .

entries.name: Executioner
entries.description_text: Level 40 Passive Increases your critical strike rating by 20 % of your Strength. In addition, increases your Armor penetration by 30 % against enemies below 35% health.

entries.name: Extinction
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Direct Physical damage dealt now has a 5 % chance to grant you Extinction for 10 seconds. Chance to trigger this effect is increased by 10 % for each Reaped Soul active. Extinction Your next Slaughter is usable regardless of the target's health and costs -10 less Runic Power.

entries.name: Bountiful Harvest
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Reap and Murder by 25 % .

entries.name: Mortal's End
entries.description_text: Level 30 Passive Allows Extinction to stack an additional time and allows Wraithblade to grant you Extinction . Extinction Your next Slaughter is usable regardless of the target's health and costs -10 less Runic Power.

entries.name: Maw Knight
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of Doomrend by 5 % .

entries.name: Blood Wraith
entries.description_text: Wraithblade now deals an additional 100 % Weapon Damage and its Runic Power cost is reduced by -20 .

entries.name: Souls for the Slaughter
entries.description_text: Critical strikes with Slaughter now cause your auto attacks to deal an additional 85 % Shadow damage for 5 seconds.

entries.name: Doomrend
entries.description_text: Rend an enemy dealing 140 % Weapon Damage plus 17 + 35% AP , causing you to apply a dark shield to them that absorbs the next 75 + 100% Strength healing done to them for 5 seconds, and generates Runic Power.

entries.name: Fleeting Soul
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Soulslam by -15 sec.

entries.name: Apparition
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Spectre Stride by 30 % and reduces the chance for enemies to see you while stealthed.

entries.name: Soulrot
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Deathchaser now applies Soulrot . Soulrot Rot the soul of your target, cursing them for 15 seconds. At the end of the duration the enemy will take damage based on the number of stacks accrued. Each instance of damage from Deathchaser adds 1 stack to this effect, up to 20 stacks. Dispelling this effect causes the dispeller to instantly take 1200 + 200% AP Shadow Damage.

entries.name: Shade
entries.description_text: Become a shade, entering an improved stealth mode for 10 seconds and entering Underwalk . Removes all movement impairing effects.

entries.name: Spiritual Reflexes
entries.description_text: While below 35% maximum health, your chance to dodge attacks is increased by 25 % and dodging an attack unleashes Soul Harvest on the target. Soul Harvest (Damage) Blasts your target for 1 + 5% AP + 10% shadow SP Shadow Damage, healing for 100% of the damage dealt.

entries.name: Spectre
entries.description_text: Level 30 Passive Reduces the cooldown of Underwalk by -10 sec. In addition, Withering Touch will now always apply Ghost Claw to the target. Ghost Claw (Speed) Chill an enemy with a ghostly claw, slowing and stealing -50 % of their movement speed for 8 seconds.

entries.name: Spirit Render
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Increases your spell penetration by 20 , scaling with your level.

entries.name: Dirge
entries.description_text: Generates 2 Soul Fragments Strike the enemy with both weapons, dealing 70 % ( 130 % if a dagger is equipped) Weapon Damage as Shadowfrost Damage with each, and generates Runic Power.

entries.name: The Jailer's Call
entries.description_text: Attacks against enemies below 20% health deal an additional 140 + 18% AP Shadow damage.

entries.name: Soul Piercer
entries.description_text: Striking at least 1 enemy with Soulslam now refunds its Reaped Souls .

entries.name: Lord of Death
entries.description_text: Abilities affected by Ghostly Weapon now deal 25 % more damage per additional target.

entries.name: Death's Presence
entries.description_text: Increases all damage dealt by party and raid members by 3 % . Does not stack with similar effects.

entries.name: Beyond Death
entries.description_text: Dealing damage with Reliquary of the Lost now has a 8 % chance to launch an additional Soul Bolt .

entries.name: Lamenting
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Ghostly Weapon now heals for 50 % of the damage dealt.

entries.name: Death Dealer
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Ghostly Weapon and Soulrend by 5 sec.

entries.name: Mark of Death
entries.description_text: Increases the damage dealt by Deathchaser by 15 % and your hit chance by 3 % .

entries.name: Reaver
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Deathstalker , Soul Shear , and Soulstone Lure by -50 % .

entries.name: Soul Bane
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Reliquary of the Lost by -5 sec.

entries.name: Endbringer
entries.description_text: Become an Endbringer for 15 seconds, increasing the damage of Dirge by 30 % , the range by 20 yds, and causes it to generate 3 Reaped Souls . For the duration, Dirge will heal you for 75 % of its damage dealt.

entries.name: Deathchaser
entries.description_text: Force death upon an enemy, dealing 13 + 8% AP Shadowfrost Damage, repeating every 0 sec for 1 seconds, and generates Runic Power.

entries.name: Deathwail
entries.description_text: Reduces the Runic Power cost of Wraithblade by -50 % .

entries.name: Anima Ambusher
entries.description_text: Spectre Stride now deals an additional 125 % of its damage dealt over 5 seconds.

entries.name: Ghostly Magic
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Reap , Dirge , and Reliquary of the Lost by 10 % .

entries.name: Soul Generator
entries.description_text: Critical strikes with Dirge now generate 10 Runic Power. Critical strikes with Murder now generate 1 additional Reaped Soul .

entries.name: Ghastly Hilt
entries.description_text: Ghostly Weapon now causes your melee abilities to strike up to 2 additional targets near the primary target.

entries.name: The End Is Near
entries.description_text: Wraithblade now creates a spectral version of yourself for 12 seconds that casts Dirge and Murder on enemies.

entries.name: Purgatory
entries.description_text: When you gain Soul Infusion , the damage of your Soulrend and Reliquary of the Lost is increased by 20 % for 6 seconds, stacking 2 times.

entries.name: Ghostly Weapon
entries.description_text: 2 Charges, 40 sec recharge Imbue your weapon with ghostly power for 15 seconds, causing melee attacks to deal 25 % additional damage as Frost damage.

entries.name: Chasing Death
entries.description_text: Deathchaser used against a target below 20% health will now reapply itself at the end of its duration until they die or until 5 seconds passes.

entries.name: Soulforged Weaponry
entries.description_text: Increases your off-hand weapon damage by 25 % . While dual-wielding, your auto attacks now have a 8 % chance to make your next Murder free of cost.

entries.name: Shattered Souls
entries.description_text: Your Wraithblade now deals double damage to enemies affected by Soulrend .

entries.name: Spectre's Call
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Deathwind , Murder , and Soul Strike by 15 % .

entries.name: Soulbender
entries.description_text: Significantly increases the Runic Power generated by Deathchaser .

entries.name: Essence Harvest
entries.description_text: Increases the additional Frost damage dealt by Ghostly Weapon by 10 % .

entries.name: Spirit Chaser
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance and critical damage of Reap , Deathchaser , and Wraithblade by 10 % .

entries.name: Weakened Souls
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive Your Soulrend now also applies Weakened Soul , increasing the target's Shadow and Frost damage taken from you by 10 % .

entries.name: Sepulchral Renewal
entries.description_text: Resets the cooldown of Limbo , Soulslam , and Shade . Usable while stealthed.

entries.name: Beyond the Veil
entries.description_text: Level 40 Passive Entering Underwalk now grants you Beyond the Veil , increasing movement speed by 30 % and allowing you to walk on water.

entries.name: Gravesite
entries.description_text: Casting Endbringer now marks the ground beneath you as your Gravesite for 15 seconds. Direct critical strikes made against enemies within a Gravesite now deals 530 + 36% AP Shadow damage.

entries.name: Soul Slip
entries.description_text: Level 30 Passive Avoiding attacks now has a 50 % chance to harvest a Soul Fragment from the attacker.

entries.name: Jailer's Will
entries.description_text: Soul Strike now deals 30% Strength increased damage, scaling with Strength.

entries.name: Dark Soldier
entries.description_text: Increases your hit chance by 3 % and reduces your Magic damage taken by -2 % .

entries.name: Well of Souls
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Soul Strike and Murder now reduces the cooldown of Spectral Scythe by -1 sec.

entries.name: Soultaker
entries.description_text: Damage dealt with Dreadwake now reduces the cooldown of Tormented Souls by -1 sec.

entries.name: Siphon Anima
entries.description_text: When you summon a Spectral Scythe , you now heal for 5 % of your damage dealt for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Hard Bargain
entries.description_text: While Tormented Souls is active on you, your melee attack speed is increased by 30 % and your Dreadwake costs -5 less Runic Power.

entries.name: Final Requiem
entries.description_text: Increases your critical strike chance with abilities that deal Shadow damage by 15 % against enemies below 20% health.

entries.name: Tormentor
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive Consuming Soul Infusion now reduces the cooldown of Tormented Souls by -3 sec.

entries.name: To The Shadowlands
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Soulslam by 1 sec.

entries.name: Warden of the Lost
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Spectral Scythes and Spectral Wardens now reduces the cooldown of Spectral Warden by -0.5 sec.

entries.name: Lifestealer
entries.description_text: Increases the missing health generated by Soul Strike by 3 % .

entries.name: Dreadknight
