entries.description_text: Increases your armor contribution from mail and plate items by 20 % and reduces the chance for spells to hit you by -2 % .

entries.name: Requiem
entries.description_text: Swing at enemies around you in a fury of souls, dealing 67 + 40% AP Shadowfrost Damage, reducing their melee and ranged attack speed by -20 % for 15 seconds, and generating Runic Power.

entries.name: Behemoth
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Increases your Stamina by 20 % and your Armor penetration by 10 % of your Strength.

entries.name: Dark Soul
entries.description_text: Level 40 Passive Increases your Stamina equal to your Armor penetration rating.

entries.name: Spectral Scythe
entries.description_text: Summons 1 Spectral Scythe for each Reaped Soul active which attack a nearby enemy for 20 seconds. Striking enemies with Soul Strike causes the Spectral Scythe to attack that enemy and 5 nearby enemies. Consumes Reaped Souls and Soul Infusion .

entries.name: Soul Knight
entries.description_text: Your successful parries and dodges increase all healing you receive by 2 % and reduce all Magic damage taken by -2 % for 10 seconds, stacking 5 times.

entries.name: Well of Eternity
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of your Spectral Scythes by 10 sec.

entries.name: Spirit Army
entries.description_text: Your Spectral Warden now causes you to summon 2 additional Spectral Wardens , but their duration is reduced by -8 sec. In addition, increases the amount absorbed by the shield granted by Spectral Warden by 100 % .

entries.name: Life Tap
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Spectral Warden by -60 sec and it now heals you equal to 200 % of the damage it deals.

entries.name: Ethereal Guard
entries.description_text: Reduces the damage taken by party and raid members by -3 % . Does not stack with similar effects. In addition, increases your melee haste by 10 % .

entries.name: Spirit Culling
entries.description_text: For the duration of Spectral Scythe , the damage of Soul Strike is increased by 20 % . In addition, generating a Reaped Soul now has a 10 % chance to summon a Spectral Scythe to fight alongside you for 10 sec.

entries.name: Bolstered Form
entries.description_text: Assume a bolstered form for 15 seconds, generating 30 Runic Power, increasing your Armor by 25 % , and increasing your parry chance by 25 % .

entries.name: Painmail
entries.description_text: Dealing damage with Reap , Dreadwake and Soul Strike now grants a stack of Painmail for 15 seconds, stacking up to 8 times. Additional applications do not refresh the effect. When Painmail stacks expire naturally, you are healed for 2 % of your maximum health and reduce the cooldown of Bolstered Form by -0.5 sec for each stack.

entries.name: Fatesealer
entries.description_text: Generating a Reaped Soul now reduces damage taken by -2 % for 15 seconds, stacking 3 times.

entries.name: Essence Binder
entries.description_text: Soul Strike now steals some of the target's health and Strength for 12 seconds, granting it to you at increased value.

entries.name: Harnessed Life
entries.description_text: Your Tormented Souls now has a -25 % chance to not consume a stack from damage taken.

entries.name: Dreadwake
entries.description_text: Generates 1 Reaped Soul Unleash a wave of souls upon enemies in a 12 yd cone, causing 80 % Weapon Damage plus 5 Frost damage.

entries.name: Dominator
entries.description_text: Reduces the Runic Power cost of Soul Strike by $/10s;s1.

entries.name: Eater of Souls
entries.description_text: Reaching 3 Reaped Souls now reduces your Physical damage taken by -10 % and you regain 1 % of your maximum health every 2 sec for 10 seconds. This will not trigger while already active. In addition, the healing done by Deathwind is increased by 10% .

entries.name: Spectral Warden
entries.description_text: Summon a spectral guardian to fight along side you for 20 seconds and apply an absorption shield to up to 8 allies within 20 yds, absorbing 199 + 150% Stamina damage.

entries.name: Empyrean Fortitude
entries.description_text: Increases your parry chance by 5 % and parrying an attack now generates 2 Runic Power.

entries.name: Spirit Realm
entries.description_text: Your Deathwind now also increases your healing taken by 10 % while you stand within its radius.

entries.name: Intimidating Presence
entries.description_text: Bolstered Form now increases the damage nearby enemies take from you by 15 % for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Soulsight
entries.description_text: Increases critical strike chance of all party and raid members by 3 % . Does not stack with similar effects. In addition, dealing direct damage now has a 15 % chance to generate a Soul Fragment .

entries.name: Soulstorm
entries.description_text: Requiem and Soulrend now have a 40 % chance to refund a Reaped Soul .

entries.name: Soul Splinters
entries.description_text: Erupt with ghastly force whenever you harvest a Reaped Soul , dealing 47 + 10.5% Stamina + 15% AP Spellshadow Damage to nearby enemies over 6 seconds.

entries.name: Wraithblade
entries.description_text: Generates 3 Reaped Souls Strike for 150 % Weapon Damage plus 36 + 62.5% SP + 18% AP Shadow damage, ignoring resistances, absorption, and invulnerability effects.

entries.name: Mysterious Omen
entries.description_text: Increases the range of Murder and Soul Shock by 5 yds.

entries.name: Tormented Souls
entries.description_text: Create 1 Tormented Soul and generate Runic Power for each Reaped Soul active. Consumes Reaped Souls and Soul Infusion . Tormented Souls Reduces all direct damage you take by -10 % and heals you for 35 + 5.8% AP + 24% Stamina , removing 1 stack. Lasts 20 seconds.

entries.name: Essence Invigoration
entries.description_text: Casting abilities that require Soul Infusion now has a 50 % chance to restore 5 % of your missing health.

entries.name: Soulfused Constitution
entries.description_text: Your Tormented Souls now creates 1 additional soul for each Reaped Soul active.

entries.name: Spectre Strength
entries.description_text: Increases your Strength by 5 % .

entries.name: Ghastly Advance
entries.description_text: Increases the range of Spectre Stride by 5 yds and causes it to generate 5 more Runic Power.

entries.name: Withering Touch
entries.description_text: Your touch rots armor and resolve, reducing the target’s armor by -20 % and increasing their Magic damage taken by 10 % for 1 minute, and generates Runic Power.

entries.name: Mawborn
entries.description_text: Reduces the duration of disarm and incapacitate effects against you by -20 % .

entries.name: Soul Tap
entries.description_text: Chip away at the very essence of your own soul, generating 50 Runic Power. Usable while stealthed.

entries.name: Soul Protector
entries.description_text: Increases Armor contribution from items by 25 % and increases your magic resistances by 21 .

entries.name: Soul Furnace
entries.description_text: Increases the amount leeched from Soul Harvest by an additional 50 % .

entries.name: Between Shadows
entries.description_text: Casting Spectre Stride now generates 1 Reaped Soul .

entries.name: Soul Harvest
entries.description_text: Generating Reaped Souls now triggers Soul Harvest . Soul Harvest (Damage) Blasts your target for 1 + 5% AP + 10% shadow SP Shadow Damage, healing for 100% of the damage dealt.

entries.name: Harvester's Scythe
entries.description_text: Increases the amount leeched by Soul Strike by 15 % .

entries.name: Soul Warden
entries.description_text: Increases your melee attack power by 1 for every 100 Armor you have.

entries.name: Painbringer
entries.description_text: Generating Reaped Souls now has a 10 % chance to trigger Masochistic Rage for 5 sec. If Masochistic Rage is already active, it will instead extend the duration by 3 sec.

entries.name: Masochistic Rage
entries.description_text: After a 1 sec delay, you suffer 660 + 36% AP damage, enraging you and increasing your damage dealt by 20 % for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Sinister Litany
entries.description_text: Embrace your sinister thoughts, instantly generating 3 Reaped Souls .

entries.name: Soulstrider
entries.description_text: Increases the movement speed granted by Veilwalk by 20 % .

entries.name: Limbo
entries.description_text: Rip out of your mortal shell for 5 seconds, making you immune to all harmful spell effects and instantly restoring 30 % of your maximum health and Runic Power. Usable while stunned, feared, or polymorphed.

entries.name: Backswing
entries.description_text: Increases the Runic Power generated by Reap by 5 .

entries.name: Veilwalk
entries.description_text: 2 Charges, 60 sec recharge Move with spectral agility, gaining 50 % increased movement speed for 5 seconds, stacking 2 times. Removes all movement impairing effects. Usable while stealthed.

entries.name: Soul Harvester
entries.description_text: Landing the killing blow on a target that yields experience or honor now grants Soul Harvester for 10 seconds. Soul Harvester After killing an enemy you generate 2 Runic Power every 1 sec.

entries.name: Dark Passage
entries.description_text: Dealing direct critical strikes with Shadow damage reduce the cooldown of Limbo by -2 sec.

entries.name: Ghastly Form
entries.description_text: After using Spectre Stride , Scythe Rush , or Veilwalk you now gain a shield that absorbs 114 + 33% AP damage for 6 seconds.

entries.name: Burial Rites
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of your Rites by 20 % .

entries.name: Dominion
entries.description_text: Gaining Soul Infusion now increases your Armor by 585 for 6 seconds.

entries.name: Damned
entries.description_text: When you gain Soul Infusion , you are protected from being slowed below 100 % of normal speed for 5 seconds.

entries.name: Ghost
entries.description_text: Sinister Litany now increases the damage of your next spell or ability within 10 sec by 50 % and casting it now grants you Ghost for 3 seconds. Ghost (Proc) Enter an enhanced stealth mode that does not break on damage dealt or taken.

entries.name: From the Shadows
entries.description_text: Exiting Underwalk increases your critical strike chance by 10 % for 5 seconds.

entries.name: Ghastly Screech
entries.description_text: Screech with ghastly intent, silencing all nearby enemies for 4 seconds, and dealing 90 + 25% AP Shadowfrost Damage at the end of the duration.

entries.name: Jailer's Bargain
entries.description_text: Beckon the jailer, gaining a shield that absorbs damage equal to 30% of your maximum health for 10 seconds. While this is active you are considered Undead and are immune to fear, sleep, and charm effects.

entries.name: Into The Shadow Realm
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Deathstalker , Soulstone Lure , and Soul Shear by -25 % .

entries.name: Scythe Rush
entries.description_text: Rush towards an enemy and generate 15 Runic Power. Cannot be used on the same target more than once every 20 seconds.

entries.name: Pulverize
entries.description_text: Critical strikes with Totemic Smash now trigger the area of effect portion of its damage an additional time.

entries.name: Lacerations
entries.description_text: Melee critical strikes now increase the effectiveness of bleed effects on the target by 30 % for 15 seconds. Does not stack with similar effects.

entries.name: Earthshaker
entries.description_text: Increases the damage dealt by Seismic abilities by 10 % and allows their periodic damage to critically strike.

entries.name: Wild Rampage
entries.description_text: Increases your attack power by 5 % and your chance to hit by 2 % .

entries.name: Totemic Smash
entries.description_text: Smash an enemy for 140 % Weapon Damage plus 20 . Deals an additional 10 + 35% AP damage to up to 5 enemies within 8 yds.

entries.name: Sharpened Claws
entries.description_text: Your direct critical strikes now increase your and your pet's Armor penetration by 5 % for 10 seconds, stacking 3 times.

entries.name: Savage Frenzy
entries.description_text: Enrage you and your pet for 18 seconds, increasing damage dealt by 20 % , and attack speed and movement speed by 30 % .

entries.name: Spirit Stable
entries.description_text: Call forth a stabled animal spirit to replace your current one. Lasts 10 seconds.

entries.name: Killer's Path
entries.description_text: Increases the attack power of party and raid members by 5 % . Does not stack with similar effects. In addition, increases your critical strike chance by 3 % .

entries.name: Bloody Claws
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by your pet now reduces the enemies periodic healing received by -10 % for 15 seconds, stacking 3 times.

entries.name: Wild Carnage
entries.description_text: Seismic Spike now causes your Wildclaws to strike up to 4 additional nearby targets, dealing reduced damage with each additional enemy struck. Lasts 6 seconds.

entries.name: Elemental Berserker
entries.description_text: Increases the area damage dealt by Totemic Smash by 30 % , but it now costs 5 additional Rage.

entries.name: Tremors
entries.description_text: Level 30 Passive Periodic damage now has a 10 % chance to reset the cooldown of your Seismic abilties and cause your next cast within 10 seconds to be free of cost.

entries.name: Wild Rage
entries.description_text: Removes the Rage cost of Rylak's Bite .

entries.name: Spiritual Frenzy
entries.description_text: Casting Primal Shred now empowers your pet, causing its auto attacks to strike up to 4 nearby enemies for 21 seconds.

entries.name: Rips and Tears
entries.description_text: Periodic damage dealt by you or your pet now generates 2 Rage for you and 5 Focus for your pet.

entries.name: Totemic Echoes
entries.description_text: Totemic Smash now applies Totemic Crash to an enemy for 2 seconds. At the end of the duration, if you are within 5 yds of the target, you cast Totemic Smash against them for free.

entries.name: Bring Me Their Bones
entries.description_text: Mark an enemy for 15 seconds, causing damage dealt by your pet's abilities to the target to add a stack of Bring Me Their Bones . At 5 stacks, your pet consumes this buff to deal 310 + 50% AP damage to the target, ignoring Armor.

entries.name: Rylak's Blessing
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Rylak's Bite now increases your pet's damage and critical strike chance by 2 % , stacking 2 times, for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Rylak's Bite
entries.description_text: 2 Charges, 10 sec recharge You and your pet rush towards an enemy and strike them, dealing 120 % Weapon Damage plus 8 .

entries.name: Fury of the Wild
entries.description_text: When you cast a Boon , you cast the same Boon on your pet at 50% effectiveness.

entries.name: Torn to Shreds
entries.description_text: Totemic Smash and Rylak's Bite now causes enemies to bleed for 155 + 4.5% AP over 12 seconds, stacking 2 times.

entries.name: Rexxar's Might
entries.description_text: Your physical critical strikes now cause your pet's next attack to apply a bleed, dealing 93 + 15% AP Physical damage every 2 sec for 6 seconds.

entries.name: Wild At Heart
entries.description_text: Reduces the global cooldown of Wildclaw by 0 . -25 sec.

entries.name: Throat Clamp
entries.description_text: Command your pet to dash forward a short distance towards your target, interrupting spellcasting and preventing any spell in that school from being cast for 3 seconds.

entries.name: Primal Shred
entries.description_text: Command your pet to shred up to 5 enemies within 8 yds, causing them to bleed, dealing 53 + 56% AP Physical damage over 21 seconds.

entries.name: Rush of the Hunt
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Wildclaw and Rylak's Bite by 15 % against bleeding enemies.

entries.name: Primal Rage
entries.description_text: Casting Totemic Smash now refreshes a charge of Rylak's Bite .

entries.name: Pulverize
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of Totemic Smash by 10 % .

entries.name: Primal Resurgence
entries.description_text: Seismic Crash now generates an additional 10 Rage and Seismic Spike now generates 3 additional Rage.

entries.name: Spinebreaker
entries.description_text: Your Seismic Grasp now roots enemies for 3.5 seconds.

entries.name: Frenzied Roar
entries.description_text: Roar with bestial fervor, generating 20 Rage and granting you 20 % increased attack speed for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Son of Ursoc
entries.description_text: Your Savage Frenzy now transforms you into a feast beast, freeing you of all movement impairing effects. In addition, increases the effectiveness of Savage Frenzy by 50 % , and reduces its cooldown by -60 sec.

entries.name: Totem Warrior
entries.description_text: While you have Boon of the Bear active, Wildclaw will now strike an additional time for 40 % of the damage dealt with both weapons.

entries.name: Bestial Wrath
entries.description_text: When you critically strike, your pet restores 10 Focus. When your pet critically strikes, you restore 2 % maximum mana and increase the target's Physical damage taken by 4 % for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Raptor Talons
entries.description_text: Increases your Strength by 5 % and your expertise by 4 .

entries.name: Spirit Beast Master
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive You may now tame beasts in Azeroth to aid you as a companion.

entries.name: Blessing of Therazane
entries.description_text: Each stack of Earthshaping now increases your critical damage dealt by 5 % .

entries.name: Earthshaping
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive Casting Geode Barrage and your Seismic abilities now generate Earthshaping . Earthshaping Empowers some of your abilities and increases your spell haste by 1 % for 20 seconds, stacking 15 times. Additional applications do not refresh duration.

entries.name: Crushing the Earth
entries.description_text: Level 40 Passive You now gain spell power equal to 50% of your armor penetration rating.

entries.name: Therazane's Blessing
entries.description_text: Level 50 Passive Allows the periodic damage dealt by Seismic Tremor , Seismic Crash , and Earthquake to critically strike.

entries.name: Volcanic Blast
entries.description_text: Your Physical or Nature damaging critical strikes now deal an additional 10 % of the damage dealt as Fire damage to the target and enemies nearby.

entries.name: Magmatism
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Eruption by -15 sec and causes Magma Geodes to deal 30 % more damage to enemies above 75% health.

entries.name: Cave In
entries.description_text: Cave in your target, interrupting spellcasting and preventing any spell in that school from being cast for 4 seconds. Successfully interrupting a target generates 1 stack of Earthshaping .

entries.name: Trembling Rage
entries.description_text: Increases the amount of Rage generated by Seismic Tremor by 2 .

entries.name: Nature's Will
entries.description_text: Casting Seismic spells now extends the duration of Earthshaping by 4 sec.

entries.name: Magma Fissure
entries.description_text: Stomp the ground and unleash a wave of earth and stone in a 20 yd line that knocks all enemies to the side and deals cond(gt(SPFI, SPN), 684+0+SPFI*1, 684+0+SPN*1) Fire damage, piercing absorption effects. Your next spell within 6 seconds is instant cast.

entries.name: Eruption
entries.description_text: Launch 1 Magma Geode at your target every 0 sec for 0.2 seconds, dealing cond(gt(SPFI, SPN), 58+200+SPFI*0.2, 58+200+SPN*0.2) Firestorm Damage. Duration increased by 0.2 sec for each stack of Earthshaping .

entries.name: Embraced By Earth!
entries.description_text: At the end of the duration of Earth's Embrace , you now disorient all nearby enemies for 6 seconds. Damage dealt will end the effect.

entries.name: Earth Pummeling
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Geode Barrage and Geodes to increase the chance for the enemy to be critically hit with spells by 3 % for 12 seconds.

entries.name: Dream
entries.description_text: Generating Earthshaping while at or above 10 stacks now grants Dream . Dream Increases the critical strike chance of your Seismic abilities and Lithic Lance by 10 % for 3 seconds.

entries.name: Stone Tosser
entries.description_text: Increases spell bonus damage scaling of Geode Barrage , Stoneshard , and Seismic Crash by 25 % .

entries.name: Cragforming
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Earth's Embrace by 4 sec.

entries.name: Therazane's Might
entries.description_text: Your Terrasurge will now always critically strike against targets affected by your Seismic Tremor .

entries.name: Stoneskin
entries.description_text: Increases your Armor by 200 % of your Intellect.

entries.name: Lithic Lance
entries.description_text: $cb

entries.name: Everlasting Rage
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Seismic Tremor by 5 sec and its tick rate by -10 % .

entries.name: One With The Earth
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Stoneshard and Geode Barrage by 20 % and Stoneshard now restores 4 % of your maximum mana.

entries.name: Primal Shaman's Mask
entries.description_text: Direct damage dealt now has a 10 % chance to launch a Geode at the enemy Geode Hurl an enchanted stone at the target, dealing 173 + 34.9% SP + 8.5% AP Physical Damage and generating 5 Rage. .

entries.name: Terrasurge
entries.description_text: Unleash a massive globule of earth at an enemy, dealing 140 + 130% nature SP Physical damage and reducing their Armor by -50 % for 10 sec. Pierces through absorption, deflection, and reflection effects. Deals 5 % additional damage for each Earthshaping stack.

entries.name: Cracking the Earth
entries.description_text: Striking at least 5 enemies with Volcanic Blast now grants you Cracking the Earth for 10 seconds. Cracking the Earth (Proc) Your Seismic Spike strikes 1 additional enemy. Stacks 5 times.

entries.name: Gaze of Therazane
entries.description_text: Increases the range of your Geomancy spells by 10 % and of Seismic spells by 8 yds.

entries.name: Molten Fervor
entries.description_text: Increases the spell haste of all party and raid members by 3 % . Does not stack with similar effects. In addition, increases your spell haste by 5 % .

entries.name: Tectonic Power
entries.description_text: Increases the duration Earthquake by 3 sec and increases its damage dealt by 25 % .

entries.name: Rockslide
entries.description_text: Stoneshard now has a 15 % chance to cast an additional time. This effect can trigger itself.

entries.name: Cataclysm
entries.description_text: Generating Earthshaping or casting Stoneshard now has a 10 % chance to reset the cooldown of your Seismic abilities.

entries.name: Whispers of the Earth
entries.description_text: Reduces the cast time of Geode Barrage and Stoneshard by 0.3 sec.

entries.name: Seismic Tremor
entries.description_text: Send a tremor through the earth at an enemy, dealing 54 + 50% nature SP Physical damage, plus an additional 336 over 24 seconds. Damage is dealt slowly at first, and builds up over time. Damage dealt generates 1 Rage. Generates 2 stacks of Earthshaping .

entries.name: Cave Dweller
entries.description_text: Increases your maximum Rage by 15 and reduces spell pushback suffered from damaging attacks by 50 % .

entries.name: Golem Form
entries.description_text: Transform into a being made of stone and earth for 20 seconds, increasing your haste by 20 % and your Armor by 50 % , and allowing you to cast damaging spells while moving.

entries.name: Tectonic Resonance
entries.description_text: Increases the amount that Earthquake slows enemies by -30 % .

entries.name: Geomolding
entries.description_text: Periodic damage dealt by Seismic Tremor now grants Geomolding for 15 seconds. Geomolding (Proc) Your next Terrasurge costs 2 additional Rage and deals 3 % increased damage. Stacks 20 times.

entries.name: Rupturer
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Seismic Spike or Seismic Crash now generates a stack of Geomolding . Critically striking with Seismic Spike or Seismic Crash now generates an additional stack of Geomolding plus a stack of Earthshaping . Casting Lithic Lance now reduces the cooldown of Terrasurge by -4 sec.

entries.name: Cave Dweller
entries.description_text: Level 30 Passive Increases your armor penetration rating by 50 % of your Intellect.

entries.name: Earth's Embrace
entries.description_text: Encapsulate your body in amber, becoming immune to all Physical attacks and spells for 8 seconds, and healing you for 300 + 50% SP every 2 sec, but making you unable to move or act. Usable while stunned, feared, or polymorphed.

entries.name: Journey To The Core
entries.description_text: $cd

entries.name: Ancient Power
entries.description_text: Increases your Strength by 5 % and your hit chance by 3 % .

entries.name: Hammer of Life
entries.description_text: Your melee attacks and abilities now heal nearby allies and damage nearby enemies equal to 20 % of the damage dealt.

entries.name: Verdant Chase
entries.description_text: Your Spirit Charge and Primal Rush now cooldown faster.

entries.name: Blessing of Neptulon
entries.description_text: Your Hand of the Earthmother now bounces to 1 ally near the primary target.

entries.name: Verdant Warrior
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Wildclaw by 15 % .

entries.name: Grove Tender
entries.description_text: While inside your Bramblepatch your Seismic abilities now have a -80 % reduced cooldown. In addition, the duration of Bramblepatch is doubled.

entries.name: Nature's Fury
entries.description_text: Auto attacks now have a 20 % chance to deal Weapon Damage and restore 5 % of your maximum mana.

entries.name: Elemental Cascade
entries.description_text: Critical strikes with Wildclaw now unleash an Elemental Cascade . Elemental Cascade Restores 32 + 10% AP + 10% healing health to allies in a 12 yd radius around you.

entries.name: Earth's Guidance
entries.description_text: Damage and healing done by Seismic spells now has a 20 % chance to reduce the cooldown of all Seismic spells by -1 sec.

entries.name: Shaman Training
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Wildclaw now reduces the enemy's armor by 555 for 8 seconds.

entries.name: Thorns
entries.description_text: Physical damage dealt or taken now has a 10 % chance to unleash Thorns on an enemy. Thorns (Talent) Create thorns around an enemy, rooting them and dealing 270 Nature Damage over 6 seconds. Direct damage taken may end this effect.

entries.name: Eternally Chosen
entries.description_text: Spirit Charge and Primal Rush now summons 2 Spirits of Life that immediately cast a lesser Spirit Charge on the nearest ally, healing them for 397 + 20% nature SP + 20% AP and dealing 404 + 20% nature SP + 20% AP Nature damage to nearby enemies.

entries.name: Tranquil Mind
entries.description_text: Increases your damage and healing done by 4 % .

entries.name: Primal Power
entries.description_text: Casting Seismic Wave now causes your next Hand of the Earthmother within 8 seconds to cost -50 % less Rage.

entries.name: Running on Instinct
entries.description_text: Passing through allies with Primal Rush now heals up to 5 of them for 166 + 25% AP + 35% SP and grants a stack of Running on Instinct . Running on Instinct (Proc) Damage of Wildclaw and Seismic spells is increased by 5 % for 20 seconds, stacking 5 times.

entries.name: Nature's Blessing
entries.description_text: Healing allies with Seismic Wave now heals them for an additional 20 % of the healing done every 3 sec for 9 sec.

entries.name: Keeper of the Grove
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Bramblepatch by -30 sec.

entries.name: Earthmother's Empowerment
entries.description_text: Hand of the Earthmother now increases the target's dodge chance by 15 % for 5 seconds.

entries.name: Primordial Earth
entries.description_text: Critical strikes with melee attacks now summon 1 Spirit of Life that immediately casts a lesser Spirit Charge on a nearby ally, healing them for 397 + 20% nature SP + 20% AP and dealing 404 + 20% nature SP + 20% AP Nature damage to nearby enemies.

entries.name: Spiritual Warrior
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of Spirit Charge by 25 % .

entries.name: Battleweaver
entries.description_text: Effective healing now increases your melee haste and damage by 2 % for 5 seconds, stacking 3 times.

entries.name: Ride the Wave
entries.description_text: Seismic Wave now increases the movement speed of affected allies by 30 % for 4 seconds.

entries.name: Infusion of Neptulon
entries.description_text: Critically healing an ally now increases your attack power by 15 % for your next 3 attacks. Lasts 12 seconds.

entries.name: Vitality Surge
entries.description_text: All effective healing done now has a 25 % chance to increase the haste of party and raid members by 5 % for 20 seconds. Does not stack with similar effects.

entries.name: Ring of Life
entries.description_text: Allies within 40 yds receive 6 % increased healing. Does not stack with similar effects. In addition, your Magic damage taken is reduced by -10 % .

entries.name: Earthmother's Binding
entries.description_text: Envelop a target in the Earthmother's love, healing them for 501 + 100% healing + 100% AP . If used on an ally, 30 % of their damage taken is redirected to you for 6 seconds.

entries.name: Grove Training
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive All melee damage, or healing done, now has a 10 % chance to grant you Aftershock for 15 seconds. Aftershock Your next Geode Barrage or Earthquake within 15 seconds is now instant cast and costs -75 % less.

entries.name: Neptulon's Wrath
entries.description_text: Emanate an aura for 15 seconds, causing allied players to deal 35% AP additional damage as Froststorm Damage when they deal direct damage. Applies Exhaustion , preventing you from benefiting from similar effects for 1 minute.

entries.name: Primal Awakening
entries.description_text: Enrage all nearby allies, increasing their haste by 30 % for 20 seconds. After being affected by this spell, allies cannot benefit from similar effects for 5 minutes.

entries.name: Flourishing Growth
entries.description_text: Empower party and raid members within 40 yds with verdant strength, increasing their attack or spell power by 95 for 20 seconds. Does not stack with similar effects.

entries.name: Earthmother's Warden
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of your Seismic abilities by -2 sec.

entries.name: Protector's Hand
entries.description_text: You now emanate an aura around you, increasing the Armor of party and raid members by 390 . Does not stack with similar effects.

entries.name: Druid Training
entries.description_text: Your Geode Barrage now heals all allies within 20 yds equal to 10 % of the damage dealt.

entries.name: Grovekeeper's Presence
entries.description_text: Increases chance to hit with all spells and attacks by 1 % for you and party and raid members. Does not stack with similar effects.

entries.name: Tears of the Earthmother
entries.description_text: Increases the amount of targets hit by Seismic Spike by 4 .

entries.name: Infused With Power
entries.description_text: Effectively healing allies with Hammer of Life or Hand of the Earthmother now has a 20 % chance to apply Infused With Power . Infused With Power Increases the critical strike chance of all party and raid members by 5 % for 10 seconds. Does not stack with similar effects.

entries.name: Hand of a God
entries.description_text: Reduces the Rage cost of Hand of the Earthmother by -5 .

entries.name: Douse
entries.description_text: Striking an enemy with Seismic spells now deals an additional 1 + 8% AP Frost damage and reduces all resistances by 75 and increases their Magic damage taken by -2 % for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Ancient of Lore
entries.description_text: Funnel nature's energies into yourself, transforming into an Ancient of Lore for 20 seconds. While active, your stats are increased by 20 % and nearby party members have their costs reduced by -30 % . While transformed, your movement speed is reduced by -30 % .

entries.name: Crashing Out
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Seismic Crash by 30 % .

entries.name: Power Hammer
entries.description_text: You now generate 10 % more Rage from damage dealt, increased by 15 % while a two-handed weapon is equipped.

entries.name: Seismic Wave
entries.description_text: Create a seismic wave of healing water around you, healing for 27 + 60% healing + 28% AP health to up to 8 allies and dealing 47 + 28% AP + 30% healing Nature damage to enemies in a 25 yd radius.

entries.name: Sacred Grove
entries.description_text: Create a Sacred Grove in a 15 yd radius around you for 16 seconds, instantly healing all nearby allies for 2002 + 100% AP . While active, up to 12 allies in the grove receive 25 % increased healing, and regain 3 % of their missing health, Rage, and mana every 2 sec.

entries.name: Spirit Charge
entries.description_text: Charge to an ally's aid, healing them for 53 + 20% healing + 20% AP and dealing 67 + 20% healing + 20% AP Nature damage to enemies within 5 yds of them.

entries.name: Ancient of War
entries.description_text: Funnel nature's fury into yourself, transforming into an Ancient of War for 20 seconds. While active, your Hammer of Life effectiveness is increased by 30 % and nearby party members have their critical strike chance increased by 20 % . While transformed, your movement speed is reduced by -30 % .

entries.name: Earthmother's Roar
entries.description_text: Your Protective Roar now also heals allies equal to 20 % of their missing health.

entries.name: Environmentalist
entries.description_text: Reduces the cost of your spells and abilities by -5 % .

entries.name: Untamed
entries.description_text: Increases the range of Primal Rush by 3 yds.

entries.name: Primal Strikes
entries.description_text: Critical strikes with abilities that deal Physical damage now generate 3 Rage.

entries.name: Emerald Will
entries.description_text: Successfully dispelling a poison or disease effect with Soothing Touch now heals for 4 % maximum health.

entries.name: Primal Convergence
entries.description_text: Ascend into a primal convergence, increasing the effectiveness of your Boons by 100 % for 30 seconds.

entries.name: Dreamslip
entries.description_text: Shifts a party member into the Emerald Dream for 15 seconds, making them immune to damage and unable to attack or cast spells. While active, the target quickly regenerates health and mana and cannot be seen by other players or creatures. Cannot be used on self.

entries.name: Nature's Call
entries.description_text: Increases your healing done and received by 6 % .

entries.name: Focus
entries.description_text: Increases your Intellect and Stamina by 5 % .

entries.name: Fae Presence
entries.description_text: Removes the reagent cost from Fae Dust and causes it to increase the target's stealth detection.

entries.name: Earthmother's Precision
entries.description_text: Seismic Crash now increases the chance for allies to hit with all spells against the enemy by 3 % for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Boulder Dash
entries.description_text: Raise a boulder out of the ground and encase yourself within it, preventing you from attacking or casting spells. For 10 seconds, you roll forward at 70 % increased movement speed, dealing 1 + 50% AP + 100% SP Physical damage to enemies you roll over, and you are immune to crowd control effects.

entries.name: Bramblepatch
entries.description_text: Grow a patch of brambles at your location for 12 seconds. Allies in the area are immune to grip and knockback effects. Enemies in the area are unable to leap, dash, or charge.

entries.name: Bearskin
entries.description_text: Reduces all damage taken by -60 % and reduces the duration of root, stun, and incapacitate effects on you by -30 % for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Earthmother's Blessing
entries.description_text: Attacks which would otherwise kill you now instead reform you in stone, healing for 30 % maximum health and reducing your Physical damage taken by -70 % for 3 seconds. Can only occur once every 2 min.

entries.name: Rock Barrier
entries.description_text: $cf

entries.name: Protector of the Grove
entries.description_text: Dealing direct damage now reduces the cooldown of Bearskin , Primal Convergence , and Boulder Dash by -1 sec.

entries.name: Mending Touch
entries.description_text: Soothing Touch now dispels an additional poison and disease effect.

entries.name: Keen Senses
entries.description_text: Increases your critical strike chance and haste by 3 % .

entries.name: Protective Roar
entries.description_text: Roar with noble tenacity, generating 20 Rage and granting 10 % increased maximum health to all allies for 12 seconds.

entries.name: Natural Efficiency
entries.description_text: Whenever you are struck by a root, stun, or incapacitate effect you are now instantly healed for 4 % of your maximum health.

entries.name: Wildheart
entries.description_text: The Earthmother marks you as her chosen one, reducing the cooldown of all other non-damaging spells and abilities by 5 % , repeating every 2 sec for 15 seconds. Instantly restores 5 % missing health, mana, and Rage to you, repeating every 3 sec.

entries.name: Primal Rush
entries.description_text: Rush forward 20 yd through enemies in a line, dealing 40 Nature damage. Generates 20 Rage.

entries.name: Earthmother's Pendant
entries.description_text: With every strike, the Earthmother’s pendant restores what was lost, healing you equal to 10 % of your damage dealt.

entries.name: Grip
entries.description_text: Summon a stone hand to grip the target, incapacitating them for 40 seconds ( 8 sec vs. players). Damage dealt will break the effect.

entries.name: Primal Fury
entries.description_text: You now passively generate 4 Rage every 5 sec.

entries.name: Tectonic Flow
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Primal Rush and Boulder Dash by -20 % .

entries.name: Grove Guardian
entries.description_text: Mark a location as your Grove for 20 seconds. Allies within gain 30 % movement speed and are healed for 404 + 25% AP every 5 sec, removing 1 poison and disease effect. Enemies within are slowed by -30 % and take 504 + 45% AP Nature damage every 5 sec and are rooted for 2 seconds.

entries.name: Stone Cold
entries.description_text: Increases your maximum health by 4 % .

entries.name: Rage Rolling
entries.description_text: Casting Boulder Dash now instantly generates 50 Rage.

entries.name: Mineralization
entries.description_text: While at or below 35% health, your spells and abilities will increase your healing received by 10 % for 6 seconds.

entries.name: Fury of the Elements
entries.description_text: Your Primal Rush now generates 10 additional Rage.

entries.name: Therazane's Gift
entries.description_text: Therazane's Rage now generates an additional 5 Rage and 5 % additional mana.

entries.name: Primal Totem
entries.description_text: Summon a Primal Totem that increases the primary stats of party and raid members by 20 % within 40 yds for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Rolling Momentum
entries.description_text: Increases the movement speed granted by Boulder Dash by 30 % .

entries.name: Bountiful Boons
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of Boons and Instincts by 10 % .

entries.name: Stonefaced
entries.description_text: Casting Seismic abilities now also grants 2 stacks of Earth's Rage . Earth's Rage Increases movement speed by 4 % and haste by 2 % for 8 seconds, stacking 5 times.

entries.name: Heavy Handed
entries.description_text: Hand of the Earthmother now increases the Armor of yourself and your target by 10 % for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Mountain Giant
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive Auto attacks now have a 20 % chance to grant you Aftershock . Aftershock Your next Geode Barrage or Earthquake within 15 seconds is now instant cast and costs -75 % less.

entries.name: Tilling the Earth
entries.description_text: Increases the chance to trigger Bash by 3 % and increases your expertise by 5 .

entries.name: Quake
entries.description_text: 2 Charges, 8 sec recharge Stomp the ground, dealing Weapon Damage plus 13 + 20% nature SP + 10% AP Nature damage to enemies within 8 yds and reduces their melee and ranged haste by -20 % for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Blessed by the Earth
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Primal Rush and Quake now grant Earth's Rage . Earth's Rage Increases movement speed by 4 % and haste by 2 % for 8 seconds, stacking 5 times.

entries.name: Mountain Hammer
entries.description_text: Throw a hammer at an enemy dealing 49 + 35.5% nature SP + 15.5% AP Physical damage and stunning them for 5 seconds.

entries.name: Bash
entries.description_text: Your auto attacks have a 30 % chance to deal 50 % Weapon Damage and stun them for 1 seconds.

entries.name: Terrasmash
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by your off hand weapon now has a 30 % chance to launch a Geode at the enemy. Geode Hurl an enchanted stone at the target, dealing 173 + 34.9% SP + 8.5% AP Physical Damage and generating 5 Rage.

entries.name: Resources of the Earth
entries.description_text: Critical strikes now grant allies Replenishment . Replenishment Restores 1 % maximum mana every 5 sec to allies within 100 yds for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Stone Soldier
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of your off hand weapon by 30 % and your chance to hit by 3 % .

entries.name: Improved Ursoc's Bellow
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of Ursoc's Bellow by 40 % .

entries.name: Mountain Mover
entries.description_text: Avoiding an attack grants a stack of Mountain Mover for 10 seconds, stacking 5 times. Wildclaw consumes Mountain Mover stacks to cost -10 % less Rage per stack.

entries.name: Earthmother's Protection
entries.description_text: While your Rock Barrier is active, the Rage cost of Hand of the Earthmother is reduced by -50 % .

entries.name: Earthenforged Barrier
entries.description_text: Increases the Armor provided by Rock Barrier by 50 % and it now reduces the cost of your spells and abilities by -25 % for the duration.

entries.name: Seismically Efficient
entries.description_text: Increases the Rage generated from Seismic Crash by 5 and Seismic Spike by 2 .

entries.name: Mountain Thane
entries.description_text: Increases your Stamina by 5 % and causes Earth's Rage to stack 1 additional time.

entries.name: Thane's Guidance
entries.description_text: Auto attacks now reduce the cooldown of Mountain Hammer by -1 sec.

entries.name: Earthbreaker
entries.description_text: Increases your melee haste by 10 % .

entries.name: Unyielding Form
entries.description_text: Increases your parry and dodge chance by 3 % and your Armor contribution from mail and plate by 25 % .

entries.name: Judgement of The Three Hammers
entries.description_text: While active, dealing direct damage has a 20 % chance to hurl 3 hammers over 2 seconds, each dealing 100 + 32.5% SP + 27.8% AP Physical damage. Lasts for 15 seconds. Damage scales with modifiers to Mountain Hammer .

entries.name: Shattering
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by each hammer triggered by Judgment of The Three Hammers now grants you 1 % increased critical strike chance and damage for 10 seconds, stacking up to 10 times.

entries.name: King of the Mountain
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Increases your parry, dodge, and haste rating by 15 % of your Strength.

entries.name: Stone Skin
entries.description_text: Level 30 Passive You are now immune to bleeds and your Geode Barrage and Seismic ability damage now additionally scales with your parry rating.

entries.name: Call of the Mountain
entries.description_text: Level 40 Passive Reaching 5 stacks of Earth's Rage now grants Call of the Mountain . Call of the Mountain Increases your parry chance by 5 % and reduces damage taken by -5 % .

entries.name: Hammer Time!
entries.description_text: Your Mountain Hammer now strikes up to 5 enemies.

entries.name: Rock Solid
entries.description_text: Increases the amount of charges of Rock Barrier by 5 .

entries.name: Quaking Thane
entries.description_text: Striking at least 5 enemies with Quake or casting Mountain Hammer now grants you Thane's Rage . Thane's Rage Increases your attack power by 20 % of your Stamina and your Stamina by 10% of your Strength for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Stonebound
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of Boon of the Turtle and Earth's Rage by 50 % .

entries.name: Spiritbound
entries.description_text: Avoiding attacks now grants you 5 Rage and reduces the cooldown of your Seismic abilities by -1 sec.

entries.name: Fury of the Earthmother
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Geode Barrage or Geodes now generates increased threat and have a 15 % chance to add 1 charge to an active Rock Barrier and extend its duration by 1 sec.

entries.name: Earthen Avatar
entries.description_text: Become an avatar of the earth, increasing your damage dealt and reducing your damage taken by 15 % , and increasing your attack speed by 20 % for 20 seconds. Immune to stuns, roots, and snares for the duration. Usable while stunned.

entries.name: Mountain Fury
entries.description_text: Move the earth, dealing 502 + 65% SP + 17% AP + 125% Stamina Physical damage to up to 12 enemies in a 10 yd frontal cone, pulling them toward you, repeating every 2 sec for 4 seconds. Each time an enemy is pulled toward you, you gain -2 % reduced damage taken for 3 seconds, stacking 5 times.

entries.name: Earthmaker
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Seismic abilities and Quake now reduces the cooldown of Earthen Avatar by -1 sec. Additionally, the cooldown of Seismic abilities is reduced by -3 sec.

entries.name: Earth Destroyer
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Mountain Fury by -20 sec and increases the duration by 4 sec.

entries.name: Primal Guardian
entries.description_text: When Earthen Avatar , Bearskin or Rock Barrier is removed or expires, you now gain 10 % melee haste and parry chance for 15 seconds.

entries.name: Legacy of the Bronzebeards
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of Earthen Avatar by 100 % .

entries.name: Everythings A Nail
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Mountain Hammer by 50 % .

entries.name: Raging Earth
entries.description_text: Your Quake now creates a fissure beneath you that deals an additional 73 + 8% AP Nature damage every 2 sec for 6 seconds.

entries.name: Quakeformer
entries.description_text: Casting Wildclaw and Seismic abilities now has a 25 % chance to refresh a charge of Quake .

entries.name: Kirin Tor Agent
entries.description_text: Casting Eye of the Beholder now rapidly reduces the coldown of your Rune spells and Phase Out for the duration.

entries.name: Expert Elementalist
entries.description_text: Reduces the cast time of Elemental Burst and Glyphic Ruin by 0.5 sec and increases your chance to hit by 3 % .

entries.name: Arcane Glyph
entries.description_text: Using Elemental Burst or Primordial Blast while Flame Glyph is active now grants you Arcane Glyph . Arcane Glyph Unleash : Deals 276 + 18% arcane SP Arcane Damage to up to 0 enemies near the primary target.

entries.name: Concentrated Magic
entries.description_text: Increases your Spirit by 5 % and reduces spell pushback suffered from damaging attacks by 35 % .

entries.name: Cryomagi
entries.description_text: Increases the range of Cryobrand by 10 yds.

entries.name: Eye of the Beholder
entries.description_text: Increases your spell critical strike chance by 25 % for 15 seconds. While active, the damage of your Glyphic Ruin and Primordial Blast is increased by 25 % .

entries.name: Bursting Pulses
entries.description_text: Each weapon enchanted by Weapon Engraving: Earth now reduces the cooldown of Primordial Pulse by -4 sec and increases it's damage by 15 % .

entries.name: Harnessing Leylines
entries.description_text: You now gain a stack of Harnessed Leylines every 1 sec for until cancelled. After the duration, the stacks reset. Harnessed Leylines (Proc) Increases the damage of your Runeblade and Elemental Burst by 3 % , stacking up to 10 times. Additional applications do not refresh the effect.

entries.name: Glyph God
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Glyphic Overload by -15 sec.

entries.name: Frigid Elements
entries.description_text: Increases the spell power scaling of Frigid Blast by 50 % , but the cast time is increased by 1 sec. Additionally, Frigid Fusion now accumulates 10 % more damage on the target.

entries.name: Primordial Salvos
entries.description_text: Unleashing a Glyph now deals an additional 115 + 6% SP damage of the same magic school to all enemies within 8 yds of the target.

entries.name: Ley Magician
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Increases your spell damage by 30 % of Spirit and 10 % of your Intellect, and spell hit rating by 6 % of your Spirit.

entries.name: Unleashed Tattoos
entries.description_text: Level 30 Passive While Runic Tattoos: Fire is active, your Glyphic Ruin now has 30 % increased critical damage. While Runic Tattoos: Water is active, the cost of your Glyphic Ruin is now reduced by -50 % .

entries.name: Unleashed Power
entries.description_text: Level 40 Passive Increases the spell power scaling of your Unleashed Glyphs by 10 % . In addition, dealing damage with Elemental Burst now increases the target's spell damage taken by 10 % for 12 seconds.

entries.name: Frost Glyph
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive Using Elemental Burst and Primordial Blast now grants you Frost Glyph . Frost Glyph Unleash : Deals 437 Frost Damage and slows movement speed by -30 % for 4 seconds.

entries.name: Ley Walker
entries.description_text: Casting or reactivating Warpdagger now removes all root and snare effects from you.

entries.name: Wizardry
entries.description_text: Increases your Intellect by 10 % and increases the mana gained for each point of Intellect by 10 % .

entries.name: Runes of Quickness
entries.description_text: Increases the spell haste of all party and raid members by 3 % . Does not stack with similar effects. In addition, the range of your Glyphic spells is increased by 6 yds.

entries.name: Silencing Rune
entries.description_text: Inscribe a rune in a 5 yd radius at target location that activates after 1 sec, silencing all enemies within for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Terraglyphs
entries.description_text: Increases the chance to trigger Weapon Engraving: Earth by 4 % .

entries.name: Runeslinger
entries.description_text: Direct damage dealt has a 5 % chance to increase your spell haste by 20 % for 5 seconds.

entries.name: Advanced Magi
entries.description_text: Increases the spell power scaling of Elemental Burst by 25 % .

entries.name: Glyphic Destruction
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Glyphic Ruin by 100 % against Frozen targets.

entries.name: Frigid Blast
entries.description_text: Blast an enemy with frigid runic magic, dealing cond(gt(SPFR, SPA), 40+0+SPFR*0.65, 40+0+SPA*0.65) Frost damage and applying Frigid Fusion . Frigid Fusion (Aura) Accumulate 20% of your damage dealt to the target over 6 seconds. After the duration, deal it as Frost Damage to the target.

entries.name: Burned Etching
entries.description_text: While Weapon Engraving: Fire is active, your Elemental Burst now deals 10 % increased damage as Fire damage and your chance to trigger Weapon Engraving: Fire is increased by 5 % .

entries.name: Primordial Power
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Frigid Fusion by 2 sec.

entries.name: Thaumaturgy
entries.description_text: Blast an enemy for 67 + 41% arcane SP + 10% AP Arcane damage and unleash your active Glyph effect.

entries.name: Focusing Crystals
entries.description_text: Increases your Magic Damage dealt by 3 % and allows 30 % of your mana regeneration to continue while in combat.

entries.name: Primordial Pulse
entries.description_text: Inscribe an area with runes for 2 seconds, dealing 23 + 30% SP Elemental Damage every 0 sec to up to 5 enemies inside.

entries.name: Leyline Magician
entries.description_text: Casting Primordial Blast now reduces the cooldown of Primordial Pulse by -5 sec.

entries.name: Cold Elements
entries.description_text: Damage dealt with Elemental Burst and Primordial Blast now has a 20 % chance to reset the cooldown of Frigid Blast and make its next use within 10 seconds instant cast.

entries.name: Phase Rush
entries.description_text: Casting Thaumaturgy now grants you 25 % increased movement speed for 5 seconds.

entries.name: Glyph Seeker
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Primordial Blast and Thaumaturgy by 20 % .

entries.name: Flame Glyph
entries.description_text: Using Elemental Burst or Primordial Blast while Frost Glyph is active now grants you a Flame Glyph . Flame Glyph Unleash : Deals 250 + 65% fire SP Fire Damage and an additional 750 + 30% SP Fire Damage over 6 seconds.

entries.name: Arcane Student
entries.description_text: While Glyphic Overload is active, your Glyphic Ruin is guaranteed to critically strike.

entries.name: Scroll of Magic
entries.description_text: Unleashing a Glyph increases the damage of your Unleashed Glyphs by 5 % for 15 seconds, stacking 3 times.

entries.name: Glyph Master
entries.description_text: Scroll of Magic now also increases the critical damage and critical strike chance of Unleashed Glyphs by 5 % for 15 seconds, stacking 3 times.

entries.name: Glyphic Ruin
entries.description_text: Unleash your active Glyph effect on an enemy and deal 82 + 100% SP Elemental Damage.

entries.name: Leystone Springs
entries.description_text: Your melee auto attacks now have a 15 % chance to restore 49 + 5% AP mana. While Runic Tattoos: Water is active, the mana restored is increased by 200 % .

entries.name: Leyline Disturbance
entries.description_text: Increases melee and ranged haste of party and raid members within 100 yds by 10 % . Does not stack with similar effects. Additionally, the duration of stun effects on you is reduced by -20 % .

entries.name: Elemental Strikes
entries.description_text: Increases your critical strike chance with Fire, Frost, and Nature spells by 3 % and your expertise by 4 .

entries.name: Brandmaster
entries.description_text: Increases your critical strike chance with Runic Brand 's explosion effect by 10 % .

entries.name: Graceful
entries.description_text: Increases your haste by 5 % .

entries.name: Mark of Strength
entries.description_text: Increases the spell power scaling of Primordial Blast by 30 % .

entries.name: Sky and Stone
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Weapon Engraving: Air and Weapon Engraving: Earth now have a 10 % chance to increase the melee attack speed of your next 10 attacks within 10 seconds by 10 % .

entries.name: Forbidden Engraving
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of your Weapon Engravings by 20 % .

entries.name: Runic Brand
entries.description_text: Brand an enemy, dealing 10 + 26% AP Fire damage with each weapon, and marking the enemy for 8 seconds. Marked: Runic Brand Your next Runeblade on the enemy causes a Runic Explosion , dealing an additional 121 + 18.5% AP Spellfire Damage to nearby enemies.

entries.name: Fist of the Ancients
entries.description_text: Smash an enemy and 1 nearby enemy with your rune-engraved fists, dealing 40 + 40% AP Elemental Damage and triggering your Weapon Engraving .

entries.name: Flowing Rivers
entries.description_text: Increases the chance to trigger Replenishment with Runic Tattoos: Water by 10 % and its mana restored by 25 % .

entries.name: Ley Power
entries.description_text: $db

entries.name: Tempo
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Runeblade by 20 % .

entries.name: Volcanic Etching
entries.description_text: Increases the chance to trigger Weapon Engraving: Fire and Weapon Engraving: Earth by 5 % .

entries.name: Wind Surge
entries.description_text: Your Weapon Engraving: Air will now strike 2 additional enemies near its target.

entries.name: Echoes of Eternity
entries.description_text: Your Zenith now has 2 charges. Zenith 2 Charges, 45 sec recharge For 6 seconds, your runic tattoos flare up, increasing your chance to trigger your Weapon Engravings by 100 % .

entries.name: Steam Conjurer
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Weapon Engraving: Earth now has a 5 % chance to cast Wild Steam . Can only occur once every 3 sec. Wild Steam (Transform) Stomp the ground in a 5 yd radius around you and release steam, dealing 128 + 25% AP Frostfire Damage to nearby enemies.

entries.name: Guarding Rune
entries.description_text: Inscribe a defensive rune beneath you in a 10 yd radius, summoning a barrier that causes allies within the radius to take -40 % reduced Magic damage. Lasts 15 seconds.

entries.name: Earth, Wind, and Fire
entries.description_text: Striking at least 5 enemies with Runic Explosion now unleashes Wild Steam . Wild Steam (Transform) Stomp the ground in a 5 yd radius around you and release steam, dealing 128 + 25% AP Frostfire Damage to nearby enemies.

entries.name: Leyborn
entries.description_text: Your Marked: Runic Brand now stacks 3 times.

entries.name: Symbols of Power
entries.description_text: Increases the damage of Fist of the Ancients while you have Weapon Engraving: Fire active by 15 % .

entries.name: Eternal Magic
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Primordial Blast by -4 sec and it now refreshes 3 charges of Runeblade .

entries.name: Branded
entries.description_text: Level 50 Passive Gaining Power Overwhelming now also guarantees your next Runic Brand to critically strike.

entries.name: Uncovered Engravings
entries.description_text: Using Fist of the Ancients now increases your chance to trigger Weapon Engravings by 20 % for 5 sec.

entries.name: Fists of Power
entries.description_text: Engrave your fists for 15 seconds, causing auto attacks to grant Earthen Fists for 10 seconds, increasing melee haste by 3 % and the chance to trigger Weapon Engraving: Earth by 10 % , stacking 5 times.

entries.name: Explosive Runes
entries.description_text: Your Weapon Engraving: Fire now detonates after 2 sec and its critical damage is increased by 10 % .

entries.name: Runic Tempest
entries.description_text: Harness the power of your runic tattoos, resetting the cooldown of Fist of the Ancients and allowing the use of abilities that require Runeshroud and making them able to be cast while moving for 8 seconds.

entries.name: Magic Etchings
entries.description_text: Dealing damage with Primordial Blast now reduces the affected target's armor by -4 % for 12 seconds, stacking 5 times.

entries.name: Runelord
entries.description_text: After activating Zenith , deal 900 + 33% AP Elemental Damage to your target and increase the damage dealt by your Runic Brand and Weapon Engravings by 30 % for 8 seconds.

entries.name: Stone Savant
entries.description_text: While Earthen Fists is active, critical strikes with Weapon Engraving: Earth now causes you to strike twice with your next auto attack.

entries.name: Devastating Flames
entries.description_text: Increases the damage dealt of Weapon Engraving: Fire by 20 % .

entries.name: Granite Shield
entries.description_text: While Runic Tattoos: Earth is active, you now periodically gain Granite Shield every 20 sec. Granite Shield Absorbs 780 + 10% AP + 30% SP damage for 20 seconds.

entries.name: Protective Warding
entries.description_text: Critical damage taken reduces the cooldown of Rune of Guarding by 10 % .

entries.name: Fists of Power
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive Runeblade now strikes your target an additional time for 50 % of the damage dealt with your offhand weapon.

entries.name: Primordial Strength
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Increases your spell damage by 25 % of your attack power, your chance to hit by 3 % of your Agility and your spell hit rating by 3 % of your Agility.

entries.name: Elemental Carvings
entries.description_text: $dd

entries.name: Ancient Warrior
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Fist of the Ancients by -2 sec whenever you use Runeblade or Primordial Blast .

entries.name: Alteration
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of your Runic Tattoos by 25 % .

entries.name: Runebound Surge
entries.description_text: Casting Runeshroud now increases your movement speed by 75 % for 3 seconds.

entries.name: Elemental Mastery
entries.description_text: Damage dealt by Runic Brand now has a 33 % chance to transform your Primordial Blast into a random unique elemental version of itself.

entries.name: Power Overwhelming
entries.description_text: Level 40 Passive Your Runeblade and Primordial Blast now have a 35 % chance to grant you Power Overwhelming , resetting the cooldown of Runic Brand .

entries.name: Elemental Assassin
entries.description_text: Level 20 Passive Increases your spell damage by 20 % of your Agility, your spell critical strike chance by 10 % of your Agility, and your hit rating by 5 % of your Agility.

entries.name: Windsage
entries.description_text: Level 30 Passive Smolder now envelops you in wind, causing your next 3 Runeblades to strike an additional time equal to 30 % of the damage dealt as Nature damage.

entries.name: Elemental Acuity
entries.description_text: Increases all Fire, Frost, and Nature damage dealt by 10 % .

entries.name: Frostburn
entries.description_text: Removes the cast time of Glacial Rune and Permafrost Rune .

entries.name: Windbreaker
entries.description_text: While Weapon Engraving: Air is active, the damage of each strike of your Hurricane is increased by 30 % .

entries.name: Spellblade
entries.description_text: Increases your Agility and Intellect by 5 % .

entries.name: Primordial Fury
entries.description_text: Your runic tattoos flare up for 15 seconds, causing Runeblade to strike up to 5 additional enemies. For the duration, your Runic Tattoos have 100 % increased effectiveness.

entries.name: Riftblade
entries.description_text: Level 10 Passive Your Primordial Blast and Smolder now refresh a charge of Runeblade . In addition, every 3rd Runeblade now restores 388 + 30% AP mana, increased by 20 % while Runic Tattoos: Water is active.

entries.name: Cinderstorm Runes
entries.description_text: Hurricane and Smolder now deal 50 % more damage against enemies below 20% maximum health.

entries.name: Turbulence
entries.description_text: Send out a gust of wind from your weapon that strikes nearby enemies in a 6 yd radius for 200 % Weapon Damage as Nature damage every 1 sec for 3 seconds. While active, you leave behind a Turbulent Spiral every 1 sec for 6 seconds. Turbulent Spiral (Damage) Enemies in the area take an additional 97 + 13.5% AP Nature Damage every 1 sec.

entries.name: Frost Spectre
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance and critical damage of Smolder and Primordial Blast against Frozen targets by 25 % .

entries.name: Unbound Energy
entries.description_text: Increases your critical strike chance by 3 % and your expertise by 4 .

entries.name: Glyph of Disappearance
entries.description_text: Level 40 Passive Your Phase Out can now be used 1 additional time within 15 seconds before incurring a cooldown.

entries.name: Earthen Codex
entries.description_text: When you active a Palm Sigil , you are now guaranteed to critically strike for 20 % increased critical damage for 10 seconds or your next 3 attacks.

entries.name: Magebreaker
entries.description_text: Dealing damage with Hurricane now also reduces the targets Magic damage dealt by -15 % for 8 seconds and dispels 1 harmful magic effect from you with each strike.

entries.name: Battle Engravings
entries.description_text: Removes the cast time from Ley Lock , but reduces its duration by 0.5 sec.

entries.name: Leyfrost
entries.description_text: Critical strikes with Hoarfrost now cause your next spell within 15 seconds to cast as if the target were Frozen .

entries.name: Frozen Earth
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Ice Rune and the stun effect from Palm Sigil: Earth by 1 sec.

entries.name: Spellfire Runes
entries.description_text: Your Runeblade now has a 20 % chance, and Warpdagger a 100 % chance, to reset the cooldown of Smolder , and increase the damage of your next Smolder by 20 % .

entries.name: Smolder
entries.description_text: Ignite your blade and strike an enemy, dealing 140 % Weapon Damage plus 19 Fire Damage.

entries.name: Freezing Codex
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Ice Rune by -20 sec and increases the mana cost by 50 % , but reduces its range by -10 yds.

entries.name: Hoarfrost
entries.description_text: Slash in a frozen fury in front of you, dealing 7 + 33% AP Frost Damage to up to 3 nearby enemies, plus an additional 7 + 33% AP every 3 sec for 21 seconds. Enemies hit by the initial strike are frozen in place for 3 seconds.

entries.name: Runic Invocation
entries.description_text: Increases the critical strike chance of Hoarfrost by 10 % and allows its periodic damage to critically strike.

entries.name: Primordial Echoes
entries.description_text: Your critical strikes dealt with Primordial Blast now have a 40 % chance to strike an additional time.

entries.name: Wind Runes
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Hurricane by 1 sec, allowing it to strike 2 additional times.

entries.name: Melting Runes
entries.description_text: Weapon Engraving: Fire now deals 25 % increased damage against Frozen enemies.

entries.name: Echo Rune
entries.description_text: Mark your current location with an echo rune for 20 seconds. At the end of the duration or upon reactivation, warp back to the marked location and heal for 880 + 150% AP health.

entries.name: Runic Power
entries.description_text: Increases the all damage dealt by party and raid members by 3 % . Does not stack with similar effects. In addition, critical strikes now increase the chance for the target to be critically struck by your spells by 3 % for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Waveforged
entries.description_text: After Hurricane ends, you may now use abilties that require Runeshroud for 5 seconds.

entries.name: Genesis
entries.description_text: Apply a runic brand to an enemy for 8 seconds, accumulating 50% of your damage dealt, and unleashing after 8 seconds as Elemental Damage. When this deals damage, it triggers your Weapon Engraving .

entries.name: Water Runes
entries.description_text: Each strike from Hurricane is now guaranteed to apply Weapon Engraving: Water or Weapon Engraving: Ice to your target while they are active.

entries.name: Hurricane
entries.description_text: Strike an enemy 5 times over 2 seconds, each strike dealing 125 % Weapon Damage as Nature Damage, scaling with level. While striking your target, your chance to dodge is increased by 100 % , but you cannot use any spells or abilities.

entries.name: Phaser
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Phase Out by -30 sec and removes its mana cost.

entries.name: Swift Etching
entries.description_text: After Hurricane ends, your melee attack speed is increased by 15 % and critical strike chance by 10 % for 10 seconds.

entries.name: Elements, Heed My Call!
entries.description_text: Increases the critical damage of Smolder , Hurricane , and Hoarfrost by 15 % .

entries.name: Runic Omen
entries.description_text: Every 3rd cast of Runeblade now deals 30 % increased damage.

entries.name: Elemental Inscription
entries.description_text: Casting Smolder now reduces the cooldown of Primordial Fury by -10 sec and Zenith by -5 sec.

entries.name: Residual Power
entries.description_text: Increases the damage replicated by Weapon Engraving: Air by 15 % .

entries.name: Fracture
entries.description_text: Strike an enemy with frozen fury, dealing 1021 + 100% AP Frost damage and Burning 25 + 35% AP of the target's mana. Damage dealt is guaranteed to critically strike against frozen targets.

entries.name: Surging Slash
entries.description_text: Level 50 Passive Every 3rd cast of Runeblade now transforms your next Runeblade within 15 seconds into Surging Slash . Surging Slash (Transform) Strike an enemy with a rune-infused weapon, dealing 110 % Weapon Damage plus 60 Elemental Damage, bouncing to up to 4 additional enemies, dealing less damage with each bounce.

entries.name: Rift Clones
entries.description_text: Casting Phase Out now summons 10 clones of yourself that run in a random direction for 5 seconds. Rift Clones periodically explode dealing 1 + 19.5% AP Arcane damage to all enemies within 5 yds of them.

entries.name: Unbound
entries.description_text: Reduces the duration of harmful magic and curse effects on you by -20 % .

entries.name: Ley Constitution
entries.description_text: Your Armor contribution from items is increased by 30 % .

entries.name: Warpdagger
entries.description_text: Toss an enchanted dagger forward in a line. Upon reactivation, you instantly teleport to the location of the dagger and deal 124 + 44% SP + 20% AP Elemental Damage to nearby enemies. Usable while stealthed.

entries.name: Ancient Teachings
entries.description_text: Increases the effectiveness of Etching of the Dextrous by 20 % .

entries.name: Power Engraving
entries.description_text: Create a Power Engraving beneath you for 20 seconds, granting 20 % increased Magic Damage dealt and 20 % increased critical strike chance to up to 5 allies standing in the area.

entries.name: Permafrost Rune
entries.description_text: Requires Frozen Target Inscribe a rune of permafrost and unleash it on an enemy, incapacitating them for 40 seconds ( 8 sec vs players). Damage taken will end the effect. Affected enemies are considered Frozen . Using this while in Runeshroud causes it to incur an -80 % reduced cooldown.

entries.name: Nomad's Scroll
entries.description_text: Swapping to Runic Tattoos: Air now instantly dispels 1 movement slowing effect on you.

entries.name: Runic Tattoos
entries.description_text: Reduces the resource costs of your spells and abilities by -10 % .

entries.name: Prismatic Flow
entries.description_text: Phase Out now increases your movement speed by 40 % for 2 seconds.

entries.name: Granite Resolve
entries.description_text: Become hard as stone, reducing your Physical damage taken by -30 % for 8 seconds. Usable while stunned.

entries.name: Speed Rune
entries.description_text: Conjure a path of runes in the direction you are facing for 10 seconds, increasing the movement speed of allies by 70 % . This effect can persist for a short duration after leaving the runic path.

entries.name: Wind Walker
entries.description_text: While Runic Tattoos: Air is active, the cooldown of Rune spells is reduced by 5 % every 5 sec.

entries.name: Magic Feeder
entries.description_text: Your Leyfeed now steals 1 additional magic effect from the target.

entries.name: Primal Rune
entries.description_text: Granite Resolve now reduces damage taken by an additional -10 % .

entries.name: Glacial Rune
entries.description_text: Place a rune at the target location that explodes after 1 sec with frigid magic, dealing 128 + 30% SP Frost damage to enemies inside and freezing them in place for 40 seconds ( 8 sec vs players). Damage caused may interrupt the effect.

entries.name: Runic Affinity
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Zenith by 6 sec.

entries.name: Mind Over Matter
entries.description_text: Increases the duration of Ley Lock by 0.5 sec.

entries.name: Master of Runes
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of your Rune spells by -25 % .

entries.name: Warding Rune
entries.description_text: Engrave anti-magic runes around you, removing all harmful magic effects and causing harmful magic effects to have no duration when cast on you for 6 seconds.

entries.name: Blade Rift
entries.description_text: While stealthed, using Warpdagger now increases your Magic Damage dealt by 10 % for 8 seconds.

entries.name: Primordialism
entries.description_text: Increases your critical strike chance by 10 % for 5 seconds after leaving Runeshroud .

entries.name: Shroudwalker
entries.description_text: Your Warpdagger now incurs no cooldown if used while your Runeshroud is active.

entries.name: Elements of Fury
entries.description_text: Your Palm Sigils now affect 1 additional instance of damage.

entries.name: Runic Breakout
entries.description_text: Abilities requiring Runeshroud can now be used for 3 sec and have no cast time after Runeshroud breaks.

entries.name: Elemental Secrets
entries.description_text: Increases the cooldown of Speed Rune by 30 sec, but it now applies stealth to allies who walk on the pathway for the duration.

entries.name: Mystical Etchings
entries.description_text: Reduces all Fire, Nature, Frost, and Arcane damage taken by -8 % .

entries.name: Warpmaster
entries.description_text: Reduces the cooldown of Warpdagger by -5 sec.

entries.name: Phase Out
entries.description_text: Disappear from sight, entering an improved stealth for 6 seconds and applying Runeshroud .

entries.name: Speedy Attuner
entries.description_text: Increases your movement speed by 8 % and reduces the mana cost of your Runic Tattoos by -25 % .

entries.name: Zenith
entries.description_text: For 6 seconds, your runic tattoos flare up, increasing your chance to trigger your Weapon Engravings by 100 % .

entries.name: Convergence
entries.description_text: For 15 seconds, the next 10 Weapon Engravings you trigger will now deal an additional 348 + 30% SP + 20% AP Elemental Damage.

entries.name: Glyphs of Power
entries.description_text: Your direct damage dealt has a 10 % chance to restore 3 % of your maximum mana.

entries.name: Stone Petroglyph
entries.description_text: While in Runic Tattoos: Earth , you now heal for 3 % of your maximum health every 4 sec and you become immune to knockbacks.

entries.name: Mind Wrath
entries.description_text: Your Ley Lock now interrupts 1 additional enemy near your primary target.

entries.name: Decoder
entries.description_text: Your Elemental Burst and Runeblade now have a 20 % chance to instantly trigger your Weapon Engravings .

entries.name: Sigilist
entries.description_text: After using a Palm Sigil , the duration of your crowd control effects is increased by 20 % . Reduces the cast time of all Palm Sigils by -0.5 sec and increases the duration of your Palm Sigil buffs by 50 % .

entries.name: Master Engraver
entries.description_text: Increases the chance to trigger your Weapon Engravings by 5 % .
